name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: bad news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
I just got off the phone and I have bad news:
I just got off the phone with my finance team and I have bad news: We’re $3,093 behind on our $50,000 PUBLIC end-of-quarter goal and we need at least 3 people from 43614 to rush a donation to help me close the gap. _If we fall short, every Republican in the country will laugh in our faces._ [**_Can I count on you to be 1 of 3 people from 43614 to rush $5, $10, or $15 to help us close the gap in the next 3 hours? Every dollar will go toward taking back the Senate. Please, donate ASAP >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116296069/573092271/246949951?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.09.30_EOQ-Update_B2_F1_S1_C1_90AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YThlZDg5NC01OTllLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BW0_3V4qo3nvenj6dCgzsCLkq8AHyojG3MFw_Mi-ER8=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116296073/573092301/246949951?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.09.30_EOQ-Update_B2_F1_S1_C1_90AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YThlZDg5NC01OTllLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BW0_3V4qo3nvenj6dCgzsCLkq8AHyojG3MFw_Mi-ER8=) | | [DONATE >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116296077/573092306/246949951?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.09.30_EOQ-Update_B2_F1_S1_C1_90AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YThlZDg5NC01OTllLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BW0_3V4qo3nvenj6dCgzsCLkq8AHyojG3MFw_Mi-ER8=)

Trump and the GOP are wreaking havoc on our country:
* They made the biggest **Medicaid cuts** in HISTORY
* **Social Security** is in GRAVE danger leaving our seniors in jeopardy
* And **Jimmy Kimmel and Stephen Colbert** being yanked from the air for criticising the President are clear signs they’re TRAMPLING on free speech

Flipping the Senate is our best chance to stop Donald Trump, but I can’t do it without your help.
[**_I wouldn’t be asking if it wasn’t so important. I need you to rush ANYTHING you can spare before 11:59 PM tonight to make sure we hit this critical goal before my numbers go PUBLIC for every Republican in the country to see. Donate now >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116296082/573092310/246949951?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.09.30_EOQ-Update_B2_F1_S1_C1_90AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YThlZDg5NC01OTllLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BW0_3V4qo3nvenj6dCgzsCLkq8AHyojG3MFw_Mi-ER8=)

name: Voter Action Project HQ
subject: The most meaningful and precious right we have
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
We MUST stop this bill in the Senate and more like it but we need to unite and fight now, before opponents of voting rights in the Senate start checking voter suppression bills off their to-do list.
Why? Listen to Senator Richard Blumenthal of Connecticut:
(Image of Richard Blumenthal speaking on the Senate floor) [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/SAVE_RB.jpg]
RUSH $25 or more right now to stop the SAVE Act, defend our right to vote, and stop opponents of voting rights from destroying our democracy >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=093025_4&amount=25]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
The Senate is standing up to stop the SAVE Act in its tracks, folks.
Defenders of voting rights know that non-citizen voting is already illegal, extremely rare, and that this bill is written in a way that could disenfranchise millions of eligible women across the country. Here's Colorado Senator Michael Bennet:
(Image of Michael Bennet speaking on the Senate floor) [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/SAVE_MB.jpg]
Opponents of voting rights in Congress -- and in the White House -- favor this bill because they know it could suppress millions of eligible voters, changing the composition of the electorate and potentially empowering them and their party for years to come.
Please, Team, join these brave Senators today. Fuel our efforts to stop this dangerous legislation with $25 or whatever you can and ensure millions of women's voices continue to be heard in our elections >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=093025_4&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=093025_4&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=093025_4&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=093025_4&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=093025_4&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=093025_4&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=093025_4&amount=35]
We know the SAVE Act was fast-tracked by opponents of voting rights to be in place before the next election, folks. This bill is a stunning assault on our fundamental right to vote, and we can not afford to let this anti-democratic legislation become law.
If you missed it: This bill would force every voter to present proof of citizenship to register, either a passport or a birth certificate that matches their current first and last name -- something millions of eligible American women don’t have. And that’s the point.
The bill would also obliterate popular methods of voter registration for all voters, including:
* Registration by mail

* 3rd party voter registration drives

* Online voter registration in states that allow it

* Automatic voter registration
Some estimates say that this bill could disenfranchise anywhere from 11 million to 65 million eligible Americans , especially women and those who live in under-resourced communities.
“ There’s never been an attack on voting rights out of Congress like this ,” said Alexander Keyssar, a professor of History and Social Policy at the Harvard Kennedy School, and a leading historian of voting rights. “ It’s always been the federal government trying to keep states in check on voting rights, for the most part. ”
The consequences of a bill like this passing would be simply catastrophic for our democracy. Chip in with $25 or whatever you can today to stop the SAVE Act and other voter suppression bills from becoming law >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=093025_4&amount=25]
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=093025_4&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=093025_4&amount=20]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.

P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/FQb7Rbo110qLPmSvMAn63Q2?unsubscribedata=tvnNrr1%2FzIcRex%2BOx1ljE0te3NcoANHBcPCBGGUukdO1NYg1KkRi1%2B0yZfLbvzSS3FKiYMw%2BwFlsD8CnSqDtVO%2Fv6UEpKajvfoj7bH0qnEPqOPj54%2Ftqp6dDHPaZp9W%2FRXfQVO3E86r4EgKCHfqD7GmdtMw9kdi7LgaZkQQBvc09bPPiMT4nGt0eFizWNv7v1O%2FjT%2FPPdRB21fOUZ57wPhCeOvSRgIHIwz0HpVYmYk8yhoVwhUD7okrlCmtHrCO%2Bavdoekw8%2Fe190Hs1QKyKb99Kh50kL3%2FlpFLxKKHOsbeSQN20ayum0BWsZbUNLUoI5TtrSP3ylj9zY37hh%2BpJHPGAQQBUbfWFfDHF8P2ojAqKL5bwmC0ti1RMvtv0t643rNZeGX8%2BHV7MGYjn0zSV%2BGQrWf8uggadt7GSvwJ%2BUXc%3D .

name: Ryan Mackenzie
subject: Midnight Deadline — Now More Important Than Ever
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mackenzie For Congress]()
body:
| | | | | [|
---](https://mackenzieforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=62252a4538e3fe848298033c5&id=dc49102e62&e=5ccada9200)
|
---
| | | | | | Dear Friend,Tonight at **midnight** is the end of the fundraising quarter - a deadline that the political pundits use to handicap the race. With your help - and contribution RIGHT AWAY – we can raise the money we need before midnight to stop the liberal press and their allies as they work to attack our campaign.Tonight at **midnight** is also the deadline to avert a government shutdown forced by radical Democrats in the U.S. Senate looking to force more than $1 trillion in new spending on American taxpayers.If that shutdown occurs, the liberal press will once again use it as an excuse to attack me! And they won’t let the fact that I actually voted for a clean funding resolution that focuses on Americans’ agenda stop them!You can help here, too! **By simply telling your friends and neighbors the facts** – that I voted for a common-sense, bipartisan bill to keep the government open, to control spending, and to ensure vital services for our seniors, servicemembers, law enforcement, and more – **we can counter the liberal media.** My position is clear: keep the government open, protect those who serve, and continue to work for the spending controls and tax relief needed to help our families and job creators. It’s sad. Just as we are getting things back under control after the Biden-Harris spending spree that drove inflation through the roof, Chuck Schumer and the Senate Democrats want to put us right back where we started. name: Heather G.
subject: I have a question for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Read before tonight
| Hi friend, it’s Heather from the Voter Protection Project. Before tonight’s end-of-quarter deadline, I have a very important favor to ask of you:

[Are you able to chip in just $1 to our grassroots powered movement to take back the House, flip the Senate, and stop Trump in 2026? $1 will allow you to claim your Democratic Supporter Membership card & fight back against MAGA. Chip in $1 today »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94439?t=6&akid=21374%2E878179%2EzyIyJW) | [LAST CHANCE TO CLAIM YOUR DEMOCRATIC MEMBERSHIP FOR THIS QUARTER: CHIP IN $1 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94439?t=7&akid=21374%2E878179%2EzyIyJW)
---
We wouldn’t normally ask for just $1, but tonight’s deadline is MASSIVE and donations are plunging! We want to make sure that loyal Democrats like you haven’t thrown in the towel in the race to flip the House and end Trump’s MAGA trifecta.

**Democratic Supporter Memberships give us the fuel we need to ensure we can limit the damage Donald Trump gets away with — _it’s that simple!_**

[With Trump ramping up his billionaire-funded war chest, we need all the help we can get. Will you chip in just $1 to claim your 2025 Democratic Supporter Membership card so we can flip critical swing seats, take back the House, and end Trump’s trifecta? »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94439?t=8&akid=21374%2E878179%2EzyIyJW)
[LAST CHANCE TO CLAIM YOUR DEMOCRATIC MEMBERSHIP FOR THIS QUARTER: CHIP IN $1 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94439?t=9&akid=21374%2E878179%2EzyIyJW)
---
Thank you SO much,

Heather G.
Executive Director
The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=21374%2E878179%2EzyIyJW). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=21374%2E878179%2EzyIyJW).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=21374%2E878179%2EzyIyJW) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=10&akid=21374%2E878179%2EzyIyJW). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=21374%2E878179%2EzyIyJW)

name: Ashley from Team Taylor
subject: Why tonight’s deadline matters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Taylor for Justice
body:
We’re just hours away from the end of the month, and we still need a few more contributions to hit our fundraising goal.
# [](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/18?refcode=em20250930-643&t=1&akid=647%2E294397%2E4ElsHY)
Hey there,
It’s Ashley, Judge Chris Taylor’s campaign manager.
We’re just hours away from the end of the month, and we still need a few more contributions to hit our digital fundraising goal. [**Can you chip in a few bucks before midnight?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_jct_20250930_2_ak?amount=10&refcode=em20250930-643&refcode2=647_294397_4ElsHY&akid=647%2E294397%2E4ElsHY)
Reaching our goal isn’t just about numbers on a spreadsheet — it’s about making sure we have the resources to connect with voters, respond to dark-money attacks, and build the grassroots momentum it’ll take to win.
And I’ll be honest: I would love to be able to report that this grassroots team stepped up and delivered tonight.
Chris is working hard every day to ensure fairness and justice for everyone in Wisconsin, and I know it would mean a lot to show her that we’re right there with her.
Not to mention, right-wing groups have a history of pouring tens of millions of dollars into Wisconsin to boost their preferred candidates. **If this election is anything like the last judicial race — _the most expensive in our nation’s history_ — we’ll need every resource possible to fight back.**
That’s why tonight’s deadline matters. [**Please, pitch in what you can before midnight so we can reach our $100,000 digital fundraising goal:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_jct_20250930_2_ak?amount=10&refcode=em20250930-643&refcode2=647_294397_4ElsHY&akid=647%2E294397%2E4ElsHY)

Thanks so much,
Ashley

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: An Arizona legislator just said I should be “tried, convicted, and hanged”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
I’ve been in politics long enough to have a thick skin, but this is different.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250930-5487-footer&t=1&akid=5487%2E420207%2EaedG3J)
Peter, this is beyond unacceptable.
**An elected member of the Arizona State House of Representatives just called for me to be “tried, convicted, and hanged.”**
[](https://www.pramilaforcongress.com/the-resistance-lab?utm_source=em20250930-5487)
I’ve been in politics long enough to have a thick skin, but this is different.
This wasn’t just an attack on me. It was a call for violence against _all of us_ who are organizing to defend our democracy and give people a voice. And it didn’t just come from some anonymous internet troll, but from an elected official — calling for my execution publicly.
We have to call this what it is: an attempt to silence our nonviolent organizing and make anyone afraid to protest against the Trump administration and the MAGA agenda.
**But Peter, I refuse to be silenced.** The irony is that our Resistance Lab trainings are rooted in the principles of nonviolent resistance. They give people a means to effect change _without_ resorting to the exact sort of violent escalation that this elected official is calling for.
That’s why I will keep teaching and keep organizing — because nonviolent resistance is the most powerful tool we have to defeat authoritarianism, and it’s our best chance to build a democracy rooted in justice, dignity, and care for all people.
Over 15,000 people in all 50 states have participated in just 5 months — this success is exactly why they’re targeting us. So let’s show them we’re not backing down.
[**Click here to sign up for a Resistance Lab training today. Our next training will be a special session on immigration on October 19th, and we have trainings scheduled for November 16th and December 14th, too.**](https://www.pramilaforcongress.com/the-resistance-lab?utm_source=em20250930-5487)
**[Sign Up To Join The Resistance Lab](https://www.pramilaforcongress.com/the-resistance-lab?utm_source=em20250930-5487)**
We can’t let threats of violence scare us into silence. Together, we will save our democracy.
In solidarity,
Pramila Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250930-5487-footer&t=2&refcode2=5487_420207_aedG3J&akid=5487%2E420207%2EaedG3J)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

name: Tim Walz
subject: I’m not quitting until the job is done
disclaimer_text: Paid for By Heartland Patriots
body:
We have some unfinished business to attend to.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95848?refcode=em20250930-9481&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9481%2E614464%2ERRm42j)
Peter,
We have some unfinished business to attend to — and as you know, I’m not going to quit on a job before it’s done.
We can be damn proud of the progress we’ve made to build the good life. We’ve got more kids in Pre-K and fewer in poverty, helped ensure families have dignified care for their loved ones, strengthened our roads and bridges, and provided more jobs with better pay and the strongest labor protections in the country — delivering real results that improve lives.
**We’ve built one of the friendliest places to start or grow a business, one of the free-est states to live your life however you choose, and the best place to raise a child in the whole country.**
But the next chapter of the story still remains to be written. And the truth is Donald Trump and his fellow MAGA extremists would love nothing more than to tear apart what we’ve built.
I promise you this: I’ll never stop fighting to protect you from Trump’s corruption and cruelty. And I’ll continue working to deliver security, opportunity, and freedom to everyone. But I can’t do it alone.
**[To help ensure we continue down the path of growth, progress, and neighborly goodwill, will you split a donation between Heartland Patriots and my campaign by chipping in any amount today?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95848?refcode=em20250930-9481&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9481%2E614464%2ERRm42j)**

body:

---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116296965/573100208/-877057620?sourceid=1057092&refcode=WUEFE971_20250930_ERMCloser_PL_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMWI4ZTExNC01YjllLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vWidCKG8UWbY7oLg_mz-KrMu0JOIUcjo4iErJsUf0lY=) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116296967/573100230/-140265690?sourceid=1057092&refcode=WUEFE971_20250930_ERMCloser_PL_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMWI4ZTExNC01YjllLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vWidCKG8UWbY7oLg_mz-KrMu0JOIUcjo4iErJsUf0lY=) Peter,

After decades in this fight, I've seen it all. I remember countless moments when pundits and experts said we couldn't win, when the establishment dismissed us, when the odds looked impossible.

And time after time, we proved them wrong. We turned "impossible" into inevitable.

[**2025 and 2026 will be no different — but only if we have the resources to compete and win. Our End-of-Quarter match deadline ends at midnight tonight. Please, don't wait:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116296968/573100240/-877057620?sourceid=1057092&refcode=WUEFE971_20250930_ERMCloser_PL_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMWI4ZTExNC01YjllLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vWidCKG8UWbY7oLg_mz-KrMu0JOIUcjo4iErJsUf0lY=) | [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116296970/573100250/-140265690?sourceid=1057092&refcode=WUEFE971_20250930_ERMCloser_PL_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMWI4ZTExNC01YjllLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vWidCKG8UWbY7oLg_mz-KrMu0JOIUcjo4iErJsUf0lY=)
---
Here's what I know: our victories never happen by accident. They happen because supporters like you step up when it matters most. Because together we can build the infrastructure, recruit the candidates, and mobilize the resources to win — even when everything is stacked against us. That's been the story of EMILYs List for 40 years and counting.

The road ahead won't be easy. We're facing well-funded opponents and tough districts where every single vote will matter. But that's exactly when EMILYs List does our best work. Where others see obstacles, we see opportunity.

[**Will you help us pull off our next incredible victory? clean_body: This is your last chance to double your impact before midnight. | = = Peter, After decades in this fight, I've seen it all. I remember countless moments when pundits and experts said we couldn't win, when the establishment dismissed us, when the odds looked impossible. And time after time, we proved them wrong. We turned "impossible" into inevitable. = | = Here's what I know: our victories never happen by accident. They happen because supporters like you step up when it matters most. Because together we can build the infrastructure, recruit the candidates, and mobilize the resources to win — even when everything is stacked against us. That's been the story of EMILYs List for 40 years and counting. The road ahead won't be easy. We're facing well-funded opponents and tough districts where every single vote will matter. But that's exactly when EMILYs List does our best work. Where others see obstacles, we see opportunity. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = With determination and hope, Ellen R. name: Laura Friedman (personal)
subject: Building the Democratic operation
body:
Hi friend, glad I could catch you. I promise I’ll be quick –
We’re facing a critical end-of-quarter deadline, and I could really use your support.
Can I count on you to chip in $3 before you log off to help us close September strong?
Here’s a good link: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lf-q3-2025](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116297296/573102876/-1623651544?refcode=em-9.30.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTE1ODRkYzYtNWI5ZS1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=_jyMNvPR2Xwtfv5qWnTTBy_glav1f15FPbr7a2JNjzE=)**
Congressional races are very expensive, and by efficiently meeting our goals we can help expand the battlefield to include Democrats running in crucial swing seats.
Because the simple truth is if we want to fight for Democratic values in Congress, we need resources. And a lot of our funds come from emails like this!
This is our chance to set the tone about the type of leadership we want to see in Congress, but that depends on your support:
So friend, if you can, please consider sending in a donation before midnight to help us build the operation that can bring accountability back to Washington and counter Republican attacks on our healthcare, economy and Constitution.
Here’s that link again: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lf-q3-2025](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116297297/573102877/-1623651544?refcode=em-9.30.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTE1ODRkYzYtNWI5ZS1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=_jyMNvPR2Xwtfv5qWnTTBy_glav1f15FPbr7a2JNjzE=)**
Thanks for your consideration – and for caring about Democracy.
Best,
Laura

Laura Friedman for Congress
PO Box 27296
Los Angeles, CA 90027
United States
We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/C_LAPt2gvkyS7ttbOCAOdg2?unsubscribedata=IVz2SQ7vnEaDatJwr%2FDPIFTsTRLqDiD%2FHENv2P8IaIePOs3fgZ7JHh%2B%2F%2B1ZzDYtX4p1diYXZh8G%2BwwMylwQSrNXKP4H9JH%2BgrNdIMOwlhx8qKHOE6dEi%2B4p7FCXtrFqcDzP2HGbUXQ3plRlyhkbAoBDuE5hx2XgiCuUfjGSHNxGwlVPznf%2BPVrq4MnO4jfj3x9aMuK%2Bn7CtzFjgi0yOAl59PJ%2BfT5XEV%2B4B8aYK%2B55d5agTrSg9NazGBRVbP%2Fr6uh0l8JG2f8skmwpbzo3n3xJZiee7xeYyieOKttjRPmTlhsfqw3tw3aaKtDIYQcjDv6GOEaZmT0xV5yBW5BX5%2BD4MUBH4sZR8Bwas0geSAA%2FQR0w71o%2F56FjS0%2FWIHaT71NPFisdZLdEar8oN3cDKSNVctJCiKDTbrGfa3lxUA9qB7o3Y0elZl3qvB%2FzKtGeTp).
clean_body: Hi friend, glad I could catch you. I promise I’ll be quick – We’re facing a critical end-of-quarter deadline, and I could really use your support. Can I count on you to chip in $3 before you log off to help us close September strong? Here’s a good link: = Congressional races are very expensive, and by efficiently meeting our goals we can help expand the battlefield to include Democrats running in crucial swing seats. Because the simple truth is if we want to fight for Democratic values in Congress, we need resources. And a lot of our funds come from emails like this! This is our chance to set the tone about the type of leadership we want to see in Congress, but that depends on your support: So friend, if you can, please consider sending in a donation before midnight to help us build the operation that can bring accountability back to Washington and counter Republican attacks on our healthcare, economy and Constitution. Here’s that link again: = Thanks for your consideration – and for caring about Democracy. Best, Laura Laura Friedman for Congress PO Box 27296 Los Angeles, CA 90027 United States We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to .

name: Roy Cooper
subject: Urgent request as we face this FEC deadline
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
We don’t want to show any weakness.
[**Our campaign’s first FEC end-of-quarter filing deadline is just hours away. Split a donation of any size between our team and Deb Haaland to help meet our goal before time runs out.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250930_2_split?refcode=em20250930-4765&refcode2=4765_400544_A7h2Dp&akid=4765%2E400544%2EA7h2Dp)
---
Hello,
I’m reaching out about our upcoming filing deadline — the first of our campaign so far — but I wanted to make sure you had some important context:
**Nationwide, Republicans and GOP-aligned groups have been outraising Democrats in the lead-up to next year’s midterm elections, and our election in North Carolina is expected to become the most expensive U.S. Senate race in history.**
My GOP opponent and his allies will be forced to make spending decisions they may not want to make based on what we can raise now. With all that in mind, it’s even more important for us to show our financial strength in this report.
This is the most consequential Senate election of 2026, and if we win here, Democrats have the chance to take back the majority and stop the far-right’s extreme agenda. Meeting our fundraising goals is key to our chances of success in this toss-up race.
But we have a long way to go to hit our end-of-quarter target, and we’re running out of time to get there.
[**We can’t risk allowing my GOP opponent to outraise us, so I need your help right away. Does a contribution, split between our campaign and Deb Haaland, fit in your budget today?** ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250930_2_split?refcode=em20250930-4765&refcode2=4765_400544_A7h2Dp&akid=4765%2E400544%2EA7h2Dp)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250930_2_split?amount=5&refcode=em20250930-4765&refcode2=4765_400544_A7h2Dp&akid=4765%2E400544%2EA7h2Dp)**
Thank you,
Roy Cooper
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20250930-2&t=1&refcode2=4765_400544_A7h2Dp&akid=4765%2E400544%2EA7h2Dp)**
[](https://deb4gov.us/text-me)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=2&akid=4765%2E400544%2EA7h2Dp)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?t=3&akid=4765%2E400544%2EA7h2Dp)

Email us: [info@debhaaland.com](mailto:info@debhaaland.com)
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO

Patriot,

As the senior U.S. Senator from the great state of Iowa, I keep my finger on the pulse of the political landscape of our state.

_There are not many things that surprise me..._

Which is why I was so deeply disturbed by the shocking results of the recent special election here:

[ **And now, we also have to defend a newly OPEN seat in my state that could tip the balance of power for President Trump’s Senate majority in the midterms.** ](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=6d68e9fd4dfa4cd89d85bf7cd68e3171&_e=W4a5xmfmUZo9kKpmgGuaDVC3ulsYPsrUp0VqgfIaW05BD75ZP-jdBWhTJVmiiXRQP0EA2aCCKoQZgya70qkQAwBIIdLt8bU0qLRUxbFnzpBR1SB15iRsNwgxNyU5v8euVLxDOQFXzufT8AE5DOvN7BlheHWNMaHS9xKtdkT8yGnAYQvGSUA-2jCMHNJv1crgkVfgsi7EFFDKTXZD_qVj-3gDcYDQbOkFi16UxYOebU21FtmQbR5N0shLF43ZhnYDDHQHtFiI0iaNMMPqsCJXYI96BS6xl5P-RLcKzNN7pbtFwPzVPV19sti5QK0yOMrTJdRyD6GwBO6RsrV3y6rrNK9N1D7wQE4B96Zf3L5E41KqED_NVPPeqqd53go37WAf9EOoh0OiIpTmhTucrPiPDum2mpsgiJv0PEaMQOh5Du0iwjqd7XS8pHmr4pzyEbROB0_Rbk4EvXh7DTRCjhtMTUNvreuN6z3FRDhYYcaJleM9drbo66YinUiaJmqfao-U9oZEqG3s1BISJmtI3LQw1oNAbf-gHk0JH_sAW8tf9b70QG06_uBbSNdlBTOxAJTMpYVA6uOUwtVMiCowCajv5UdtFfLohd5F3AfdiF02vER7V2qc8qmIOyu93pmLQD0U6QdDpb3e0gNDEPY41Ib0_Um1Xvw8AOlV671vnxaoHlNEQrN2r15Xs8xQ_8SUOFeGMm2TtgpaWd09O_LxUYtJrLdCjlyw9bYcS4LRoXEY_CcI5mpk8i_Vj_0b1L4VNBWzSueV88Mumf-Zv_8Djn1BDiZhNM1jrX3KZgNc5M7hh26NAW3buFAiDapcsbK5kbW3b54A2GG1qD1mwTdxe7QCZ9MWLx4MKHesoOQsLULC1q-CKsofRBkmxFLKz1mzKETOyWrjepWHAwygHWf1lTE3Jsuc-qqx8Ls4I-cyIw4O8BA%3D)

But here’s the silver lining: The Democrats didn’t win on the issues. They won simply because they turned out a much larger percentage of their voters than Republicans did.

In fact, that’s a pattern we’ve been seeing all year...

clean_body: Democrats just pulled off an upset in my home state of Iowa. | Patriot, As the senior U.S. Senator from the great state of Iowa, I keep my finger on the pulse of the political landscape of our state. There are not many things that surprise me... Which is why I was so deeply disturbed by the shocking results of the recent special election here: That’s right: I won’t sugarcoat things -- But here’s the silver lining: The Democrats didn’t win on the issues. They won simply because they turned out a much larger percentage of their voters than Republicans did. In fact, that’s a pattern we’ve been seeing all year... | | Per Cook Political Report: “Republicans just can’t count on Trump’s more peripherally-engaged voters to show up when Trump isn’t on the ballot. If those numbers hold true for the midterms, it will be a disaster for Republicans. We could LOSE even here in Iowa and be forced to hand power in the Senate to radical, far-Left Democrats. It would truly be a nightmare scenario for our country. This all proves just how important the GOP’s 2025 Voter Verification Initiative is for the midterms, Patriot. We need to ensure we have a fully, 100% VERIFIED voter file so we can get every last Republican voter out to the polls! body:
How much we raise matters a lot. But it's about more than that. It's about the message we send.

Hi Peter, it's Abigail Spanberger. I wanted you to hear this from me personally:
_Tonight's end-of-quarter deadline is the biggest one yet for our campaign._
And yes, how much we raise matters a lot. But it's about more than that. _It's about the message we send._
We have momentum on our side right now. But that could change once our latest fundraising numbers become public.
If they're strong, we'll be able to continue turning out voters and laying the groundwork to flip Virginia blue. If we fall short, it gives Winsome Earle-Sears and National Republicans an opening to bring Trump's agenda to our Commonwealth.
**That's why I feel the responsibility not just to win, but to win big.**
[__**So, I'm asking one last time: Will you contribute your first $25 before midnight and join our grassroots donor list?**__](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116297404/573104274/830632682?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-09-30_4&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2JiYTUzY2MtNWI5ZS1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=1zaL1mINHbJtWKrdeyAtpDt0gueLLrK3MJWNgjSECRQ=)

clean_body: How much we raise matters a lot. But it's about more than that. It's about the message we send. Hi Peter, it's Abigail Spanberger. I wanted you to hear this from me personally: Tonight's end-of-quarter deadline is the biggest one yet for our campaign. And yes, how much we raise matters a lot. But it's about more than that. It's about the message we send. We have momentum on our side right now. But that could change once our latest fundraising numbers become public. If they're strong, we'll be able to continue turning out voters and laying the groundwork to flip Virginia blue. If we fall short, it gives Winsome Earle-Sears and National Republicans an opening to bring Trump's agenda to our Commonwealth. That's why I feel the responsibility not just to win, but to win big. = = Thank you, Abigail By submitting your phone number you're agreeing to receive periodic text messages from the Spanberger for Governor campaign. Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? _

clean_body: You're my number one recruit | Peter, I've got a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity for you, but you've got to act quickly. As a former Hall-of-Fame College Football Coach, I know the key to a successful football program is building an All-American roster of players I can depend on. The same applies to winning an election.That 's why I'm looking for 50 supporters who'll join my team who I can depend on each and every month. | The Left already thinks they'll beat me. They want to turn Alabama into the California of the South, and they're prepared to DUMP MILLIONS into this race to make it happen. This will be the toughest season I've ever led a team through, but I'm hoping to make a repeat of my perfect 2004 13-0 season. Thank you, Coach Tuberville Meet Coach Tuberville: Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces. In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud. In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson. In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others. In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime. Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? PAID FOR BY TUBERVILLE FOR GOVERNOR, INC PO Box 43124 Birmingham, AL 35243 Copyright (C) 2025 Tuberville for Governor, Inc, All rights reserved.

name: Patty's iPhone
subject: Sorry to email so late, but this is important
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
| | |
---
Peter, I'm sorry to email you so late, but I'm still hard at work trying to get Republicans to work with us to keep the government open and prevent Americans' health care premiums from skyrocketing, **and my team just let me know we're still $6,819 short of our critical end-of-quarter goal. **
To be completely honest, this would be a really terrible time to fall short. Republicans have engineered a health care crisis, and they'd rather shut down the government than compromise with Democrats who are trying to solve it.
**We need a SURGE of grassroots resources if we're going to hold them accountable and work to flip the Senate blue next November. That's why I'm urgently asking:[Will you please rush $5, or anything at all, to close the gap on our $30,000 goal before the FEC's quarterly deadline at midnight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116297824/573111300/-145648726?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk553-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjZiYTliZi01ZDllLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eZGHffTKmdxPJDDrM10oVyOxOKtd0GOsI3YzZ_gN9n8=)**
Thanks in advance for your help,

Patty

clean_body: | = This is it. At midnight tonight, we’ll close the books for the quarter and report our fundraising numbers to the FEC. = Election experts are calling CA-22 one of the most competitive races in America. If we flip this seat, it unlocks our path to a Democratic House majority. Republicans know it, and their mega-donors are flooding the Central Valley with cash to keep David Valadao in Congress. By tomorrow morning, they’ll be scouring our report to see if this grassroots campaign has what it takes to win (guess what - it does). This is a corporate-free campaign – no corporate PACs, no billionaires. This movement is powered by people who are ready for real change. But I can’t do it alone. I need you with me in these final hours. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = This is the most competitive race in the country. name: KT Coleman, NDRC
subject: There’s so much at stake in Pennsylvania and Virginia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
We can’t lose sight of these critical state-level elections that will determine the future of our democracy.
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116297885/573112740/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA1NmJhOWJmLTVkOWUtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=L9kyHOCpbXs7AsgQbud7MNp-jauYuX084Ps_2y4dyyU=&emci=34be7f06-3f9e-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=056ba9bf-5d9e-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=8431045)
---

I’ll cut right to the chase, Peter: We’re in the thick of election season in Pennsylvania and Virginia. We’re working tirelessly to push back on Republicans’ attempts to redraw maps in states from Texas to Utah. **But we can’t lose sight of these critical state-level elections that will have an outsized impact on the future of our democracy. **
* In **Pennsylvania** , control of the State Supreme Court will determine whether there’s a backstop against attacks on voting rights and egregiously gerrymandered maps. There are three seats at stake on the Pennsylvania Supreme Court, and the Republican Party has pledged to spend “seven figures” on judicial elections across the country this year — evidence of just how critical these races are.

* In **Virginia** , we’re fighting to elect Democracy Defenders to the Governor’s Mansion and in the House of Delegates. Ensuring Virginia has pro-democracy champions like Abigail Spanberger at the helm will be crucial in the fight for fair representation in the years ahead.

[**With so much at stake in these elections in just over six weeks, we’re asking — will you pitch in a donation to help the NDRC elect Democracy Defenders in key state-level elections across the country?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116297886/573112741/1110433579?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_2025ElectionUpdateNOR_email_20250930-NDRC-Tier1-2025ElectionUpdateNOR_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250930-NDRC-Tier1-2025ElectionUpdateNOR_&utm_campaign=2025ElectionUpdateNOR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA1NmJhOWJmLTVkOWUtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=L9kyHOCpbXs7AsgQbud7MNp-jauYuX084Ps_2y4dyyU=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: We can’t lose sight of these critical state-level elections that will determine the future of our democracy. | I’ll cut right to the chase, Peter: We’re in the thick of election season in Pennsylvania and Virginia. We’re working tirelessly to push back on Republicans’ attempts to redraw maps in states from Texas to Utah. But we can’t lose sight of these critical state-level elections that will have an outsized impact on the future of our democracy. In Pennsylvania , control of the State Supreme Court will determine whether there’s a backstop against attacks on voting rights and egregiously gerrymandered maps. There are three seats at stake on the Pennsylvania Supreme Court, and the Republican Party has pledged to spend “seven figures” on judicial elections across the country this year — evidence of just how critical these races are. In Virginia , we’re fighting to elect Democracy Defenders to the Governor’s Mansion and in the House of Delegates. Ensuring Virginia has pro-democracy champions like Abigail Spanberger at the helm will be crucial in the fight for fair representation in the years ahead. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Thank you, KT Coleman, Deputy Campaigns Director National Democratic Redistricting Committee = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. name: GOTV PAC
subject: What a Yasshole…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09042025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09042025&amount=25]
Peter ,
A conservative political machine in Pennsylvania is flooding mailboxes with “incredibly dishonest” ads urging voters to reject the retention of three Democratic leaning state Supreme Court justices. These mailers claim the Court gerrymandered Pennsylvania’s districts to help Democrats win. The truth? That gerrymandered map was drawn by Republicans back in 2011 -- and the Court struck it down because it violated the state constitution.
But facts don’t matter to GOP power brokers like billionaire donor Jeff Yass. He's willing to mislead voters if it helps him grab control of Pennsylvania’s Supreme Court. His plan is simple: boot these justices now, then run partisan candidates in 2027 to tilt the court in their favor.
We cannot let that happen. If Republicans succeed, they’ll use the courts to roll back voting rights, rig districts, and greenlight attacks on workers, women, and families.
This is why GOTV PAC exists -- to fight back against the lies, expose the truth, and mobilize voters before November 4. But taking on billionaires like Yass requires people power.
Will you chip in to help us push back against GOP lies and turn out voters in Pennsylvania this November? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09302025]

Learn more at: gotv.vote [https://www.gotv.vote/]

body:
I know I’ve been emailing a lot lately, but I wanted to drop one last reminder about my third End of Quarter deadline of 2025.

We’re still a couple thousand short of our goal, and these deadlines are very real. If we don't hit our goal, Republican PACs and far-right billionaires will see it in the public FEC reports, and they’ll think we’re giving up – that we’re not strong enough to win with grassroots support alone.

So yeah, the money matters. But it’s really about what it can do:

- Power our organizing efforts
- Fight back against far-right billionaires trying to buy elections
- Keep me in Congress fighting for us—because we're not done here, not by a long shot

Every dollar makes a difference in a grassroots campaign like mine. Can you pitch in a few dollars before our End of Quarter deadline at midnight?

Here’s the best link to give: http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/lx41dKJgqdON5PgnRqBm-Q~~/AAPPABA~/cUCwy4qcXRl4d_6ecbn3Wt0uIqMSmQ4PjXigL_r6oJPoAoFtbbJ1lOIAcndppQb3mCZDCj1aGXORbB6ImAlfc2uTSoDOvmWvKZGjxo2gRdh_2Vdh-m4f_MQk8QaegPxIy-z6lsAVs7GWP33Au5sIWg~~ (http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/fnnbr2CJSuHYYtsWigYcYQ~~/AAPPABA~/bEBHXDr4I9xixQDdkdeiQZvKb6fQbLGkrf6QT3rfBOMKMENvailEwepCRauMgcNQthhGaZJ53tq3krNapfs3bNDkjpzuFyelxErLNRivvqHcoWsq-IE-Adi--jZcOQmNj3eoCo6u7AZ_ttf8uC2ZtQVUuBhi0bCas0FjRMkpDikPMFfThX7liNGKRq5X05-Bl7GMFgCXrSLGY9XSkle45w~~)

Thank you!!

-Maxwell

Hi Peter,

At midnight tonight, this fundraising quarter will officially close. What we raise before then will determine how strong we look heading into the next phase of this campaign.

This is about more than numbers. It’s about proving that people, not billionaires and special interests, are powering this campaign. When extremists in Congress push for tax breaks for the wealthy, cuts to healthcare, and attacks on working people, we’re standing up and fighting back.

Every single contribution, no matter the size, is a clear statement: people power is stronger than Trump’s agenda.

[If you’re able, I’m asking you to step up before midnight so we can finish this quarter strong, Peter.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116298204/573119206/297343010?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_SM_20250930_FR_EOQ_0_3MO_TeamMagaziner_NA_NA_8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzlhNTA5NC01ZjllLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ejcz9t0JUCAo-vp7r-D-hb-UaWf1opC00odJMnw1DIo=) | | [Contribute now →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116298205/573119208/297343010?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_SM_20250930_FR_EOQ_0_3MO_TeamMagaziner_NA_NA_8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzlhNTA5NC01ZjllLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ejcz9t0JUCAo-vp7r-D-hb-UaWf1opC00odJMnw1DIo=)

name: Raul Ruiz
subject: I’m ready to fight for CA-25
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE
body:
While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/dAfRehWDrkq5GdVTndjWgA2?unsubscribedata=o9wqRKGrCtQ1RWBdl4kDxiHEgLbrRrb%2BV83WyE3F%2FHdjT5Tei1Iog2thZfttJw595wXTtGPUabd67TlyidOVw62j6iJ54Jzysol9hVqaTQjg2iOFFWV1RSklevA%2BH2PjGI314%2FRP2ndg45aYlTBbHSyhArNXVfxeF1Ea72WpYCYOZ%2FI5dpjEbUerM7DnIVBwW%2FcUKOAQ4X5tltPaf%2FaDvDsietbsHWy3VFQFz6nXOWkC8AWl9viMnFscTgiwfvBaZF1E3MsA%2F%2B8MM7IyBhCouloVbhdM5Wm%2B87xHA%2FMnKsx2P8s8QbxegtrcW2uQTfSi0GqoLr3ZxGSAC60C3lh4GcDO5gZTs2XOSBfka8zXSZyv1Ap%2F3DMAePmnGVw9x3hmM1gDXYEQSX1qoJBWPZMBIqcwYEwwZDuaBNO4c52FXmRm%2FtaE5diHXWziKqozpPSy]

# [#]
Hi, it’s Raul.

I’m reaching out to you directly before our FEC Q3 deadline tonight at midnight. We’re further behind than I’d like to be, but I know that with your help, we can finish strong.

This deadline is our opportunity to show that CA-25 demands competent governance over manufactured chaos.

I'm prepared to continue holding the line — confronting Secretary RFK Jr.'s dangerous misinformation and opposing policies that prioritize profits at the expense of our economy, democracy, and hard-working Americans.

But I need your help to keep me in this fight.

Can you chip in $10 or any amount you can manage before midnight to get us across the finish line? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-sep25?amount=10&source=SBD_RR_EM_FR_093025_EOQ6_D1_S6]

Thank you,

Raul
https://www.facebook.com/DrRaulRuiz/ [https://www.facebook.com/DrRaulRuiz/] https://www.instagram.com/doctorraulruiz [https://www.instagram.com/doctorraulruiz] https://twitter.com/Dr_RaulRuiz [https://twitter.com/Dr_RaulRuiz]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-footer [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-footer]
The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress.
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-footer] CONTRIBUTE » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-footer]
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-footer?recurring=true&amount=25] CONTRIBUTE MONTHLY » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-footer?recurring=true&amount=25]
[https://drraulruiz.com/] LEARN MORE » [https://drraulruiz.com/]
PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE

This month has been busy, with the end of the district work period, we got right back to business fighting for Arizonans.
I stood with healthcare advocates as they opposed Trump’s cruel cuts to Medicaid. Over 90% of Arizona voters oppose these cuts because they know it’ll make health care more expensive for all of us.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116298400/573121752/1289792659?refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20250930_PM2_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzY1MWY0ZS02MDllLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p-uctO_eCwhRBlmcyoRq2AaG99aHFwIeub-zAOgZy4w=)
We spent some time in Maricopa County talking with voters about how Republicans are failing Arizonans and what everyday people can do to make a difference and fight back. We’re living in dystopian times. And it’s terrifying. But when we register voters and organize, we win every time. Arizona will lead the way.
And in Washington, I met with survivors of Jeffrey Epstein’s abuses, and in my role on the House Oversight Committee, I kept the spotlight on the members of this administration who are working hard to keep these abuses in the dark, denying survivors the justice they’ve been waiting decades for. **I won’t rest until every predator enabled by Jeffrey Epstein is held accountable.**
[We’re hard at work, Peter, and we aren’t slowing down any time soon. If you’re with us, can I count on your support today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116298401/573121753/1289792659?amount=&refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20250930_PM2_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzY1MWY0ZS02MDllLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p-uctO_eCwhRBlmcyoRq2AaG99aHFwIeub-zAOgZy4w=)

subject: I’m writing to you personally
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
Thank you.
#
Hi,
I’m writing to you personally because we’re just hours away from one of our last FEC end-of-quarter fundraising deadlines before 2026. As it stands, we’re still $5,000 short of our goal.
After tonight, the amount we’ve raised and the number of people who have contributed to our campaign will become public. And as soon as they’re released, National Republicans will scrutinize every detail to gauge the strength of our campaign.
**Grassroots supporters like you have had my back since day one.** [**If I can count on your support once again, please chip in anything you can before midnight to help me post the strongest report possible.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250930-2?refcode=em20250930-2381&refcode2=2381_21716_wDdOT1&akid=2381%2E21716%2EwDdOT1)

name: Kim (personal)
subject: I need your support before midnight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
Peter,

Tonight at midnight, we'll be closing the books on the third FEC end-of-quarter deadline of the year.

This is one of the most important deadlines that we're facing this year. My team and I set an ambitious $30,000 online fundraising goal, but we're still coming up a little short.

We can't afford to miss this goal. Speaker Mike Johnson and MAGA Republicans in the House have failed to govern and are leading our country directly towards a government shutdown. We need to take back the House majority next year, but to do it, we must win again in WA-08.

Can I count on your support before midnight, Peter? name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: We’ve only got hours left before our end-of-quarter deadline
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

We’re staring down our [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250930-2.Vz0ecf&refcode=ema20250930-240384&t=1002&akid=240384%2E444211%2EpKPiun ]end-of-quarter fundraising deadline at midnight
tonight, and I’m asking you to be part of this grassroots push.

Here’s why it matters so much.

Ken Paxton and Texas Republicans are doing everything they can to cling to
power. They’ve gerrymandered our maps—again. They’ve made it harder for
people to vote. They’ve wasted taxpayer dollars dragging us into court
with one baseless stunt after another.

And at every turn, they’ve shown us that they’ll put their own grip on
power above what’s best for the people of Texas.

But I believe in us—in the people of Texas coming together to do something
bigger and better than the corruption and extremism that Paxton
represents.

That’s what we’re building through Powered by People. We’ve registered
tens of thousands of new voters. We’ve hosted town halls in places that
politicians have ignored for too long. We’ve trained volunteers, organized
communities, and proven that when everyday Texans step up, we can change
the outcome of elections—and the future of our state.

This work doesn’t happen because a few billionaires write big checks. It
happens because people like you chip in $5, $10, or whatever they can
afford, and then give their time and energy to bring others into the
fight. It happens because we believe in each other, and because we’re
willing to work for the Texas we deserve.

But to keep this work going strong—to fight back against Paxton’s attacks
and make sure we’re reaching as many voters as possible—we have to hit our
fundraising goal before midnight tonight.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250930-2.Vz0ecf&refcode=ema20250930-240384&t=1003&akid=240384%2E444211%2EpKPiun ]So I’m asking, will you make a contribution of $3 ahead
of tonight’s deadline? We’ve been told for too long that Texas can’t
change—but I’ve seen firsthand that when Texans come together, there’s
nothing we can’t do.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250930-2.Vz0ecf&refcode=ema20250930-240384&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=240384%2E444211%2EpKPiun ]DONATE $3

Beto O’Rourke

clean_body: This is a full-blown assault on the very idea that American elections should be decided by American citizens. | | | | | | You deserve to know the truth, Peter. IN NOVEMBER: A Chinese national in Michigan ILLEGALLY voted in the General Election. IN FEBRUARY: President Trump took action issuing an executive order requiring states to require proof of U.S. citizenship to vote. IN APRIL: Top Democrat committees filed legal action to STOP Trump 's executive order. Let that sink in ... Democrats are racing to undermine our President and the integrity of our elections - and weaponizing our justice system to do it. This is not just another political fight - this is a wrecking ball to the very idea that American elections should be decided by American citizens. So if you believe only American citizens should be allowed to vote... If you believe non-citizens should be removed from the voter rolls...If you agree with President Trump's strong executive action... Then I need to hear from you IMMEDIATELY. "Then I’m asking you directly to take action right now and sign my petition to MANDATE proof of citizenship to vote:" | | "ADD YOUR NAME>>" I'm pleading with every Conservative in America to support President Trump and House Republicans' efforts. "Your signature today is the FIRST step in making American elections the most secure in HISTORY." | "ADD YOUR NAME>>" Can I count on seeing your name? I hope so. For America, Steve Scalise | | \- Democrat Leadership formed an anti-Trump task force \- More than a dozen Attorneys General are suing the Trump Administration \- A House Democrat just introduced 7 Articles of Impeachment | "Liberal Trump Resistance" If they manage to strip us of our House Majority, they'll have the power to impeach, investigate, and bring his entire legislative agenda to a SCREECHING HALT! Stand with us to defend fair and honest elections >>

| **Trump has been falsely claiming that the U.S. is the only country that allows mail-in voting and called it a “corrupt” practice.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116298980/573128843/399364649?refcode=NDCAF_20250930_EMPET_E3_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzNmNjRmMy02MTllLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xC-eYuxUXxDz66052w5iNx8tFBn6oWyyDc7g5xN22Vc=&emci=b5771c0b-0a9e-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=a33f64f3-619e-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=48524772) | [1,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED: ADD YOUR NAME TO DEFEND MAIL-IN VOTING »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116298983/573128862/399364649?refcode=NDCAF_20250930_EMPET_E3_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzNmNjRmMy02MTllLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xC-eYuxUXxDz66052w5iNx8tFBn6oWyyDc7g5xN22Vc=&emci=b5771c0b-0a9e-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=a33f64f3-619e-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=48524772)

He even quoted advice he said he received from Russian President Vladimir Putin, “It’s impossible to have mail-in voting and have honest elections.”

Now he’s threatening to unilaterally abolish mail-in balloting through an executive order ahead of the 2026 midterms.

New Dems are fighting back in Congress because we know how critical mail-in voting is to ensure everyone has their voice heard — _**it accounted for 30% of all votes cast during the 2024 general election.**_

**[But we need thousands of grassroots Democrats to stand with us against Trump’s voter suppression plan. Will you add your name to our “Defend Mail-In Voting” petition before our deadline at 11:59pm tonight? »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116298987/573128878/399364649?refcode=NDCAF_20250930_EMPET_E3_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzNmNjRmMy02MTllLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xC-eYuxUXxDz66052w5iNx8tFBn6oWyyDc7g5xN22Vc=&emci=b5771c0b-0a9e-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=a33f64f3-619e-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=48524772)**

name: Derek Tran
subject: on the record at midnight
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116299068/573129127/1527952032?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGU0ODMyMTktNjI5ZS1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=2aeiijOogl8VKutzthVSfDbAnhEoPEqFLqKFpx76X-c=)
Let me explain why tonight’s FEC deadline is so critical. At midnight, my campaign finance report closes for the quarter. That means every dollar raised becomes public – reporters, analysts, and Republicans alike will scour the numbers to judge the strength of our campaign. **If I fall short, Republicans will take it as a green light to flood CA-45 with even more outside money. But, if we show strong grassroots support, it sends a very different message: that this seat isn’t going anywhere.** **[That’s why I’m asking for your help before the deadline hits. Will you be one of the supporters I can count on to show the strength of our campaign tonight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116299071/573129129/1527952032?refcode=em-9.30.25-2-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGU0ODMyMTktNjI5ZS1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=2aeiijOogl8VKutzthVSfDbAnhEoPEqFLqKFpx76X-c=)**
| **[DONATE $4.50](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116299072/573129133/1527952032?refcode=em-9.30.25-2-all-b&amount=4.50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGU0ODMyMTktNjI5ZS1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=2aeiijOogl8VKutzthVSfDbAnhEoPEqFLqKFpx76X-c=)**
---
**[DONATE $45](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116299073/573129134/1527952032?refcode=em-9.30.25-2-all-b&amount=45&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGU0ODMyMTktNjI5ZS1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=2aeiijOogl8VKutzthVSfDbAnhEoPEqFLqKFpx76X-c=)**
---
Here’s why I’m offering those amounts:
* _$4.50_ shows that even the smallest donations add up and make a difference. If everyone reading this chipped in this amount, we’d soar past our goal.
* _$45_ reflects the district we’re defending: CA-45, and represents a larger contribution toward the resources we need to hold the line against GOP attacks.

Every dollar will be on the record at midnight. Republicans will see our numbers no matter what. Let’s make sure they see a campaign powered by people like you – and a grassroots team that’s ready to win again.
Together your contributions build the momentum we need to keep CA-45 blue and keep fighting for working families. **[Will you chip in $4.50, $45, or a custom amount before our deadline expires?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116299074/573129135/1527952032?refcode=em-9.30.25-2-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGU0ODMyMTktNjI5ZS1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=2aeiijOogl8VKutzthVSfDbAnhEoPEqFLqKFpx76X-c=)**

clean_body: | = Let me explain why tonight’s FEC deadline is so critical. At midnight, my campaign finance report closes for the quarter. That means every dollar raised becomes public – reporters, analysts, and Republicans alike will scour the numbers to judge the strength of our campaign. If I fall short, Republicans will take it as a green light to flood CA-45 with even more outside money. But, if we show strong grassroots support, it sends a very different message: that this seat isn’t going anywhere. = | = = Here’s why I’m offering those amounts: $4.50 shows that even the smallest donations add up and make a difference. If everyone reading this chipped in this amount, we’d soar past our goal. $45 reflects the district we’re defending: CA-45, and represents a larger contribution toward the resources we need to hold the line against GOP attacks. Every dollar will be on the record at midnight. Republicans will see our numbers no matter what. Let’s make sure they see a campaign powered by people like you – and a grassroots team that’s ready to win again. Together your contributions build the momentum we need to keep CA-45 blue and keep fighting for working families. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, -Derek | www.derektranforcongress.com Use of Derek Tran's military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Dept. of Defense or U.S. Army. name: Mikie Sherrill
subject: The state of this race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
This email is long, but I hope you’ll read all of it.
#
Peter,
With just 35 days to go until Election Day, I wanted to send you an update about where our campaign stands heading into the final weeks of this race. This email is long, but I hope you’ll read all of it.
**[And if you’re already ready to power my campaign to victory, I’d really appreciate it if you split a donation between my campaign and State Democrats Committee before the end-of-quarter deadline tonight ->](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96250?refcode=em20250930-9512&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9512%2E614464%2E8aLPVo)**
**The Polls Are Tied** Anyone who believes this race is anything but a toss-up needs to wake up, Peter. A new major poll was just released showing me deadlocked with my opponent, and with New Jersey becoming more competitive every year, this race is going to be _close._ **But 11% of voters are still undecided, and I’m making it my personal mission to reach every single one of them before Election Day.**

**Ballots Are Already Out** As of last week, the first votes have been cast in our race for governor. Last governor's election, 22% of voters sent in their ballots by mail — and if those numbers stay the same, that means that a decisive margin of voters are going to be making their final decision in this race _before Election Day._ **That’s why I’m going to spend the next 35 days trying to reach as many voters as I can, and share with them my vision for our state.**

**The Stakes Couldn’t Be Higher** There is so much on the line for the Garden State in this election, Peter — lowering the cost of living, improving education for our children, fixing our public transportation, and more. But the way I look at it, we aren’t just deciding New Jersey’s future this November. This is our chance to show **the entire nation** that the people reject the Trump administration’s incompetence and authoritarianism. They’ve shown time and time again that they’ll do anything to stop me — _and that’s why meeting our fundraising goals is so important._

**[Peter, if anything I said convinced you, we have the last end-of-quarter deadline of the campaign tonight. We’re in a fight for the future of New Jersey, and I’m relying on the strength of our grassroots team to help us meet our goal. Can I count on you to pitch in a donation split between my team and State Democrats Committee and help me win this toss-up race?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96250?refcode=em20250930-9512&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9512%2E614464%2E8aLPVo)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $5](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96251?refcode=em20250930-9512&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=3&akid=9512%2E614464%2E8aLPVo) [Contribute $15](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96251?refcode=em20250930-9512&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=4&akid=9512%2E614464%2E8aLPVo) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96251?refcode=em20250930-9512&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=5&akid=9512%2E614464%2E8aLPVo) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96251?refcode=em20250930-9512&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=6&akid=9512%2E614464%2E8aLPVo) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96251?refcode=em20250930-9512&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=7&akid=9512%2E614464%2E8aLPVo) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96251?refcode=em20250930-9512&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=8&akid=9512%2E614464%2E8aLPVo) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96250?refcode=em20250930-9512&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=9512%2E614464%2E8aLPVo)
---
Thank you, Peter. Let’s get to work.
\- Mikie Sherrill

name: Katie Porter
subject: I know it’s late so I’ll cut to the chase
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
Peter,
I know it’s late so I’ll cut right to the chase.
No BS: it’s looking like we’ll fall just short of our September $200,000 end-of-quarter deadline.
**[Can I count on you to donate $5 before midnight? Every donation will help us plan our budget for the rest of the year and make sure we have the resources to win.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250930_3_ak?refcode=em20250930-40221&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=40221_3422442_OQpdfo&akid=40221%2E3422442%2EOQpdfo)**
Thank you,
Katie Porter

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4g-emails?source=40221&t=1&akid=40221%2E3422442%2EOQpdfo)

| | Peter, I wanted to write to you personally this evening. At midnight tonight, the Federal Election Commission will require us to close the books on our Q3 fundraising. That means our Cash on Hand number will become public — the number by which campaigns are judged by the media, outside groups, and most importantly, those working to defeat us. I ran for Congress to secure the border and restore law and order to our communities. I’m working directly with President Trump to deliver harsher penalties for illegal immigrant criminals and the most dangerous offenders on our streets. The message is simple: follow the law or face the consequences. While we have made major progress, there is work to be done. We must reverse the damage of Biden’s failed policies and ensure that career criminals — like the repeat offender who murdered an innocent woman in Charlotte — are never again put back on the street by soft-on-crime Democrats. Winning in 2026 is going to take a strong war chest. I need you in the fight, and it all starts now.
