## DPS Restricts CDLs for Non-Citizens
The Texas Department of Public Safety (DPS) is [no longer issuing](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGutCAUhJ9GOwywKGtB8Td2-7e3NCgHPbkoBs4u6336G_cVbjnJzOSb-XqMD4sB9-W_3cDQ28dxh5IDEEEap_ScYYrzesYnpTh_A8H7CNGNksuWCc64GJ3FcI6qdmbirhc1GKHb_ia6tmvr1Wi4ad_rHgAmJSfeaQWT1t56ee-9ghrNVSY4F0JwqWQjtJLOglfT_S5V6yvFwSHF1NB6AdjswxlfkJo5bnUwK9GRq9u_Sg6VHEopjU-Ay0rFviBfpkoO16pKDp84yxSPzDDnJ-4Lm13IjCLb485mJPyB_aPnuB3hZAVpZR5crpNxR8EQMHe6UnzZLIYPA_3tuZeRvwEAAP__g4GGpQ) commercial driver's licenses to those who aren't permanent residents of the U.S. and non-citizens who are refugees, asylees, or Deferred Action for Childhood Arrivals (DACA) recipients. Texas has issued 51,993 CDLs to non-domiciled drivers since 2015. The move, effective this Monday, is in response to the Trump administration's [emergency rule](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2urCAUxfGnwQ4DW9SxoLgN3dz2lIaP7UgGZAKMjm9_4rzCqVfyyz_r5z7ftQ9-e_zXEWX9LGne8CgBa8U8m_y2aJJdz_SuOdknVvy8QnIzMOgpZ5Tx2Wkfzlk0ThrmJt6g5GM_dXzoh75ZpelGnGDSzABYLrjrrUN9G6zQHcBkGi8vjDPGOWcgoOWjAKdxEeZ2A9EvRDB0vqbc1vUK0GUJZ9oxtzbFJsi11lch3T8CioA6jqN9hrpfIwF12QQUmwiojhFQX4CuOtRCbYoRs_U6UJf9jrnQ4C1uBQuNejupj9E_st5qIaCaLN3r8CH4MoxEsEfUPnwb6t-e2yX8BgAA__8qyIMi) barring non-citizens who aren't permanent U.S. residents from receiving a CDL unless they have an employment-based visa. A June audit by the Federal Motor Carrier Safety Administration (FMCSA) [identified](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGSozAQBNCvgUyUJASYgOASZ3vphdQgjWzVCoYaDWb5-yv7Fzbv6nrd_77mL0g5bY-_sOIkP5HmDc-SUQR5XvjwuJB_XnQIk_9GwZ89U5ittp0yWmkzB0j5ml0dpkWH0dQ4maEbW9N3fVc_p7HvdL-AHoKGwd3i2FrXDt2twxBxacc6Te8yo7UxRltnGzM4GwCjW24367pYOY0hCXEjzzcASswXvZAbT2udp6fIXqr2T2Xvlb2f59nE1RdoAknzoFdl7-9JTLRW9i58rHtRwrCVnVhAEm2qoGcU4EsVhE3tKhwxXkrgG4vCFfmBm78U-E96ZxL0omBFTh6KYoJQap7CfqacU-mHyunHCil_iPK7Y1-T_R8AAP__EiiSNw) "a catastrophic pattern of states issuing licenses illegally to foreign drivers." Texas was one of six states where "weak oversight, insufficient training, and programming errors" contributed to "licensing patterns not consistent with federal regulations." DPS troopers have issued [hundreds of citations](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2SsyAUhq9GOx3OEUQKiq-xy9du6fBziMxiyCKJyd3vmFvY_nl_5vm6LBcTU7xd_5uNdH2FvNzo2BPVSmWx5eHIZre-86OW7L6p0uuesl-QoeiAdQwWb2J6L7z12jKvoCUNUqgBRjGKdtVSMBG4QRwVOk9GOjko4SalLHNqMm3UZxkwBgAMOfYgOXpDgdtpQi5Cwxn5WHPp63oeMHtI7_yk0ru8tUmvtd73ZvjX4NzgfBzHyTm6VSr7z8MUOrkG50-0wdmUGl2iRQGBZBg6563tuFOyUyMPXRhh4ByYlWLs17qltmh_P2JKcR9lw9l1MzF9xuvflD01_gYAAP__H0Z-vw) to truckers who are unable to communicate in English, following Gov. Greg Abbott's call for "zero-tolerance enforcement of federal safety regulations" earlier this year.
## 28 Lone Star Blue Ribbon Schools Recognized
Gov. Greg Abbott announced the [first-ever recipients](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLvOnDAQhZ8GOpBnMCwULtLQbdqUyJdhsWKYlRmW5e0j8gp_d6Qjncv35zk9bUxxe_22Kxn5zjxtdO6JRChPLh-eHPvl4kMy-78k9H0nDhMqbCtQlYIp2JiuSZfBOBUGKMnAox0a6NquLRcztAE69J4IdNP0Dt1gQTkL2Ayq7bGM5g4DpQBAocYaHhqDpVm7vkfdzoVWFKJwrmW5B9h9Thd_KNee1zKZReS9F82vAscCx_M868suzLdb4HjfKXC0WaJPdMsXfyrrHItUnjeJ20GVSwdVOTrHWwWdVg0M0NSLrKnMJrzPmFLcu0eh1Wu1Mf1vlp_x-hj8FwAA__8ltX9k) of the Lone Star Blue Ribbon School award on Monday, following the U.S. Department of Education's recent discontinuation of the similarly named national program. Twenty-six public schools and two private schools received the designation for "outstanding academic performance and progress in closing achievement gaps." A [statement](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOozAQhJ8GOiN7AxgKF9fQ5dorkY0XsM7xInshydufknuEv57R6Jvvz32-2xBD2n7bBxp-rTQnfJaIzJhnl88FHS37m07OtPxFxtcRyc8goRNKCqlmb0N8z23tjZN-VDUapbvxpvqu7-rdrN5rfZMK1Dr00q_OqVFrAK_GwevR1cF8xpSUSikJLTRKt-Atrq0bBmi7tWol-sCUG94_ALas8U0X5mahRx3NznyU6vargqmCaaOr-Zaaja4Kps-dCqaDCv9PMSfKwjpHzMKmRGdasIiQ7Lmd2UYRKaEobLPIwTlKoiw7USx1Nv54hhhD6XXVyu1hQ_wy8M_MXQb-BQAA__-eDoXS) from Abbott’s office said delegating the program to the states "ensures that decisions about honoring excellence in Texas education are made by those who know Texas schools best." Eight of the schools are located in the Houston area, five are in [the Dallas-Fort Worth area](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L3u4yAQBPCnwR0RrHE-Copr3OXaK60F1jE64o1gHSdvf_K9wr-fGf00f-7THXPJ6-M3PsnLZ-Zppb0VEqE6hbpFChyXL29SOf4loc-rcJrAwKCt0cZOCXP5Tq5LPph0sx15exluvT0P56FbfBwShDk6sAjxcrv2aTBwdcnFPvU3nLvsjzFrjLXWgIOTvThISLML1yu4YVbOUMrC9STLAcA2ly-_qZ4iP7viF5FXU_0vBaOCMWEp2OjzqtTakVAwUtoiSuZVwfjgt8YQWEQvvHJtOs27xkqoW1yYS9N7lkUffcmPzFvThVfSTbDqmkPgVeOONSkYu-rTa8-l5Ha-KGceT8zlP0t-dubbw78AAAD__2KSjSI), and five are in the Rio Grande Valley. Three [Laredo](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkb-OpDAMh58mdEFJCJmhoDhpRLfXXonyx0A0IR4lZth5-xP7CttYnyz5s63fv6_5y8YU8_rX7jDS94JzhrMmIIIyu3J4cOi3Dx5U0D-B4PuVMMxKqJ5LwYWcg43pM-smjE6EQTYwyls_dNL0pm-20Xh9M4O-e9NpsXjjtTVmcL0y0g3h7ps4XjIphJRSKK1aedMqWFi0u9-V7hemBYRIWFrargNsXdIH31Baj3uTxo3oVVn3h6mJqek8z_a55trSm6npUjM1ieHiq6zXYMbCrXNIxG3OeGQPlSfMwCvZwkt0DjOvfkNMldNWAHiKlbgtPxCuVd100D5XPIoH1j3IOsRkmTJXe4cQj511DyyrzdH7FP2zMmXIFVhY99heTRnD64wpxWpuTIt1tzH9vES_C-I9qv8BAAD__17jnus) schools were recognized, along with two in the Tyler area. Schools in [George West ISD](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD3u4yAUxE-Du2cBxl8FRbSSu3_aLS0MzzG7mBcBjpPbr5wrbDfSSDO_md8_84_xwcfH3eyoy3ulOeKZA5aCaV7SYXEhu33oKInsXyz4fgZys-SyBcGBi9kZHz6zqpxeuBtFhVr07diIru3aatN85Gp1tuOj7U3vjBslNrbhyzq03Sr6yusrTHAuhOBSyVr0SjqDq1qGQap2ZYqj84VSXbYLwOQ1fOiFqba0V0FvpTwza25MTkxO53nWe46Xx-SEEY7M5HSNYnL66rL5DJZMLibAgtFBthtRgNNkMDvFB8gBfIRvFxQCNClCxBPQHdYUTxE2ipSYnEyC203cf4nuT5W0e54-BJ-7nin-2I0PX8byf8--tPwXAAD__8iJjqA), Hunt ISD, Mumford ISD, Palo Pinto ISD, and Tidehaven ISD were also honored. "_Texas is on the pathway to become No. 1 in educating our children_ ," Abbott said.
## Bruce Bochy Won't Coach Rangers Next Year
The Texas Rangers and manager Bruce Bochy have decided by “mutual agreement” that he [will not coach the team](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOozAQhp_GdBPZExuSwkUaut32dBUyeBysMxjZkyW8_Sm8wnYjjfTp-_4_X8OXiymuz2-3kOV3yMNKe03ETGUYy2uiMU_zkV9c8vSPmN5byn5AiQaUBKkG72I6Bt14O0p_Vw1Z1Zn7VbWmNc1snbkFnIzv7vqulLkGN11bo7tWYUsGdRPtB6akVEpJ1HhRnUbvKOjxdkNtgtCSfORcLjx_BFwN6cg_VC5TXppkZ-atiutDYC-w3_f9stT18xPY0wqvKrCvWy78OZY0CuxPChS3PqlUODPh7ATOsLnCsLujggtMBXguRFDJ1bxWiAwVRqIVHMyUEuQAJXoS2LsCj4f6PlL92xTrtz2mFGvbCS2fi4vp9OXfrfxj8X8AAAD__xkUkww) next year after the 81-81 Rangers missed the playoffs for the second year in a row. Bochy, 70, hadn't coached in three years when he was recruited by general manager Chris Young in 2022, but he had [won three World Series titles](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGypCAURL8GMy3uFdEJCDYhm003pFCuSi2KBcw4_v2r8Rde3FWn-_S_p3laH_y-_LUbqfKZo9npzIFKoWTG9JpojNN6xVdJcfpPhT5HiM4gx64GXnMwzvpwGVE5NXL3gIoU9N2jBdnJrlpVix0igkQElI92Ahg42Fm6tu_l3GPl1RcGnAMAR4EN9AKdpVmMw4Cim5ng5HyJqSnrd4DNc7jim1Izxa0Kai3lyKz9w1Az1Od5NpSP_Rsy1FsYGepcYroYasNQe8dQCymwH2TLUN-S9W1Z3_Q62X2hlOvN7nahVCXljtOH4LPsmeDLZn24u8vvHnsr_AkAAP__Q51-DQ) with the San Francisco Giants since 2010—when they defeated the Rangers in their first-ever appearance in the Fall Classic. Bochy delivered the Rangers' [first championship](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLFywyAQRL9G6qSBMwi7oEijzmlTag44WUyQ0cDJtv4-Y_9C-p3dfe_nOl0xpni_feNKll9znu70rImYqUyu7J5c9suRdy7Z_xLTa0s5TCBAd1J0Qk4BYzom1QbrRLjIlqw0-nKSgx50u9jglQZ0g3QzgPFIOAejnTIoUCANbbTvMimElFKAgl4aBQFpVu58BqXnRgkKkXPpeXkfwDqnIz-o9D6vbbIL81ab01cDYwNj3XLh2h-45PwONDBi4egTNTB-gLoPUVfwfqNSu3XnHVM6ug0LdyDUIMxw0f3Ca2qLDdszphTrYBolbivG9Jnl_8l6WPgLAAD__0atgC0) in 2023, when the revamped squad won each of their 11 postseason road games as an overlooked wild card team. That success was followed by a losing record in 2024 and significant offensive struggles this season. During a Monday press conference, Young praised Bochy as "a legend in Texas Rangers history" who "brought instant credibility, wisdom, and legitimacy to a team looking to emerge from a rebuild." During his tenure, Bochy had a [249-237 record](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDFygzAQRU8DnRhpEWAXKtLQOW1KZgUr0EQgRlob-_YZuEL63Tfv_Z_H8EAf_DZ_40qG3y4OGx05EDOlwabnSDaOyyc-OcXxl5jee4jTABIaoaSQapjQh8-gy8lYOd1VSUZ1zb1WbdM25WJs16BuHWona9AwWuxaUKO911bKrmlLb06YklIpJUFDpToNE5LT9nYD3bhCS5o8x1TxcgpgduETX5SqMa5lMAvznov6q4C-gP44jsrFtz4zzoMC-rzHxLmA_uoRV5A4fAhiiywS8TNt4gKLhNtMKYsVN5wpCXRMSdQiE-a45TKZaT8_fW67Qst5RR8uDf7feC8DfwEAAP__ChyGjw).

name: Sharice Davids
subject: The last blue dot in Kansas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
I need you to read this, Peter
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc9f038a4-a163-482a-bcc1-01ad919852ee/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9e64b4fd-7662-42d4-9b52-f08dd57809bc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Republican politicians want to make it impossible for a Democrat like me to win my district. Not more difficult. Impossible. This is Congresswoman Sharice Davids from Kansas’ 3rd Congressional district — and Donald Trump has made it his number one priority to gerrymander me out of office. [But Peter, I didn’t flip this seat from red to blue by running scared when the going got tough, and I’m not going to start now. I’m more energized than ever to defend this seat — and our democracy — from the far-right, but I need you standing with me to do it. Will you split a donation between my campaign and Blue Amp Action before midnight?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T34249b11-2e43-4598-9a29-ecc4ad512a43/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5cc4927e-07b1-4078-9b46-e5baaa24b70f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| There’s a pretty obvious reason why Donald Trump wants me out of Congress: I don’t fit his mold of what a “Kansas politician” should look like. And Peter, he’s right. I do stand out in Washington — and I’m proud of it. I’m the first LGBTQ+ Native American woman ever elected to Congress. I was raised by a single Army mom, paid my own way through college, and even had a career as an MMA fighter before I ran for elected office. Maybe that background doesn’t make me a “typical” politician. But I think that’s a good thing. But Donald Trump disagrees. Instead, he wants to end all competitive Congressional elections in Kansas and install a hand-picked, far-right extremist in my place. [Kansas Republicans know they can’t win my district here in Kansas unless they cheat, so they’re trying to stack the deck and pray that we won’t notice. That’s why I need your help. Can you chip in a split donation right away to help me and Blue Amp Action keep fighting back against this partisan power grab while we still have the chance?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T87a0c9ce-9d29-4e42-a15c-8cfdee8537e6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE $10](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2e83857a-57a2-467d-9be2-c3052a7d2c4c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE $25](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc8a9a948-a954-4614-826d-de077d4389fa/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE MORE](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbe15f90b-747e-4eb8-b56a-0c7687edb9fa/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Together, we can win this fight for our democracy’s future. Thank you for having my back. Sharice

| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/loc_em_fr_20251001_davids-bluedot_b1_f1_s1_c1_warmup_n-t0?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | |
---
| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8013fd0d-079d-4846-a9e3-f3549ffe90d1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

subject: Obama & government shutdown
disclaimer_text: Paid for by HMP, # [#]
body:

name: Andrew Yang
subject: The 2025 Shutdown
body:
Well, the federal government is now shutting down because Congress couldn't come to a deal to extend funding.

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack..JXshbUKQ55XBu_gT0rX0t3pOgt-iFL8PyzhR8ZKtBYs?) for more

---|---|---
* * *
# [The 2025 Shutdown](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=287304&post_id=174987857&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc0OTg3ODU3LCJpYXQiOjE3NTkzMjA0NDgsImV4cCI6MTc2MTkxMjQ0OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI4NzMwNCIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.s7BHmI2XjkkFy27URCWB3EVhevut9fdBWA9rp0Vpqbo)
| | [Andrew Yang](https://substack.com/@andrewyang)
---
| Oct 1
---
| [](https://substack.com/@andrewyang)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=287304&post_id=174987857&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc0OTg3ODU3LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1OTMyMDQ0OCwiZXhwIjoxNzYxOTEyNDQ4LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjg3MzA0Iiwic3ViIjoicmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.b1BvivimjnzDmK72j-PpdxyIckA6TP_WuLq-jaMEBgs&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=287304&post_id=174987857&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc0OTg3ODU3LCJpYXQiOjE3NTkzMjA0NDgsImV4cCI6MTc2MTkxMjQ0OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI4NzMwNCIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.s7BHmI2XjkkFy27URCWB3EVhevut9fdBWA9rp0Vpqbo&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=287304&post_id=174987857&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc0OTg3ODU3LCJpYXQiOjE3NTkzMjA0NDgsImV4cCI6MTc2MTkxMjQ0OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI4NzMwNCIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.s7BHmI2XjkkFy27URCWB3EVhevut9fdBWA9rp0Vpqbo)
---
| | [](https://substack..tEQOVj4-HyGNTICse7kVcWj2tSTPardiWoQtP4rSrpI?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/andrewyang/p/the-2025-shutdown?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Well, the federal government is now shutting down because Congress couldn't come to a deal to extend funding. How long this will last is anyone's guess. The last shutdown in 2018 lasted a record 35 days and cost the economy at least $3 billion. Several hundred thousand government workers were furloughed - asked not to report to work and were not paid - in 2018. This time may be worse. There are about 2 million civilian federal government workers, not including the military. I talked to someone in D.C. and households are hunkering down there and preparing for a significant disruption.
For the record, I think this is a mistake on both sides. Republicans should take this opportunity to undo some of the less popular health care cuts in their big beautiful bill. Democrats are overplaying their hand because this administration will relish the ability to shut down various agencies and only operate their own priorities. It's hard to negotiate with a crew that has a significant anti-government strain in its DNA. The Dems are being exhorted by their base to fight, but this is a fight it's not clear they can win.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0e0bfa85-75aa-4abf-9782-abb2572bf201?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
By the way, Chuck Schumer faced a very similar situation back in March, when he backed down and approved a continuation of government funding. He took a ton of heat for it from within the Party. This time, he's determined to show that he won't back down.
I find this to be misguided. A government shutdown is going to hurt the country economically and institutionally. I think Chuck did the right thing in March. The problem is that the politics of today don't reward someone thinking pragmatically about what happens to the average American or the average government worker or small business owner in Maryland. You have to demonstrate that you are a strident partisan warrior. On this one, I think Dems are playing into the Republicans' hands as Trump and company are going to take this opportunity to accelerate a reshaping of the government and its workforce.
The Democrats have become the de facto party of safeguarding institutions. If one goal is making sure the government continues to operate, this isn't going to serve that goal. It's possible that this tactic leads to a concession from the Republicans, as Trump has signaled a willingness to deal on healthcare because he senses that the cuts will be unpopular when they are actually felt. Some Republican Senators are also for a one-year extension pushing the health care cuts back. But Trump will be eager to cast the Dems as the agents of this particular shutdown. He has a point, as Dems historically have advocated for clean funding patches when the situation was reversed.
As my friend in D.C. said, "Well, the National Guard is walking the streets and the government is about to shut down for God knows how long, so things are going great." The era of institutional decline is about to lead to a destructive shutdown of unknown length, which now seems like an obvious outgrowth of polarization. What is going to bring leaders back to the table? I hope at some point common sense prevails, but that is anything but a given. The first shutdown since 2019 is on, and where it leads is anyone's guess. But every hour does harm, and the prognosis isn't positive. As usual, the people deserve better.
To try and get us beyond polarization, check out [Forward Party](https://substack.com/redirect/a3168bce-6dfb-45b4-b3f8-dfeee48d95c3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) which is doing great work around the country and [Fairvote](https://substack.com/redirect/9c4eb55e-dfb6-45c2-8082-f4e385f37452?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), which champions reforms like Ranked Choice Voting. If you're worried about saving money in a time of disruption, check out [Noble Mobile](https://substack.com/redirect/f6546129-d628-434b-ba9f-5eb9e135bb2c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), which is growing quickly every day.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6a8b664b-5b76-4a99-b218-1dd70b2d76b9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---

subject: Democrats refused to bend the knee
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
#
**The federal government was just shut down.**
Not because there wasn’t a way through—but because Trump demanded that everyone else bend the knee. **Democrats didn’t.**
They held the line and fought for the health care of millions by demanding lower premiums and pushing to reverse the harmful cuts to Medicaid that Republicans made earlier this year.
Texas is already the least insured state in the country, and now Republicans are refusing to act as health care costs are about to skyrocket. Democrats are fighting back by using the leverage they have, and Powered by People applauds them for taking this stand and refusing to bend the knee.
[**Will you add your name right now to say you support Democrats fighting on the front foot and holding the line?**](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/20251001-shutdown/?source=ema20251001-240385&t=2&akid=240385%2E444211%2EpTtfYp)

By signing, you’re telling Democrats in the House and Senate that they’re not alone—that Texans have their backs as they fight to lower health care costs, reverse Trump’s harmful Medicaid cuts, and keep health care within reach for our families.
Thank you for your support today,
Team Powered by People

# _Choose US Air Force Veteran and Successful Houston Entrepreneur - Warren Howell for County Judge_
---
| [Join the Team!](https://howellforharriscounty.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8c3a643a45a6e2b06d8f050&id=7a42d43ba0&e=7c92d84deb)
---
| |
Dear Friends and Neighbors,
I hope this message finds you well. My name is Kayla Hensley, and I have the honor of serving as the Fundraising Director for **Warren Howell** , a proud Military Veteran, business leader and experienced public servant who is running to be our next **Harris County Judge**.
Warren brings a unique combination of **military discipline, leadership-under-fire, and a deep commitment to service** — qualities our community needs now more than ever. As a veteran, he understands what it means to put others first, and he is ready to bring that same sense of duty and integrity to our Commissioners Court in the role of Harris County Judge.
This campaign is about restoring the public trust, promoting transparency, and ensuring that every voice is heard in Harris County. But to make that vision a reality, **we need your support**.
Would you consider making a contribution today to help us elect a **Veteran leader who’s ready to serve again — this time, for Harris County**?
DONATE TODAY 👉 [www.howellforharriscounty.com](https://howellforharriscounty.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8c3a643a45a6e2b06d8f050&id=b6c44da6d6&e=7c92d84deb)
Every dollar helps us connect with more voters, expand our outreach, and build the momentum we need to win.
As part of our campaign, we’ll be reaching out and sharing **weekly updates** — including behind-the-scenes looks, invites to upcoming events, and ways you can stay involved. We’re building a grassroots movement, and we’d love to have you be part of it.
Thank you again for your time and support. If you have any questions, or would like to host a fundraising event, **please don’t hesitate to reach out**.
Respectfully,
**Kayla Hensley**
Fundraising Director
Warren Howell for County Judge
[**kaylahensley@howellforharriscounty.com**](mailto:kaylahensley@howellforharriscounty.com)**(c) 832-992-6242**

name: Team TFVC
subject: ACTION ALERT: REPEAL THE SHIELD
body:
| |
---
2 Ways to Make Your Voice Heard | | [View in browser](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/tj/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTY3MDYyOTg5Nzk1NDkzNjc3LFwiclwiOjE2NzA2MzE2NDEzODAzMDgzOH0iLCJzIjoiODI3MWUwYTkyMjllOTIyNiJ9)
| | | [ ](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/tj/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTY3MDYyOTg5ODA1OTc5NDQwLFwiclwiOjE2NzA2MzE2NDEzODAzMDgzOH0iLCJzIjoiNmJkNjdjNDhjYjM0ZTEzNSJ9)
---
|
---
# ACTION ALERT: REPEAL THE SHIELD
|
---
**Representative Paul Gosar Refiles Bill to End the Federal Immunity from Liability for Vaccine Manufacturers** For too long, Big Pharma has enjoyed a total lack of accountability for harm done to Americans by their profitable vaccines. If passed, the **“End the Vaccine Carveout Act”** by Representative Paul Gosar (R-AZ) would finally bring an _end to their immunity from liability and allow the vaccine injured to hold these corporations responsible for damage._ You can be a part of this monumental policy change!
**TWO WAYS TO MAKE YOUR VOICE HEARD!**

|
---
__**1- ASK YOUR CONGRESSMAN TO CO-SPONSOR THIS BILL
** Join thousands of medical liberty warriors across the country in urging members of Congress to sign on in support of HB 4668 by Representative Paul Gosar. Click [here](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/tj/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTY3MDYyOTg5ODE0MzY4MDUxLFwiclwiOjE2NzA2MzE2NDEzODAzMDgzOH0iLCJzIjoiNzcxMDM0OGM4OTM0ZWQ4YiJ9) to learn more about this important bill and to send an email **directly to your member of Congress.**

|
---
| | [ Learn More and Take Action ](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/tj/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTY3MDYyOTg5ODIyNzU2NjYyLFwiclwiOjE2NzA2MzE2NDEzODAzMDgzOH0iLCJzIjoiNDU3MjhmZmQxYzU4YmJhMyJ9)
---
|
---
__**2- CONTACT OUR U.S. SENATORS ABOUT THIS BILL
** A companion bill has not yet been filed in the Senate, but you can let our Senators know that this bill is **important to Texans!** Tell our U.S. Senators to become a Senate co-sponsor once the “End the Vaccine Carveout Act” is filed in their chamber! For Senator Ted Cruz, visit his [site](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/tj/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTY3MDYyOTg5ODMzMjQyNDI1LFwiclwiOjE2NzA2MzE2NDEzODAzMDgzOH0iLCJzIjoiMzUzNjA2MmI1ZDQ0M2QzMyJ9), scroll down, and click the “email us” option for your region of the state. For Senator John Cornyn, submit your information and message [here](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/tj/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTY3MDYyOTg5ODQyNjc5NjEzLFwiclwiOjE2NzA2MzE2NDEzODAzMDgzOH0iLCJzIjoiZWFjN2UzOGZlNmUyY2YxMiJ9). **SAMPLE EMAIL MESSAGE:**
**Subject:** Please Co-Sponsor and Support HR4668, end the vaccine shield _H.R. 4668 by Rep. Gosar was recently introduced and as your constituent, I ask that you please support this important legislation once it is filed in the Senate. Vaccine manufacturers have been shielded from liability for harm done to Americans by their products since 1986. This bill would restore civil liability, providing an opportunity for fair compensation for victims of vaccine injuries. This bill is long overdue, and I ask that you please lend your support today._ _Sincerely,_
_YOUR NAME_****

|
---
| |
---
|
---
|
##### Texans for Vaccine Choice
1540 Keller Parkway Ste 108 #166, Keller, TX 76248 United States |
---

body:
“... probably the most shameless political ad I’ve ever seen.” | [ ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116347208/573186947/720563957?refcode=EM_FL_OPA_20251001_fr_icymi_team_oc_act_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vQ1BELzEvMTEzNTk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjljMjRlNTE1LWM5OWUtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KpsQ53UA39IIgQ-73JmOARXxnTrGhtrLCA_tPpQwGl4=)
---
Did you see this, Peter? Richest man in the state and mega-MAGA billionaire, Jeffrey Yass, has been pouring funds (up to $1.25 million) in an effort to undermine the PA Supreme Court. Just when you think the man can’t stoop lower, one of his PACs released what’s been quoted as “... probably the most shameless political ad I’ve ever seen.” **It’s shameless and an all out LIE:** blaming Democrats on the PA Supreme Court with gerrymandering. They didn’t think Pennsylvanians would catch on that their ad featured _wildly shaped congressional districts drawn by Republicans_ that the Pennsylvania Supreme Court had to throw out as unconstitutionally biased. Forget Republican vs Democrat labels for a label and trust your gut on this. **_Why would anti-worker wealth hoarders like Elon Musk and Jeffrey Yass drop millions into state supreme court races?_** Especially with the Trump takeover in DC, selling off essential programs and services for regular folks to help billionaires make out with more $$$, state courts are our last line of defense. **What has typically been an unremarkable off-year procedural election to retain PA state justices is now the epicenter for regular people vs. greedy far-right billionaires. They want to buy out our rights and our freedoms for their gain, but we can stop them.** **Election Day is right around the corner. We’re running programs across the Commonwealth to have conversations in the community to talk through what’s really at stake here and how to vote in their best interest.** _**[Yass is trying to drown us out, any donation you can give right now will help us fight back and reach more folks. clean_body: “... probably the most shameless political ad I’ve ever seen.” | = Did you see this, Peter? Richest man in the state and mega-MAGA billionaire, Jeffrey Yass, has been pouring funds (up to $1.25 million) in an effort to undermine the PA Supreme Court. Just when you think the man can’t stoop lower, one of his PACs released what’s been quoted as “... probably the most shameless political ad I’ve ever seen.” It’s shameless and an all out LIE: blaming Democrats on the PA Supreme Court with gerrymandering. They didn’t think Pennsylvanians would catch on that their ad featured wildly shaped congressional districts drawn by Republicans that the Pennsylvania Supreme Court had to throw out as unconstitutionally biased. Forget Republican vs Democrat labels for a label and trust your gut on this. Why would anti-worker wealth hoarders like Elon Musk and Jeffrey Yass drop millions into state supreme court races? Especially with the Trump takeover in DC, selling off essential programs and services for regular folks to help billionaires make out with more $$$, state courts are our last line of defense. What has typically been an unremarkable off-year procedural election to retain PA state justices is now the epicenter for regular people vs. greedy far-right billionaires. They want to buy out our rights and our freedoms for their gain, but we can stop them. Election Day is right around the corner. We’re running programs across the Commonwealth to have conversations in the community to talk through what’s really at stake here and how to vote in their best interest. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = Everything will come down to these last five weeks. name: Katherine Clark
subject: They’re shutting the door on the American people
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katherine Clark for Congress
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116347853/573189425/1117401451?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_KMC_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20251001_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2FhZGM0My1jOTllLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kD0mPSAIsagBb6Ij7rohns-x0s7ir4y0bbRirDfTFws=)
---
##
**Republicans have shut down the United States government. ** Democrats did everything in our power to meet with Republicans and find a way forward, but we stood our ground and made it clear: we will not rubber-stamp a budget that throws the American people under the bus. Trump and Republicans didn’t just shut the door on Democrats. They shut the door on the American people, who already know their health care system doesn't work for them. And now they’re threatening to cut essential services — including health care — for good. **That is an outrageous statement against hardworking families in this country.** While Democrats fought for the millions of Americans who are already struggling to provide the basics for their families, Republicans turned their backs. They would rather shut down the government than protect Americans’ health care. **Here’s the thing: Republicans control the White House, the Senate, and the House. This shutdown falls squarely on their shoulders, and they need to know the consequences of their actions.** **[Please share your story to let me know how this shutdown will impact you and your family. Republicans need to know that their greed has a price, and that Americans won’t stand for it.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116347857/573189431/-1408768501?refcode=AU_KMC_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20251001_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2FhZGM0My1jOTllLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kD0mPSAIsagBb6Ij7rohns-x0s7ir4y0bbRirDfTFws=&emci=72deb610-c89e-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=acaadc43-c99e-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=33198651)** | [SHARE YOUR STORY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116347864/573189440/-1408768501?refcode=AU_KMC_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20251001_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2FhZGM0My1jOTllLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kD0mPSAIsagBb6Ij7rohns-x0s7ir4y0bbRirDfTFws=&emci=72deb610-c89e-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=acaadc43-c99e-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=33198651)
---
Together, we can get through this and win for the American people. Thank you.
— Katherine
Katherine Clark for Congress
P.O. Box 159
Belmont, MA 02478
United States **[katherineclark.org](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116347866/573189448/567842951?refcode=AU_KMC_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20251001_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2FhZGM0My1jOTllLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kD0mPSAIsagBb6Ij7rohns-x0s7ir4y0bbRirDfTFws=&emci=72deb610-c89e-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=acaadc43-c99e-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=33198651) | [info@katherineclark.org](mailto:info@katherineclark.org)** | Paid for by Katherine Clark for Congress

Trump stated that women should just “tough it out” and that there’s no downside to not taking “Tylenol,” but that’s simply not true. **When a fever goes untreated in a pregnant woman, it can lead to miscarriages, birth defects, preterm labor, and more.**

Dr. Linda Ecker, an esteemed author and a professor of obstetrics and gynecology at the University of Washington, shared her insights with _PBS_. She emphasized that major health organizations, including the American College of Obstetrics and Gynecology, the Royal College of Obstetrics and Gynecology, and the Society for Maternal Fetal Medicine, have thoroughly examined the data and consistently **reaffirmed their support for Tylenol as the safest option for pain and fever control during pregnancy.**

**We can’t accept this harmful conduct, Peter. Trump has no interest in protecting women and babies. If he did, he would spend less time placing unnecessary blame on mothers and more time implementing policies such as federal maternity leave, increased access to healthcare, gun safety measures, food security, REAL research, etc...**

Some experts are concerned that this administration will be targeting epidurals next – and we have no reason to believe that won’t happen. Our best defense will be getting more _**women**_ in the rooms where that potential policy will eventually be introduced – to block it at every turn. We will desperately need women representing ALL American women when and if that happens.

[**We cannot afford to sit back and watch this administration continue to attack women, our safety, our well-being, and our health. It's time to act. Support our pro-WOMEN women candidates by donating $20.25 now. We have no time to waste.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116350191/573195211/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_251001Junk_JZ_8_90DO_G_N_L2&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQyYmU5MGMyLWNhOWUtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6h3EH26wKiMTxhcIu9Vp0MSuhfwRaeolkeIkHzylblY=)

For ALL women,

Jordan Zaslow
Founder & President

subject: The Silent Crisis That Might Be Exacerbated By the Shutdown

Police officers and veterans are dying by suicide at disproportionately higher rates. It's time we match their courage with care.

# [The Silent Crisis That Might Be Exacerbated By the Shutdown ](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4399133&post_id=175017836&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc1MDE3ODM2LCJpYXQiOjE3NTkzMjU3MzEsImV4cCI6MTc2MTkxNzczMSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQzOTkxMzMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0._Aaf2YwfqL-zRQO_1UJ1Foiic0Xp4OnXKOCPxdLVD_0)
### Police officers and veterans are dying by suicide at disproportionately higher rates. It's time we match their courage with care.
| | [Patrick J. Murphy](https://substack.com/@patrickmurphypa)
---
| Oct 1
---
| [](https://substack.com/@patrickmurphypa)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4399133&post_id=175017836&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc1MDE3ODM2LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1OTMyNTczMSwiZXhwIjoxNzYxOTE3NzMxLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItNDM5OTEzMyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.Wp2J0Ufi8YENQC7U9TBqqmO4VGjNM91IAl-8U2CnI5c&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4399133&post_id=175017836&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc1MDE3ODM2LCJpYXQiOjE3NTkzMjU3MzEsImV4cCI6MTc2MTkxNzczMSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQzOTkxMzMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0._Aaf2YwfqL-zRQO_1UJ1Foiic0Xp4OnXKOCPxdLVD_0&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4399133&post_id=175017836&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc1MDE3ODM2LCJpYXQiOjE3NTkzMjU3MzEsImV4cCI6MTc2MTkxNzczMSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQzOTkxMzMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0._Aaf2YwfqL-zRQO_1UJ1Foiic0Xp4OnXKOCPxdLVD_0)

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/patrickmurphypa/p/the-silent-crisis-that-might-be-exacerbated?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

With September behind us, that also leaves behind [National Suicide Prevention Month](https://substack.com/redirect/4f6d8468-ab9a-42d5-adaf-9adcd571a625?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and as our nation reflects on the service and sacrifice of our veterans and law enforcement officers, I keep coming back to our military ethic: leave no one behind.
The latest [FBI data](https://substack.com/redirect/72336a7a-b4e7-4736-b9c5-cb84c6b5c122?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) shows that [violent crime fell by 4.5% in 2024](https://substack.com/redirect/72336a7a-b4e7-4736-b9c5-cb84c6b5c122?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and 2025 is tracking in the same direction. That's good news. But we cannot ignore another sobering reality: [64 police officers were killed in the line of duty last year.](https://substack.com/redirect/35673c39-511d-4311-98c6-0bef8a845a40?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Assaults on officers hit a 10-year high, with [over 85,000 assaults reported.](https://substack.com/redirect/c66a75b7-f6cd-4e0e-aac5-de65fd0278d0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Last week, there were shots fired at a [Dallas ICE facility](https://substack.com/redirect/6dc473bc-f9a6-4b3f-8f7f-42fc0e59e460?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Whether you support the President's immigration policies or not, remember the lesson learned from the Vietnam War-- separate the war from the warrior. It's the political leaders in Washington, D.C., who are deploying our men and women; they are just doing their jobs.
Last week here in Pennsylvania was especially brutal. We [lost three Northern York County Regional Police detectives](https://substack.com/redirect/7e537f17-9004-4322-ab1c-dbcb5025af00?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--Sgt. Cody Becker, 39, Detective Mark Baker, 53, and Detective Isaiah Emenheiser, 43. All three were killed while attempting to arrest a man accused of stalking.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/31d4acaa-6189-4b60-9bb5-1309fdfd8eb7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Officers salute during a procession for slain Northern York County Regional Police detectives Cody Michael Becker, Mark Edward Baker and Isaiah Emenheiser, Thursday, Sept. 25, 2025, in Red Lion, Pa. (AP Photo/Matt Rourke)
Their families never got the chance to say goodbye.
I thought of their families when I remembered my mom sitting at our kitchen table with a police scanner and a cup of coffee, listening for my dad on duty with the Philadelphia Police Department. She always told us: _"[Always kiss your father goodbye](https://substack.com/redirect/e4b521d3-038d-4990-9d66-e7844f5bf37f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), because you never know if it will be the last time you see him."_ For those three families in York, that goodbye never came.
Thank you for reading. If my writing resonates with you, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..vUGZgGYq4kl3_-niojstWU8KY2Zhm7xYn8gSrFyZsRc?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=175017836)
## **The Silent Epidemic**
It should come as no surprise that veterans and law enforcement officers suffer from higher rates of suicide compared to the general population - almost twice as likely to take their own life
We tend to think of the dangers of police work in terms of physical risks. But the invisible toll is often just as devastating.
Studies show [police personnel experience roughly twice the prevalence of depression and PTSD compared to the general population.](https://substack.com/redirect/b143f004-93a5-4cad-b623-a1c13e39ce42?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
A 2020 national study found that [law enforcement officers are significantly more likely to die by suicide than other U.S. workers](https://substack.com/redirect/2ea730a1-720c-4393-a545-af3c7649112b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Using CDC death certificate data, researchers concluded officers were **54% to 69% more likely to die by suicide** compared to the general working population.
Some research suggests that [2 to 3 times more officers die by suicide than are killed in the line of duty.](https://substack.com/redirect/daa2825b-ac72-4176-9e96-293a92c48f9a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Just like we see in the military, a 2025 study of the Fargo Police Department by North Dakota State University found that stigma remains a major barrier to seeking care. More than half of officers said most of their peers wouldn't disclose a mental illness to a colleague, nearly three-quarters said they wouldn't tell a supervisor, and [53% believed most cops see getting treatment as a sign of weakness](https://substack.com/redirect/16fc9705-d692-41ba-8594-a15edb0671de?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Another source claims[ 90% of officers report stigma as a barrier to seeking mental health care.](https://substack.com/redirect/210f5fce-ad4e-47ca-a37b-c994cfaf495a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Our veterans face similar struggles. Since 2001, [over 120,000 veterans have died by suicide](https://substack.com/redirect/3586f023-f415-4956-beb1-a53a20043e62?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
That's why I chair the **[Face the Fight Initiative](https://substack.com/redirect/befad12b-a7e8-4d56-8826-c3b11d3147e3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** --a public-private partnership led by USAA and Humana with over 250 coalition partners. Our core mission is to reduce veteran suicide through awareness, screenings, interventions, and supporting veteran-focused programs.
If we truly believe in the ethic of _leave no one behind,_ then this must be all our fight - not just for those who wear the cloth of our community and country.
## **Building a Culture of Care**
Last week, I returned to my mom's alma mater, Immaculata University, where she was in the convent with the Immaculate Heart of Mary sisters, to keynote the First Responders Mental Health Symposium in Philadelphia, led by Dr. Melissa Rice.
I stood alongside President Kenyatta Johnson of Philadelphia City Council, who pledged to investigate why officers who die by suicide aren't considered "in the line of duty." We heard from global experts and nonprofit leaders like Families Behind the Badge and the Steven Cohen Foundation.
It was a powerful reminder that this issue doesn't end when the uniform comes off. Mental health is crucial to public safety.
## **Why Government Stability Matters**
One of the biggest risk factors for suicide among veterans is financial instability. That's why asking millions of our military families or public servants' families to go without a paycheck is brutal. (Congress and those in the White House should go without one, too).
Helping transitioning troops and their families earn family-sustaining jobs is why, for the past eight years, I've served as an ambassador for the U.S. Chamber of Commerce's [Hiring Our Heroes](https://substack.com/redirect/f3c71299-f8f5-48c7-acf0-fb18b0191904?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) program. Each year, we help over 84,000 transitioning troops and military spouses with jobs, training, and support. We'll be at the US Army War College this Tuesday (24% of our military spouses are unemployed, which is unconscionable).
But right now, progress for these families is at risk.
The government shutdown, which begins today, is now the fourth under President Trump's leadership and threatens the paychecks of 1.3 million active duty service members and 2 million federal workers. Six years ago, one of those shutdowns lasted 34 days. Imagine going without a paycheck for over a month.
Most American families live paycheck to paycheck. And while I've often encouraged people to follow Dave Ramsey's advice about keeping three months of emergency savings, I know firsthand that it's not always realistic. I've been in and out of that struggle myself.
This also applies to our 30,000 federal prison guards--already 4,000 short nationwide--whose collectively bargained contract was just nullified. For their fellow federal employees, and for our troops standing watch & stationed in over 170 countries, the uncertainty is more than a hardship. It's dangerous.
We ask these men and women to protect us from evil, to run toward danger when others run away. The least we can do is ensure they have the support they need--mental, financial, and moral.
It's time for all of us to live our ethic: leave no one behind.
Thank you for reading. If my writing resonates with you, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.

subject: All I can say is thank you
disclaimer_text: paid for by Tim Walz for Governor
body:
I can’t thank you enough for everything you do for our state.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116351517/573199237/191921470?refcode=header&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkY2RkNjIzZS1jYzllLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VaCr7TzxWpZRguB0zTQEXqfLp0kfUuBe4Ql-OBN5YJk=)

Peter,
I can’t thank you enough for everything you do for our state. Thanks to your support, we not only met our end-of-quarter fundraising goal — we surpassed it.
The next chapter of the Minnesota story still remains to be written. And you and I both know Donald Trump and his fellow MAGA extremists would love nothing more than to tear apart the progress we’ve built.
But the support we’ve gotten since launch day shows that Minnesotans aren’t going to let MAGA extremism invade our state.
Together we’re building a team that is ready to win this.
I’m grateful,
Tim Walz

name: Emerge
subject: Join Emerge’s Hispanic Heritage Month virtual event 10/8
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emerge
body:
emergeamerica.org [emergeamerica.org]
Dear Peter,
We are excited to invite you to join Emerge’s free Hispanic Heritage Month virtual event on Wednesday, October 8th at 4pm ET. We are hosting Emerge alum Oregon Congresswoman Andrea Salinas , former White House Political Director Emmy Ruiz , and Kat Vargas of Howdy Politics and Taco Politics in this conversation moderated by Emerge Board Member Amanda Aguirre .
They will discuss Latina leaders in the spotlight in this moment, opportunities for Latina leadership, why we need more Latinas stepping up to lead, and how Emerge helps women on their leadership journeys.
RSVP [https://secure.everyaction.com/bmhMIVlMSUOy6HYFEI4lVg2]
https://secure.everyaction.com/bmhMIVlMSUOy6HYFEI4lVg2 [https://secure.everyaction.com/bmhMIVlMSUOy6HYFEI4lVg2]
Please reach out to contact@emergeamerica.org with any questions. We hope you will join us and celebrate with us!
Warmly,
Team Emerge

body:
We Build Blue. | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.jTd4CJP2oHMhBHdrjS9uuj9lON4kJdoHrzrshzPmhg6E7kL1xBAi-DQRzVdOLqlANHgdcVBRAXjB0BTeTNviiGKuSCazl6_kMykJzyT2ZDvYDlxRrQBRi5KbFdxCpWEtwTAUN8iGiMlVa4xirdN5m-pcGSw673fHeGak8bs6wP5p1M91215TZe7FWNPwGztd8zpsF350uBLYS0n6NQNEtvcxRlE2uxNgx_64-qFyuog/4kd/K8PI5knLQBKRgQ5Q6vQspg/h0/h001.CORbwFVmkSwF5pWNX4l4B6qPR2qhm-XvqfsQa7JWD7c) | | Peter,

We’re glad you’re here. **_[Building Blue](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMa0Pr2UZFNtZKz-B_eZ_H8i1p_3EzsfrfosCjUlWlIojffLtXFv3DKUzY8JzJkcRPPzXP8XCj0XJTHwq42laFtYmLETkf34yRKwAsIWaqJMLPfpVUC6j6txKvwS8cIroHrsQp_GHfkU3IAIb7Jp99SWPnU0Ms04QFaXBLO5Zt3UtEX4qF3VB437AKvU5HAzQdL20HBBjGY-FOmoY2BJczHbFuOk2KzQ-736owRzvH6AQ/4kd/K8PI5knLQBKRgQ5Q6vQspg/h1/h001.zvUPzPIYIEGcNovPu9BqJOAe5GMDnPx4k6kr9CIEpq0)_** exists for one reason: to win elections that protect our rights and strengthen our democracy.

This isn’t just about the next big presidential race — it’s about every seat, at every level. _In 2026 alone_ , **435 House seats, 33 Senate seats, and more than 1,000 local races** will be on the line. Every single one matters.

Our strategy is simple but powerful:

* **Build Power:** Support candidates who can win — from local school boards to Congress.
* **Fund the Fight:** Level the playing field against dark money and corporate interests.
* **Elect Democrats:** Mobilize voters, organize communities, and protect our freedoms.

MAGA extremists are counting on us to sit out. We won’t. And now that you’re with us, neither will you.

Let’s get to work.

– The Building Blue Team

name: Vikram Mansharamani
subject: 🤔 Mansharamani Musings: Vikram's Latest Thoughts 💭
body:
Read my current insights and analyses

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mansharamani/vikram-update-september2025-17443789?e=93b2c2b824)
---
[|
---](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=0de35d2ffb&e=93b2c2b824)
| | | | | |
# Mansharamani Musings
---
| | September’s assassination of Charlie Kirk was a major moment in American history. I usually insist on waiting for some period of time before commenting on big developments, to gain additional perspective...but in this case, I couldn't help myself and posted my thoughts within 24 hours. I received more (mostly positive) feedback to “[Speech Isn’t Violence; Violence Isn’t Speech](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=ed1ba6a5da&e=93b2c2b824)” than I have for any other piece this year. If you haven’t read it, I’d encourage you to do so and would appreciate your feedback.
I also commented on developments at Cracker Barrel, President Trump’s visit to the United Nations, and our seemingly inevitable trend towards increasing polarization. Please note that I’ve reintroduced reader polls in some of my pieces, so please be sure to share to vote and see the results!
[_B_](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=c301dca3da&e=93b2c2b824) _est,**
Vikram**_

---
[|
---](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=a040bf1434&e=93b2c2b824)
| | SEPTEMBER 27, 2025

Two years ago I wrote an article entitled, [“Global Multilateralism is Dead.”](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=54f5bc1863&e=93b2c2b824) The piece generated a lot of feedback, most of which was negative. Former colleagues from academia reached out to suggest my views were not helpful and global organizations stopped inviting me to speak at their gatherings. But the years since I penned the piece have delivered plenty of evidence that the arc of history is bending away from global multilateralism...
---
| [CLICK HERE TO CONTINUE READING](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=7cd0c83a2b&e=93b2c2b824)
---
|
---
[|
---](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=d2adb91831&e=93b2c2b824)
| | SEPTEMBER 20, 2025

September 11, 2001 was a horrible day in US history when thousands of innocent Americans lost their lives as the result of brutal terrorist attacks. But from this tragedy emerged unity. On September 12, Americans put aside differences, came together, and stood united in the face of adversity. If there was a single moment that captured this unity, it was when, after a joint press conference on the steps of the U.S. Capitol, Republican and Democrat members of Congress spontaneously started to [sing](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=0501364635&e=93b2c2b824), “God Bless America”.
Such unity is, at best, a distant memory. In the twenty plus years since, our country has been engaged in conflicts that don’t seem to end, a mortgage crisis, a pandemic, record inflation, spasms of political violence, exploding polarization, and now, political assassinations...
---
| [CLICK HERE TO CONTINUE READING](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=beb40a51fb&e=93b2c2b824)
---
|
---
[|
---](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=2e6d45e45d&e=93b2c2b824)
| | SEPTEMBER 11, 2025

The news that Charlie Kirk, a young conservative activist, [was shot and killed](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=723fd1b29d&e=93b2c2b824) while speaking at an event in Utah was shocking. This tragedy is the latest in a rising tide of political violence that has swept the United States.
In just the past year, in addition to Kirk’s murder, [a man shot and killed](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=4eda74a876&e=93b2c2b824) a Minnesota legislator and her husband and wounded another legislator and his wife; [someone broke into the Pennsylvania’s governor’s mansion and set in on fire](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=6342e6a386&e=93b2c2b824), forcing Governor Josh Shapiro and his family to flee; and then former president and presidential candidate Donald Trump survived not [one](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=976f79a593&e=93b2c2b824) but [two](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=fa0e816d16&e=93b2c2b824) assassination attempts. Violent political protests have also become a regular feature of American politics, often involving destruction of property, hospitalizations, and clashes between opposing sides...
---
| [CLICK HERE TO CONTINUE READING](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=8c2fe27b66&e=93b2c2b824)
---
|
---
[|
---](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=f083c133a6&e=93b2c2b824)
| | SEPTEMBER 7, 2025

I have been a regular and public opponent of [DEI](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=f480aad070&e=93b2c2b824), [ESG](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=11449c1edd&e=93b2c2b824), and anything [else](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=dc808dcfd5&e=93b2c2b824) that leads to a misdirection or hijacking of corporate purpose. All these efforts, I believed, are part of the “Woke” movement that prioritized equality of outcomes over equality of opportunity, and demanded that capitalists be deprioritized, if not punished.
After the Bud Light fiasco and resulting backlash a couple of years ago, it was clear that the Woke fever (something I had likened to a mania and popular delusions I had studied during [my research into financial bubbles](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=a2bb2a7eb0&e=93b2c2b824)) had broken. The mania, which reminded me of the Salem Witch Trials and the Tulip Bubble, seemed to have reached its limits...
---
| [CLICK HERE TO CONTINUE READING](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=30900ff9d2&e=93b2c2b824)
---
|
---
|
---
[|
---](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=d201af4245&e=93b2c2b824)
| |
# NAVIGATING UNCERTAINTY
---
| | As many of you are aware, I’ve returned to writing my weekly newsletter and have been pleased by the rapidly growing interest in my thoughts. As I have in the past, I’m addressing a wide range of topics, ranging from geopolitics and economics to social trends to technology. The overall theme of my work is focused on “navigating uncertainty” and how a generalist approach can help us all make sense of what seems like chaos.
If you have not already done so, please consider subscribing! (**It’s Free**!)
---
| [Subscribe to “Navigating Uncertainty” by Vikram Mansharamani](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=6f0af59189&e=93b2c2b824)

# About Vikram
---
[|
---](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=34e61b5b88&e=93b2c2b824)
| | **VIKRAM MANSHARAMANI** is an entrepreneur, consultant, scholar, neighbor, husband, father, volunteer, and professional generalist who thinks in multiple-dimensions and looks beyond the short-term. Self-taught to think around corners and connect original dots, he spends his time speaking with global leaders in business, government, academia, and journalism. **He’s currently the Chairman and CEO of Goodwell Foods, a manufacturer of private label frozen pizza**. _LinkedIn_ has twice listed him as its #1 Top Voice in Money & Finance, and _Worth_ profiled him as one of the 100 Most Powerful People in Global Finance. Vikram earned a PhD From MIT, has taught at Yale and Harvard, and is the author of three books, [ _**The Making of a Generalist: An Independent Thinker Finds Unconventional Success in an Uncertain World**_](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=a5f809db9b&e=93b2c2b824) , [ _**Think for Yourself: Restoring Common Sense in an Age of Experts and Artificial Intelligence**_](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=f51f9c2652&e=93b2c2b824) and [ _**Boombustology: Spotting Financial Bubbles Before They Burst**_](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=4070861cbc&e=93b2c2b824). Vikram lives in Lincoln, New Hampshire with his wife and two children, where they can usually be found hiking or skiing.

name: Eva Piatek, Evergreen
subject: FWD: Quick survey for you
body:
What kind of information do you want from us?
| | |
---
| Friend—

I wanted to make sure you got my message from a few weeks ago. As we work to make some improvements to how we show up in your inbox, **I’d love to learn more about how to prefer to engage with our email content.**[**Will you let me know by taking this brief survey?**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/4041423/87SdQ4wZ)

I know life gets busy, but I promise that I’ll read every single answer. Because your feedback will help us keep our content aligned with the people who make this movement run—people like you.

Thanks for being a part of our movement.

– Eva

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Eva Piatek, Evergreen Collaborative
Date: Wed, Sept 17, 2025
Subject: Short survey for you |
| [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/4041424/87SdQ4wZ) |
---|---|---
---
| Hi there,

I know that we write to you often, so I wanted to check in and see if you’re getting what you need from us.

**_Are we sending too many emails? Want more policy content, or more actions? What else can we do for you?_**

🗣️ Now is your chance to tell us!

At Evergreen, we work every day to design and implement bold state climate policies that can resist political attacks and Big Oil’s influence, while doing everything we can to defend climate progress at the federal level.

In doing so, **we strive to be as genuine, helpful, and audience-led as possible.** To help make that happen, [**we’ve created a brief survey to help us better understand what climate issues you care about and what kind of content you’d like to receive from us.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/4041425/87SdQ4wZ) |
---
[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/4041426/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| As the person who makes sure these messages get delivered to your inbox, it’s one of my priorities to learn more about the folks who engage with our work and make so much of it possible. _And that includes you!_

I also believe that through shared knowledge and connection, we can build a movement powerful enough to take on the fossil fuel industry and deliver a thriving, just, and inclusive clean energy future for all.

But to do that effectively, [**we need to hear from Evergreen supporters like you.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/4041427/87SdQ4wZ) |
---
[SHARE YOUR THOUGHTS](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/4041428/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| I know your time and input are extremely valuable, so I really appreciate you taking two minutes today to help guide what resources we create and how we show up in your inbox in the months ahead. |
---
| In community, |
---
| | |
---
### Eva Piatek
Digital Lead – Email
Evergreen Collaborative
---
---
| **P.S.** We take the security of your data seriously and promise to protect it at all times. [**So, let’s get started!**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/4041429/87SdQ4wZ) |
---
* * *
---
| _Evergreen is building the ambitious, actionable policy roadmap for an all-out mobilization to defeat climate change—and to create millions of jobs in a thriving, just, and inclusive clean energy future. None of this would be possible without your support._ |
---
[DONATE](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/4041430/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
---
| | [ ](https://evergreenaction.com/?utm_source=digital_template&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=evergreen&utm_content=footer)
---

---
Hi Peter,This morning, the government officially shut down. Instead of fixing a broken system, protecting healthcare, and restoring the public’s trust in government, **Republicans chose to shut down the government** instead. Why? Because they’re protecting the _massive_ tax giveaways they passed for their rich friends, corporations and billionaires. The very politicians responsible for this crisis continue protecting healthcare cuts they made **to pay for Trump’s tax breaks for the ultra-rich**. But we don’t have to accept this as normal. Today, we’re holding an **urgent** **town hall with House Democratic Leader Hakeem Jeffries** , **ECU President Tiffany Muller,** and Democratic members of Congress to bring people together, share more information about the shutdown and its impact on our communities, and **how to demand real action and accountability**.
---
[ **RSVP NOW** ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116364694/573229834/-727999045?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJmNTMwOTdhLWQ3OWUtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=cE-ijjSa-gikgtbFccYFjn_ShzTaq99PndEzpLiecMQ=&emci=72a651e8-509e-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=bf53097a-d79e-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=14405814)

| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116364697/573229835/-727999045?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJmNTMwOTdhLWQ3OWUtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=cE-ijjSa-gikgtbFccYFjn_ShzTaq99PndEzpLiecMQ=&emci=72a651e8-509e-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=bf53097a-d79e-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=14405814)

---
# Will you join us? Make sure to share on social media!
---
| I can't believe the government just shut down because Republicans are prioritizing rich people & corporations. Meanwhile, Democrats are committed to fighting to lower costs for working families. That's why I'm joining the town hall today. Can you join me? clean_body: Courts, Congress, and Redistricting| | | | | Hi Peter,This morning, the government officially shut down. Instead of fixing a broken system, protecting healthcare, and restoring the public’s trust in government, Republicans chose to shut down the government instead. Why? Because they’re protecting the massive tax giveaways they passed for their rich friends, corporations and billionaires. The very politicians responsible for this crisis continue protecting healthcare cuts they made to pay for Trump’s tax breaks for the ultra-rich. But we don’t have to accept this as normal. Today, we’re holding an urgent town hall with House Democratic Leader Hakeem Jeffries , ECU President Tiffany Muller, and Democratic members of Congress to bring people together, share more information about the shutdown and its impact on our communities, and how to demand real action and accountability. | | Will you join us? Make sure to share on social media! | I can't believe the government just shut down because Republicans are prioritizing rich people & corporations. Meanwhile, Democrats are committed to fighting to lower costs for working families. That's why I'm joining the town hall today. Can you join me? See you this afternoon,Team ECU Contributions to End Citizens United//Let America Vote Action Fund are not tax deductible. name: Mark Warner
subject: At 12:01am this morning:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
My Republican colleagues refused to negotiate a bipartisan agreement that meets the needs of the American people and addresses the dangerous Republican health care crisis.

|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116364883/573230296/1082117603?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Shutdown_251001_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjQwZmQzZi1kNzllLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iqb5G2mdmkTTgqQH2z2RpD7_EWaUJvEhip-UGrQffKg=) _We understand that many_ _Americans_ _are directly impacted by the government shutdown. If you would like to pause emails from Team Warner until the federal government reopens,[_**please let us know by completing this form**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116364888/573230300/222818858?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Shutdown_251001_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjQwZmQzZi1kNzllLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iqb5G2mdmkTTgqQH2z2RpD7_EWaUJvEhip-UGrQffKg=&emci=86a881e1-cf9e-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=8240fd3f-d79e-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=4568237)._ Derek –

This is not the email I wanted to send to you today, but unfortunately, at 12:01am this morning, the federal government shut down.

Why? Because my Republican colleagues refused to negotiate a bipartisan agreement that meets the needs of the American people and addresses the dangerous Republican health care crisis.

Now, 20 million Americans are on the brink of experiencing dramatically increased premiums, co-pays, and deductibles. Thousands of federal workers – many right here in Virginia – are facing an unknown amount of time without a paycheck. And many Americans will not have access to the services they rely on from the federal government.

_Apparently, Trump's campaign promises to lower costs and increase government efficiency were nothing but empty words – and Virginians and all Americans are worse off because of it._

**It’s never been more clear: we need to win back control of Congress for Democrats in the midterms.**

[_**The work to protect this seat for Democrats – and flip control of Congress – must continue. If you are in a position to donate, I ask that you consider a contribution to my reelection campaign today.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116364896/573230307/1082117603?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Shutdown_251001_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjQwZmQzZi1kNzllLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iqb5G2mdmkTTgqQH2z2RpD7_EWaUJvEhip-UGrQffKg=)

There's no bipartisan effort in the Senate in the last decade that I haven't been deeply involved with.

**So I know this firsthand: there's always a way to meet halfway.**

In the four years Democrats were in the majority, we didn’t have ONE shutdown. Because every single time – all 13 funding bills – were negotiated with Republicans.

Congress cannot afford more delay. It’s well past time for the president and congressional Republicans to stop playing games, get serious, and do their jobs – before the American people are forced to pay the price further.

The work continues,

Mark Warner ****[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116364899/573230311/1082117603?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Shutdown_251001_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjQwZmQzZi1kNzllLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iqb5G2mdmkTTgqQH2z2RpD7_EWaUJvEhip-UGrQffKg=)****

* * *
---
|
---
| Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185
United States
---

body:

| | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zes87c9tn80u2p7tkcmbt6ujlerj9okgpe87n2mg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4spgmaoj4c9h2bs)

We need your immediate action, Friend. As it stands, Antifa is plotting bold, dangerous action to **_DESTROY_** our country and President Trump’s agenda, and if they get their way, nowhere, not even your state, will be safe.

name: Chris Taylor for Justice
subject: BREAKING: We have a new right-wing opponent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Taylor for Justice
body:
# [](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/18?refcode=em20251001-648&t=1&akid=649%2E294397%2ENEx18m)
Breaking news, folks:
**Judge Chris Taylor officially has a new right-wing opponent, Maria Lazar.**
Maria Lazar is as out of touch as it gets. She’s spent her career rolling back people’s rights and catering to billionaires and special interests. That’s why she has been backed by groups who believe in rolling back access to reproductive care – even IVF and contraception.
If elected, Maria Lazar would be the most extreme member of the Wisconsin Supreme Court.
[**Before we say more, can you rush in $10 to help fuel our campaign? With a new opponent in the race, we have to show strength immediately.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_jct_20251001_1_ak?amount=10&refcode=em20251001-648&refcode2=649_294397_NEx18m&akid=649%2E294397%2ENEx18m)
**[Donate $10 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_jct_20251001_1_ak?amount=10&refcode=em20251001-648&refcode2=649_294397_NEx18m&akid=649%2E294397%2ENEx18m)**
Now that it’s official, far-right mega donors are already gearing up to pour millions into Wisconsin to tip the scales in Lazar’s favor.
We can’t afford to wait to respond — every hour we delay, the other side gains ground.
That’s why we need this grassroots team to step up immediately. If everyone reading this email chips in right now, we’ll be ready for whatever right-wing special interests throw at us.
[**Pitch in $10 now to elect Judge Chris Taylor and secure our progressive majority on the Wisconsin Supreme Court:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_jct_20251001_1_ak?amount=10&refcode=em20251001-648&refcode2=649_294397_NEx18m&akid=649%2E294397%2ENEx18m)
**[Donate $10 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_jct_20251001_1_ak?amount=10&refcode=em20251001-648&refcode2=649_294397_NEx18m&akid=649%2E294397%2ENEx18m)**
Thank you,
Team Taylor
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_jct_footer?refcode=em20251001-648&t=2&refcode2=649_294397_NEx18m&akid=649%2E294397%2ENEx18m)**

President Donald Trump **[met with survivors of childhood cancer](https://substack.com/redirect/c0d30fde-c370-4db1-95a7-c47670aece2e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** in the Oval Office before signing an executive order directing the MAHA Commission to employ artificial intelligence for diagnosing, treating, and finding cures for childhood cancers.
_" Wow, that was so beautiful... Where did you learn how to speak like that?"_
**[Watch the unbelievable MAGA moment here:](https://substack.com/redirect/c0d30fde-c370-4db1-95a7-c47670aece2e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/c0d30fde-c370-4db1-95a7-c47670aece2e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[ Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/c0d30fde-c370-4db1-95a7-c47670aece2e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
## What will the initiative accomplish?
* **$50 million funding boost** : The order adds $50 million to the Childhood Cancer Data Initiative and issues a call for research proposals on AI applications in childhood cancer, with researchers able to use existing databases of molecular and genetic information to predict treatment responses and minimize side effects.
* **Budget contradiction raises questions** : Despite the initiative, the Trump administration's budget request proposes cutting National Cancer Institute funding from $7.2 billion to $4.5 billion for fiscal year 2026, though the White House pushed back on characterizations of cutting cancer research funding and said the budget is "still being worked out."
* **Improving survival rates** : Pediatric cancer remains the leading cause of death by disease after infancy in children, but five-year survival rates have improved significantly--rising from 58-68% in the 1970s to more than 83% currently for children ages 0-19, according to the National Cancer Institute.
