* * *
# Government enters partial shutdown, Trump warns of "irreversible" consequences
The federal government **[officially entered a partial shutdown](https://substack.com/redirect/e37e9f09-fe7a-4dfb-a8bb-77b7dd788830?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** after midnight on Wednesday when Congress failed to pass a continuing resolution (CR) before the October 1st deadline, with Democrats blocking the Republican bill that would have extended funding until November 21st.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e37e9f09-fe7a-4dfb-a8bb-77b7dd788830?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Democratic healthcare demands vs. Republican refusal** : Democrats insisted on including extensions of COVID-era Obamacare subsidies set to expire in December 2025, while Republicans accused them of holding the government "hostage for over $1 trillion in new spending" and said they were willing to discuss healthcare funding later but not as part of the CR.
* **Mass federal worker impact** : Approximately 750,000 federal employees could be furloughed daily at a cost of roughly $400 million in compensation, with active-duty service members also going without pay, while OMB Director Russ Vought's guidance warned of potential permanent job cuts beyond typical furloughs.
* **Trump 's warning and political standoff**: President Trump stated Republicans could "do things during the shutdown that are irreversible" including "cutting vast numbers of people out" and programs Democrats support, while Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer accused Trump of "using Americans as political pawns," with both sides blaming each other as the standoff continues.

* * *
# Black conservative gives perfect response to rude Democrat caller who asks "Are you a DEI hire?"
Black Heritage Foundation research fellow Delano Squires **[responded perfectly to a rude CSPAN caller](https://substack.com/redirect/73efc61b-63e2-4fe3-ad0e-00d969252275?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** who asked if he considered himself a "DEI hire."
"Let me answer the second question first, right, in terms of being a DEI hire. There's no part of me that believes that. I have the respect of my colleagues," Squires answered. "My work stands for itself. As I said, I've been writing about these issues and thinking about these issues since I was 15, but even in an official capacity for over a decade."
[](https://substack.com/redirect/40f797a0-a573-485a-bfcd-f9fcba9a1cea?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Hypocrisy highlighted** : Squires pointed out the contradiction of people who support DEI programs using "DEI" as an insult against black conservatives they disagree with, calling this practice "quite interesting" and turning the criticism back on his questioner.
* **Polling shows skepticism about DEI** : An AP-NORC poll from July found that black and Hispanic respondents are more likely than white people to believe DEI programs increase discrimination against minorities, with roughly four in 10 black respondents saying DEI increases discrimination against black people.
* **Limited perceived benefits** : The survey of 1,437 adults showed less than half of Americans believe DEI programs have benefits for "the people it's intended to help," indicating widespread skepticism about the effectiveness of diversity initiatives across racial groups.

* * *
# Republican senator to introduce bill removing "gender neutral" passports once and for all
Senator Roger Marshall (R-KS) **[is introducing the"Passport Sanity Act"](https://substack.com/redirect/7dec8f1e-0ecc-47da-afaa-85c71679e29f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** to mandate that the State Department can only issue passports marked male or female, eliminating the option for gender-neutral "X" designations.
* **Codifying Trump 's executive action**: The bill would permanently enshrine President Trump's January executive order requiring travel documents be issued based on biological sex, with Secretary of State Marco Rubio having already frozen all passport applications with "X" gender markers.
* **Legal challenge ongoing** : Trump's directive has been blocked by a federal judge, prompting the administration to appeal to the Supreme Court, with Solicitor General John Sauer arguing "The Constitution does not prohibit the government from defining sex in terms of an individual's biological classification."
* **Reversal of Biden policy** : The legislation would reverse the Biden administration's March 2021 policy allowing "X" passports for those who rejected their biological sex, part of the Trump administration's broader rollback of transgender-related policies including removing ideological language from federal documents and targeting taxpayer-funded hospitals performing transgender procedures on minors.

clean_body: Democrats just pulled off an upset in my home state of Iowa. Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this Peter, As the senior U.S. Senator from the great state of Iowa, I keep my finger on the pulse of the political landscape of our state. There are not many things that surprise me ... Which is why I was so deeply disturbed by the shocking results of the recent special election here: That 's right: I won't sugarcoat things - But here's the silver lining: The Democrats didn't win on the issues. They won simply because they turned out a much larger percentage of their voters than Republicans did. In fact, that's a pattern we've been seeing all year... Per Cook Political Report: "Republicans just can't count on Trump's more peripherally-engaged voters to show up when Trump isn't on the ballot. Democrats have been averaging 63% of Harris 's 2024 vote totals while If those numbers hold true for the midterms, it will be a disaster for Republicans. We could LOSE even here in Iowa and be forced to hand power in the Senate to radical, far-Left Democrats. It would truly be a nightmare scenario for our country. This all proves just how important the GOP's 2025 Voter Verification Initiative is for the midterms, Peter. We need to ensure we have a fully, 100% VERIFIED voter file so we can get every last Republican voter out to the polls! But your profile has been flagged for me as one that is still marked as Thank you, Senator Chuck Grassley | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

**For Charlie,** The Turning Point USA Team

name: Jazz Lewis
subject: Newsletter
body:
https://www.jazzlewis.com/ [https://www.jazzlewis.com/]
UMD Public Leadership Scholars Program
As a proud graduate of the University of Maryland’s Public Leadership Scholars Program, I can say without hesitation: this experience changes lives . My own path in public service started with the opportunities I found through the Scholars Program at College Park. From my beginning as a student organizer, to growing as a Capitol Hill staffer, and now serving as a Delegate and Majority Whip in the Maryland House of Delegates, I know just how important this program can be for students and their future careers .
When I spoke with current students, my message was simple: this program works. But it only works if you lean in . Don’t rest on your laurels. Step outside your comfort zone. Seek mentorship. Build relationships. Take action. The program, and the university, are only as powerful as the effort you put into them. Like all things, it is what you make of it.
We are living in a time of rapid change, and strong leadership has never been more urgent . These students carry a mandate to prepare themselves, because the moment to lead will come—not if, but when. And I have every confidence they will rise to meet it.
Congratulations to the newest class of scholars, I can’t wait to see what the future holds for you all!
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88468/images/UMD%20Public%20Leadership%201.jpg] [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88468/images/UMD%20Public%20Leadership%202.jpg]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88468/images/UMD%20Public%20Leadership%203.jpg]
Federal Job Cuts: Where We’re at
According to the Maryland Department of Labor, our state lost another 2,500 federal jobs in August alone. Since January, that brings the total to 15,100 positions, nearly 10 percent of the federal jobs located in Maryland. With almost 100,000 federal jobs eliminated nationwide this year and Maryland bearing the brunt, the long term stability of our state’s economy and labor market is facing significant strain .
These cuts are hitting families hard . Many former employees with decades of experience are struggling to find equivalent work in the private sector and are being forced to leave the region or accept substantial pay cuts. This is unacceptable , and I remain committed to supporting and advocating for these workers, many of whom live right here in Prince George’s County.
Click here [https://marylandmatters.org/2025/09/19/marylands-federal-job-losses-climb-to-15100-the-most-in-the-nation/?fbclid=IwdGRjcAM-NVFjbGNrAz41TWV4dG4DYWVtAjExAAEexkwGZL7BYogLd_njapLyl5iKeGCJJSZ0mEEtLoGib_moWmb0QjSu3CX89_I_aem_esawCnBAVawhZC4uHbPvPg] to learn more about the cuts and their effects.
House of Reformation: Remembering and Reflecting
For too long, our community has lived with the painful truth of the House of Reformation, which operated right here in Prince George’s County . The state-run juvenile facility, where more than 230 Black children died between 1873 and 1939, often confined them for nothing more than “vagrancy” or “incorrigibility.” These young boys were forced into labor, endured neglect and abuse, and when they died, they were buried in what would become a dilapidated graveyard, a resting place where many now have only cinderblocks for headstones .
Today , advocates, families, and state leaders are beginning the work of restoring the burial site, investigating the deaths, and ensuring these children are finally honored with the respect they deserve. But remembrance alone is not enough . We need sustained investment, legislation to formally investigate what happened, and involvement of local residents who may be connected to those buried there. I believe we have a moral responsibility to face this history , to care for these boys’ resting place, and to make sure Maryland never again fails its children in this way.
We cannot forget our own history , and we should do everything possible to restore this neglected graveyard and grant these children the dignity in death that was stolen from them in life . I am proud to see fellow state leaders stepping up to honor the young black boys buried here.
Celebrating the Jewish High Holy Days
As the Jewish community begins their holiday season, I want to wish you all a happy new year and an easy fast as we prepare for Yom Kippur in the coming days. Chag Sameach to all of my Jewish friends!
https://www.jazzlewis.com/ [https://www.jazzlewis.com/]
Delegate Jazz Lewis
Democrat, District 24, Prince George's County
Taylor House Office Building, Room 151
6 Bladen St., Annapolis, MD 21401
800-492-7122, ext. 3691; jazz.lewis@house.state.md.us
www.jazzlewis.com
By Authority: Friends of Jazz Lewis, Chris Taitt, Treasurer
Friends of Jazz Lewis - State Account
P.O. Box 341854
Bethesda, MD 20827
United States

clean_body: [] UMD Public Leadership Scholars Program As a proud graduate of the University of Maryland’s Public Leadership Scholars Program, I can say without hesitation: this experience changes lives . My own path in public service started with the opportunities I found through the Scholars Program at College Park. From my beginning as a student organizer, to growing as a Capitol Hill staffer, and now serving as a Delegate and Majority Whip in the Maryland House of Delegates, I know just how important this program can be for students and their future careers . When I spoke with current students, my message was simple: this program works. But it only works if you lean in . Don’t rest on your laurels. Step outside your comfort zone. Seek mentorship. Build relationships. Take action. The program, and the university, are only as powerful as the effort you put into them. Like all things, it is what you make of it. We are living in a time of rapid change, and strong leadership has never been more urgent . These students carry a mandate to prepare themselves, because the moment to lead will come—not if, but when. And I have every confidence they will rise to meet it. Congratulations to the newest class of scholars, I can’t wait to see what the future holds for you all! [] [] [] Federal Job Cuts: Where We’re at According to the Maryland Department of Labor, our state lost another 2,500 federal jobs in August alone. Since January, that brings the total to 15,100 positions, nearly 10 percent of the federal jobs located in Maryland. With almost 100,000 federal jobs eliminated nationwide this year and Maryland bearing the brunt, the long term stability of our state’s economy and labor market is facing significant strain . These cuts are hitting families hard . Many former employees with decades of experience are struggling to find equivalent work in the private sector and are being forced to leave the region or accept substantial pay cuts. This is unacceptable , and I remain committed to supporting and advocating for these workers, many of whom live right here in Prince George’s County. Click here [] to learn more about the cuts and their effects. House of Reformation: Remembering and Reflecting For too long, our community has lived with the painful truth of the House of Reformation, which operated right here in Prince George’s County . The state-run juvenile facility, where more than 230 Black children died between 1873 and 1939, often confined them for nothing more than “vagrancy” or “incorrigibility.” These young boys were forced into labor, endured neglect and abuse, and when they died, they were buried in what would become a dilapidated graveyard, a resting place where many now have only cinderblocks for headstones . Today , advocates, families, and state leaders are beginning the work of restoring the burial site, investigating the deaths, and ensuring these children are finally honored with the respect they deserve. But remembrance alone is not enough . We need sustained investment, legislation to formally investigate what happened, and involvement of local residents who may be connected to those buried there. I believe we have a moral responsibility to face this history , to care for these boys’ resting place, and to make sure Maryland never again fails its children in this way. We cannot forget our own history , and we should do everything possible to restore this neglected graveyard and grant these children the dignity in death that was stolen from them in life . I am proud to see fellow state leaders stepping up to honor the young black boys buried here. Celebrating the Jewish High Holy Days As the Jewish community begins their holiday season, I want to wish you all a happy new year and an easy fast as we prepare for Yom Kippur in the coming days. Chag Sameach to all of my Jewish friends! [] Delegate Jazz Lewis Democrat, District 24, Prince George's County Taylor House Office Building, Room 151 6 Bladen St., Annapolis, MD 21401 800-492-7122, ext. 3691; jazz.lewis@house.state.md.us www.jazzlewis.com By Authority: Friends of Jazz Lewis, Chris Taitt, Treasurer Friends of Jazz Lewis - State Account P.O. Box 341854 Bethesda, MD 20827 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

name: Brian Lenney
subject: When Parents Beg the Government to Raise Their Children for Them
body:
Dismantling the App Store Accountability Act

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack..pIj34z54CI4KImaEp5Z9Mqb_38p57sOtE0HVxpTITI4?) for more
---
# [When Parents Beg the Government to Raise Their Children for Them](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2114823&post_id=175023753&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc1MDIzNzUzLCJpYXQiOjE3NTkzMzI3NDUsImV4cCI6MTc2MTkyNDc0NSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTIxMTQ4MjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.pQs9AjYhhOcK7Dk_9YugB_j6owRNJOP8y85njWSdx0c)
### Dismantling the App Store Accountability Act
| | [Brian Lenney](https://substack.com/@brianlenney)
---
| Oct 1
---
| [](https://substack.com/@brianlenney)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2114823&post_id=175023753&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc1MDIzNzUzLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1OTMzMjc0NSwiZXhwIjoxNzYxOTI0NzQ1LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjExNDgyMyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.pOg-GCKKzQHvpk4hSwKiezR2ULo_zhF-ORtRZIgn2ak&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2114823&post_id=175023753&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc1MDIzNzUzLCJpYXQiOjE3NTkzMzI3NDUsImV4cCI6MTc2MTkyNDc0NSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTIxMTQ4MjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.pQs9AjYhhOcK7Dk_9YugB_j6owRNJOP8y85njWSdx0c&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2114823&post_id=175023753&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc1MDIzNzUzLCJpYXQiOjE3NTkzMzI3NDUsImV4cCI6MTc2MTkyNDc0NSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTIxMTQ4MjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.pQs9AjYhhOcK7Dk_9YugB_j6owRNJOP8y85njWSdx0c)
---
| | [](https://substack..-6hcA6j-3U2WmSvEMPT9WlauMIQl5LI6oJ9IfdQsbAU?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/brianlenney/p/when-parents-beg-the-government-to?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/95474c27-73c6-4aae-99df-e8b48b990842?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
There's a moment in every coordinated deception when the mask slips just enough to reveal what's really happening underneath.
For the "App Store Accountability Act," that moment came in a Louisiana Senate Finance Committee hearing in 2024, when Digital Childhood Alliance Executive Director Casey Stefanski squirmed under questioning from Senator Jay Morris. When asked whether tech companies funded her organization, she deflected, claimed discomfort, and eventually admitted they received tech funding but refused to name which companies were writing the checks (cough, Meta).
That awkward silence told you everything.
But a recent piece titled ["Making the Case for the App Store Accountability Act"](https://substack.com/redirect/e1f4ecfa-a081-4b5d-981e-42267bc0308a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) by the "Digital Childhood Alliance" wants you to ignore that moment entirely. They want you to believe you're powerless to protect your own children, that only government regulation can save kids from Big Tech, and that Apple and Google bear responsibility for harm they didn't create and can't control.
As you're about to see, every claim is wrong.
It's a coordinated campaign to convince parents they're incompetent while the company actually destroying children's mental health funds legislation that lets them off the hook.
The fundamental truth they're desperate to obscure:
### **You already have complete power to protect your children. The solution isn 't more regulation. It's taking the damn phone away.**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/30dbd38e-87d0-4ee6-b717-20e53e5c54ac?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The Digital Childhood Alliance claims "the current system places an impossible burden on parents." _Uh, excuse me?_ According to them, expecting parents to monitor what apps their children download represents some insurmountable challenge only government can solve.
Reading an app description before your child downloads it is not an "impossible burden." You know what's actually impossible?
_**Expecting Apple to police every piece of content in millions of apps while Meta continues serving algorithmic poison directly to your child 's brain.**_
If spending 30 seconds reading an app description feels too burdensome, forcing Apple to send you a digital permission slip won't transform you into an engaged parent (you'll click "approve" without reading it, exactly like you breeze through every Terms of Service agreement).
The article claims parents can't be "responsible for every minute of content their kids consume."
**But that 's literally parenting is it not?!**
1. _When your 12-year-old asks for Instagram, you can say no_
2. _When they beg for TikTok, you can refuse_
3. _When they want a smartphone, you can hand them a flip phone instead_

Pretending you're helpless is the surrender Meta is banking on.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ff5295ad-a34d-431e-b57a-460b01362b8c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
_[Cartoons Hate Her](https://substack.com/redirect/81ce1ef4-7106-41b1-a369-c1cf46099d11?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_
The Digital Childhood Alliance points to Instagram's 12+ rating and cheerful app description, then reveals it mentions nothing about sexual content, violence, or eating disorder tutorials.
Their "gotcha" question: _" Does this sound like an app that is appropriate for children?"_
Here's the answer:
_**Don 't let your child download it.**_
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a2fd27a7-4441-4806-9ea4-044088f48a8b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
This may come as a shocker, but Instagram cannot install itself on your child's phone.
It requires your permission, your payment method, your WiFi, your device. You control every point of access. But notice the sleight of hand? _Instagram 's rating is misleading because Meta makes it misleading. _
So why regulate Apple instead of Meta?
☑️ It's Meta's content
☑️ It's Meta's algorithm
☑️ It's _Meta 's platform_ causing documented harm
So,_if_ you're gonna do something, why not _make Meta_ verify ages at the point where they serve content.
But nope. Instead, they compare digital parenting with building codes and allergen warnings, claiming "even the most diligent adults can't know every danger in every product."
This is dishonest at best.
You need building codes because you can't inspect structural engineering. You need allergen warnings because you can't perform chemical analysis. But deciding _**whether your 12-year-old should have Instagram**_ doesn't require specialized expertise.
It requires the willingness to say "no" and enforce boundaries.
## What ASAA Actually Does (Spoiler: Nothing)
**Requirement #1: Verified parental approval for each app download.**
Three scenarios matter:
1. If you're an engaged parent monitoring your child's phone. _ASAA gives you zero new control._
2. If you're a checked-out parent who gave unrestricted device access. You'll click "approve" without reading. _ASAA changes nothing._
3. Your child accesses social media through a friend's phone, web browsers, or the thousand workarounds teenagers have perfected. A _SAA does nothing because it only covers app store downloads._

The only thing ASAA accomplishes?
Forcing Apple and Google to build expensive verification systems for Meta's harmful products. Meanwhile, Meta serves whatever content maximizes engagement, but now has a liability shield because "the parent approved the download."
Meta creates the harm. Apple handles the paperwork.
Meta faces zero accountability.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5d36421f-96b7-456e-993c-99aaba1c3569?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**Requirement #2: App stores use age verification they "already have."**
This misses the point.
Storing birthdates doesn't prevent Meta from serving eating disorder content to vulnerable 14-year-olds after they open the app.
[But when Idaho targeted pornography sites directly](https://open.substack.com/pub/brianlenney/p/when-child-protection-becomes-censorship?r=ii39s&utm_campaign=post&utm_medium=web&showWelcomeOnShare=true), _**those sites**_ had to verify ages before serving explicit content. No hiding behind app stores. Verification happened where it mattered: at the point of content access.
ASAA does the opposite: Verify at download, create false security, then let Meta serve whatever their algorithm decides.
**Requirement #3: "Accurate" age ratings that reflect actual content.**
Question: who gets to decide what's "accurate?"
Will Apple review every Instagram post? Every TikTok video? Meta serves billions of pieces of content daily through algorithms Apple can't see.
The real solution: make Meta (and similiar platforms) accountable for what they serve.
If Instagram's algorithm pushes pro-anorexia content to middle schoolers, that's Meta's responsibility. They built it. They profit from it.
But ASAA lets Meta operate freely while forcing Apple to rate content they don't create and can't monitor.
## When the Excuses Are Worse Than the Problem
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/cfac74d6-1621-4cb0-8a3f-ebf6cff9e31f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The Digital Childhood Alliance apparently thinks you were born yesterday. So let's examine their defenses for ASAA and watch them collapse under the weight of their own absurdity.
> **" Age verification protects privacy without storing data."**
Meta already collects massive amounts of personal data when you create an Instagram account. They know your age, location, interests, relationships, and psychological vulnerabilities. They use this to serve targeted content designed to maximize engagement regardless of impact. But somehow we should worry about Apple knowing your birthdate?
Meta wants app stores handling verification so Meta faces no direct accountability.
> **" App stores handle verification, NOT developers, protecting smaller companies."**
Meta creates the harmful content. [Meta designs algorithms that research shows damage teenage girls' mental health](https://substack.com/redirect/624164ee-dc9c-4244-9f42-2b9aae3c3f5a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Meta profits from engagement patterns their own internal documents acknowledge cause psychological harm. But with the ASAA, Meta takes zero responsibility because they've outsourced all liability to Apple and Google.
Compare that to Idaho's age verification law: Pornhub must verify ages before serving content. _Not Apple. Not Google._ The company profiting from potentially harmful material bears the compliance burden.
> **" Children as young as 18 months are hypnotized by screens."**
Yes... _**because you hand them screens instead of parenting.**_
An 18-month-old didn't download Instagram or purchase a smartphone. Every step required _your_ choices.
> **" Children are targeted by predators through social media and gaming platforms."**
Yes... _**because you give them unrestricted access to platforms designed for public interaction with strangers.**_
The solution isn't Apple verifying ages. It's not giving your 8-year-old unrestricted online access where strangers can message them.
You control device access, screen time, app downloads, and whether devices live in bedrooms overnight.
## Where Idaho Got It Right
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/cc4b5b75-0145-41b8-abba-459bcc8dbf17?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
_Idaho Capital Sun_
Idaho didn't regulate internet providers, app stores, or device manufacturers.
We went straight to the source: _websites profiting from explicit content must verify ages before serving that content._ The law hit hard enough that Pornhub geoblocked Idaho entirely rather than comply.
That's real deterrence and actual accountability.
Because we recognized a principle Meta desperately wants ignored: _those who create and profit from potentially harmful content should prevent minors from accessing it_. Not third parties. The actual source.
ASAA embraces the opposite: Meta designs algorithms pushing eating disorder content to teenage girls, but Apple must somehow rate apps containing content they can't see or control.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/044c8ba9-35ec-4213-aab3-6ba2f94760a5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
When you hand a 12-year-old an unrestricted smartphone with social media accounts and bedroom device access, you made deliberate choices with predictable consequences.
* Rising depression
* Skyrocketing self-harm among young girls
* Suicide attempts completely out of control

Meta's own internal research, [exposed through whistleblower documents](https://substack.com/redirect/c28237ff-1950-4b88-ae60-5bcf71c665c7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), proved Facebook executives knew their platforms devastated young people's mental health. Instagram made body image issues worse for one in three teen girls. The platform worsened eating disorders and suicidal thoughts.
But instead of fixing their platforms, Meta hired lobbyists, spent $24 million in 2024 (exceeding defense contractors), and backed organizations pushing legislation that shifts compliance burden to their competitors.
The tobacco industry blamed consumers for addiction. The alcohol industry resisted age restrictions. But the difference is...
_**Parents weren 't handing cigarettes to their children while demanding the government regulate the convenience store.**_
That's exactly what's happening with ASAA. You're giving children access to platforms research proves harmful, then demanding Apple or Google prevent the harm you're enabling.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/3302eea8-eaff-434b-bb85-b97eeadfe874?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
When your child asks for Instagram, say no.
When they claim "everyone has it," explain why popularity doesn't mean healthy. When they argue they need it for social connection, teach them about face-to-face relationships without algorithmic mediation.
These are parenting decisions.
_**The "anxious generation" wasn't created by app stores failing to verify ages. **_
It was created by algorithms deliberately designed to maximize engagement regardless of psychological impact, combined with parents who surrendered authority and demanded someone else fix problems they enabled.
When Casey Stefanski (executive director of the Digital Childhood Alliance) [refused to name her Big Tech backers in Louisiana](https://substack.com/redirect/4bcfbb40-7669-43a4-8520-c48caacdfff8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), she was protecting coordinated deception. Meta identified a brilliant strategy: weaponize parental anxiety to wage regulatory war against competitors while preserving their ability to serve algorithmic content to minors.
Stop asking state government to be mommy and daddy.
You're the parent. Your child lives in your home. Uses devices you purchased. Accesses apps you have authority to permit or prohibit. You have all the power, but only if you use it.
The App Store Accountability Act is theater funded by the company destroying children's mental health. It accomplishes nothing except shifting burden to Apple and Google while Meta operates harmful algorithms without restriction.
_Take the damn phone away._
**Be the parent. Set the boundaries. Monitor their lives. Say no and mean it.**
That's the job you signed up for, right?

---

clean_body: Dismantling the App Store Accountability Act | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more Dismantling the App Store Accountability Act | | | Oct 1 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- There's a moment in every coordinated deception when the mask slips just enough to reveal what's really happening underneath. For the "App Store Accountability Act," that moment came in a Louisiana Senate Finance Committee hearing in 2024, when Digital Childhood Alliance Executive Director Casey Stefanski squirmed under questioning from Senator Jay Morris. When asked whether tech companies funded her organization, she deflected, claimed discomfort, and eventually admitted they received tech funding but refused to name which companies were writing the checks (cough, Meta). That awkward silence told you everything. But a recent piece titled by the "Digital Childhood Alliance" wants you to ignore that moment entirely. They want you to believe you're powerless to protect your own children, that only government regulation can save kids from Big Tech, and that Apple and Google bear responsibility for harm they didn't create and can't control. As you're about to see, every claim is wrong. It's a coordinated campaign to convince parents they're incompetent while the company actually destroying children's mental health funds legislation that lets them off the hook. The fundamental truth they're desperate to obscure: You already have complete power to protect your children. The solution isn 't more regulation. It's taking the damn phone away. | | ---|---|--- The Digital Childhood Alliance claims "the current system places an impossible burden on parents." Uh, excuse me? According to them, expecting parents to monitor what apps their children download represents some insurmountable challenge only government can solve. Reading an app description before your child downloads it is not an "impossible burden." You know what's actually impossible? Expecting Apple to police every piece of content in millions of apps while Meta continues serving algorithmic poison directly to your child 's brain. If spending 30 seconds reading an app description feels too burdensome, forcing Apple to send you a digital permission slip won't transform you into an engaged parent (you'll click "approve" without reading it, exactly like you breeze through every Terms of Service agreement). The article claims parents can't be "responsible for every minute of content their kids consume." But that 's literally parenting is it not?! 1. When your 12-year-old asks for Instagram, you can say no 2. When they beg for TikTok, you can refuse 3. When they want a smartphone, you can hand them a flip phone instead Pretending you're helpless is the surrender Meta is banking on. | | ---|---|--- The Digital Childhood Alliance points to Instagram's 12+ rating and cheerful app description, then reveals it mentions nothing about sexual content, violence, or eating disorder tutorials. Their "gotcha" question: " Does this sound like an app that is appropriate for children?" Here's the answer: Don 't let your child download it. | | ---|---|--- This may come as a shocker, but Instagram cannot install itself on your child's phone. It requires your permission, your payment method, your WiFi, your device. You control every point of access. But notice the sleight of hand? Instagram 's rating is misleading because Meta makes it misleading. So why regulate Apple instead of Meta? ☑️ It's Meta's content ☑️ It's Meta's algorithm ☑️ It's Meta 's platform causing documented harm So,if you're gonna do something, why not make Meta verify ages at the point where they serve content. But nope. Instead, they compare digital parenting with building codes and allergen warnings, claiming "even the most diligent adults can't know every danger in every product." This is dishonest at best. You need building codes because you can't inspect structural engineering. You need allergen warnings because you can't perform chemical analysis. But deciding whether your 12-year-old should have Instagram doesn't require specialized expertise. It requires the willingness to say "no" and enforce boundaries. What ASAA Actually Does (Spoiler: Nothing) Requirement #1: Verified parental approval for each app download. Three scenarios matter: 1. If you're an engaged parent monitoring your child's phone. ASAA gives you zero new control. 2. If you're a checked-out parent who gave unrestricted device access. You'll click "approve" without reading. ASAA changes nothing. 3. Your child accesses social media through a friend's phone, web browsers, or the thousand workarounds teenagers have perfected. A SAA does nothing because it only covers app store downloads. The only thing ASAA accomplishes? Forcing Apple and Google to build expensive verification systems for Meta's harmful products. Meanwhile, Meta serves whatever content maximizes engagement, but now has a liability shield because "the parent approved the download." Meta creates the harm. Apple handles the paperwork. Meta faces zero accountability. | | ---|---|--- Requirement #2: App stores use age verification they "already have." This misses the point. Storing birthdates doesn't prevent Meta from serving eating disorder content to vulnerable 14-year-olds after they open the app. , those sites had to verify ages before serving explicit content. No hiding behind app stores. Verification happened where it mattered: at the point of content access. ASAA does the opposite: Verify at download, create false security, then let Meta serve whatever their algorithm decides. Requirement #3: "Accurate" age ratings that reflect actual content. Question: who gets to decide what's "accurate?" Will Apple review every Instagram post? Every TikTok video? Meta serves billions of pieces of content daily through algorithms Apple can't see. The real solution: make Meta (and similiar platforms) accountable for what they serve. If Instagram's algorithm pushes pro-anorexia content to middle schoolers, that's Meta's responsibility. They built it. They profit from it. But ASAA lets Meta operate freely while forcing Apple to rate content they don't create and can't monitor. When the Excuses Are Worse Than the Problem | | ---|---|--- The Digital Childhood Alliance apparently thinks you were born yesterday. So let's examine their defenses for ASAA and watch them collapse under the weight of their own absurdity. " Age verification protects privacy without storing data." Meta already collects massive amounts of personal data when you create an Instagram account. They know your age, location, interests, relationships, and psychological vulnerabilities. They use this to serve targeted content designed to maximize engagement regardless of impact. But somehow we should worry about Apple knowing your birthdate? Meta wants app stores handling verification so Meta faces no direct accountability. " App stores handle verification, NOT developers, protecting smaller companies." Meta creates the harmful content. . Meta profits from engagement patterns their own internal documents acknowledge cause psychological harm. But with the ASAA, Meta takes zero responsibility because they've outsourced all liability to Apple and Google. Compare that to Idaho's age verification law: Pornhub must verify ages before serving content. Not Apple. Not Google. The company profiting from potentially harmful material bears the compliance burden. " Children as young as 18 months are hypnotized by screens." Yes... because you hand them screens instead of parenting. An 18-month-old didn't download Instagram or purchase a smartphone. Every step required your choices. " Children are targeted by predators through social media and gaming platforms." Yes... because you give them unrestricted access to platforms designed for public interaction with strangers. The solution isn't Apple verifying ages. It's not giving your 8-year-old unrestricted online access where strangers can message them. You control device access, screen time, app downloads, and whether devices live in bedrooms overnight. Where Idaho Got It Right | | ---|---|--- Idaho Capital Sun Idaho didn't regulate internet providers, app stores, or device manufacturers. We went straight to the source: websites profiting from explicit content must verify ages before serving that content. The law hit hard enough that Pornhub geoblocked Idaho entirely rather than comply. That's real deterrence and actual accountability. Because we recognized a principle Meta desperately wants ignored: those who create and profit from potentially harmful content should prevent minors from accessing it. Not third parties. The actual source. ASAA embraces the opposite: Meta designs algorithms pushing eating disorder content to teenage girls, but Apple must somehow rate apps containing content they can't see or control. | | ---|---|--- When you hand a 12-year-old an unrestricted smartphone with social media accounts and bedroom device access, you made deliberate choices with predictable consequences. Rising depression Skyrocketing self-harm among young girls Suicide attempts completely out of control Meta's own internal research, , proved Facebook executives knew their platforms devastated young people's mental health. Instagram made body image issues worse for one in three teen girls. The platform worsened eating disorders and suicidal thoughts. But instead of fixing their platforms, Meta hired lobbyists, spent $24 million in 2024 (exceeding defense contractors), and backed organizations pushing legislation that shifts compliance burden to their competitors. The tobacco industry blamed consumers for addiction. The alcohol industry resisted age restrictions. But the difference is... Parents weren 't handing cigarettes to their children while demanding the government regulate the convenience store. That's exactly what's happening with ASAA. You're giving children access to platforms research proves harmful, then demanding Apple or Google prevent the harm you're enabling. When your child asks for Instagram, say no. When they claim "everyone has it," explain why popularity doesn't mean healthy. When they argue they need it for social connection, teach them about face-to-face relationships without algorithmic mediation. These are parenting decisions. The "anxious generation" wasn't created by app stores failing to verify ages. It was created by algorithms deliberately designed to maximize engagement regardless of psychological impact, combined with parents who surrendered authority and demanded someone else fix problems they enabled. When Casey Stefanski (executive director of the Digital Childhood Alliance) , she was protecting coordinated deception. Meta identified a brilliant strategy: weaponize parental anxiety to wage regulatory war against competitors while preserving their ability to serve algorithmic content to minors. Stop asking state government to be mommy and daddy. You're the parent. Your child lives in your home. Uses devices you purchased. Accesses apps you have authority to permit or prohibit. You have all the power, but only if you use it. The App Store Accountability Act is theater funded by the company destroying children's mental health. It accomplishes nothing except shifting burden to Apple and Google while Meta operates harmful algorithms without restriction. Take the damn phone away. Be the parent. Set the boundaries. Monitor their lives. Say no and mean it.** That's the job you signed up for, right? | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Brian Lenney ? ?

Dear Friend of Religious Liberty, Because of your voice, Camp IdRaHaJe can continue to live out its Christian faith--free from government coercion. Praise God! When Colorado officials tried to force the camp to allow males in girls' private spaces, Camp IdRaHaJe didn't cave. It stood firm on its biblical convictions--and said, "We'd rather have Jesus." And you stood with the camp. Thousands signed the public statement of support. The outcry was heard. Colorado backed down. **Today, Camp IdRaHaJe remains a place where kids across the state can encounter the hope of the Gospel without compromise.** _**But the battle for truth and freedom isn 't over.**_ In Vermont, the girls' basketball team at Mid Vermont Christian School (MVCS) chose faith over fear--and paid a price. Faced with the prospect of competing against a team that included a male who identifies as female, the school declined to play. The school and its families honored their biblical beliefs about God's design for males and females. In response, **Vermont officials banned every MVCS middle and high school student from participating in all state-sponsored sports. Every student --benched.** This punishment has lasted two years. And it continues. We're helping MVCS challenge this injustice in court--because **no school, ministry, or student should be punished for following their faith.** Will you stand with this school and its students today? Add your name to the statement of support and tell Vermont: truth matters.

name: GIFFORDS
subject: Donald Trump just shut down the government.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Team,
Earlier this morning, Donald Trump and Republicans shut down the government.
Why? Because they want to jack up healthcare costs for millions of Americans to give tax breaks for their billionaire friends.
Americans are already feeling the effects of rising costs. If the GOP’s budget goes through, more than 20 million Americans will see their premiums skyrocket.
Republicans control the White House, the Senate, and the House of Representatives. Republicans own this shutdown.
Cuts to healthcare, especially Medicaid, will have devastating consequences to survivors of gun violence who often need costly long-term care after facing such a life altering experience.
Additionally, hundreds of thousands of federal employees will be furloughed — or fired altogether. Active-duty servicemembers could be forced to wait even longer for their next paycheck. Social Security and VA benefits could be delayed.
This is unacceptable. Donald Trump and Republicans must come to the table, reopen our government, and save our healthcare.
[**Will you add your name to demand Donald Trump reopen the federal government? We need a strong showing of support right now.**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_gvtshutdown_sv//?source=em251001-1-b&refcode2=10932.3935704.95GrMn&akid=10932%2E3935704%2E95GrMn)
**[SIGN ON](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=.OZdfvS&refcode=em251001-1-b&t=1&akid=10932%2E3935704%2E95GrMn)**
Thank you,
Team GIFFORDS

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=10932%2E3935704%2E95GrMn) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.
clean_body: Team, Earlier this morning, Donald Trump and Republicans shut down the government. Why? Because they want to jack up healthcare costs for millions of Americans to give tax breaks for their billionaire friends. Americans are already feeling the effects of rising costs. If the GOP’s budget goes through, more than 20 million Americans will see their premiums skyrocket. Republicans control the White House, the Senate, and the House of Representatives. Republicans own this shutdown. Cuts to healthcare, especially Medicaid, will have devastating consequences to survivors of gun violence who often need costly long-term care after facing such a life altering experience. Additionally, hundreds of thousands of federal employees will be furloughed — or fired altogether. Active-duty servicemembers could be forced to wait even longer for their next paycheck. Social Security and VA benefits could be delayed. This is unacceptable. Donald Trump and Republicans must come to the table, reopen our government, and save our healthcare. Thank you, Team GIFFORDS Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org

We want you to have one. clean_body: Your 2025 voter record is still incomplete. Fix it before it’s too late. | I'll shoot straight with you, Fellow American. We're building for 2026, and we need to bolster our conservative America First majority in the Senate, and my father, President Donald J. Trump, is counting on us to deliver. But I just got some troubling news: Our 2025 NRSC voter records are still incomplete in critical to protecting our Senate majority. We can't afford to leave any data on the table while the radical left is mounting a comeback for their complete and total socialist takeover of the federal government. I'm asking you personally, Fellow American: Nothing keeps me up at night more than the thought of Chuck Schumer and Democrats running the Senate again. Let's make sure that doesn't happen by completing your profile in the next 30 minutes. Thanks, Donald Trump Jr. If you want to help Republicans KEEP THE SENATE MAJORITY, text WIN to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! Message and data rates may apply. name: No Kings Mobilization via Our Revolution
subject: “Enemy from within”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31294?t=1012&refcode=email-20251001_v&akid=9446%2E5885482%2Ed6Zpzi ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

Trump just told our military leaders to use American cities as their
“training grounds” to fight the “enemy from within.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31295?source=email-20251001&t=1062&akid=9446%2E5885482%2Ed6Zpzi ]Headline: Trump, justifying domestic military action, tells Pentagon
leaders to 'handle' the enemy from within'

If there’s one thing history’s taught us, it’s that silence in moments
like this is surrender.

That’s why, on October 18, we’re working with allies to organize the
largest day of action in Our Revolution’s history: No Kings Day.

Our goal? To show Trump that these blatant attempts to scare us into
silence will NOT work. Together we will make No Kings Day impossible to
ignore, from front pages to the White House.

Trump wants fear. We’ll show courage. He wants control. We demand
democracy. But for it to work, we need everyone.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31294?t=1058&amount=22&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&refcode=email-20251001nd&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9446%2E5885482%2Ed6Zpzi ]Can you pitch in now to help us make No Kings Day the biggest single day
of protest yet and show Trump that his scare tactics will only bring MORE
of us out into the streets in peaceful protest?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31294?t=1043&express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email-20251001nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9446%2E5885482%2Ed6Zpzi ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31294?t=1044&express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20251001nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9446%2E5885482%2Ed6Zpzi ]CHIP IN $22
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31294?t=1046&express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20251001nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9446%2E5885482%2Ed6Zpzi ]CHIP IN $27 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31294?t=1047&express_lane=true&amount=46&refcode=email-20251001nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9446%2E5885482%2Ed6Zpzi ]CHIP IN $46
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31294?t=1048&express_lane=true&amount=66&refcode=email-20251001nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9446%2E5885482%2Ed6Zpzi ]CHIP IN $66 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31294?t=1049&amount=9&refcode=email-20251001nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9446%2E5885482%2Ed6Zpzi ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

Trump’s already sent the National Guard to cities, but yesterday’s speech
makes it clear he’s only just getting started. Now he’s labeling cities
like Portland as “war zones” and telling Pentagon leaders to be ready to
“handle” the “enemy from within.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31295?source=email-20251001&t=1061&akid=9446%2E5885482%2Ed6Zpzi ]Headline: ' Like World War II': Trump talks POrtland during address to
military leaders

Trump tries to justify this militarization of one city after the next by
trying to make it seem like our cities are crime-infested and out of
control, but the truth is crime statistics in most big cities are stable
or falling. His real goal is simple – scaring our communities into
silence.

Let’s be clear: what he means by ‘enemy’ is anyone who disagrees with him.
It’s authoritarian rule plain and simple, and we WILL NOT accept it
quietly.

Our Revolution is mobilizing students, workers, families, and elders to
show up in massive numbers on October 18 – at courthouses, public parks,
and city squares. We’re readying banners, speakers, organizers, and
preparing legal support to keep everyone safe. We’ll be out in force, but
we can’t maximize turnout and cover the costs of dozens of events –
permits, supplies, safety equipment – without your help.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31294?t=1055&amount=22&refcode=email-20251001nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9446%2E5885482%2Ed6Zpzi ]As Trump tries to crush dissent, we have to show up bigger and bolder than
ever. Will you help make No Kings Day on October 18 massive?

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

P.S. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34243?t=1011&akid=9446%2E5885482%2Ed6Zpzi ]RSVP here to join a No Kings Day protest on October 18

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Will you stand with Pete Hegseth?
---
| | | | | | | Untitled Document
Patriot,

After years of illegal immigration, soft-on-crime policies, and weakness on the world stage, **[Americans are demanding leadership that puts safety and sovereignty first.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=6cfff264baa444bc99b44aae554ae0aa&_e=Hkw6zDUy69eIi9ETUCE1_BRHS-97VXrmHiyNi8qjELL2nLxXZIj0TkZCMgCijS6P3hBl_A2h1sNpTDzd0jKcccu-M_mPWPXbEcSHfqkyCnnGBZi-P3AD_Z7NeokScMHWW8ObzVbgiwLX0iv3JFLhU-E2EJUSLK9gTAK4l70I3p9aRsH-eH93mIu75TTCTNn-Q9gzUincwyiEkQP10qgFarhbWBDgcIcm-e1-xdPmYgY3-YJKPG68TFYrnhfDH4dWUEMc-qxocO1L5E71dl6y-fzIPYkcJfCAJfcTnMaLXFNVnAkoNRFPLEYihpF83wSKIEkZkF7pCBX1CACQyA7S43i-JmiFZ15H4kEd-xJCSXYH7arilKVyK3J2rmMhWenM0s0IJMy6I8MI2RCYkZXFqlvnNqkZ7QavcplW6gZvZvs3u-2NpIt8cS09fEyBwGMPeoS-k8_IWk3YJCqtMvLkavgvsLf6ut041GATxgvXLX-Z_qd0Rgge99m_x2ylDmKOM2tzuZNHCkssHcQI6H9jKj4qYxlO0VTVdcT58GlI7w2AP21aKyLgt5TWqUwOzKYx-PWX8uYOACGePL9aeDQLMgHS42Ohi_DdH92G-fkrJNsFhPBzXnt_o7DjR7zdiWIYop-jHUCvK7FEa0jU_AkX85PNYTJshKVmuXJRovpLH-KP8peLuZpqQvtMAUosRNZFG7GpRP2c6DOm7EA9f_xir4Ma5BLyyJcZWhXhnWFMe9vmbu5GeYTSDnsQ2WNCCSKDroLRgna7mRcibOxQoprTp-SCbD0hHT6os8AqiivsoIOzfr55POPFLhfW6rz6i741znQIEelAQEl5nzb4c0j5V9eOqAoDAqCNwtXeU8WHBQIRE8pa1P2a6rMyAVcOMm31whCd7XL3TyoKGkaISvjg-Qcz0AUEpZ77hZ4ieN6pGiwn-7852rxpiDI5ktxAwL4VsSJTG1h5aYoxavyYT7Uneg%3D%3D)**

We need to know whether or not _YOU_ support the new direction the Department of War is taking under Hegseth's leadership, Patriot. This is a mission to restore the Republic; _are you in, or are you out?_

body:
\--------------------------------------
This is the situation I’m caught in:
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e3949380/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3Yvd1hFcmVxOGdQYQ/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTEwMDE/LbmNsQjcwSTcxOQ/qP2hpZHM9bmN5Z0JTOTU3aDZyTTBscw/gaN1VLg/s7r3b2bdc1d)

| [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Patriot,
---
Asking for help has never been my strong suit, but today, I’m asking that you spare just a minute of your time to understand my situation.
---
The Democrats and their Deep State thugs are cashing in on a years-long scheme to **JAIL** me for the rest of my life.
---
**A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a _federal_ pardon in _state_ court.**
---
_As it stands, I’m simply out of options._
---
Several years ago, the Democrats began their plot by having Joe Biden’s FBI unlawfully raid my home at the crack of dawn.
---
Then, they had me unjustly arrested and booked in one of the most violent jails in America under _booking # 2313757_.
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
__
---

But as the lawyer who successfully defended President Trump from the Democrats’ impeachment witch hunt, I felt reassured in knowing I could **_at least defend myself_** from the Left’s bogus charges...
---
_...Or so I thought!_
---
**_The Democrats’ cronies even _STRIPPED_ me of my law licenses!_**
---
**Left with no means to defend myself, no way to be pardoned by President Trump for _state-level_ charges, no cavalry coming over the hill, and no lifeline, my _ONLY_ chance was to secure a top-notch defense team.**
---
But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of **BANKRUPTCY**.
---
_They knew full well this was exactly the kind of defense I couldn’t afford!_
---
Patriot, the situation I find myself in today is simple, but sadly, bleak.
---
My last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like _YOU_.
---
That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust.
---
[**Please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to ensure I have the resources needed to retain a top-notch defense team in what is now the FINAL BATTLE for my freedom and justice.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

Thank you and God bless you,
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

Rudy Giuliani

subject: I believe I can be of assistance
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
Tim Walz and the radical left are preparing for war - it’s up to us to stop them. As a former Navy SEAL, I believe I can be of assistance. | [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=18567616e3234f0391c06eb6d615617d&_e=FC4VMU4Rs_q3eJDDCX2Y0jFcmAeRjv1pu8emlccWT7NOno3_8SL-vlJuRuZtNJ8JzOkGtdcWodIZl1cUMmic02CQE0SgiGA7NtI3SSifg4VqQigq9A7ud2nz3Zo5bX-xc-m9Gghpzx7whQgdphohej4nWpcrMw00n3KxGu5SEhu4huD2cdvpWCWWybZ6IhMAhqdzyil_aDusgBstM2ctHMELVHtVTCu19zC_tzdDf8HfIXPyIYeinLSk-lQm7XYpJkv0qBINBVyrDHIeZ_N8JgWoAFanKFUvRszFWrR1MG0kX5Gh2F3U8MOKay3mgx0WVV-9TjZ0xc1VKqvuqnUR8a1EGZiDDwMlKNzocJFAoszuBoOiyr6rCK9Ex8n4GHTD7TLAVw7EP8lFknwQV1Eder2n-UzYcZAEfhQ1fJknuEOL_cq4t_w70AvAFWW6liW1dzlkhsYzhu6OnHXHa9AiBWEdgw4vYY7ertKE4frM9h-tWFLaO2wt9hX0VvquJKorumM5MYgrxdGYXa0TjPA3j-5aLsAoi331tREsN4ZukCYkB_5sFSYitHS8I0hD4kpbnfHy0SZLmx6dWDC82h-77s1HlWa61HYbJszE_4a_GApEUhYgsCpqKim1dmvK90hMyFVsjXOJiLT_PwQoQtxGHJXM6s1t--BNqfmFwzasdgNs6uuedqHjWD2RrMjm1Fa2iYmRnQ2CSAPDhtlT2LY1iYRc-GNjvnk8Z97dUVkxary2YPLeGl5EtKq-UDENOLdYRmARgDLFramoHtovQ4uybqAEC0Wb_RhtRil15Oj-EdpcVdmyjn8hV1BP723_0zt2)

---

Fellow Conservative,

They’re calling us **_“backward,” “extreme,”_** and worse — labels meant to dismiss and divide. Rep. Jasmine Crockett’s harsh words about President Trump aren’t just about him. They’re aimed at you, me, and anyone who cherishes America’s values, respects our nation’s heritage, or believes in standing firm for what’s right.

They think we’re obstacles to their agenda. They believe we’ll stay silent. But I know better — and so do you.

I’m Adam Schwarze, a former Navy SEAL Officer and Marine Corps veteran. I’ve served in over 70 countries, led teams through high-stakes missions, and faced challenges that tested my resolve. Through it all, I learned that disciplined action and quiet strength always prevail.

I’m running for U.S. Senate in Minnesota — to fight for our state with focus, humility, and unwavering commitment.

I never imagined a career in politics. But returning home from deployments, I saw a Minnesota drifting from the values that shaped me. My opponent, Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor, and a radical transgender activist, pushes a far-left vision that’s out of touch with our communities. _**While chaos gripped our streets in 2020, she criticized those working to restore order, leaving businesses and families to bear the cost.**_****

I grew up on Minnesota’s hockey rinks and enlisted in the Marine Corps at 18, weeks after 9/11. Service has always been my calling — to my country, my family, and now to you. This is a different kind of fight, but the stakes are just as high.

Minnesota hasn’t backed a Republican for president since 1976, and this Senate race is an uphill climb. I’m the underdog — a regular Minnesotan called to an extraordinary challenge. **[With your support, we can turn this seat red and send a message to Washington](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=18567616e3234f0391c06eb6d615617d&_e=FC4VMU4Rs_q3eJDDCX2Y0jFcmAeRjv1pu8emlccWT7NOno3_8SL-vlJuRuZtNJ8JzOkGtdcWodIZl1cUMmic02CQE0SgiGA7NtI3SSifg4VqQigq9A7ud2nz3Zo5bX-xc-m9Gghpzx7whQgdphohej4nWpcrMw00n3KxGu5SEhu4huD2cdvpWCWWybZ6IhMAhqdzyil_aDusgBstM2ctHMELVHtVTCu19zC_tzdDf8HfIXPyIYeinLSk-lQm7XYpJkv0qBINBVyrDHIeZ_N8JgWoAFanKFUvRszFWrR1MG2w3LJOgPh3jJZ7rePdFq_LEOP3YSBaKb54qnus4cwGQ00cFEiULRI3XtAj4wXlyH1USbby-4MJ-a9TlVdx2bPaBYkA8hpYHJm4oRTMANNh7SStmDAYr51cDeb82q6AIgPqxMROw-glLNL6m1_6VSTYmwq83cQYTvpbORkgeRlaG0DgFYe6GoO3MrP6r3rRUM-peXXdDwDijp0Gn2tOKPvTj488Aib_UV0UOnwd1AEoiB30unnJs0lPjzgPu-rVeLGYrMVEP7l7Iw-w94aJqZ0NG3UPwm6rgKJSvoDRocNd_bT0hdrV9sUwcPRdXW9PnS0RYj3qx_a_To4HfpQcno1otXH-Y_8nsgmGG-1KweC1hJrqBLLlXzocKg4ctglfpT4DbmhVnvDI11RogC4v1b4ikCiUOTKbjjz18ORrGFoG-tl0p6G_FLrbKb94BHlRxbR0_LgAGUF6xLZ-42-kgBaD6dhpE4wY1i2DRhne7kvq6J8d2_VfbIcySlCfOtQfeepw6wULMuMFKxUOJyuMVxeU)**.

_**You have a choice.**_

You can set this email aside, or you can join me in sending a second Navy SEAL to the U.S. Senate — someone forged in service, ready for the challenge, and driven by principle, not pride. **[Will you contribute $1, $5, or $50 to help us win this fight?](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=18567616e3234f0391c06eb6d615617d&_e=FC4VMU4Rs_q3eJDDCX2Y0jFcmAeRjv1pu8emlccWT7NOno3_8SL-vlJuRuZtNJ8JzOkGtdcWodIZl1cUMmic02CQE0SgiGA7NtI3SSifg4VqQigq9A7ud2nz3Zo5bX-xc-m9Gghpzx7whQgdphohej4nWpcrMw00n3KxGu5SEhu4huD2cdvpWCWWybZ6IhMAhqdzyil_aDusgBstM2ctHMELVHtVTCu19zC_tzdDf8HfIXPyIYeinLSk-lQm7XYpJkv0qBINBVyrDHIeZ_N8JgWoAFanKFUvRszFWrR1MG1d6wfyTjYAHaHRHchAk3xssuE6qSQQx5zZjqYr5rvJjlMRLhk0xux_ZNN7bd16FOBL9B73uj3GbzVItvzWthDbYdW9lUjZy7DGnnogFLxXdIWvcmv4xlHLLlr8UcHp0qCS4ixcRWWnwUAaJGTTX4xcS_WpBsHz98Rhp73iuMUCR5nBFwWB1hcIGalyY03YcexTCc9KpepT43H4hLlw0yQSMi_9OTuybMOop8Om42dCUQdhfUnn_LGFmSnVkjjd0RRd3Mwk3Wi2D4kgwW3dr9Sphu15wBCBh7Rr2UvopptPeikpGahcBu-p23iv-jSg6OvOor5LKydzWWBhKRNEF5HaVI0mne6q6PcwD0Bl9oX7uu7RG43QuJANPQTXKWfW-e_S2TVAFdXwgCvxN__b3xS3SD9z7UvYQIDc2Oi3sEwsfaR_uch0cpQUAURwNIn_DjUg5OMhT-FZhu-SXRRSR7ZKLIk1vbAPNHM0SdByJON0k6NFDFs51R2gVx9zGl8ZLuhkGiDcaJBFcaqx2eDdsRk0)**

[**MAKE A GIFT RIGHT NOW
**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=18567616e3234f0391c06eb6d615617d&_e=FC4VMU4Rs_q3eJDDCX2Y0jFcmAeRjv1pu8emlccWT7NOno3_8SL-vlJuRuZtNJ8JzOkGtdcWodIZl1cUMmic02CQE0SgiGA7NtI3SSifg4VqQigq9A7ud2nz3Zo5bX-xc-m9Gghpzx7whQgdphohej4nWpcrMw00n3KxGu5SEhu4huD2cdvpWCWWybZ6IhMAhqdzyil_aDusgBstM2ctHMELVHtVTCu19zC_tzdDf8HfIXPyIYeinLSk-lQm7XYpJkv0qBINBVyrDHIeZ_N8JgWoAFanKFUvRszFWrR1MG2rx6EmDaX-z3TRdAXxy-adxGl1zrq7Pk1wiMF76En37dacU-QdKvd3d-_apuoKlJXq5glmjmzs9cUFgEL5LD8JLL-52ubzM_dEXik1tbxw6ZKrxtlZKzjxKutuHNq9GqcNW7Fjk2AiBVrBf2c2ixaXM1D5PWyrsLDrGZT7LIUZFFxgUm1TPJAWrJCLsiD1sgSqd3HpwCLqmn6oTtAemp5Q2mvKO00pBFfh471C2xXXnEd96dtuqa3LtsPUm_RZaBXBOdXOJkl5TIkIxkHbbf9gY2sVtVj_xs4qZJK5C6EF_wyHfcQa4BjQSUoVvjn2h9jb19Set8ZaxYHI9hAPO6OwaGfsB38xOWd_faRany_H8DFspYOFOVkSyJhGxFiDQyWtmUnc1YT1vHjg2r_nSq4VzBwa0MITNesTHqEFG7ogbflS12b1tKMZEAuavE-btvoEJLhpcvbnt8vMnbCidqOoDlSc6SqawfFMzNEpxxjx_Ar9vLxVFlpTEn7bGHYejyUL78duPbEo9htn3vvYhAZ_)
I’ve earned degrees from Harvard and Johns Hopkins and trained in high-stakes fields like nuclear deterrence. I’ve built coalitions across cultures and led through crises. But the greatest challenge is earning your trust and building a movement to reclaim our state. I’m not asking for a free pass —** I’m asking for your partnership. **

Our country is worth defending. Respect, integrity, and action still matter. Together, we can show Minnesota — and America — what we’re made of.

With gratitude,
Adam Schwarze
Proud Marine Veteran
Retired Navy SEAL
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate – Minnesota _**

**_

clean_body: Tim Walz and the radical left are preparing for war - it’s up to us to stop them. As a former Navy SEAL, I believe I can be of assistance. | Fellow Conservative, They’re calling us “backward,” “extreme,” and worse — labels meant to dismiss and divide. Rep. Jasmine Crockett’s harsh words about President Trump aren’t just about him. They’re aimed at you, me, and anyone who cherishes America’s values, respects our nation’s heritage, or believes in standing firm for what’s right. They think we’re obstacles to their agenda. They believe we’ll stay silent. But I know better — and so do you. I’m Adam Schwarze, a former Navy SEAL Officer and Marine Corps veteran. I’ve served in over 70 countries, led teams through high-stakes missions, and faced challenges that tested my resolve. Through it all, I learned that disciplined action and quiet strength always prevail. I’m running for U.S. Senate in Minnesota — to fight for our state with focus, humility, and unwavering commitment. I never imagined a career in politics. But returning home from deployments, I saw a Minnesota drifting from the values that shaped me. My opponent, Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor, and a radical transgender activist, pushes a far-left vision that’s out of touch with our communities. While chaos gripped our streets in 2020, she criticized those working to restore order, leaving businesses and families to bear the cost.** I grew up on Minnesota’s hockey rinks and enlisted in the Marine Corps at 18, weeks after 9/11. Service has always been my calling — to my country, my family, and now to you. This is a different kind of fight, but the stakes are just as high. Minnesota hasn’t backed a Republican for president since 1976, and this Senate race is an uphill climb. I’m the underdog — a regular Minnesotan called to an extraordinary challenge. . You have a choice. You can set this email aside, or you can join me in sending a second Navy SEAL to the U.S. Senate — someone forged in service, ready for the challenge, and driven by principle, not pride. I’ve earned degrees from Harvard and Johns Hopkins and trained in high-stakes fields like nuclear deterrence. I’ve built coalitions across cultures and led through crises. But the greatest challenge is earning your trust and building a movement to reclaim our state. I’m not asking for a free pass — I’m asking for your partnership. Our country is worth defending. Respect, integrity, and action still matter. Together, we can show Minnesota — and America — what we’re made of. With gratitude, Adam Schwarze Proud Marine Veteran Retired Navy SEAL Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate – Minnesota FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA** | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: James Talarico
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Talarico for Texas
body:
#
Peter —
I just wanted to say thank you.
I launched this campaign just three weeks ago — and last night, we closed the books on our first fundraising deadline.
With the help of over 100,000 small dollar donors, we shattered our fundraising goal for the quarter and passed the first major test of the campaign.
I couldn’t be prouder of this team.
To the thousands of folks who’ve signed up to volunteer; to everyone who’s shown up in community at our rallies across the state; to those who’ve contributed to fuel this movement: I couldn’t be more grateful.
I’ve been overwhelmed by the outpouring of support every day.
[](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em251001-1-ak&t=1&akid=89%2E1347274%2E-PX8FQ)
What we’ve already accomplished has far surpassed my wildest expectations for this campaign.
I didn’t have the advantages of a prior statewide campaign, or the backing of the DC establishment and DC super PACs, or a rolodex full of billionaire mega-donors.
But this movement has something far more powerful.
The people.
You are the backbone of this campaign.
I’m really proud of what we’re building here. I hope you are, too.
We’re funding this campaign with contributions from the people. Not a dime from corporate PACs.
There’s plenty of hard work ahead. But I’m optimistic.
Something is happening. Something special.
James

**It’s important we build on our momentum. If you haven’t had a chance to contribute yet, will you consider making a contribution to help James start this quarter strong?**
[DONATE ](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em251001-1-ak&t=3&akid=89%2E1347274%2E-PX8FQ)

Paid for by Talarico for Texas
Talarico for Texas
PO Box 14508
Austin, TX 78761
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update your contact information, [**you can submit this form.**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/signup/update-info/?t=4&akid=89%2E1347274%2E-PX8FQ) Looking for Team Talarico merch? [**Check out our online store!**](https://store.jamestalarico.com?utm_source=em_footer&utm_campaign=em_footer) This is a grassroots movement to take back Texas for working people. [**Please consider making a contribution to support our fight today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jt-em-launch?refcode=em_footer&t=5&refcode2=89_1347274_-PX8FQ&akid=89%2E1347274%2E-PX8FQ)
James is grateful to have you in our movement. We try to send only the most important updates and opportunities to participate via email, but if you want to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.jamestalarico.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=6&akid=89%2E1347274%2E-PX8FQ).

_**EXHIBIT 1 - JOINT FUNDRAISING NOTICE **_

Team Nunn ("JFC") is a joint fundraising committee composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn ("Campaign"), Call to Service PAC ("LPAC") and NRCC (each, a "Committee," and, collectively, the "Committees"). Any contribution to the JFC permissible under the Federal Election Campaign Act, as amended ("FECA"), from contributors who have not exceeded their applicable federal contribution limits, shall be allocated among the Committees pursuant to FECA and the formula set forth in this Notice.

_**Contributions Made by an Individual or Federal Non-Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Individuals or federal non-multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $322,100. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $7,000, designating up to $3,500 to the primary election and up to $3,500 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3\. NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $44,300 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

_**Contributions Made by a Federal Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $120,000. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:

name: Adam Schiff
subject: re: shutdown
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=9039%2E5257348%2EoIWLRW)
Derek,
Late last night, Donald Trump and Republicans shut down the government at 12:01 am.
All because they refused to work with Democrats to lower health care costs and prevent millions of Americans from being thrown off their health care.
None of this happens in a vacuum.
It comes after Donald Trump and MAGA Republicans passed their Big Ugly Bill, which will kick millions of Americans off their health care — all to give huge tax breaks to millionaires and billionaires.
It comes as Donald Trump is breaking law after law, weaponizing law enforcement to go after his political enemies, and using the federal government as a tool for his dictatorial ambition.
And it comes as Trump’s chaos is already having disastrous effects on families.
Last week, I was in Oceanside, CA, meeting with families and health care providers about what they’re seeing.
A median-income family of four in that community will see their health care premiums go up — by nearly $1,000.
Other families are already getting notices that their premiums could go up by as much as 75%.
_That’s outrageous. And it’s a crisis of Republicans’ own purposeful making._
Derek, I’m going to be working night and day to solve this health care crisis.
Here’s what I’m fighting for:
_We need to make sure millions of Americans aren’t thrown off their health care._
_We need to make sure health care costs aren’t driven even higher._
_And we need to use every tool at our disposal to stop Trump’s lawlessness._
There is no doubt that Donald Trump and MAGA Republicans will do everything they can to make this shutdown **_worse._**
They’re going to hold everyday Americans hostage to enact Trump’s extremely unpopular and dangerous agenda. They’re going to do everything they can to attack your health care. And they’re going to say some really crazy stuff — like the bigoted AI video the President put out during and after the negotiations.
We must do everything possible to win this fight and use every tool at our disposal to do so. Our health care and democracy depend on it.
More very soon,
Adam

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: Republicans shut down the government
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HICKENLOOPER FOR COLORADO
body:
Last night, Trump and his Republican-controlled Congress shut down the government.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116378205/573258638/1531865432?amount=15&refcode=email_100125_shutdown&refcode2=sl1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzVhMzYwMC1lNjllLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m7PgiQ6zrAEuHUfN2nMvoqs1g4S96nLrwWFBwD34IF0=) Team – **Last night, Trump and his Republican-controlled Congress shut down the government.** Look, I was one of the first senators to announce I would vote **‘NO’** on any budget that did nothing to lower costs or restore the health care they cruelly ripped away. But rather than negotiating with us on a spending bill, Republicans blocked our effort to keep the government open while lowering health care costs. They let government funding expire last night and are now threatening to lay off thousands of hardworking federal employees. **It’s unacceptable.** Nobody wants a shutdown. But the drastic health care cuts Trump and MAGA Republicans made in their Big Beautiful Betrayal could skyrocket folks’ out-of-pocket premium payments by nearly 75%. _Nobody can afford that!_ And on top of that, Trump’s illegal tariff-taxes are still pulverizing small businesses and driving up inflation on everything else we need, like gas and groceries. **That’s why I’m laser-focused on making life more affordable for working people, not rubber stamping the reckless MAGA agenda.** We will continue to stand ready to work with anyone on a budget that actually serves the American people — not corporations and the ultra-wealthy. [_**But one thing is clear: We need to take back the Senate majority and put a stop to this catastrophe. I know we’ve been reaching out a lot, but there couldn’t be a more important time to take a stand. Can you rush a donation today to defend this critical Senate seat and help Democrats take back the Senate?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116378206/573258639/1531865432?amount=15&refcode=email_100125_shutdown&refcode2=sl1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzVhMzYwMC1lNjllLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m7PgiQ6zrAEuHUfN2nMvoqs1g4S96nLrwWFBwD34IF0=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116378207/573258640/1531865432?express_lane=true&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&amount=5&refcode=email_100125_shutdown&refcode2=sl1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzVhMzYwMC1lNjllLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m7PgiQ6zrAEuHUfN2nMvoqs1g4S96nLrwWFBwD34IF0=)

Listen up: [For the first time in SIX years, **_the United States federal government has shut down._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69316?t=9&akid=23453%2E4449941%2EjbGx9e)

This shutdown is exactly why it’s more important than ever that we **come together as Democrats, sharpen our strategy, and stand up to Republicans’ reckless leadership** — and that’s why your input today is so critical.

As one of the most informed and engaged Fight for Reform members in your area, you have been selected for this strategy interview today.

Republicans have the House and Senate Majorities currently – YIKES!!

But if they lose just a handful of seats, we can TAKE BACK the Majority and finally combat Donald Trump’s corruption and bring real reform to DC.

That's why we need to develop a foolproof strategy NOW to take back the House! But this will only happen if we gather enough responses from smart Democrats like you.

[**_Please click below to complete your interview:_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69316?t=10&akid=23453%2E4449941%2EjbGx9e)
[Complete your interview now → ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69316?t=11&akid=23453%2E4449941%2EjbGx9e)
