“They” think we’re backward - I’m a former Navy SEAL hellbent on proving them wrong | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=4064db7d3efe41798b9a2e66a0422694&_e=kaOVo96Kr5ihXfiSfLkXTStGzAiB5hLoFheHmbxNcRF8Plv43ocT6tK5-HSLgz2dMjQkdEKhqsUR9_3NEmjMMVXPJo6fbZLP7qT12N96B6bMfmFgk9VQwXesjgPn-bpiHtff4EvkwS72crROCYBsGJ8s-xD4jcENtQ0vTRqnZUbcSEaDl9JhzDkmyiIm2pHsg0v7NYlFH-lQTswN9RobwZxfu0M8nmD_R85hYVLQtwM3iKEt9RP2ynOtoE4QjFMYWTQq_PP6jnSN3w2dankGX8BlgS5foqYzp8NHdNjPSZjEOENOtftGcx0adztTt0zvhd0HaR1NSl7W2HXo5J2biqFjhiyAQOloNbAZ6C-RkORLVTRHysWqxC-k-nlT9czTQFQzu5pkBBpGdRq0716AF-Np4AN6o_29iBwK_KeyrUlpK21Eu2NdCIZhvosN2F1w_MUtJXMJNx77NOY-50kt40RoAbr-Z2rOMfYVlVOH5QkmxchMIJXbgcKQ8jNEKzlHRJcniWNclUitoKo0-Pis9QLdbTj7oZOljHq5JpjNwjMhV9MY1lNh1LPQnY1cDeaIUnuVG_KTMLrG2wVKRTczvJVufbU4o9EhvfMG6W-A7hLnl8Pv4XBIDLgvbP752216YNi6IVS8L7sNmcURxp6Qs8gnxqhsELWqbMGAq7giTEm4xjnc5DvbsIieH8-shdfX1wHozGQD_MqKhwImCa4WKZ54VaIX7nekUZzCwB0nUNrEUfLRRXLLrXjywd9rGITq_c2ApegOyC7KLTjGUrl2O92l39DbuM8Vx7ld6LOvqZaTtw7LcyaS2HIUr3yy_J-w)

Peter,

They’re calling us **_“backward,” “extreme,”_** and worse — labels meant to dismiss and divide. Rep. Jasmine Crockett’s harsh words about President Trump aren’t just about him. They’re aimed at you, me, and anyone who cherishes America’s values, respects our nation’s heritage, or believes in standing firm for what’s right.

They think we’re obstacles to their agenda. They believe we’ll stay silent. But I know better — and so do you.

I’m Adam Schwarze, a former Navy SEAL Officer and Marine Corps veteran. I’ve served in over 70 countries, led teams through high-stakes missions, and faced challenges that tested my resolve. Through it all, I learned that disciplined action and quiet strength always prevail.

I’m running for U.S. Senate in Minnesota — to fight for our state with focus, humility, and unwavering commitment.

I never imagined a career in politics. But returning home from deployments, I saw a Minnesota drifting from the values that shaped me. My opponent, Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor, and a radical transgender activist, pushes a far-left vision that’s out of touch with our communities. _**While chaos gripped our streets in 2020, she criticized those working to restore order, leaving businesses and families to bear the cost.**_****

I grew up on Minnesota’s hockey rinks and enlisted in the Marine Corps at 18, weeks after 9/11. Service has always been my calling — to my country, my family, and now to you. This is a different kind of fight, but the stakes are just as high.

Minnesota hasn’t backed a Republican for president since 1976, and this Senate race is an uphill climb. I’m the underdog — a regular Minnesotan called to an extraordinary challenge. **[With your support, we can turn this seat red and send a message to Washington](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=4064db7d3efe41798b9a2e66a0422694&_e=kaOVo96Kr5ihXfiSfLkXTStGzAiB5hLoFheHmbxNcRF8Plv43ocT6tK5-HSLgz2dMjQkdEKhqsUR9_3NEmjMMVXPJo6fbZLP7qT12N96B6bMfmFgk9VQwXesjgPn-bpiHtff4EvkwS72crROCYBsGJ8s-xD4jcENtQ0vTRqnZUbcSEaDl9JhzDkmyiIm2pHsg0v7NYlFH-lQTswN9RobwZxfu0M8nmD_R85hYVLQtwM3iKEt9RP2ynOtoE4QjFMYWTQq_PP6jnSN3w2dankGX8BlgS5foqYzp8NHdNjPSZimF8yTtDH4B-7R462lW984ljTEsjHVBctXS-339d-_M46Iu9G6SLaZKTGyD6sKA7ieM4H0g2OEaagWteWD0-mjg_rmGnS3TcMkpz-uT28q56NOMua-mp9Z2N7Fjds7-1VE6mk-QwRunlO3dgbWFPoPvuKl4g56DEyp4QEB3ZRDC3A2a3qf8_kcompp7VTUi-sWZ0PX03BvSzredQOlnJ0Qy5nFlqqRwph1peJnKrC3nS_sjst3WTG9uk2z-jceW41-xY1AGEOV7UYKJRmRFqm3jjm0CDOPGkfGaaLoh5QY7V3VNygLa-UGuQW-atfGSZeEElGWpOT03rScLuA4753aZh2d3moIZnZNHVPP60QVLumJ-S39twxefCtRsLkS-XUpPM7IQ5stbSK1pkpk1dALqFjtkvNrDFlUlMrYuLJwKEUqifaQib21nh41pOAO8ucuoQv3qojyy_TN2jzJBmePt9zTHsIiTO6CFTbIkJKzPRoQDTGSNmReXDQti2f5oYX23XVaxGlObNKDD_kH2cE-)**.

_**You have a choice.**_

You can set this email aside, or you can join me in sending a second Navy SEAL to the U.S. Senate — someone forged in service, ready for the challenge, and driven by principle, not pride. **[Will you contribute $1, $5, or $50 to help us win this fight?](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=4064db7d3efe41798b9a2e66a0422694&_e=kaOVo96Kr5ihXfiSfLkXTStGzAiB5hLoFheHmbxNcRF8Plv43ocT6tK5-HSLgz2dMjQkdEKhqsUR9_3NEmjMMVXPJo6fbZLP7qT12N96B6bMfmFgk9VQwXesjgPn-bpiHtff4EvkwS72crROCYBsGJ8s-xD4jcENtQ0vTRqnZUbcSEaDl9JhzDkmyiIm2pHsg0v7NYlFH-lQTswN9RobwZxfu0M8nmD_R85hYVLQtwM3iKEt9RP2ynOtoE4QjFMYWTQq_PP6jnSN3w2dankGX8BlgS5foqYzp8NHdNjPSZi5mzKeV1BSWl8WpEvnDZl6J_5XKeJNEPcxA0zmJlTH6AR6XX9aAPsELNIT3v5O_oC9Z4g98Nl8YLehQm4nmyEnyx-yMvFMZNeeoPfAO4-sOK_5UtJzmHKmoyVsSIByYdkQi65DfX22O_g8D4YHjxYfoE51GGQNFGyX00Lj3-Bi61w2y5687BjFRBOy7FuGYz321YXwS_KTuyWv7R3ksyLVjMRKUJbLIDXKm6Dts03cABIziD6BV5yMjS85G6AaoVgk-vSFrtvaNGbvS5Ihams4XTIDaY9lnHNAte2DHzCG0-XNAI5CNsw3a71RQ7rxXXFxnw-_H-yARUde3amjgl5PMe8dyHBgOstwIBNWBCO-Juuu_qnEhU-CCfdSsJ6potQa23AWhDdFiIZlcRDItT6WIoCt69sEiof1aGDOg9uYvT1msIoRcvBUx-BlKYGMXJtjk7rj6AI6MEArgU3bPq60Lv4IMLkFujeE3McDRsXkgL0mi7Q3zWIcPJweXjaZPUs_SgH5gHjt3y8eUCD1wvTs)**

I’ve earned degrees from Harvard and Johns Hopkins and trained in high-stakes fields like nuclear deterrence. I’ve built coalitions across cultures and led through crises. But the greatest challenge is earning your trust and building a movement to reclaim our state. I’m not asking for a free pass —** I’m asking for your partnership. **

Our country is worth defending. Respect, integrity, and action still matter. Together, we can show Minnesota — and America — what we’re made of.

With gratitude,
Adam Schwarze
Proud Marine Veteran
Retired Navy SEAL
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate – Minnesota _**

Dabrowski’s Campaign Bankrolled by Democrat Donors Tied to Johnson and Pritzker Allies (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/09/dabrowskis-campaign-bankrolled-by-democrat-donors-tied-to-johnson-and-pritzker-allies.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=368b90b7e3-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/09/dabrowskis-campaign-bankrolled-by-democrat-donors-tied-to-johnson-and-pritzker-allies.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=368b90b7e3-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823
(Photo credit: Jim Talamonti | The Center Square)
By Illinois Review

Former Wirepoints president and Illinois GOP gubernatorial candidate Ted Dabrowski is making waves – not for his policies, but for his donors. His campaign is bankrolled by Democrat supporters and Brandon Johnson allies, sparking questions over whether his bid reflects Republican values or is being propped up by the very forces conservatives have long opposed in Illinois.

Yes, Dabrowski has the backing of major Republican donors like Richard Uihlein and Vince Kolber. But alongside them are contributors who routinely fund Democrats – a mix that is stirring unease among conservative grassroots Republicans.

On September 2, Dabrowski’s campaign reported a $250,000 donation from James Perry, a senior advisor with Madison Dearborn Partners in Chicago. State election filings show Perry is also a frequent supporter of Democrats, including Chicago Alderman Bill Conway, State Representative Margaret Croke, Dr. Rafael Yanez and former Mayor Lori Lightfoot – to whose campaign he contributed $50,000 in 2019.
CLICK TO READ FULL ARTICLE (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/09/dabrowskis-campaign-bankrolled-by-democrat-donors-tied-to-johnson-and-pritzker-allies.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=368b90b7e3-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823)

By Illinois Review

The Illinois Republican Party rolled out a new line of apparel this week, branding it with phrases like “Word to Your Mother” and “Stop, Cooperate and Listen” – lines lifted directly from Vanilla Ice’s 1990 hit “Ice Ice Baby.”

The release, pitched as a lighthearted way to raise money and attention, quickly drew backlash from conservatives who see the move as another sign that the party’s leadership is tone-deaf and unserious at a critical moment for Illinois families.

Twitter () Facebook () IllinoisReview.com () Dabrowski’s Campaign Bankrolled by Democrat Donors Tied to Johnson and Pritzker Allies () (Photo credit: Jim Talamonti | The Center Square) By Illinois Review Former Wirepoints president and Illinois GOP gubernatorial candidate Ted Dabrowski is making waves – not for his policies, but for his donors. His campaign is bankrolled by Democrat supporters and Brandon Johnson allies, sparking questions over whether his bid reflects Republican values or is being propped up by the very forces conservatives have long opposed in Illinois. Yes, Dabrowski has the backing of major Republican donors like Richard Uihlein and Vince Kolber. But alongside them are contributors who routinely fund Democrats – a mix that is stirring unease among conservative grassroots Republicans. On September 2, Dabrowski’s campaign reported a $250,000 donation from James Perry, a senior advisor with Madison Dearborn Partners in Chicago. State election filings show Perry is also a frequent supporter of Democrats, including Chicago Alderman Bill Conway, State Representative Margaret Croke, Dr. Rafael Yanez and former Mayor Lori Lightfoot – to whose campaign he contributed $50,000 in 2019. Democrats are outraising us, and they're voting in elections that, to put it simply, we're not voting in. Recently, voter complacency in Iowa cost Republicans a super-majority in the Iowa Senate. | [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=ad8ba6771f12494abf40dd67e5decb54&_e=Ij7MlZM9aKAh41teJ35dz1dD1Kxhdn1Dt0JE9zJElXOJITXctY2B6oUbkHbQnawKGhfprL5qmemRdXcsC4lhiJnYGxCb7jdLo290M4gPEtoqbfB7eXgMR9hY9fN_aCYhddLkCXoseomzQyFi2I2LoKTEG2fLeGLXQizVWZ2qV0eRx_BY_TqmHpCDRk_B2kmslGJLB3Lg0TvgKwVxNXIeEmSqjb4qGCkF_pnyX1RWaBBHg1FipSFKZO6ANM83rg-NGB1tKf_ws_DEOsRbf5aAQEuBz1P6DVk_3-NDWLFfAzYYUn8IFrmBQWxywsoGbKnSkCwGK12XRdXS3T-of5N6MGwwn7mNjQDeEAv0rrJWAXfKNFEG2ZDs90clR6DauX0RRM31BnXLUrJzf8iIVkwBDKD9KX3QK79YhZ6qaf25QHaTHTnmDf3_eoDPC9_2TLy9ucFh-oALp_ObgDFNQJn9BfYSBPjl7Y3WnDnIbl4G_C3WFlYG4frXN_HkYiX74J96LSl2a-Lfv9c4pX-FFPU4G05FcnxVRjIstFKYmbigtj0Z0Gj35SlDRkAgBNSQ9pXDMjTDLOb6xWVmqEQlaK7194OoS0lVB8o2YFjyykq6S_aMokMPrvOis1l8P9Br6omJQSVp_lg1q6HL6FKqfcfoWxym-qQrak2AJd_m5iqI7wpIek5_x6NO_q69bX_qFf5HySNjQGxW6xIoJSwRNV4LOD9BLPqWLkR8TRvdh6j4zHPLvQLHw5n_DdWmVC-rHfij)
---
Fellow Conservative,

The partisan divide gripping our nation has turned Washington into a warzone of its own—fierce, unrelenting, and filled with entrenched elites more interested in power than progress.

_**As a Navy SEAL, I've faced harsh environments and impossible odds, from battlefields abroad to the political arena at home. Those experiences taught me how to stay calm under pressure, broker compromise, and accomplish the mission—no matter the stakes.**_

I'm Sen. Tim Sheehy, and I'm in the U.S. Senate to serve you, not the special interests or partisan extremists. The liberal media and their allies attack me for my resolve to challenge the status quo and expose the waste and corruption draining our nation. They fear leaders who put America first and refuse to bow to their agenda.

My SEAL background gives me a unique perspective:**I know how to navigate chaos, build bridges, and lower temperatures in even the most hostile settings.** In Congress, I'm fighting for practical solutions—securing our borders, strengthening our economy, and restoring accountability in government.

**But I can't do it alone.**

Democrats are outraising us, and they're voting in elections that, to put it simply, we're not voting in. Recently, voter complacency in Iowa cost Republicans a super-majority in the Iowa Senate.

What happens when that complacency extends to U.S. House and Senate races?

We lose.

I can't abide by that - and I don't believe you can either - _**so I'm sounding the alarm right now.**_

Fellow Conservative, I need your support to keep pushing for a stronger, united America. Together, we can reject the elites' divisive tactics and build a future that honors the sacrifices of our forefathers.

clean_body: Democrats are outraising us, and they're voting in elections that, to put it simply, we're not voting in. Recently, voter complacency in Iowa cost Republicans a super-majority in the Iowa Senate. | Fellow Conservative, The partisan divide gripping our nation has turned Washington into a warzone of its own—fierce, unrelenting, and filled with entrenched elites more interested in power than progress. As a Navy SEAL, I've faced harsh environments and impossible odds, from battlefields abroad to the political arena at home. Those experiences taught me how to stay calm under pressure, broker compromise, and accomplish the mission—no matter the stakes. I'm Sen. Tim Sheehy, and I'm in the U.S. Senate to serve you, not the special interests or partisan extremists. The liberal media and their allies attack me for my resolve to challenge the status quo and expose the waste and corruption draining our nation. They fear leaders who put America first and refuse to bow to their agenda. My SEAL background gives me a unique perspective:I know how to navigate chaos, build bridges, and lower temperatures in even the most hostile settings. In Congress, I'm fighting for practical solutions—securing our borders, strengthening our economy, and restoring accountability in government. But I can't do it alone. Democrats are outraising us, and they're voting in elections that, to put it simply, we're not voting in. Recently, voter complacency in Iowa cost Republicans a super-majority in the Iowa Senate. What happens when that complacency extends to U.S. House and Senate races? We lose. I can't abide by that - and I don't believe you can either - so I'm sounding the alarm right now. Fellow Conservative, I need your support to keep pushing for a stronger, united America. Together, we can reject the elites' divisive tactics and build a future that honors the sacrifices of our forefathers. to fuel this fight to fuel this fight to fuel this fight The attacks from partisan outlets won't stop—they're desperate to protect their broken system. But with your help, we can stay focused on delivering results for the American people. If they silence voices like mine, they'll come for yours next. Thank you for your unwavering support. For America's Future, Tim Sheehy United States Senator - Montana | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. name: Shontel Brown
subject: This was a choice.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
We came to save health care – they went on vacation.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116381408/573268126/1806897946?refcode=EM_C_251001Choice_SB_90DO_5_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzRiZGYzMy1lYTllLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A8gTI3CdANsRVP7kMbu1hXSH9EKSxXJXSrqNUBLJ2I0=) Peter,

Last night, Congressional Republicans failed to advance bipartisan legislation to keep the government open and to address America’s growing and urgent health care crisis. As they have reminded us since inauguration day, Trump and Republicans control Washington, and yet they can’t even keep the lights on?

**Republicans have completely and totally failed in their responsibility to fund the government.** In fact, many House Republicans didn’t even bother to show up to DC this week as the government neared the critical deadline.

Republicans decided to shut the government down instead of addressing the current health care crisis. According to a KFF report, **ACA Marketplace healthcare premium costs are going to skyrocket if Republicans end the ACA tax credits.** This will impact around 22 million Americans, including over 500,000 people in Ohio.

My Democratic colleagues and I were clear that we would not serve as a rubber stamp for a budget that continues to cut access to health care. Republicans are failing the American people – and **I remain committed to reopening the government, protecting health care and lowering costs.**

We cannot allow Republicans to continue to sweep our nation’s most dire issues under the rug. It’s time for real solutions.

Thank you,

Shontel Brown | Shontel Brown is proud to be elected as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District. She has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. As she enters her second full term in Congress, she will use that experience to continue the fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and to preserve and protect our democracy for generations to come. Will you join her and be the change we need?
---

name: Mandela Barnes
subject: An abject failure
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC
body:
The GOP is in complete disarray, so much so that they can’t even manage to keep the government open.
| You may be receiving this email because of your previous support for organizations like The Long Run PAC. We need your support, but if you’d prefer not to receive emails from us, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=5625%2E196590%2E-p_lZH). [](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/5684?t=2&akid=5625%2E196590%2E-p_lZH)
---
| The GOP is in complete disarray, so much so that they can’t even manage to keep the government open.

They’ve completely neglected the duties of their job, instead unabashedly backing Trump on his latest test of the Constitution’s limits.

_**While the government careens towards a shutdown, Trump’s deployed military personnel in cities across the country.

He’s weaponized the DOJ to prosecute anyone who disagrees with him.

He’s waged an assault against free speech.

And he’s spread baseless lies about public health.**_

He’s done all this while the economy tanks and the thousands of federal workers, families, and elderly who rely on the federal government to stay open for support are left by the wayside.

_**This is not government by the people for the people, this is government by one man and for one man.**_

If you’ve had enough like I have, [_**I hope you’ll consider contributing to The Long Run PAC today so I can continue my important work supporting changemaking candidates up and down the ballot across the country. We’re in desperate need of change, and the work starts now. Will you contribute today?**_](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/5684?t=3&akid=5625%2E196590%2E-p_lZH)
---

---
| [CONTRIBUTE $50 ](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/5688?t=10&akid=5625%2E196590%2E-p_lZH)
---
| [OTHER AMOUNT ](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/5689?t=12&akid=5625%2E196590%2E-p_lZH)
---
Thank you for supporting change,
Mandela Barnes
* * *

name: =?utf-8?B?TGluZGEgU8OhbmNoZXo=?=
subject: Republicans need to take a look in the mirror.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sanchez
body:
Republicans control the White House, the House, and the Senate. Yet they’re trying to blame Democrats for the government shutdown, even though Speaker Johnson cancelled votes this week.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116381729/573269064/-107464461?refcode=BLU_EM_SAN_2025-10-01_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODZmOTY5OS1lYjllLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uEEM3cQfAaDNm7NDRj1wkbVfJhseUzj5exoYCKg9_C8=)
---
| Peter,

Republicans control the White House, the House, and the Senate. Yet they’re trying to blame Democrats for the government shutdown, even though Speaker Johnson cancelled votes this week.

The fault lies with them. Not with Democrats who are ready to do the work. Not with the American people, who will bear the brunt of their dysfunction.

It’s time Republicans look in the mirror and admit they’re the problem.

They won’t. Instead, they’ll keep pointing fingers and using chaos to push their extreme agenda. That’s why it’s critical we hold them accountable at the ballot box, and that starts with building a strong grassroots movement right now.

If we want to stop this reckless Republican chaos, we have to take back the House. As Chair of BOLD PAC, I’m working every day to make sure we can elect Democrats across the country. But I’m counting on grassroots supporters like you to stand with me.

* Trump eyes work force reductions as 750K are furloughed
* Washington Post fears Democrats have walked into a trap
* Shock NYT poll shows cratering support by Dems for the shutdown
* Prediction markets expect a 2 week shutdown
* Ultra Rich investors race to Gold, Bitcoin and AI stocks
* Meta to let its ads spy on users AI interactions

# Shutdown Chaos: Trump gears up to play hardball as Congress deadlocks
The U.S. government plunged into a partial shutdown at midnight Wednesday after **[Democrats blocked](https://substack.com/redirect/ddb94a40-bb1d-4cb2-bf8e-468d36d8a69f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** a Republican funding bill in the Senate, leaving thousands of federal workers furloughed and active-duty troops without pay amid bitter partisan clashes over Obamacare subsidies.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ddb94a40-bb1d-4cb2-bf8e-468d36d8a69f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Trump Vows Irreversible Retaliation** : President Trump threatened "irreversible" cuts to Democratic-favored programs during the shutdown, as GOP leaders like Senate Majority Leader Thune decry Democrat hostage tactics on the $1T spending bill.

[](https://substack.com/redirect/05191253-fba2-489c-bed4-081db1d06b6a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Democrats Demand Subsidies Extension** : Furious Senate Democrats insisted on renewing enhanced Obamacare subsidies expiring at the end of 2025, rejecting short-term funding without them.
* **Mass Furloughs Grip Agencies** : Up to 750,000 workers face daily furloughs with Trump and OMB Chair rumored to be planning to use the shut down to accelerate cuts to government agencies.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/61f5d324-0878-42a8-b7c3-b43b4be68cd4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Senate Votes Persist Endlessly** : Republicans plan continuous CR votes through the coming days to keep up the pressure on Democrats to pass the spending bill.,

# Voters Slam Dem Shutdown Threat!
As the government shutdown grips the nation, a New York Times/Siena College poll reveals **[65% of registered voters](https://substack.com/redirect/c8ad35b0-1b08-4371-92ef-4040d6fd9141?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** urged Democrats not to force a federal closure over their unmet demands. The Democrat strategy even **[got called out](https://substack.com/redirect/da0269ec-9aa8-4a1e-9d77-7dbb9827c22a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** by the Washington Post Editorial Board
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/da0269ec-9aa8-4a1e-9d77-7dbb9827c22a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Democrat Voters Huge Split** : The survey of 1,313 voters from Sept. 22-27 shows only 47% of Democrats support the shutdown, with 43% of Democrats opposed to it. while independents (32%) and Republicans (5%) largely reject it.
* **Dems lose ground with independents** : Only 32% of Independent voters and 5% of Republicans were in favor of the shutdown.
* **Healthcare Credits at Stake** : Democrats demanded Obamacare tax credit extensions be included in the funding bill so as to cut healthcare costs, but Republicans balked, fearing it boosts coverage for undocumented migrants, leading to the funding impasse.

* * *
* * *
# Two weeks of gridlock? Prediction markets say yes
Prediction markets forecast a U.S. government shutdown **[lasting nearly two weeks](https://substack.com/redirect/7a25e49e-4a1c-4a25-a6cb-6aa6c076bfff?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** aligning with historical data going back 35 years.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/df077c2b-3323-46e8-958c-1e4adb11fc39?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Markets Predict Prolonged Standoff** : Kalshi forecasts an 11.1-day shutdown duration, pushing a theoretical resolution date to mid-October.
* **Polymarket Odds Favor Delay** : The highest probability (38%) for the government reopening is October 15 or later, with 23% for October 6-9 and just 14% for quick fix by October 3-5.
* **Historical Shutdowns Average 14 Days** : Bank of America data shows typical closures since 1990 last about two weeks, often with minimal S&P 500 dips of 1% gain on average.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/448117e6-469d-47f1-8c8d-d9d428d48d0c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Economic Ripples Threaten Markets** : Extended closure risks weighing on the economy and acting as a drag on record-high stocks, amplifying pressure on lawmakers to compromise swiftly.

* * *
* * *
# Ultra Rich make a dash for Gold, Bitcoin and AI ETFs for safety
The world's **[ultra-wealthy are surging](https://substack.com/redirect/8481b761-9e66-47c3-8c68-7b2f4ef350ac?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** into exchange-traded funds (ETF's) for gold, bitcoin and artificial intelligence amid economic turbulence and policy shifts, a new Goldman Sachs report reveals, with investors favoring these vehicles for hedging and thematic bets as gold hits record highs above $3,820 an ounce.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8481b761-9e66-47c3-8c68-7b2f4ef350ac?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Gold surges as safe haven:** Ultra-rich investors flock to leveraged gold miner ETFs, posting 632% and 348% yearly gains, fueled by Fed rate cuts and looming U.S. government shutdown risks.
* **Bitcoin ETFs explode in popularity:** Crypto holdings via ETFs like iShares Bitcoin Trust balloon to $87 billion, propelled by Trump-era pro-digital policies, despite bitcoin's dip from $124,000 peak.
* **AI funds ride tech boom:** Over half of family offices channel 52% of AI investments through ETFs, with top performers like Roundhill and VistaShares soaring 50% and 46% on generative tech frenzy.
* **ETFs trump direct buys:** Wealth managers prefer ETFs for targeted risks over broad accounts, blending hedging strategies with high-conviction themes in volatile markets.

* * *
* * *
# Meta's AI BETRAYAL: Meta Ads will spy on users chats with Meta AI agent
Meta announced Wednesday it will begin **[using users' interactions](https://substack.com/redirect/95263427-daa7-47c8-89b6-c8b38852da2a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** with its AI digital assistant to personalize ads and content across Facebook, Instagram and Messenger starting Dec. 16, with notifications rolling out Oct. 7 as part of its push to fuse generative AI with its advertising empire.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/95263427-daa7-47c8-89b6-c8b38852da2a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Massive User Base:** Meta AI boasts over 1 billion monthly active users, amplifying the reach of data-driven ad targeting across its ecosystem.
* **No Escape Option:** Users cannot opt out of the AI-influenced recommendations, though non-interactors remain unaffected.
* **Voice Input Included:** Typed and audio chats, even via Ray-Ban Meta glasses, will feed into personalized feeds and promotions.
* **WhatsApp Exemption:** Private messages stay excluded unless accounts link to other Meta apps, preserving some separation.

* * *
* * *
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d1ba4209-33e1-4083-a1ec-ab9b9568b0c2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---

Dems lose ground with independents : Only 32% of Independent voters and 5% of Republicans were in favor of the shutdown. Healthcare Credits at Stake : Democrats demanded Obamacare tax credit extensions be included in the funding bill so as to cut healthcare costs, but Republicans balked, fearing it boosts coverage for undocumented migrants, leading to the funding impasse. Two weeks of gridlock? Prediction markets say yes Prediction markets forecast a U.S. government shutdown aligning with historical data going back 35 years. Markets Predict Prolonged Standoff : Kalshi forecasts an 11.1-day shutdown duration, pushing a theoretical resolution date to mid-October. Polymarket Odds Favor Delay : The highest probability (38%) for the government reopening is October 15 or later, with 23% for October 6-9 and just 14% for quick fix by October 3-5. Historical Shutdowns Average 14 Days : Bank of America data shows typical closures since 1990 last about two weeks, often with minimal S&P 500 dips of 1% gain on average. | | ---|---|--- Economic Ripples Threaten Markets : Extended closure risks weighing on the economy and acting as a drag on record-high stocks, amplifying pressure on lawmakers to compromise swiftly. clean_body: Trump + Hilton | | | Hi Friend, You may remember Steve Hilton from Fox News — where he called out the insiders and revealed what the media wouldn’t say. Now, alongside Donald Trump , Steve is asking the question that changes everything: Is California still part of America’s promise, or has it gone rogue? The proof is hard to ignore. The policies tested in California are already being pushed nationwide and now Gavin Newsom is preparing to run for PRESIDENT! With the entire Democratic base now rallying behind the evil genius that destroyed California we are calling on real patriots to support AMERICA FIRST. One forward to a friend can turn into ten more voices demanding answers. That’s how we build the movement strong enough to stop California’s rogue agenda before it spreads. See what Trump and Hilton uncovered — then share it with everyone you know Thank you, \- Team Hilton Authorized by Steve Hilton for Governor 2026 | Pop Acta Media | Updates for Great Americans PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Winsome
subject: Better a few hours too soon than a minute too late
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
clean_body: Please read EVERY word carefully | Please read EVERY word carefully| | | | Please read EVERY word carefully| - This is my final message to you before time expires. Knowing that, will you please read every word carefully? Thanks for opening this email! I wouldn't be reaching out like this if my situation weren't truly dire. Let me explain my predicament: FIRST, while I was barred from accepting any campaign donations during Virginia's legislative session, my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, was RAKING IN hundreds of thousands of dollars! THEN, a Soros-backed, liberal group gave my Democrat opponent $500K all in one go! My Democrat opponent has continued to OUTRAISE me by MILLIONS of dollars. NOW , the polls are TIED. But I cannot win with this crippling cash disadvantage. TO MAKE MATTERS WORSE, I'm facing my CRUCIAL End of Quarter Deadline Goal and I'm WAY behind! in a serious bind here, Patriot. I'm over $10,000 behind pace to reach my upcoming Goal. I'm asking you as a Christian, a Marine, and a mother: Democrat opponent has Leftist billionaires like George Soros and Hollywood liberals backing her, but I'm 100% relying on you! can't thank you enough for reading this message all the way through, Patriot. You are truly a key part of my team! Together, we will close this fundraising gap and beat my liberal opponent in November! Thanks again and may God bless you! -Winsome Earle-Sears . Marine. Mom. Small Business Owner. Lieutenant Governor. I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, and I've held many titles in my life. Each one hasn't been a cakewalk, but I like a challenge. I've tried to show my daughters that what you can accomplish is not decided by the color of your skin or where you were born.Sure, a silver spoon would've made it easier, but I've found a helping hand from your community means so much more. ** This will be another challenge, but with you on my side, I know I can do this. | Paid for by Winsome for Governor Neither military info nor photographs of Winsome Earle-Sears in uniform imply endorsement of Winsome Earle-Sears by the Department of Defense or its particular military departments. PO Box 71596 Richmond, VA 23255-1596

name: Texas Organizing Project
subject: Manifesting with our communities / Manifestándose con nuestras comunidades ☀️🍂✨
body:
Lea el boletín en español abajo [#Español]
Speaking up for the affordable healthcare access Texans deserve
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Theresa%20DeLeon.jpg]
Our thanks to Congressman Joaquin Castro of San Antonio for inviting us to participate in a virtual press conference with him last Thursday, where TOP member Theresa DeLeon shared her story as a cancer patient, retired teacher, and as a Texan who’s concerned about healthcare access.
Theresa also spoke on how the Trump administration is letting the Affordable Care Act tax credit for premiums expire [https://www.tpr.org/government-politics/2025-09-26/castro-pushes-to-extend-tax-credits-that-make-healthcare-more-affordable-for-middle-income-families] amid the government shutdown fight.
Healthcare is a human right , and no matter the political circumstance, TOP will keep championing quality affordable healthcare access for ALL who call our state home. To learn more about TOP's healthcare justice campaign, email Tiffany at thogue@organizetexas.org [thogue@organizetexas.org] .
OCT. 11 IN HOUSTON:
Coming together for a community-led candidate forum with allies
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/CD%2018%20Candidate%20Forum_Save%20the%20Date_to%20email%20%28Website%29%20%282%29.png]
MARK YOUR CALENDAR: This community forum on October 11 is YOUR chance to hear directly from candidates for City of Houston At-Large Council and Texas Congressional District 18 on some of the issues that impact our neighborhoods the most -- such environmental justice, infrastructure, housing, public health, and economic opportunity. Partners for this event include TOP, Houston Area Urban League, Hip Hop Caucus, Texas Campaign for the Environment, BakerRipley, CEER (Coalition for Environment, Equity, and Resilience), Greater Houston Coalition for Justice, Texas Organizing Project, Denver Harbor Cares, and Pleasantville Community.
https://secure.airalliancehouston.org/a/houston-voices-health-and-equity-cd-18-and-council-large-4-candidate-forum-health-env [https://secure.airalliancehouston.org/a/houston-voices-health-and-equity-cd-18-and-council-large-4-candidate-forum-health-env]
Also, remember the voter registration deadline is October 6 for this November's elections in Houston. Double-check your voter status at govotetexas.org [http://govotetexas.org] .
For more information on this forum, email Oscar at othomas@organizetexas.org [othomas@organizetexas.org] .
ADD YOUR NAME:
Call out algorithmic price setting for rent in Dallas
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Real%20Pages%20graphic.jpg]
Safe, stable, and affordable housing shouldn't be a luxury. As costs for basic goods and services continue to rise, so does rent. And if you're a tenant in Dallas, a pesky algorithm is likely causing your rent to go even higher.
Join TOP and DFW housing justice allies as we urge the City of Dallas to ban RealPage, as well as private data sharing between landlords through algorithmic price setting.
https://secure.everyaction.com/NXgD0nS8F02LVZwJDOVXgQ2 [https://secure.everyaction.com/NXgD0nS8F02LVZwJDOVXgQ2]
RealPage is currently under investigation by the U.S. Dept. of Justice and faces multiple lawsuits from states and cities for violating antitrust laws. For more information on this campaign, contact Iman at ibouzid@organizetexas.org [ibouzid@organizetexas.org] .
TOP Tip: 🎉 Pitch in as TOP celebrates its first 15 years! 🎉
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Quince%20Fundraiser%20Blast%20-%20TOP%281%29.jpg]
That's right! For the past 15 years, TOP has built people power and political power alongside Black and Latino Texans to win policies that aim to lift up ALL in our state — no matter our race, age, faith, gender, or income. And through relentless organizing and solidarity, we know the sky's the limit for the future we can win. Help us go for another impactful 15 years by contributing $15 to TOP today!
https://secure.everyaction.com/_ew4evGgs0i4Ml7-RjD4tQ2 [https://secure.everyaction.com/_ew4evGgs0i4Ml7-RjD4tQ2]
Español
Alzando la voz por el acceso a la atención médica accesible que merecen los tejanos
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Theresa%20DeLeon.jpg]
Agradecemos al congresista Joaquín Castro , de San Antonio, por invitarnos a participar en una conferencia de prensa virtual con él el jueves pasado. Allí, Theresa DeLeon , miembro de TOP, compartió su historia como paciente de cáncer, maestra jubilada y tejana preocupada por el acceso a la atención médica.
Theresa también habló sobre cómo la administración Trump está permitiendo que expire el crédito fiscal para primas de la Ley de Cuidado de Salud Asequible (ACA) [https://www.tpr.org/government-politics/2025-09-26/castro-pushes-to-extend-tax-credits-that-make-healthcare-more-affordable-for-middle-income-families] en medio de la lucha contra el cierre del gobierno.
La atención médica es un derecho humano y, sin importar las circunstancias políticas, TOP seguirá defendiendo el acceso a una atención médica accesible y de calidad para TODOS los que consideran nuestro estado su hogar. Para obtener más información sobre la campaña de TOP por la justicia en la atención médica, escriba a Tiffany a thogue@organizetexas.org [thogue@organizetexas.org] .
11 DE OCTUBRE EN HOUSTON: Reuniéndose para un foro de candidatos liderado por la comunidad con aliados
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/CD%2018%20Candidate%20Forum_Save%20the%20Date_to%20email%20%28Website%29%20%282%29.png]
¡Aparta la fecha! Este foro comunitario del 11 de Octubre es TU oportunidad para escuchar directamente a las candidatas y los candidatos a los puestos de ‘City of Houston At-Large Council’ y del Distrito 18 del Congreso de Texas sobre temas que más impactan a nuestros vecindarios -- como justicia ambiental, infraestructura, vivienda, salud pública y oportunidades económicas.
Los aliados de este evento incluyen a TOP, Houston Area Urban League, Hip Hop Caucus, Texas Campaign for the Environment, BakerRipley, CEER (Coalition for Environment, Equity, and Resilience), Greater Houston Coalition for Justice, Texas Organizing Project, Denver Harbor Cares y Pleasantville Community.
https://secure.airalliancehouston.org/a/houston-voices-health-and-equity-cd-18-and-council-large-4-candidate-forum-health-env [https://secure.airalliancehouston.org/a/houston-voices-health-and-equity-cd-18-and-council-large-4-candidate-forum-health-env]
Además, recuerde que la fecha límite para registrarse como votante para las elecciones de noviembre en Houston es el 6 de Octubre. Verifique su estatus como votante en govotetexas.org [http://govotetexas.org] .
Para obtener más información sobre este foro, escriba a Oscar a othomas@organizetexas.org [othomas@organizetexas.org] .
AGREGA TU NOMBRE: Llama a la fijación algorítmica de precios para alguileres en Dallas
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Real%20Pages%20graphic.jpg]
La vivienda segura, estable y accesible no debería ser un lujo. A medida que siguen aumentando los costos de los bienes y servicios básicos, también sube la renta. Y si eres inquilino en Dallas, es probable que un algoritmo esté haciendo que tu renta suba todavía más.
Únete a TOP y a los aliados por la justicia en vivienda del área de DFW para exigir que la Ciudad de Dallas prohíba a RealPage, así como el intercambio privado de datos entre arrendadores mediante fijación de precios con algoritmos.
https://secure.everyaction.com/NXgD0nS8F02LVZwJDOVXgQ2 [https://secure.everyaction.com/NXgD0nS8F02LVZwJDOVXgQ2]
Actualmente, RealPage está siendo investigada por el Departamento de Justicia de Estados Unidos. y enfrenta múltiples demandas de estados y ciudades por violar leyes antimonopolio.
Para obtener más información sobre esta campaña, contacte con Iman en ibouzid@organizetexas.org [ibouzid@organizetexas.org] .
Consejos de TOP: 🎉 Dona ya que TOP celebra sus primeros 15 años 🎉
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Quince%20Fundraiser%20Blast%20-%20TOP%281%29.jpg]
¡Así es! Durante los últimos 15 años, TOP ha fortalecido el poder popular y político junto con la comunidad morena y latina de Texas para lograr políticas que buscan impulsar a TODOS en nuestro estado, sin importar nuestra raza, edad, religión, género o ingresos. Y mediante la organización incansable y la solidaridad, sabemos que el cielo es el límite para el futuro que podemos lograr. ¡Ayúdanos a lograr otros 15 años de impacto contribuyendo con $15 a TOP hoy mismo!
https://secure.everyaction.com/_ew4evGgs0i4Ml7-RjD4tQ2 [https://secure.everyaction.com/_ew4evGgs0i4Ml7-RjD4tQ2]

Texas Organizing Project
700 S. Zarzamora, Suite 212
San Antonio, TX 78207

body:

Marine.
Mom.
Small Business Owner.
Lieutenant Governor.I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, and I've held many titles in my life. Each one hasn't been a cakewalk, but I like a challenge. I've tried to show my daughters that what you can accomplish is not decided by the color of your skin or where you were born.Sure, a silver spoon would've made it easier, but I've found a helping hand from your community means so much more. _**[That 's why I'm reaching out to you asking for a helping hand to propel me to a win in my race for Governor.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z94743hfjb85i5bv2fjtqkgir82seu00bgsas338_rp22sh2s8i6epb4spim2oj4cjh2bs)**_ This will be another challenge, but with you on my side, I know I can do this.[LEND A HAND

name: Carol Obando-Derstine
subject: Ryan Mackenzie caused this shutdown
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carol for PA
body:
Ryan Mackenzie and Republicans in Washington walked away from the table.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116386683/573278287/1877634325?refcode=BLU_EM_CODC_2025-10-01_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc2MjgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzA0NGI0NTEtZjE5ZS1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=bPwxpkmf2VNA47oGvoBdxUvZGgTyA-hp7pJnSLMDOIU=)
---
| Peter,

Let’s be clear: this government shutdown is because Republicans like Ryan Mackenzie chose to make life harder and more expensive for regular people like you and me, all to create more tax breaks for the rich.

**[_I’m running to bring much-needed change to Washington. In Congress, I’ll always put Pennsylvania first. If you’re with me, chip in whatever you can to my campaign right away._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116386684/573278288/1877634325?refcode=BLU_EM_CODC_2025-10-01_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc2MjgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzA0NGI0NTEtZjE5ZS1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=bPwxpkmf2VNA47oGvoBdxUvZGgTyA-hp7pJnSLMDOIU=)**

name: Wes Moore
subject: The federal government shut down
body:
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=698%2E1086043%2E_S53C-)
Hi Peter, it’s Governor Wes Moore.
**At 12:01 this morning, the federal government shut down. Not by accident, but by choice.**
Washington failed to govern, Donald Trump failed to make a deal, and now families across our state are left to deal with the fallout.
This shutdown will have staggering impacts for our state — health coverage denied, wages lost, programs shuttered, projects scrapped.
But here in Maryland, we will not stop protecting each other.
We’re going to keep our state government open. We’re going to protect critical programs like Medicaid and food assistance. And we’re working to ensure that no one is foreclosed on or evicted simply because Washington can’t do its job, and would rather force people to go without a paycheck.
If you’re a federal worker, a veteran, or a family impacted by this shutdown — or even if you know someone who is — go to **[go.md.gov/federalshutdown.](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/410?t=2&akid=698%2E1086043%2E_S53C-)** There, you’ll find resources, protections, and support available right now.
We’ve faced hard times before. We’ll face them again.
May God Bless the Great State of Maryland and may we all continue our work to Leave No One Behind.
Elevate,
Wes
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20251001-1?refcode=em-20251001-1&refcode2=698_1086043__S53C-&akid=698%2E1086043%2E_S53C-)
**[Donate ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20251001-1?refcode=em-20251001-1&refcode2=698_1086043__S53C-&akid=698%2E1086043%2E_S53C-)**

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=698%2E1086043%2E_S53C-)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.wesmoore.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=698%2E1086043%2E_S53C-)

Email us: [info@wesmoore.com](mailto:info@wesmoore.com)
BY AUTHORITY: WES MOORE FOR MARYLAND, MARY TYDINGS, TREASURER

name: Chris Brooks, LCV
subject: DEVELOPING... the Republican Shutdown is officially underway:
body:
To view this mail in a browser, copy https://links.messages.lcv.org/servlet/MailView?ms=MTMwMDM5NzMS1&r=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&j=MjMyMDAyMDA5MAS2&mt=1&rt=0 into your browser.
DEVELOPING... cowering under pressure from President Trump, the Republican
majority in Congress has triggered a federal government shutdown, effective at
midnight last night. The longer this drags on, the more people will feel its effects: essential
services suspended, environmental safety ground to a halt, and national parks
and monuments closed to the public. Peter — last night was the deadline for our Membership Drive, but with Trump’s shutdown taking hold, we’ve been able to secure last-minute approval to extend our TRIPLE MATCH. This is urgent, Peter. Will you renew your membership for just $5 today while your support goes THREE TIMES as far to pressure Republicans in Congress to re-open our government without sacrificing the environment? https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/w_ywTKq~ President Trump and Congressional Republicans have spent this year raising our
costs — utility bills, groceries, health care, and more — while rolling back
programs that make our lives more affordable. Now they’ve shut down the government so they can continue illegally gutting
essential services and fund tax breaks for corporate polluters and the ultra
wealthy. Republicans control the White House, the Senate, and the House of
Representatives — they own this shutdown. Our job is to keep up pressure for a deal that helps lower rising energy costs
and protects our environment. Pulling this off is going to take ALL of us right
now. Please, renew your membership for just $5 to TRIPLE your impact >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/L6b_ Thanks for everything you do, Peter. We’ll be in touch as more
develops. Chris Peter — our 3x match offer ends at MIDNIGHT TONIGHT,and we’re so close to reaching our $50,000 goal. How much we raise now
determines how big we can go in our environmental campaigns for the rest of the
year. Right now, your membership goes 3X as far. Will you renew your LCV membership now to claim your 3X match and help defend our environment against Trump’s pro-polluter agenda? https://links.messages.lcv. This matching opportunity expires soon, and so does the opportunity to make your
renewed membership go THREE TIMES as far to... ✅ Hold polluters accountable:The Trump administration is trying to end ALL reporting of and limits on
greenhouse gases emitted by corporate polluters. We’re campaigning to stop them. ✅ Keep public lands in public hands:Trump’s Interior Department is seeking to overturn an important rule that
balances public lands for conservation, effectively giving priority to Big Oil
and other polluters to drill, frack, mine, and log on OUR lands — unless we act quickly. ✅ Protect climate action from anti-science extremists in Congress:With a government shutdown looming, extreme House Republicans are trying to
slash all federal programs to study and combat the climate crisis. We need you in our corner before Congress votes. The best thing you can do for our environment right now is to renew your membership for just $5 while your support will go THREE TIMES as far >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/gryxf4~ Protecting our communities from Trump’s reckless and harmful agenda is going to
take ALL of us.LCV is working around the clock to stop Trump and his allies in Congress from
repealing environmental safeguards, selling off our public lands to corporate
polluters, banning cheaper clean energy, and defunding climate science. But to do any of it, we rely on support from members like you. I wear it every single day, because to me, it’s more than just a bracelet — it’s a promise.

Gun violence prevention isn’t just a policy position for me. I will never back down from standing up to the gun lobby, and I’ll always fight for common-sense solutions that save lives.

name: Mike Nellis - Endless Urgency
subject: What Does Taking Risk Look Like Right Now?
body:
Owning the fear and stepping into it anyway

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack..65KwwaTMDjvf2vpDRkQdRLEkBNAi-4ON1ynLh6ko614?) for more
---
[](https://substack..YwW3Z6plRba4Hnp-dryPPVx3NvwSPM77E9TcCtlEIqQ?)
---
# [What Does Taking Risk Look Like Right Now?](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4258115&post_id=175039949&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc1MDM5OTQ5LCJpYXQiOjE3NTkzNDMwOTQsImV4cCI6MTc2MTkzNTA5NCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQyNTgxMTUiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.tvTYcium3xJtMKzoaIIMeVOd643TJf7Up7OuuX-1V_Q)
### Owning the fear and stepping into it anyway
| | [Mike Nellis](https://substack.com/@mikenellis)
---
| Oct 1
---
| [](https://substack.com/@mikenellis)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4258115&post_id=175039949&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc1MDM5OTQ5LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1OTM0MzA5NCwiZXhwIjoxNzYxOTM1MDk0LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItNDI1ODExNSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.68p5BrrbhVNzYauAJK8wn-v6Gi662O5Hf_Sx6J1pFtk&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4258115&post_id=175039949&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc1MDM5OTQ5LCJpYXQiOjE3NTkzNDMwOTQsImV4cCI6MTc2MTkzNTA5NCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQyNTgxMTUiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.tvTYcium3xJtMKzoaIIMeVOd643TJf7Up7OuuX-1V_Q&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4258115&post_id=175039949&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc1MDM5OTQ5LCJpYXQiOjE3NTkzNDMwOTQsImV4cCI6MTc2MTkzNTA5NCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQyNTgxMTUiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.tvTYcium3xJtMKzoaIIMeVOd643TJf7Up7OuuX-1V_Q)
---
| | [](https://substack..m-LpsQEr-tH_e0seQGMkb4fEKpX_cc8SkOIXxWS1bOU?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/endlessurgency/p/what-does-taking-risk-look-like-right?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

That question in the headline--the one posed by my friend, Chicago Alderman Andre Vasquez, in a reel on my feed this week--hit me like a brick. And then a headline popped up on my phone yesterday morning: Trump, standing before top U.S. military brass, declared that American cities and citizens should be used as "training grounds" for the armed forces.
That's not a democracy talking. That's a president telling the military the American people are the enemy. That's an audition for dictatorship.
And somehow, it didn't feel shocking. It felt inevitable. Like we've been sleepwalking here for years, and the warning signs have just been background noise. Maybe you felt it too--that sick mix of nausea and numbness. That frog-in-boiling-water dread.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f402ebd5-ff1f-411b-80b9-f9159c85783c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
_**[I'm committed to keeping Endless Urgency free for everyone--but I rely on paid subscribers (starting at just $8/month) to keep it going. If you find value in the work, consider becoming a paid subscriber:](https://substack.com/redirect/7d2b6ea0-71e5-4512-a9db-d4f379bbe767?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/7d2b6ea0-71e5-4512-a9db-d4f379bbe767?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Monday, I sat down with Sarah Longwell for my podcast. We talked about the collapse of the Democratic narrative, the ongoing shutdown standoff, and what it actually means to "defend democracy." She said it plainly: _You can 't call Trump a threat to the Republic and then not act like it._
She's right. If we say he's dangerous, we have to move like it. Speak like it. Show up like it. That doesn't mean just another viral tweet. It means an in-the-streets mentality. It means abandoning the hierarchy that says we wait for Democratic leaders to give the signal. It means relentless communication--from every corner of this movement, at every level.
Even as I write this, I feel the heat rise in my throat: _Am I doing enough?_ Is writing this rant a form of risk--or just a ritual of safe outrage?
Because here's what happens when a president says the military should "train" on U.S. citizens: it collapses the line between defense and suppression. It tells generals to see neighbors as insurgents. Protesters as combatants. Citizens as enemies.
We've seen this before--in history books, in coups, in regimes where obedience is currency and silence is survival.
And the most dangerous part? It's all happening in the open. On camera. In quotes. No conspiracy required. Just power, consolidating--unchallenged.
So what does _risk_ look like for me right now?
It looks like refusing to stay in the performance of analysis in the face of death threats from MAGA losers like Laura Loomer. It looks like owning the fear that comes with saying something sharper, harder, less polite. It looks like calling this what it is: authoritarian creep. A soft purge. The normalization of institutional rot.
And it looks like learning from those already showing up.
_**[I'm committed to keeping Endless Urgency free for everyone--but I rely on paid subscribers (starting at just $8/month) to keep it going. If you find value in the work, consider becoming a paid subscriber:](https://substack.com/redirect/7d2b6ea0-71e5-4512-a9db-d4f379bbe767?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/7d2b6ea0-71e5-4512-a9db-d4f379bbe767?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Every Friday for the last _12 years_ , a Catholic prayer group has gathered outside the Broadview ICE facility in my hometown of Chicago, standing witness as buses take people to be deported. Rain or shine. Week after week. In recent weeks, others have joined them--neighbors, clergy, students, elderly, veterans, Congressional candidates. Now people are showing up every Friday and Saturday. Even on weekdays, there's someone there, taking a stand. That's what presence looks like: ordinary citizens refusing to let cruelty happen in silence. Local officials have joined them. Community groups have rallied support. When institutions fail, people step up.
_Indivisible_ offers a different kind of model--one rooted in Big Tent politics and a single unifying message: _No Kings._ Just citizens standing up together to say: _Enough._ All are welcome. It's not about purity tests or perfect alignment--it's about solidarity in the face of authoritarianism. A simple message, but a powerful force: everyone in, nobody out, and a clear, collective voice saying this is not who we are.
Mallory McMorrow is another model. Her power is authenticity. She doesn't sound poll-tested--because she isn't--she sounds like someone who shops at Meijer, worries about the cost of groceries, watches football. Her NFL Redzone ad focusing on affordability that went viral is a form of protest, too. She framed Democratic values in concrete, everyday terms. And she shows up--locally, visibly, like a real person, not a press release. We need a million just like her.
That's what people respond to: not spin or talking points.
Truth. Presence. Guts.
_**[I'm committed to keeping Endless Urgency free for everyone--but I rely on paid subscribers (starting at just $8/month) to keep it going. If you find value in the work, consider becoming a paid subscriber:](https://substack.com/redirect/7d2b6ea0-71e5-4512-a9db-d4f379bbe767?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/7d2b6ea0-71e5-4512-a9db-d4f379bbe767?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
And yet, this fight is exhausting. My assistant and I admitted to each other this week--we feel the collective grief. The dread. The flickering hope. Some days, the only thing holding us up are these small, honest exchanges. Like when I told her I wanted to cut a work trip short just to take my son to school in the morning, and she said, _" That sounds like a great idea."_ Or when she said she needed a day to rest after a grueling newscycle week, and I said, _" Take it. Rest. We'll get back to it after the weekend."_
That's how we keep going.
Because the point of authoritarianism is to grind you down. To isolate you. To make you feel like showing up doesn't matter. Like you're alone.
Don't let the bastards grind you down.
People ask me all the time: _Mike, what do we do? What 's the next move? How do you feel hope? How do we fix this?_
But the truth is: I don't have an easy answer. I'm scared too. I'm tired too.
But here's what I know: it won't be one person or one idea that saves us. It'll be a million acts of resistance. Moments both big and small that make a difference for you and your circle of people. We need you doing whatever you can with the skills and the energy you have to move our country through this moment where the worst possible people are grinding this country into the ground for their own gain.
Mallory's showing up with truth--taking on a political establishment that begged her not to run. Chicagoans are showing up with presence and grit against armed ICE agents. Indivisible is showing up with unity and guts. This fight is in our hands now.
That's the model: relentless presence. Ordinary people creating accountability where institutions fail.
That's how I find hope--not in one grand fix, but in thousands of small acts of courage that add up. That bend history.
So ask yourself: What risk are you willing to take right now? What are you willing to disrupt, to say out loud, to make uncomfortable?
Because this moment doesn't need more commentary.
It needs courage.
Yours. Mine. Ours.
LFG.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/7d2b6ea0-71e5-4512-a9db-d4f379bbe767?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
_Mike Nellis is a Democratic strategist and entrepreneur who has raised over $1 billion for Democratic campaigns and causes. He 's the founder of Authentic.org, an award-winning fundraising and advertising agency, and a former Senior Advisor to Vice President Kamala Harris. This Substack is where he writes with endless urgency about the issues of the day--and how we can save the Democratic Party and our democracy._
_You 're currently a free subscriber to Endless Urgency with Mike Nellis. For the full experience or to support my work so I can keep it free for as many people as possible, upgrade your subscription._
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..M4UwB2QI0I9_qjlwYGMqWiW7g2d8YisBstqLY6l1ZyY?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=175039949)

| | [Comment](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4258115&post_id=175039949&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc1MDM5OTQ5LCJpYXQiOjE3NTkzNDMwOTQsImV4cCI6MTc2MTkzNTA5NCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQyNTgxMTUiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.tvTYcium3xJtMKzoaIIMeVOd643TJf7Up7OuuX-1V_Q&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

Just citizens standing up together to say: Enough. All are welcome. It's not about purity tests or perfect alignment--it's about solidarity in the face of authoritarianism. A simple message, but a powerful force: everyone in, nobody out, and a clear, collective voice saying this is not who we are. Mallory McMorrow is another model. Her power is authenticity. She doesn't sound poll-tested--because she isn't--she sounds like someone who shops at Meijer, worries about the cost of groceries, watches football. Her NFL Redzone ad focusing on affordability that went viral is a form of protest, too. She framed Democratic values in concrete, everyday terms. And she shows up--locally, visibly, like a real person, not a press release. We need a million just like her. That's what people respond to: not spin or talking points. Truth. Presence. Guts. And yet, this fight is exhausting. My assistant and I admitted to each other this week--we feel the collective grief. The dread. The flickering hope. Some days, the only thing holding us up are these small, honest exchanges. Like when I told her I wanted to cut a work trip short just to take my son to school in the morning, and she said, " That sounds like a great idea." Or when she said she needed a day to rest after a grueling newscycle week, and I said, " Take it. Rest. We'll get back to it after the weekend." That's how we keep going. Because the point of authoritarianism is to grind you down. To isolate you. To make you feel like showing up doesn't matter. Like you're alone. Don't let the bastards grind you down. People ask me all the time: Mike, what do we do? What 's the next move? How do you feel hope? How do we fix this? But the truth is: I don't have an easy answer. I'm scared too. I'm tired too. But here's what I know: it won't be one person or one idea that saves us. It'll be a million acts of resistance. Moments both big and small that make a difference for you and your circle of people. We need you doing whatever you can with the skills and the energy you have to move our country through this moment where the worst possible people are grinding this country into the ground for their own gain. Mallory's showing up with truth--taking on a political establishment that begged her not to run. Chicagoans are showing up with presence and grit against armed ICE agents. Indivisible is showing up with unity and guts. This fight is in our hands now. That's the model: relentless presence. Ordinary people creating accountability where institutions fail. That's how I find hope--not in one grand fix, but in thousands of small acts of courage that add up. That bend history. So ask yourself: What risk are you willing to take right now? What are you willing to disrupt, to say out loud, to make uncomfortable? Because this moment doesn't need more commentary. It needs courage. Yours. Mine. Ours. LFG. Mike Nellis is a Democratic strategist and entrepreneur who has raised over $1 billion for Democratic campaigns and causes. He 's the founder of Authentic.org, an award-winning fundraising and advertising agency, and a former Senior Advisor to Vice President Kamala Harris. This Substack is where he writes with endless urgency about the issues of the day--and how we can save the Democratic Party and our democracy. You 're currently a free subscriber to Endless Urgency with Mike Nellis. For the full experience or to support my work so I can keep it free for as many people as possible, upgrade your subscription. | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Mike Nellis 548 Market Street PMB 72296, San Francisco, CA 94104 ? ?

clean_body: Will you confirm your support for our campaign? Peter, voting is underway across Virginia! Abigail Spanberger is running in the biggest election of 2025, the only race where a Democrat can flip a Governor's office from red to blue. She's built a broad coalition of supporters, including two former Republican members of Congress from Virginia. And today, we're asking you to confirm your support for our campaign: Unlike the far-right Republican ticket led by Winsome Earle-Sears, Abigail is committed to making our Commonwealth stronger, safer, and more affordable. She'll protect reproductive rights, strengthen public schools, and stand up to the chaos coming out of Washington. Thanks so much, Team Spanberger By submitting your phone number you're agreeing to receive periodic text messages from the Spanberger for Governor campaign. Message & data rates may apply. name: EMILYs List
subject: Republicans just shut down the federal government
body:
They'd rather shut down the government than protect our health care |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116389012/573280101/-1403821653?refcode=WUEFEJ02_20251001_ShutdownRR_PL&sourceid=1057102&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYmEwYjNlYS1mMjllLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bRIpaQyYHrngxB3wQZ3___l7nREZ2LIwIdehVW7CD20=) Peter,

**Instead of protecting health care for millions of Americans, Republicans just shut down the federal government. **

Congressional Republicans are refusing to extend health care tax credits currently set to expire, which will cause people to see massive spikes in their health care costs — or kick them off their coverage altogether.

EMILYs List women in Congress have been working hard to protect health care for millions of Americans. House Republicans refuse to show up, negotiate, and _do their jobs_.

It's never been more clear that in order to reinstate a functional federal government that works for the American people and provides them with the services they need, we've got to take back power and **flip the House** next November. Electing Democratic pro-choice women is how we do just that.

name: Mazie Hirono
subject: Just so we’re clear
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii**
body:
|
#
---
Peter, Republicans control the White House, Senate, and House of Representatives. And they chose to shut down the U.S. government. # THE MENDOZA BRIEF
# The Latest News from Team Mendoza
# October 1, 2025
---
| | The Mendoza Brief is a way for our campaign to share the latest news, opportunities, and updates from the campaign trail. 🏜️

| [Fuel Jo’s Mission Today!](https://joannamendoza.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a848c5089d2c16d92422d70c8&id=09f5703855&e=fea3203902)
---
|
---
| |
# September Endorsement Roundup
---
| | September was another HUGE month for endorsements! Last month, Jo was proud to receive endorsements from:
**Future Forum PAC****Pima County Supervisor Rex Scott****2022 and 2024 AZ-06 Democratic Nominee Kirsten Engel****Senator Ruben Gallego****Congressman Greg Stanton****New Dems Action Fund**
The endorsements come as Jo’s campaign has seen widespread support from local and national organizations, community leaders, and grassroots donors. Raising **over $1.5 million** since launching in February, Jo has established herself as the clear frontrunner to take on vulnerable Juan Ciscomani next year.
To see the full list of endorsements, click or tap below!
---
| [Check out the full list of endorsements here!](https://joannamendoza.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a848c5089d2c16d92422d70c8&id=1fe69e6814&e=fea3203902)

---
| |
# Jo is on the Go!
---
| | The 2026 general election is **398 days away** \- and Jo is already out in the district, listening and meeting with constituents, and laying the groundwork to fight for southern Arizonans in DC. Stay tuned for when Jo will be in a community near you!

# We’re almost 1 year away from the midterms and we need your help!
---
| | The weather may be getting cooler, but this campaign certainly isn’t. **We need everyone’s help** to make sure we hit our fundraising goals to make sure we hit the ground running as we roll into 2026.
Every dollar helps as we continue to get boots on the ground and fund our effort to fire Juan Ciscomani and flip AZ-06 next year. Let’s keep up the momentum!
---
| [Pitch in to help hit our October goals!](https://joannamendoza.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a848c5089d2c16d92422d70c8&id=1f013504e3&e=fea3203902)

# Jo in the News

name: Deb Haaland
subject: Donald Trump just forced a government shutdown
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=4779%2E400544%2EYDQ5ye)
**Donald Trump and his MAGA allies in Congress just forced a government shutdown.**
Here in New Mexico, more than 22,000 federal workers and their families are now facing a wall of uncertainty. People don’t know when their next paycheck will come. Mothers will struggle to access WIC benefits to feed their families, and veterans will have a harder time accessing critical services.
**All because Donald Trump would rather make Americans sicker by raising the cost of healthcare than keep the government open.**
This is deliberate cruelty carried out by people who’ve never had to live with the consequences of their own chaos: Donald Trump has never known what it’s like to miss a paycheck or to not know where your next meal will come from. He’s never had to choose between filling a prescription and paying the rent. **But I have. And so have thousands of New Mexicans.**
We need leaders who understand the decisions made in Washington have real and harmful impacts on everyday New Mexicans. **That’s why I’m running for Governor.**
When Washington abandons people, governors are the first line of defense. New Mexicans deserve a leader who truly understands their struggles and will fight fiercely to protect them. **I’m ready to fight and deliver every day for New Mexicans, but I can’t do it alone.**
If you’re not able to contribute today, I completely understand — know that I’m so grateful for everything you’re doing to support our campaign. **[But if you’re in a position to do so, we are days away from our final public reporting deadline this year, so any grassroots donation today will be a HUGE help. Even a little bit helps us build a campaign to serve all New Mexicans.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20251001_1_shutdown?refcode=em20251001-4779&refcode2=4779_400544_YDQ5ye&akid=4779%2E400544%2EYDQ5ye)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20251001_1_shutdown?refcode=em20251001-4779&refcode2=4779_400544_YDQ5ye&akid=4779%2E400544%2EYDQ5ye)**
In solidarity,
Deb Haaland
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20251001-1&t=2&refcode2=4779_400544_YDQ5ye&akid=4779%2E400544%2EYDQ5ye)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

name: Troy Downing
subject: Make Schumer PAY THE PRICE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
Let’s call it for what it is: Chuck Schumer and Senate Democrats have SHUT DOWN the federal government.

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)Peter,
Let’s call it for what it is: Chuck Schumer and Senate Democrats have SHUT DOWN the federal government.
House Republicans did our job, passing a straightforward 7-week funding bill to keep government operations running. But Schumer and the Democrats are playing politics, demanding free healthcare for illegal immigrants and pushing other partisan priorities.
President Trump tried to negotiate in good faith, but Schumer has made one thing clear: it’s not a negotiation – it’s a power grab. Now, over a million workers are unpaid, veterans are left waiting for benefits, and dozens of services shut down – all thanks to Schumer’s left-wing demands.

Thankfully, the American public sees right through this charade. Democrats set up a plan to leverage the funding process for their demands, but it’s backfiring politically. Now it’s time to make them pay the price and expand our GOP Majority.

[Peter, I’m humbly asking you to donate TODAY to stand against Schumer’s plan and protect Trump’s America First agenda.](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-Fe8RA)
[RUSH SUPPORT FOR THE GOP
](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-4fJ9FLckKkyA)Thank you,
Troy Downing| |

House Republicans did our job, passing a straightforward 7-week funding bill to keep government operations running. But Schumer and the Democrats are playing politics, demanding free healthcare for illegal immigrants and pushing other partisan priorities. President Trump tried to negotiate in good faith, but Schumer has made one thing clear: it’s not a negotiation – it’s a power grab. Now, over a million workers are unpaid, veterans are left waiting for benefits, and dozens of services shut down – all thanks to Schumer’s left-wing demands. Thankfully, the American public sees right through this charade. Democrats set up a plan to leverage the funding process for their demands, but it’s backfiring politically. Now it’s time to make them pay the price and expand our GOP Majority. you, Troy Downing| | Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress Troy Downing is a former member of the U.S. Air Force/Air National Guard. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Air Force or the Department of War. Troy Downing For Congress P.O. | | | Friend, this is _not_ the message I hoped to send out today. Simply put: Tom missed his major End-of-Quarter fundraising goal. And to make matters worse...** _by less than $1,500._** _If you’re getting this message, it’s because you are one of a handful of supporters Tom knows he can count on when it matters most._ This is our final shot. I was able to extend the deadline until **midnight tonight** , but after that, what’s done is done. Can you help push Tom over the line?
