name: Lindsey Graham
subject: Why I’m fighting for our future.
body:
Peter, I grew up in a single room behind my parents’ family-owned liquor store, restaurant, and pool hall in Central, South Carolina. I was the first in my family to attend college, and while I was in school, I lost my mother and father within two years of one another. |
---
Peter,

I grew up in a single room behind my parents' family-owned liquor store, restaurant, and pool hall in Central, South Carolina.

I was the first in my family to attend college, and while I was in school, I lost my mother and father within two years of one another. I quickly took on the responsibility of helping raise my 13-year-old sister, Darline, and running the family businesses.

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=031af893d68e4a76a66763664cfacf7b&_e=I7IQ3L5lRksYc9LASaiKXcz0dWxZpseIJTQFFJ7bJkEDDhcm9gyC6IAaBuwvUGU3EPZBXyTgZ0E-Y0JB2CHzlxDpCFv9r284Ea7SJ5W9fqltmYKCc_hNhWz_-2Hm1sqqcTtEndCXbBbFlO7sOYc7Iearu1T0pWnkErD77EsBp9lqQKF2bOL35v4YBHW0VSmiCbQ9fyNc3wTObjPS6lL6inyM7xLpQEoJ-1Q-a8kdhjMDkRKEDmye-kgNr780q7FihSg4biAZy2oXvXUi6zBdWj7xjbWpQL8AAio2pgP-93uekvEnIGTHXbjdHOUB-7v_S81uFF0l7R2FGZM_xg_KsUgGZW1EbQ1_GLit5IuKFKn0VeQn9hnAGixojftkcFixFhw-XsCKzv_p_4ibjr-6gaF-JSIGl9QuWfVYUCsJiLh6KvjQ_5oA9rbLK7003jQsxauhkA5VXAoGx36IspmQOwuQ9gYLR2XJ9JjJHMby-MTCqP4QJDGusNHAVyYqPceti_EOJtnxoKTnxBZ7qKb40ugunCXIjo2fVG4ad1ASfY-qXAmLl3052zfHK_OklmIxIKye3ciBRbOJtuwj48xLDjLC9F54z2YJQQO7xgweRGDqDcVSWjSKYGReREILEQq7bZ2TyE6IVS7gk2PCKy4RZ6TcNa9UyXFpCiSsUBDrt0zhtfcuL6G5zxiYoDkKzBc_)
**I had to grow up fast, Peter,_and I learned many life lessons at an early age._**

After attending law school, I joined the U.S. Air Force as a member of the Judge Advocate General Corps, where I served as a military prosecutor and defense attorney.

Even after being elected to the United States Senate, I continued to wear the uniform and served in the U.S. Air Force Reserves, where I performed several short deployments in the war zones of Afghanistan and Iraq.

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=031af893d68e4a76a66763664cfacf7b&_e=I7IQ3L5lRksYc9LASaiKXcz0dWxZpseIJTQFFJ7bJkEDDhcm9gyC6IAaBuwvUGU3EPZBXyTgZ0E-Y0JB2CHzlxDpCFv9r284Ea7SJ5W9fqltmYKCc_hNhWz_-2Hm1sqqcTtEndCXbBbFlO7sOYc7Iearu1T0pWnkErD77EsBp9lqQKF2bOL35v4YBHW0VSmiCbQ9fyNc3wTObjPS6lL6inyM7xLpQEoJ-1Q-a8kdhjOXaAvMB8I6eY-MGYZCHGEdIVusUvPaur8QG0dFExpPVXRBctSctQgNPViP3WRldfLfv45Q3huUq7ylpfJLRfkRyT4Fz54l4BPQpFo3HESgSDA4dTy27fvrW26igqUrw3c9CkPXQfzuJddokhdvrY6QotwhcD6QPWMW5W9phn6QROQc-PYwXZ5Pi7-LRVmxmo4vAfNGzXD9la8_0RrOpUoUPSc3xN5pNnJE1V954JT_UC1wHvNDOf6Kc8-jlxylgqgPPMjORBFgiFlLe-SSQaAuUVZh9d5CH2e4aKuASNM3QIlb_0H8Vu73Ahs3imIV97ACzBR5TUcvh9IBtSYvsjDCh4rtA9QuZ4VGXjhlkeocF6QTU7S4lMMYK9mj0UyyIdDLIkuQRLb8uC1MxL_ydAQ0PoLmyWCmYBGgSpwE9RF2MCESgbPC6qIwHzF973jfhtciNa7ag-iXPgNli_Rqnoq2)
Peter, my story is similar to that of most Americans. I didn't grow up with a silver spoon in my mouth with everything handed to me. I had to grow up fast and work hard. I learned a lot of valuable lessons at a young age and took on a whole lot of responsibility.

But one thing stuck with me over the years -- the perspectives I gained from listening to the hard-working South Carolinians who were regulars at my family's pool hall or my brave colleagues in the military. Their perspectives, whether I agreed with them or not, helped build my foundation for understanding what Americans need.

**It's no secret that our nation is sharply divided right now, but there are some things we should all agree on.**

**We need a country that is a safe place to live and raise a family, and we need a country where the American Dream is alive and possible for everyone, no matter where they start from.**

Peter, I'm fighting every day to make those two things a reality. Sadly, there are people across the aisle in Washington who simply can't agree with us on these issues. They are okay with open borders and the flow of violent crime into our neighborhoods and onto our streets. They are okay with punishing hard-working Americans with higher taxes, deepening the burden on them and their families.

**[That's why I'm reaching out with a simple request: if you have a few dollars to spare, would you consider making a contribution to support my campaign by clicking this link or the button below?](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=031af893d68e4a76a66763664cfacf7b&_e=I7IQ3L5lRksYc9LASaiKXcz0dWxZpseIJTQFFJ7bJkEDDhcm9gyC6IAaBuwvUGU3EPZBXyTgZ0E-Y0JB2CHzlxDpCFv9r284Ea7SJ5W9fqltmYKCc_hNhWz_-2Hm1sqqcTtEndCXbBbFlO7sOYc7Iearu1T0pWnkErD77EsBp9lqQKF2bOL35v4YBHW0VSmiCbQ9fyNc3wTObjPS6lL6inyM7xLpQEoJ-1Q-a8kdhjOIllzrxrrxSpZUVONledITbp0iVjeRf0zNdBnApicQIUf5DeTHrgNEp914ue6eSs6R114pWEX9igu18qA0ncDFU0lb3UmYcms1ZuYgiZXfVT6E7MBk-XR6w-E2CAjOCaQu7ehCCn6NwgGtAdwj3AhHdD4X5rL2XWAr2bPGo_uhF50UsDnr0JjdoKVdmsATHBBQIFDMV1oV7RaJcc35mIQ1BVY0MS4PLvjoSop7W-PlZBuRKgeG-2wH4_PZ-St7UsaxWeKw_Evs6EOjEPvIexra2mhQO3zQYeqn0FeR57EAXRBeyRfTjZ1Q60pGW-hdFe1OQfEPMetHQbeAFffM_W4dO28Z946tKb0ektka7bpwe4EVQLu4ZjU_Qjq2Brzx-Ofma0MNe2lQQ0-ODG6ejP6grw6YvuK8dvSupTCYd-MHDhdn08M1uyUCSalPMu1-JLaRyYxK7hzMTPOW-XP4YfzS)**

body:
Denver’s Spending Grew 60% in a Decade, But Revenues and Population Lagged Far Behind
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)

**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Hi friends,
🚨 Heidi just dropped one of her most explosive episodes of _Unleashed_ yet: _The Durango Dirty Dozen — Exposing the Truth in 9-R._ From secret gender transitions without parental consent to $200K in taxpayer funds funneled to DEI consultants, Heidi uncovers what may be one of Colorado’s biggest school district coverups. **This is more than a Durango story — it’s a warning for every parent in Colorado.** If it can happen there, it can happen anywhere. Listen [here](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), or watch on [YouTube](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) or [Rumble](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)!
🎙️ Speaking of podcasts, did you know you can listen/watch a **daily 3-minute rundown of the news** from RMV? Check out today's Mountain Minute podcast [here](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), or watch on [YouTube](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) or [Rumble](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)!
Here is a summary of today's top stories:
🏔️ **Here in Colorado...** Denver’s spending has jumped [60% in a decade](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), outpacing revenues and population growth and raising sustainability concerns. State Republicans say [officials blocked their pick for a vacant House seat](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) over disputed eligibility rules, while Pueblo voters will decide whether to [end the “strong mayor” system](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). Congressman Evans is urging Colorado to [embrace oil, gas, and nuclear](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) for energy security, and CU Boulder condemned an [anti-Mormon chant](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) at the BYU football game as a violation of community standards.
**🇺🇸 On the National Stage...** Washington is now facing [government shutdown](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) as Democrats demand Obamacare subsidy extensions and Republicans push for a clean funding bill. The shutdown will furlough workers, disrupt agencies, and cost billions, echoing past closures. Meanwhile, President Trump and Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu rolled out a [sweeping Middle East peace plan](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), challenging Hamas to accept disarmament, aid, and eventual self-governance, with Trump set to chair a new “Board of Peace” guiding Gaza’s redevelopment.
🗣️ **Commentary Spotlight...** This week’s commentary focuses on justice and jobs. C .J. Garbo warns that [partisan responses to political violence](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) threaten liberty and trust in the rule of law. Mike O’Donnell cautions that Colorado’s reliance on health care and government hiring is unsustainable, with a correction likely to [burst the employment bubble](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). Together, they argue impartial justice and economic balance are key to preserving stability.
This is the Mountain Minute for Wednesday, October 1, 2025.
– Team RMV
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[Denver’s Spending Grew 60% in a Decade, But Revenues and Population Lagged Far Behind](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY SHAINA COLE, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
Denver’s budget has grown sharply over the past ten years, far faster than its population and its ability to bring in tax dollars. A new analysis from the Common Sense Institute shows inflation-adjusted spending per resident rose about 60 percent since 2015. During that period, revenues grew more slowly, at about 40 percent, while the city’s population increased by less than 7 percent.
The mismatch is why Denver now faces a projected $250 million gap over the next two years, even as officials push a $950 million bond proposal for housing, roads, and other projects.
Where the money goes has changed dramatically. Construction and infrastructure costs have ballooned, climbing more than elevenfold since 2015, largely because of major bond packages such as Elevate Denver approved by voters in 2017. Spending on community development has also surged, while health programs now cost about twice what they did a decade ago.
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[When will the health-related employment bubble burst?](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY MIKE O'DONNELL, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Since January 2023, nearly 39% of new jobs in Colorado have been in health care and social assistance, and another 22% in state government, raising concerns about overdependence on these sectors.
* Mental health and elder care are driving much of this growth, with outpatient centers, home health, and disability services seeing double-digit job increases, while other areas like dialysis centers and medical labs have shed jobs.
* Critics warn this rapid expansion is unsustainable, arguing the “health care employment bubble” could burst once demand slows or AI reshapes the industry—leaving Colorado particularly vulnerable to an economic downturn.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|

The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[When Justice Becomes Partisan, Freedom Dies](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY C. J. GARBO, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
_Picture, for a moment, a reversal of roles._
_Suppose a radical on the right assassinated one of the most visible voices on the left in front of live cameras. Imagine if, after that horror, crowds of conservatives cheered, called for more, and excused the violence as justified. Picture further attacks – one shouting slogans, another storming a newsroom, a sniper targeting a Planned Parenthood clinic – and all of them part of an ongoing pattern._
_Would there be any question how the left would react? Their calls for action would be immediate, sweeping, and relentless._
_This thought experiment matters because it exposes a double standard. Violence should not be judged by the ideology of the perpetrator. Violence is violence. Terror is terror._
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
** ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ **
**[Why the Douglas County School Board Election on November 4th Matters More Than Ever](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY ANDY JONES | COMMENTARY | SEPTEMBER 29** _As the leaves turn in Douglas County, so does the page to another pivotal moment in our community’s story: the school board election on November 4, 2025. For parents juggling carpools, teachers fine-tuning lesson plans, and students eyeing college applications, this vote might feel like just another item on a crowded ballot. But in a district that has clawed its way back from the depths of COVID-19 disruptions to become a beacon of educational excellence, the stakes couldn’t be higher._
__
**[VSSA teacher apologizes—debate persists over classroom remarks about Charlie Kirk and Trump](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**BY SHAINA COLE | COMMENTARY | SEPTEMBER 29** _A storm continues to brew at Vail Ski and Snowboard Academy (VSSA) after a longtime teacher’s controversial remarks in class. The comments came shortly after conservative activist Charlie Kirk was assassinated, setting off heated debate in the community about free speech, professional boundaries, and accountability in schools. The issue dominated last Wednesday night’s school board meeting, where the teacher publicly apologized but many parents and students left split over whether she should keep her job._
__

**[Durango 9-R’s Monday update comes as parents dispute the “misinformation” label](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY JEN SCHUMANN | LOCAL | SEPTEMBER 29** _Durango School District 9-R holds its State of the District tonight at the Impact Career Innovation Center. The district’s event page bills it as a community update with test-score dashboards and a Q &A. The Durango Herald said leaders plan to confront “misinformation.” Parent Jason Mietchen hears it differently: “We’ve had to counteract the misinformation for years. The school puts out a ton of it."_
__

subject: It’s time for Republicans to cut their vacation short
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRIS DELUZIO FOR CONGRESS
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116393889/573289478/1895761198?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTQ1ZWI2Yy1mYTllLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rLA_y4kwQ2A5rhHVhsPqA0Hwfy97FdY8_iQpC-rpUWQ=&emci=82257b64-fa9e-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=4545eb6c-fa9e-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=13185894) Derek,

Republicans just shut down the federal government. We House Democrats were in Washington ready to work to fund the government and do something to bring down high costs pounding hardworking Western Pennsylvanians and folks across the country.

**Let’s be clear: Republicans have full control in Washington. Their decision to shut down the government is foolish, partisan, and reckless—and it’s all to avoid working with Democrats to clean up the mess they caused.**

House Republicans have been on vacation for more than a week, ducking their responsibility to keep the government funded and running—all while my Democratic colleagues and I have been in DC ready to work.

It’s time for Republicans to cut their vacation short, come back to Washington, and negotiate in good faith to reopen the government and deliver a deal that works for the American people to lower costs and protect healthcare. [**I’m committed to funding the government, putting an end to the chaos Republicans have caused, and protecting Western Pennsylvania. clean_body: Derek, Republicans just shut down the federal government. We House Democrats were in Washington ready to work to fund the government and do something to bring down high costs pounding hardworking Western Pennsylvanians and folks across the country. Let’s be clear: Republicans have full control in Washington. Their decision to shut down the government is foolish, partisan, and reckless—and it’s all to avoid working with Democrats to clean up the mess they caused. House Republicans have been on vacation for more than a week, ducking their responsibility to keep the government funded and running—all while my Democratic colleagues and I have been in DC ready to work. It’s time for Republicans to cut their vacation short, come back to Washington, and negotiate in good faith to reopen the government and deliver a deal that works for the American people to lower costs and protect healthcare. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | = | = | | | = | = | | | = | = Thanks, Chris Deluzio | Make sure this email goes to your inbox. name: Becca Balint
subject: Republicans got us in this mess.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont**
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116394232/573290131/-785282667?refcode=AU_RAB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20251001_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZWQxOGFmMy1mYTllLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Qo2UiZkIorxxm3BmGjEdHyii8vZs4fcDD-PGCxT8AiU=)
---
Peter, at midnight, the federal government shut down. Let’s be clear about how we got into this mess: Right now, who holds the majority in the House? **Republicans.** And who holds the majority in the Senate? **Republicans, again.** And the White House? You’re right, **Republicans.** They could have worked with Democrats to claw back the damage they’ve created. They could have worked with us to save rural hospitals. They could have worked with us to save the healthcare of millions of Americans. We were at the Capitol all week to show the American people that we were standing with them — and we were ready to negotiate. But House Republicans didn’t even bother to come back to town. Disgraceful. **[If you’re as outraged as I am, please add your name to my petition. I’m calling on Republicans to come back to Washington, save our healthcare, and stop giving the ultra-wealthy tax breaks they don’t need.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116394233/573290132/-1419040311?contactdata=dd9MxxdNGA3kP4kC3NCAxKu8xvuFt+BNEJv8Mt8u8vAIdR8TVR7tM0rfO0/DL4CKOmL/v9QG/7/9fc2NK3wt2+3EJGV1mY4TKNQFwtgOGhGpdNh61bDcHQshsXINqqiX4L2LoP/zLUPPAqO5kN5vYHcnMkfHEZ3qeuer5B+38+E=&refcode=AU_RAB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20251001_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZWQxOGFmMy1mYTllLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Qo2UiZkIorxxm3BmGjEdHyii8vZs4fcDD-PGCxT8AiU=&emci=9b0a2138-ec9e-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=3ed18af3-fa9e-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=43402272)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116394234/573290133/-1419040311?contactdata=dd9MxxdNGA3kP4kC3NCAxKu8xvuFt+BNEJv8Mt8u8vAIdR8TVR7tM0rfO0/DL4CKOmL/v9QG/7/9fc2NK3wt2+3EJGV1mY4TKNQFwtgOGhGpdNh61bDcHQshsXINqqiX4L2LoP/zLUPPAqO5kN5vYHcnMkfHEZ3qeuer5B+38+E=&refcode=AU_RAB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20251001_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZWQxOGFmMy1mYTllLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Qo2UiZkIorxxm3BmGjEdHyii8vZs4fcDD-PGCxT8AiU=&emci=9b0a2138-ec9e-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=3ed18af3-fa9e-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=43402272)
---
If you’re worried, scared, or downright furious — I’m with you. I’m going to do everything in my power to end this mess.
In the meantime, I know you may have questions about how this government shutdown may affect you and your families. [**For more information, please see these FAQs now live on my website.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116394235/573290134/545849503?refcode=AU_RAB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20251001_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZWQxOGFmMy1mYTllLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Qo2UiZkIorxxm3BmGjEdHyii8vZs4fcDD-PGCxT8AiU=&emci=9b0a2138-ec9e-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=3ed18af3-fa9e-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=43402272)
In solidarity,
Becca
**[beccabalintvt@beccabalint.com](mailto:beccabalintvt@beccabalint.com)** | **Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont**
P.O. Box 291
Burlington, VT 05402

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: re: government shutdown
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress
body:
---
| | [BREAKING:
_House Republicans shut down government_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116393841/573289379/1694059021?amount=15&refcode=20251001_em_fr_rr1_np4c_main&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTdmYTRmNi1mMzllLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cWIEXKibQ7y2fiQzvzVwPr9WgBJ_RtDKduLt5Yh4u8Q=) We’re dealing with yet another Republican DISASTER for America’s working families. Mike Johnson and House Republicans — along with Trump and the Republican Senate — just SHUT DOWN the government! [Let me repeat that: Speaker Johnson and House Republicans doing Trump’s bidding just halted paychecks for MILLIONS of Americans, in order to try to RIP AWAY health care from millions and DISMANTLE the Affordable Care Act once and for all.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116393842/573289380/1694059021?amount=15&refcode=20251001_em_fr_rr1_np4c_main&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTdmYTRmNi1mMzllLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cWIEXKibQ7y2fiQzvzVwPr9WgBJ_RtDKduLt5Yh4u8Q=) Hear me loudly and clearly: Republicans are too extreme to govern — and we need to make sure this is their LAST term in power in the House. [For several months, grassroots supporters like you have joined our call to Save Our Health Care — and we need you now more than ever.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116393843/573289381/1694059021?amount=15&refcode=20251001_em_fr_rr1_np4c_main&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTdmYTRmNi1mMzllLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cWIEXKibQ7y2fiQzvzVwPr9WgBJ_RtDKduLt5Yh4u8Q=) In the saddest and cruelest irony of all, Republican attacks on the Affordable Care Act harm Republican constituents the most — including the closure of rural hospitals. Thank you for helping to make this point clear to voters across the country, including in swing districts that we need to win in 2026 in order to give the American people the health care they deserve. [_Democrats need to make Republicans’ destructive scheme completely BACKFIRE — and that starts by OUTRAISING them in October so we can DEFEAT every last one of them in the midterms. I know that nothing would get Republicans' attention more than us building a POWERHOUSE operation to TAKE BACK the House — but I’ll need you on board to do it. Please, will you rush $15 in this existential moment? >>_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116393844/573289382/1694059021?amount=15&refcode=20251001_em_fr_rr1_np4c_main&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTdmYTRmNi1mMzllLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cWIEXKibQ7y2fiQzvzVwPr9WgBJ_RtDKduLt5Yh4u8Q=) I’ll be blunt: Republicans just imperiled the lives and livelihood of millions of Americans. [It’s disgusting. It’s shameful. It’s un-American. And we need to make them REGRET it.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116393845/573289383/1694059021?amount=15&refcode=20251001_em_fr_rr1_np4c_main&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTdmYTRmNi1mMzllLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cWIEXKibQ7y2fiQzvzVwPr9WgBJ_RtDKduLt5Yh4u8Q=) [_Please: I’m pleading with you in this unprecedented moment. If Democrats like you step up, we can make this the day Republicans lost the House. But I’ll need every grassroots supporter like you on board to do it. I’ve never needed you more — will you answer my call and rush in $15 to help our Democrats FLIP the House and elect Hakeem Jeffries as Speaker? Please, in moments like these, we can’t afford to stay silent. clean_body: The Left is motivated, flush in cash, and out for revenge | | | 🚨 | SPECIAL ELECTION ALERT | 🚨 ---|---|--- Friend, When President Trump gave me his COMPLETE AND TOTAL ENDORSEMENT , my mission was clear – keep Marco Rubio’s former Senate seat firmly in Republican hands. At the time, many of the dynamics of this race were still up in the air. But now, Chuck Schumer’s handpicked candidate has emerged. And this candidate was one of the biggest driving forces behind the woke insanity that we in Florida thought we’d defeated. Their prized candidate abused her power by pushing extreme lock-downs , mask mandates , boys in girls’ sports and bathrooms , and America-hating CRT. This is who the Democrats and Chuck Schumer think should represent Florida. Democrats think they can win this seat – and they are about to be flush with MILLIONS of left-wing dollars to try to defeat us as a way to get back at President Trump in his home state. Since Governor DeSantis appointed me to replace Marco Rubio, I’ve been working tirelessly to simultaneously carry out President Trump’s agenda and build a massive, statewide campaign from scratch. From our victories in Florida to President Trump’s landslide win, we dealt some crushing blows to the woke agenda – particularly as it relates to our kids in school. But this is not close to over. The Left is motivated, flush in cash, and out for revenge. If we get complacent, we will lose our Senate majority. That’s the last thing we need. Thank you for your time and commitment. Sincerely, Ashley Moody U.S. Senator for Florida Paid for Moody for Florida Moody for Florida 301 W Platt St, #A663, Tampa, FL 33606

_**Government Shutdown Politics**_

**and Arizona's First Latina Elected to Congress**

The Latino Vote Podcast Season 2025 Episode 32
| Chuck Rocha and Mike Madrid break down what a looming **government shutdown really means** — and why it could hand extraordinary power to Donald Trump, reshaping which agencies stay open and which close. Our hosts also analyze the results of **Arizona’s Grijalva special election** , revealing how local Latino candidates are outperforming national Democrats.

name: Working Families Party
subject: Republicans’ choice: fix health care or shut down the government
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St
body:
| | | Peter,
**Trump and Congressional Republicans have driven us straight into a government shutdown.** Why? Because they refuse to do the one thing working families need most: lower health care costs. Let’s be clear: Republicans don’t care that families can’t afford prescription drugs or that premiums are spiraling out of control. They don’t care if rural hospitals close or cancer research funding dries up. As long as their billionaire donors keep cutting campaign checks, they’re fine with throwing millions of people off their health insurance. **[That’s why Working Families Power and other allies are bringing people together today, October 1st at 8:30 PM ET / 5:30 PM PT for a mass call.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMbGj-ca0TYSsYMZBvIweYdKJE_axQjKhqRn_JUr1BFDbgH0iIaq_OFY-nTEe1BmGT3hVY7shLbZv3v2tcEmqqubi6bu5pFe2SrqgjGsJlFhax8MlBoxZj3cIAM_FnMe9jrokAKCUsBQrpy1aJT6Op2eDrvasTy73jaZy9F2AR1iRi--Wo6H_KEPrt520auPH3HKOzZK-xmfqMfntolbcGbum-XC45EG0rk4iyy5r_Lx0FeiZCQdlbdFofMpU8Cug80aFyiO3Hp-Dx3UJNdJ1D1Eo51Vp15HK6Ry2Ro9hKbsf/4kd/mSDIDJikT06vJcHu4QqQqw/h0/h001.I-c9UQWf5ElEghDRObaIEYCD1oKFsqFZZouajOzRaIE) **They’ll break down the shutdown in Congress, share what’s at stake for our families, and talk about how we are organizing to fight back. **[RSVP](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMbGj-ca0TYSsYMZBvIweYdKJE_axQjKhqRn_JUr1BFDbgH0iIaq_OFY-nTEe1BmGT3hVY7shLbZv3v2tcEmqqub0t54fB6jaQsEwSjGl1Gw_rZPdH53IC_zgBtebo8utEPmj93Ak0LW3ZqWXu5vhzZYMG0cGeyytnyTobQ6QmDmu9AqLzVPSB24S70B4fZOjVXA8zu6_xYIfjQaTWcb4nvYKgbWSRPVao-5J7c2fN-h37gBGHi3gVvdMgxkY96JrRVRrnecrwPphLy3mOIFbbmlgBzeL43a0cEZTEXZqcRy-/4kd/mSDIDJikT06vJcHu4QqQqw/h1/h001.911DmQmQu8Szc75rR-zSGMSZxTQezxkBuBLnpmqvJ5w)** For ten straight months, Republicans have attacked our health care from every angle. They’ve:
* Jacked up medication costs,
* Slashed funding for life-saving medical research,
* Put rural hospitals on the chopping block, and
* Cut coverage for more than 15 million people.

And as of midnight last night, they have led us into a full government shutdown which they promised they would continue unless we let them raise premiums even higher. **Republicans have a simple choice: fix our health care crisis or keep the government shut down. It shouldn’t be a hard choice.** **[Join the mass call tonight (10/1) at 8:30 PM EST/5:30 PM PST for an update on the federal funding fight, and to discuss how we can organize collectively to support and protect our communities in this federal shutdown.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMbGj-ca0TYSsYMZBvIweYdKJE_axQjKhqRn_JUr1BFDbgH0iIaq_OFY-nTEe1BmGT3hVY7shLbZv3v2tcEmqquZOBP01MwuLBLBUMpvEn6-ZwNIuDRTMoJVnetG3PZPXicVV0jPSW3aiuNI4dsgToT3dUdzwXBIO2N8QV2HQj1RASzwzknBBGsTCS9fwxnncKAx9gJ58T9EuLTKv5b7xjacy9BSJP29BRIg8YOAArRTnbKhzxE5-lXXLoewIFN3dWDgdFr17s6e1dkJQQdDuQMe6pFH0ZZsQJx5DoWPfHUSD/4kd/mSDIDJikT06vJcHu4QqQqw/h2/h001.TWDBdvDm2lw8t-NIvtZFS76x80dbeQSHp6H48WcvEOE)** [RSVP](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMbGj-ca0TYSsYMZBvIweYdKJE_axQjKhqRn_JUr1BFDbgH0iIaq_OFY-nTEe1BmGT3hVY7shLbZv3v2tcEmqqubDQqDPtW1TxD4shikzCqM0XiOvRudJIJYL62tB4O5i5mbKHKSWFumrERoL-2w6_vd_zoRPdu7j0XMxdbkHCOfpjwQrsHXOpVay51HiZmrhrOVz6JluzBHpbYH3w0hKdwAFmBnnQ2KnT0Gest1F0Rhg2S8cf-TfOqdkG7iBXqs5k8yNo1-5NNjJ1BoI_hrjT9T4vpcjJXMkpDvSHVJVItN_/4kd/mSDIDJikT06vJcHu4QqQqw/h3/h001.pRoHXEjEowOGePScLJ3VDGszLfoV8OAWJOEhtcS0o5k) We’ve faced these fights before, and when we come together, we’ve won. We can do it again. But we need to make it clear to our leaders: **we won’t accept any funding bill that throws millions off their health insurance or drives our health care costs even higher.** **[Will you join Working Families Power and others tonight, October 1st at 8:30 PM ET / 5:30 PM PT for a mass call to reclaim our democracy for working families?](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMbGj-ca0TYSsYMZBvIweYdKJE_axQjKhqRn_JUr1BFDbgH0iIaq_OFY-nTEe1BmGT3hVY7shLbZv3v2tcEmqquYwKMV_OSXxEmzdHPcg-cwWobRDU56NdZzkPDjHXHCO3TOfsGokFykHJ5hcpDSfmf0DS5PyPeJvYprRGrBg3vNqoG7uDo2HQJb8c3cPfBwOM3y9KC9NO6HdhWJF09TjucmzMQtzbjSmhpETBHuNteLherLfBzFcXagMTi_9Qjr4QtIB290Ca3vm4K2CWyvlBD3Ke9IvSaLEHcSD8HW566fS/4kd/mSDIDJikT06vJcHu4QqQqw/h4/h001.LIi6jy-45i08RkNBMh2YohJ36kO_s_V1NhUv4N-mimw)** [RSVP](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMbGj-ca0TYSsYMZBvIweYdKJE_axQjKhqRn_JUr1BFDbgH0iIaq_OFY-nTEe1BmGT3hVY7shLbZv3v2tcEmqquYKbRg5YUzWBWbidYiMRGTFvXEPlXynZzpvoRJPsLJzkh89GTTbQWRr2Fqh84j-BeAv-YtOIv-0rtGY0p89zuuHfU40ZMPc0nSPOYM5GB9gsfH4OzEKadWKF6qFKpmrTAXonXpkBqHX1v5t-kQrnrYv8EHQPI4zFmbL3SLih874kWH8H4dFe4hSC1WLP7FrFgG6b9iha1GN_WzBGQ7fkICN/4kd/mSDIDJikT06vJcHu4QqQqw/h5/h001.-no2YLhxOMomlFzFqf_g1PmBVQf7tpOgEv6EXGsCEc4) clean_body: | | | Peter, Trump and Congressional Republicans have driven us straight into a government shutdown. Why? Because they refuse to do the one thing working families need most: lower health care costs. Let’s be clear: Republicans don’t care that families can’t afford prescription drugs or that premiums are spiraling out of control. They don’t care if rural hospitals close or cancer research funding dries up. As long as their billionaire donors keep cutting campaign checks, they’re fine with throwing millions of people off their health insurance. They’ll break down the shutdown in Congress, share what’s at stake for our families, and talk about how we are organizing to fight back. For ten straight months, Republicans have attacked our health care from every angle. They’ve: Jacked up medication costs, Slashed funding for life-saving medical research, Put rural hospitals on the chopping block, and Cut coverage for more than 15 million people. And as of midnight last night, they have led us into a full government shutdown which they promised they would continue unless we let them raise premiums even higher. Republicans have a simple choice: fix our health care crisis or keep the government shut down. It shouldn’t be a hard choice. We’ve faced these fights before, and when we come together, we’ve won. We can do it again. But we need to make it clear to our leaders: we won’t accept any funding bill that throws millions off their health insurance or drives our health care costs even higher. In solidarity, Working Families Party Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . name: Team DNC
subject: Republicans own this shutdown.
body:
---
Derek, It’s official: **Donald Trump and Republicans in Congress have shut down the federal government.** Democratic members of the House and the Senate are in DC, ready to pass a clean bill to fund the government. **Donald Trump and Republicans won’t take that deal.** Instead, they’re holding the federal government hostage while ripping away Americans’ health care and jacking up costs. That’s just plain wrong, Derek. Democrats won’t support a partisan Republican spending bill that rips health care away from tens of millions of Americans. Republicans need to ditch their vacations, come back to work, and get serious about reaching a bipartisan agreement that meets the needs of the American people. **They own this shutdown.** [**Derek, we’re asking Democrats in Republican-led districts to call their members of Congress and urge them to reach a bipartisan agreement that funds the government and addresses this dangerous health care crisis. Democrats are making calls right now — can you join them?**](https://ak.democrats.org/call/20250929-Government-Shutdown?refcode=em_20251001_4720_fr&akid=4728%2E22930333%2EaXzNgR) **[MAKE A CALL](https://ak.democrats.org/call/20250929-Government-Shutdown?refcode=em_20251001_4720_fr&akid=4728%2E22930333%2EaXzNgR)** Thank you, The Democrats

**[CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-october-2025?refcode=em_20251001_4720_fr&refcode2=4728_22930333_aXzNgR&akid=4728%2E22930333%2EaXzNgR)**

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

name: Judicial Watch Corruption Chronicles
subject: Judicial Watch: Transgender Scandal Documents Show UC San Francisco Doctors Gave Puberty Blockers to Children as Young as Nine
body:
Judicial Watch announced today it received 2,491 pages of records
in a California Public Records Act lawsuit on behalf of The Daily
Caller News Foundation that show top doctors in the University of
California San Francisco (USCF) gave puberty blockers to children as
young as age nine.

[alt_text]

| | | | Friend, Republicans control the House. Republicans control the Senate. Someone who will advocate for what’s right, take care of business, and always put Tennesseans first. **It’s time to elect Vincent Dixie.** Early voting ends **_TOMORROW,_** and the primary couldn’t be closer. If we want to send the right candidate to Washington in December, we have to work together **_now_**. **The next 6 days are critical.[Chip in what you can so we can finish strong, and get back to work >>](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/BeOl0Nm_ynQ31-ykdzG2EQ~~/AAUS1hA~/jrLY1R1eIsnVL5OVDjFOlyFW3NFh1oFYBH3-hkvtnt3FYuGYVoZSk1aFmkwHGi-D1ijPrV1XwwA7x6Pi9ntnJf0RSFpyj9swBpgaqwek_MUHgBkC25tAS6noVBi4AzhjRO5NA0nkz61Iur2bUSjKg8AU8IohmAwjIzTFVwd38oEEz1CRLy_F5AHDC-OBwLvWRVM5NRp7qsNrdP1uORpo3a74rc4wq0WxNLjm9Rj6lllTcYo23MS0P27XhJz9A35mBSE6_RKGWU0_6b2-wMoDwkqnzIMvmSotlAXW-_rYciY~)** ****[**CHIP IN**](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/BeOl0Nm_ynQ31-ykdzG2EQ~~/AAUS1hA~/jrLY1R1eIsnVL5OVDjFOlyFW3NFh1oFYBH3-hkvtnt3FYuGYVoZSk1aFmkwHGi-D1ijPrV1XwwA7x6Pi9ntnJf0RSFpyj9swBpgaqwek_MUHgBkC25tAS6noVBi4AzhjRO5NA0nkz61Iur2bUSjKg8AU8IohmAwjIzTFVwd38oEEz1CRLy_F5AHDC-OBwLvWRVM5NRp7qsNrdP1uORpo3a74rc4wq0WxNLjm9Rj6lllTcYo23MS0P27XhJz9A35mBSE6_RKGWU0_6b2-wMoDwkqnzIMvmSotlAXW-_rYciY~)**** –Team Dixie

clean_body: Republicans just shut down the government. | ~ | | | | Friend, Republicans control the House. Republicans control the Senate. Republicans control the White House. Republicans just shut down the government. Are we really going to send a Republican to Washington to “work” for TN-7? No, we can’t. Tennessee’s 7th District deserves better. For the first time in 40 years, it’s time to send a fighter to Washington. Someone who will advocate for what’s right, take care of business, and always put Tennesseans first. It’s time to elect Vincent Dixie. Early voting ends TOMORROW, and the primary couldn’t be closer. If we want to send the right candidate to Washington in December, we have to work together now. The next 6 days are critical.~ **~ –Team Dixie Vincent Dixie is a small business owner, husband, and State Representative who has passed bipartisan laws, taken on corruption, and delivered real results for Tennessee families. Now he’s running for Congress to lower costs, protect Medicare and Social Security, and finally put working people first. ~ ** ** | Paid for by Vincent Dixie for Tennessee Vincent Dixie for Tennessee73 White Bridge RoadSte 103-328Nashville, TN 37205United States ~ "Website"

subject: Hegseth has no clue what he's doing. Demand he resign or be fired.
body:
| | | | |

| | |
# [Hegseth has no clue what he's doing. Demand he resign or be fired.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T62bbf98d-65e3-48d4-8fdb-2482fda24105/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T676a4b08-ae96-4020-b347-a3fe5398488e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | _([Take action, ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8b27ad90-80fd-4a8c-8d05-4e09db53ecff/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)then share with friends to help build support!)_ **Pete Hegseth is a disaster as Secretary of Defense, and he needs to go NOW.** He has no idea what he is doing, and has been making policies based on what sounds "macho" rather than what is based on proven military strategy. And just this week, Hegseth ordered all the top military leaders to rush to meet him so he could lecture them about being fat. It cost a fortune to get them all there, it was incredibly dangerous (our entire military leadership in the same place, announced publicly), and he had absolutely no logical reason for doing it. **Having Hegseth in charge of our defense puts America in danger. He needs to go NOW.** [**> > Add your name, and demand he resign or be removed NOW.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8cbe76e5-ffec-4730-a93a-5f22168c6960/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Aria, United We Dream
subject: Students belong in the classroom!
body:
Join us in demanding what all students deserve: Safety and the freedom to learn. | | | Peter, students belong in the classroom. Full stop. **** But as students, families, and educators head back to school, we’ve seen an alarming number of immigrant youth detained. **Students and youth across the country, some too young to be in**** _kindergarten_****, are being abducted and disappeared.** Young people aren’t just being torn from their families, Peter. They’re being taken away from crucial resources, including their education and even _life-saving healthcare._ For some students, their friends and classmates — people they’ve known their whole lives — will not be in attendance this year. These cruel abductions must end. To create a future where we can all thrive, we have to meet this moment with courage and demand what all students deserve: _Safety and the freedom to learn._[**United We Dream is educating our communities and keeping the pressure on our elected officials, but we need you with us. Please make a donation to help us continue demanding justice for undocumented students and their families:**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqswjENXoYacFGtlMLXh6NAekMDT887VITlFf_D1bXsJIswJ51rUGNkfFLqmAti84mBOmo22ZuDwAxaGcL5sXKN8J-WSIMwc4k9SSYQ0TuJNrcn9L2-X0MYX0TBuN3sDz2xRZ2OjikBIgofvfa3CsmraFWctDX4M5Q0XAPhOIiKtfOIEn06GV1iM54LHfDPQfV0nboub7X4vFNpYR4Pe_GPLaf01XyMMt3y18QcBg_7HNvatHeDfsdkHCJJbzV7p-0wtSN0WD8sjO6OcmefDzz5-Ys6BUOwXONdrBLwM6Jh_Ve0ysou22dcZj9cM7PFwI4NcUv-sUWWhGyBfIjwpC2vNZ2P3eetk5wTuNrepoTo0DuylDinTQ2_XWwGck6eOOAH5hGerLVFTKaJANmfAQu273Sgp3_5RfCypntzl-s0yEykEYqR_FCSiedcQYwWUFfFUTtyHBZu8gF2Al_1qtF4I/4kd/G5e1q3zQSKeuOO0aAYlx9Q/h0/h001.kBv5dL1p0PF9LtjxqidvzsxcIt_MR_iJ_qY2gINUXmk) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [express donate: $5](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqswjENXoYacFGtlMLXh6NAekMDT887VITlFf_D1bXsJIswJ51rUGNkfFLqmAti84mBOmo22ZuDwAxaGcL5sXKN8-TuwAJ-GV3YgNFo8mO4Qml4jbt_ky19fzAr6hy8EmvZ-BPbWV-LYaGne0ScgnGcq-aZ0zoOqFFKtP_TRkaaglRxHZSQbz7Xjz7BaEqW_vl8hOCfekKOByhFApxxIFtafFML6mEMa4F-jHExXsAE8FeorQlSB1GOl4XFKWhArkV5IbdHfXIbeTJSER8ZPdmhSPU_UlDc3dqWi1x-1MM65WFbpQdRBgI32IDPLLQG7EKKd3kqvIGqZMxpECYMAtxCEHUzeHGQwTAQnB9HwlFd1iuu39wsY1HA_eUigAX2owX-p3p4YZBvQwNwKJNYtj5W7b8JG3GKDHGKe1qsN2UUuFHHAMedBuuvxpgQuFv3hdn0Nt1Z4Etz2fzNgb6NnV8uDpkwynZYfMlFQdni2NGizfQ/4kd/G5e1q3zQSKeuOO0aAYlx9Q/h1/h001.tUrA7hrXe7djtGMdZ3kwRcZaLgUZvi3kVxGdthcqbNw)

clean_body: Join us in demanding what all students deserve: Safety and the freedom to learn. | | | Peter, students belong in the classroom. Full stop. ** But as students, families, and educators head back to school, we’ve seen an alarming number of immigrant youth detained. Students and youth across the country, some too young to be in** kindergarten, are being abducted and disappeared. Young people aren’t just being torn from their families, Peter. They’re being taken away from crucial resources, including their education and even life-saving healthcare. For some students, their friends and classmates — people they’ve known their whole lives — will not be in attendance this year. These cruel abductions must end. To create a future where we can all thrive, we have to meet this moment with courage and demand what all students deserve: Safety and the freedom to learn. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | The respective merchants of record for transactions to United We Dream Network are ActBlue Charities Inc. They receive and process those donations and subsequently give them to the organization or cause indicated on the contribution form within 30 days. This donation is tax-deductible. Thank you, Aria, United We Dream Follow us on: | | | | |

name: Mark Guethle, IDCCA
subject: The shutdown

body:
_[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116396755/573296108/-939470041?amount=25&refcode=IDCCA_EMAIL_011025_FR_Shutdown&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU1NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWIzZjQ0ZjEtMDE5Zi1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UhqxYHqexsQKuwZeW_lmcDHAOe37BQ8kFXw7qH3WHAM=)_
Team,

This morning, we woke up to a government shutdown for the first time in seven years – because Republicans are so hell-bent on stripping healthcare from the elderly, working-class folks, the poor, and people with pre-existing conditions that they’re willing to bring the entire country to a grinding halt to make sure they can do it.

We’ve been living in a slow-motion shutdown since January, in my opinion. Trump has fired scores of career public servants without cause, hijacked independent departments to go after his enemies, installed idiotic, unqualified sycophants as heads of departments, and slashed federal budgets to punish the poor and pay the rich. That is a government not at work.

This is just another proofpoint as to why we can’t trust Republicans with any sort of responsibility. They’ll abandon their responsibilities at the drop of a hat, and they’ll leave Americans in the lurch to make Trump happy.

I’m sick of it, and it’s why we literally cannot afford to have more years of Republican majority. [**If you’re with us, we need you to support our mission. We’re aiming to oust Republicans up and down the ballot with Democrats who want to get things done for the sake of our country, and the sake of our people.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116396756/573296109/61847097?amount=25&refcode=IDCCA_EMAIL_011025_FR_Shutdown&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU1NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWIzZjQ0ZjEtMDE5Zi1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UhqxYHqexsQKuwZeW_lmcDHAOe37BQ8kFXw7qH3WHAM=)
[**DONATE**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116396757/573296110/-939470041?amount=25&refcode=IDCCA_EMAIL_011025_FR_Shutdown&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU1NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWIzZjQ0ZjEtMDE5Zi1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UhqxYHqexsQKuwZeW_lmcDHAOe37BQ8kFXw7qH3WHAM=)MAGA Republicans control the House, the Senate, and the White House. They alone are responsible for this shut down and we’re going to make sure that voters know about it. They are going to own every second of the mess that they caused.

Democrats will stand firm and continue to fight for every American. We will make sure they hear from us: MAGA Republicans shut down the government to appease Trump and take away your healthcare. You deserve better.

[**If you’re sick of this and you’re with us on our mission to oust these Republicans, then we need you. Rush a contribution right now to support our mission and strategy →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116396758/573296111/-939470041?amount=25&refcode=IDCCA_EMAIL_011025_FR_Shutdown&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU1NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWIzZjQ0ZjEtMDE5Zi1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UhqxYHqexsQKuwZeW_lmcDHAOe37BQ8kFXw7qH3WHAM=)

Thank you,
Mark

clean_body: This isn’t tough talk. This is reckless, dangerous poison. | Fellow American, I’m angry. You probably saw it, and if you haven’t, Jasmine Crockett sat on CNN and called President Trump a “wannabe Hitler.” Then she smirked, defended it, and called it “accurate.” This isn’t tough talk. This is reckless, dangerous poison. Think about what Crockett and her friends are saying: they voted against condemning the assassination of Charlie Kirk. Against condemning murder. While families prayed, they scoffed. While conservatives came together, they shrugged. Crockett thinks words like “Hitler” are just political seasoning. But she knows exactly what she’s doing. Stirring up the most unstable, the most violent, the most radical voices on her side — and aiming them at us. Texas doesn’t raise cowards, and I refuse to sit here while Crockett plays arsonist on live television. I will continue to fight back against her dangerous attacks. My district is a top target for these violent radical leftists, and they will do everything they can to flip this seat and take back control of Congress. So I’m asking you, fellow American: please stand shoulder-to-shoulder with me. Let them rant on cable news. Let them tweet themselves hoarse. We’ll meet their madness with action, and we’ll win. Beth Van Duyne | | PAID FOR BY BETH VAN DUYNE FOR CONGRESS

name: David Hogg
subject: I can’t thank you enough, Peter

body:
The work we’re doing together is transformational.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20251001-1&t=1&akid=2704%2E587540%2E3BugIB)
Peter, I wrote to you yesterday about our end-of-quarter fundraising goal. This team came together right away and helped us finish off where we needed to be.
**The work we’re doing together is transformational.** We’re not only empowering the next generation of progressive leaders to run for office, we’re helping them build strong campaigns, recruit volunteers, and actually win these critical races.
I am truly grateful for you and everyone on this team. You are making our vision a reality. We are replacing the old guard — both MAGA Republicans and ineffective Democrats — with bold progressives who are ready to fight for our future.
But first, we’ve got some big fights on our hands: electing a brand new slate of candidates in the 2026 elections. I know that Leaders We Deserve is ready to fight and win because of the continual strength of support from this grassroots team.
**I can’t thank you enough.**
David Hogg

clean_body: The work we’re doing together is transformational. Peter, I wrote to you yesterday about our end-of-quarter fundraising goal. This team came together right away and helped us finish off where we needed to be. The work we’re doing together is transformational. We’re not only empowering the next generation of progressive leaders to run for office, we’re helping them build strong campaigns, recruit volunteers, and actually win these critical races. I am truly grateful for you and everyone on this team. You are making our vision a reality. We are replacing the old guard — both MAGA Republicans and ineffective Democrats — with bold progressives who are ready to fight for our future. But first, we’ve got some big fights on our hands: electing a brand new slate of candidates in the 2026 elections. I know that Leaders We Deserve is ready to fight and win because of the continual strength of support from this grassroots team. I can’t thank you enough. David Hogg

name: Jena Griswold
subject: We’re sending the message
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2510-q4-jg?refcode=251001-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2510-q4-jg?refcode=251001-email]
Peter,
I want to start this new month by saying thank you.
Because of your support, we closed out the third quarter of this campaign strong. Every donation, every engagement on social media, and every single share of our message made a difference. Together, in the midst of the chaos of the Trump administration, we are standing up for our rights, freedoms, and future.
Running for Attorney General isn’t always easy — especially when we’re up against MAGA extremism and a president trying to power grab. But thanks to you, we’re sending the message that Coloradans won’t back down from this fight for the future of our nation and for our freedoms. We’re building the momentum we need to win every day, and we’re doing it together.
We have a journey ahead, but today, I just want to recognize how grateful I am for this team.
Thank you for being with me in this fight.
With gratitude,
Jena Griswold

* **TOP NEWS**

**" 2 killed, 5 wounded when man opened fire in casino parking lot in Texas, authorities say," **via AP**** \-- "Authorities on Monday were trying to determine why a man opened fire in the parking lot of a casino in a Texas border city over the weekend, killing two people and wounding at least five others.

**Keryan Rashad Jones** , 34, was arrested during a traffic stop several hours after the shooting late Saturday night at the Kickapoo Lucky Eagle Casino in Eagle Pass, authorities said.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/b6d937b6-280a-4c07-ac83-8d69f5925b2c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Jones was arrested Sunday morning following a pursuit by authorities near Stockdale, which is about 180 miles east of Eagle Pass, according to the Wilson County Sheriff's Office.

Jones faces two counts of capital murder and five counts of assault with a deadly weapon, Maverick County Sheriff **Tom Schmerber** said.
It was unclear where Jones was being held and whether he had an attorney to speak on his behalf.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/b6d937b6-280a-4c07-ac83-8d69f5925b2c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Texas Department of Public Safety Lt. **Christopher Olivarez** said that what led to the shooting is still under investigation.

The Kickapoo Traditional Tribe of Texas Police Department is leading the investigation and said the casino will remain closed while the investigation continues." Keryan Rashad Jones , 34, was arrested during a traffic stop several hours after the shooting late Saturday night at the Kickapoo Lucky Eagle Casino in Eagle Pass, authorities said. Jones was arrested Sunday morning following a pursuit by authorities near Stockdale, which is about 180 miles east of Eagle Pass, according to the Wilson County Sheriff's Office. Jones faces two counts of capital murder and five counts of assault with a deadly weapon, Maverick County Sheriff Tom Schmerber said. It was unclear where Jones was being held and whether he had an attorney to speak on his behalf. Texas Department of Public Safety Lt. **Keryan Rashad Jones** , 34, was arrested during a traffic stop several hours after the shooting late Saturday night at the Kickapoo Lucky Eagle Casino in Eagle Pass, authorities said.

TOP NEWS " 2 killed, 5 wounded when man opened fire in casino parking lot in Texas, authorities say," via AP \-- "Authorities on Monday were trying to determine why a man opened fire in the parking lot of a casino in a Texas border city over the weekend, killing two people and wounding at least five others. Keryan Rashad Jones , 34, was arrested during a traffic stop several hours after the shooting late Saturday night at the Kickapoo Lucky Eagle Casino in Eagle Pass, authorities said. Jones was arrested Sunday morning following a pursuit by authorities near Stockdale, which is about 180 miles east of Eagle Pass, according to the Wilson County Sheriff's Office. Jones faces two counts of capital murder and five counts of assault with a deadly weapon, Maverick County Sheriff Tom Schmerber said. It was unclear where Jones was being held and whether he had an attorney to speak on his behalf. Texas Department of Public Safety Lt. Christopher Olivarez said that what led to the shooting is still under investigation. The Kickapoo Traditional Tribe of Texas Police Department is leading the investigation and said the casino will remain closed while the investigation continues." * **TOP NEWS**

**“2 killed, 5 wounded when man opened fire in casino parking lot in Texas, authorities say,”** via AP**** \-- “Authorities on Monday were trying to determine why a man opened fire in the parking lot of a casino in a Texas border city over the weekend, killing two people and wounding at least five others.

**Keryan Rashad Jones** , 34, was arrested during a traffic stop several hours after the shooting late Saturday night at the Kickapoo Lucky Eagle Casino in Eagle Pass, authorities said.

Here’s what the Democrat Party chose over you: ❌ Open borders ❌ ‘Transgender’ for everybody ❌ Men competing in women’s sports ❌ Crime and lawlessness in our streets ❌ Cashless bail policies over the safety and security of our nation It's never America First. Many are calling this the “Schumer Shutdown,” but I prefer to call it the DEMOCRAT SHUTDOWN because they all believe in America LAST! Let me tell you what the Democrats voted against by trying to STOP MAGA: 1: Supporting our Military and Troops 2: Pay Law Enforcement Officers 3: Critical Care for Veterans 4: Firefighter Pay for Disaster Response I’m sick to my stomach every second this continues, so please read my lips: THEY WILL NEVER STOP MAGA!!! May God Bless you, Donald J. Trump President of the United States | | | | | | | | | | Paid for by Never Surrender, Inc. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate authorized’s committee. . | | P.O. name: AOC
subject: Government shutdown.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
I think there are two things that are happening at once, and this is something that’s very important for people to understand:
One: there absolutely is an unprecedented abuse of power, destruction of norms, erosion of our government and our democracy in order to prop up an authoritarian style of governance.
That is happening.
However: **they are weaker than they look**. It is important that we remember that.
Because what they rely on is the _impression_ of power, the _perception_ of inevitability, in us giving up in advance, to say, “Oh, what’s going to happen if I stand up?” **Nothing’s gonna happen**.
They rely on that perception of inevitability and power so that people comply in advance, acquiesce in advance, and give up in advance.
And at the end of the day, Donald Trump is at record levels of unpopularity in his tenure. The Republican House is at record levels of unpopularity.
**They are underwater across the board, and they know it**. And that is causing them to double down in public. But it is backfiring.
That is why — whether it’s a shutdown, whether it’s all of this — they want us to blink first. And we have too much to save.
**Protecting people is too important a task for us to give up before anything even starts**. So they may want to send people in, but these National Guardsmen do not want to be turned against their fellow Americans.
We’re seeing this here in Washington, D.C. It is an insult.
Donald Trump is insulting the service members of this country by putting them on these silly tasks that they themselves do not want to be enforcing.
And so we have to understand that standing up matters, that our voice matters, to not give into the cynicism because _that is what they rely on_ in order to perpetuate this idea that they have total immunity from consequence.
They will experience the consequences of this — but **_we_ have to be the consequence**.
Which is why Congress has to stand tall right now alongside everyday Americans.
In solidarity,
Alexandria
[Help us continue the fight with a grassroots contribution today.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20251001-2.Ro5KZx&refcode=em20251001-9868-P_FND_EGR_CTR&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9868%2E2526796%2EFtsBOP)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20251001-2.Ro5KZx&refcode=em20251001-9868-P_FND_EGR_CTR&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=9868%2E2526796%2EFtsBOP)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20251001-2?refcode=em20251001-9868-P_FND_EGR_CTR&t=21&refcode2=9868_2526796_FtsBOP&akid=9868%2E2526796%2EFtsBOP)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20251001-9868-P_FND_EGR_CTR&t=22&akid=9868%2E2526796%2EFtsBOP)**

---|---|---|---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Trump and the GOP just shut down the government
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
I’ve been in Washington, D.C. alongside my Democratic colleagues, ready to negotiate.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20251001-5488-footer&t=1&akid=5488%2E420207%2E7EvlK8)
Peter,
Donald Trump and the GOP control the White House, the House, and the Senate. But instead of delivering health care for the American people, they have chosen to **shut down the federal government** as of 12:01am this morning.
I’ve been in Washington, D.C. alongside my Democratic colleagues, ready to negotiate a bill that cancels Trump’s horrific budget cuts, saves health care, and keeps the government open.
**But Speaker Johnson sent Republican Members of Congress home to do fancy fundraisers with billionaires, refusing to negotiate.**
Their shortsighted decisions will raise health care costs and devastate communities as working families across the country suffer.
It’s further confirmation that Trump and Republicans in Congress are more concerned with their billionaire donors than they are with poor and working people.
I’ve spent my life organizing to protect working families, and I’ve seen firsthand what happens when the government fails to show up for the people who need it most. That’s why it’s critical that we continue organizing and building a grassroots movement strong enough to win.
[**But Peter, I need you with me. If you’re in a position to give right now, will you chip in $3 or any amount you can to help me keep fighting back and growing our progressive movement?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20251001?refcode=em20251001-5488&amount=3&refcode2=5488_420207_7EvlK8&akid=5488%2E420207%2E7EvlK8)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20251001?amount=3&refcode=em20251001-5488&refcode2=5488_420207_7EvlK8&akid=5488%2E420207%2E7EvlK8)**
In solidarity,
Pramila Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20251001-5488-footer&t=2&refcode2=5488_420207_7EvlK8&akid=5488%2E420207%2E7EvlK8)**

# **
Will Americans Be Replaced? Nation 's Birth Rate Reaches Lowest Point in History.**

---
# Fellow American,

Federal health data just confirmed it: America's birth rate has plunged to its _lowest point in history_ , just 1.599 children per woman. **That 's ****_well below_****the replacement rate.**
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/FMtoYq9iPehXOO1MiKcHVx8keUF7aFC6YDHSKcKo2vD4alCzoDZSwkbSp1QOn6kJDtn9ttqNqpUaAC100olbDOL0rMkn4igxmQjpQXYj4CJqAvByip_xIalHNYJK0cNnhaiymDSnEoyLEosgArWHhXglT-XdDDUgoe1-Yjjgv-rkzn7QhdFWXLFPokwXkfHEFQ0nnodzAEwQX6YkzRgmMRviqeUUSI8VEd2CpLTEXIBxiwXGz6VFJmrq1SQL3aZlozmk2yCq6EQhbPPEREvILa95TqdRmVVM77j7NG0wij4BTfXUsPX5ncLLGyT2DD0ut1u85qx7JXdCoTLmQeuGHY7RptyHZMwzBmuKWIJ2nF0U8P1NBfYuww6izrAw7YgA-kE0ing2P0IYSQWfWDxYBwgWHExW0Mm3AYFon7ogeViGjC9ZDsfpJknnzHblbdav15wChoQRxk8MeP0xhsHbH0XZduU_bydENGi5Pi2__oT720V3_6EI96uB_MQru9EUVoQQ-a2aeeDXn9UlmeA3b3PvXkwOK5McjxViNsrZdWEJCtI3RtIrJwazlaC4fV4C51asw1tx0iCQsOyloX2ZILLxjaSnKxTCZ2V9fkXxoqmhczTfL52LAzm-CMBPuXYQLX-kVxW8YlZ82MIAMeVJgQmIxpa-QGcbsAQ_2d6PMCwGfik/prX6gqJi6cEyCRxkLaqKaPVz5pw0X9au/13)
---
# What does that mean? If nothing changes, the only way to sustain our economy, workforce, and national future is to import it. Or we risk watching it collapse.

**At the same time, abortion is rising again.

**The very future of our nation is vanishing. We're losing a generation not only to cultural shifts and economic fears, but to the direct, intentional ending of life in the womb through the abortion pill.

**But there is hope.**

PreBorn! is fighting back with life-saving, truth-filled, compassionate care. We equip our PreBorn! Network Clinics across the country to offer _free ultrasounds_ to women and families in crisis, often giving them their first real glimpse into the new life God has given them.

**[Here's why that matters: When mothers see their babies through an ultrasound, they choose life 80% of the time.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/fWq8nsMjowSoe0-fVP6WwzWsFobDJHdqqoQ-BWc-qwPXrE9NhusgvPV6jQk_AWICVGvc6ROaHcoIBXBlrXDVG6XDg-TtNVbXtU3h8dhR2bagAr-zx7BA5jRKMsJdKbfftYUSb_Yqc3hKfr9p67SBuipM9GvV1fgfBbcpF1fJn5mjJaO6aWnPw1wDOhTxakjF9phcrPljXzCPgZeGuRUyLqaGNQcG8iJso5O3VxFYuE7XffE6xdT4uxszXi3cMftFTSaZQXGm99JhtRwpbRSbSfY3TuqSUlKpyjwBA6-5t69B9_taMAkTc1X5d8ARaEzFprvO5oIKb7HhfJ_rAzwpUKngc2yvP9Q38CcxE0GU0JDJWWr66GZRREaYQwy0hLNxgwx9NotG_GvNl1GKnZmjwMDiWSi1Gv8Zsl-vfj8Ma1jqm3MELV0wWMhgWM-ZbTEqX7AV7Mx_yqMLRcJpmwjuP-8SesTj5XEliHqurT5JQyOx4-uQyxX_RsoMuICFVcUnDukZ0r2eXUpcqX3VnetPhQBKadO1CJ4RwajzmyqkBm2ZdO8kmMFYgH2SZxWLxLOdIUpf7pSvsWjF56ZG7R1H7390Tli8ox6TYdn9YoaXb7KHvTuPJ1PtrRGv4WTj9Od_qSQtXF2Np2GxQlqTv4UI8osJES54EsMSXOlxkEQ6BT1UdPY/zJkqIg9K1ZRmv4mpMKoeGZqIZClEjIaz/13)

** This isn't a policy battle. It's a personal one. It's one mom, one baby, one heartbeat at a time.

Your gift of $28 can fund one ultrasound and save one life.

Will you stand with PreBorn! on the frontline by giving a gift at the link below?

[preborn.com/DB0825GP](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/YD4lXymmWoWoaMmWMd3YmNicmQD7GfmA5AbbG6sxPGFRHEbKCysoJcTi40SfcUbtTPklvMHVsN-DSLeL0zNkosTgpQPNs3XNZ4viR9UgOnkEFfWr4fh4dyd8dI2ou8CC26OmCefThYPNGGC6Wt1PG4r0EOm8NzcLHdKZUGR0NWMk-rcF9cqdek6Gfn91i7ThaNJl2XbwTVRY3Rmvvrxq2uzGd8qWo7rDik24uXAn0GNwvgdrR7thZntmtJT-wayqyBfkthOiVRTT2HJu6z7SWFMVy3eo0nRnqf5HJpUD3t3jNfZOBRsqe5QtlaHhIFRwWotb7-zcYoXHeacrU60ttpwqUSoVIn46Ic4w6eEcyR6N-Oi0RIpHBjqo3ltX_QR-AOT4l-wAciYgTxrM4CIJoU-bjyLUEcK0zYg3bphyb-MkNcAn6OQc6N9lzHYk7_nC2ztu6Ih8ARdfa6jt4voRMuNqhRh9ogma8qVcTE-_-foiW4hfOr4ZVylQ9rjZkQP9Axl_ti_2x0Mf14ZY2iS9V3_dQOJuu8QPPjjto9e-jjlWGSOlG0xSuGyq_fbCN66vVphw8iS5tfMgQ_U-j2VX1NSlSGYKnLnine0x0o68vWadhOGdGIPJ9OIM6T2knVUXvKxw-SV71EhvkjGHNmhSv9dN2Rut84-lOUIjGE8ObZwE2gw/QNphmOCG51WdqbEcNhqFdAQ3fDntaK8V/13)

body:
We're working harder than ever, and we need you on the team. |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116400332/573303451/-1403821653?refcode=WUEFEJ01_20251001_OctToplines_ALL_v1s3&sourceid=1057101&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjM3MGMxNC0wYTlmLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k_NgLWo5BayhjiN_2Rvnw82zNA9PYoMHa7k2PSGWKzo=) Peter,

October is here, and **we're in a full sprint toward Election Day 2025.**

Republicans will spend this month trying to spook us with fear tactics and misinformation. But we're not falling for it — and neither should you.

**We're focused on what actually wins elections:** connecting with voters, supporting our Democratic pro-choice women, and building power from the ground up.

[**So no, we're not coasting into November. We're working harder than ever, and we need you with us. Peter, will you help power our work at EMILYs List this month?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116400333/573303458/-1403821653?refcode=WUEFEJ01_20251001_OctToplines_ALL_v1s3&sourceid=1057101&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjM3MGMxNC0wYTlmLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k_NgLWo5BayhjiN_2Rvnw82zNA9PYoMHa7k2PSGWKzo=) | [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116400334/573303463/-1403821653?refcode=WUEFEJ01_20251001_OctToplines_ALL_v1s3&sourceid=1057101&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjM3MGMxNC0wYTlmLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k_NgLWo5BayhjiN_2Rvnw82zNA9PYoMHa7k2PSGWKzo=)

Here's what's happening right now:

**📢 Fresh endorsements are rolling in** — including today's exciting announcement: **Kaela Berg (MN-02).** She joins a powerful slate of Democratic pro-choice women we've backed at every level this cycle, and each one is ready to deliver results. Keep an eye out for more endorsements on the way soon!

**🗳️ Voters are voting** in New Orleans, Virginia, and New Jersey, where EMILYs List women running for mayor, state legislature, and governor are on the ballot NOW! These races will set the tone for Democrats heading into 2026, and we're making sure our candidates have the resources they need to win.

🤝**Our candidates are teaming up** in powerful ways — collaborating on events, sharing resources, and lifting each other up. This is what political power looks like when women work together.

October isn't an in-between month. **It's go time.** While Republicans try to scare voters, we're doing the real work — and we're doing it all the way to Election Day and beyond.

clean_body: We're working harder than ever, and we need you on the team. | = Peter, October is here, and we're in a full sprint toward Election Day 2025. Republicans will spend this month trying to spook us with fear tactics and misinformation. But we're not falling for it — and neither should you. We're focused on what actually wins elections: connecting with voters, supporting our Democratic pro-choice women, and building power from the ground up. = | = Here's what's happening right now: 📢 Fresh endorsements are rolling in — including today's exciting announcement: Kaela Berg (MN-02). She joins a powerful slate of Democratic pro-choice women we've backed at every level this cycle, and each one is ready to deliver results. Keep an eye out for more endorsements on the way soon! 🗳️ Voters are voting in New Orleans, Virginia, and New Jersey, where EMILYs List women running for mayor, state legislature, and governor are on the ballot NOW! These races will set the tone for Democrats heading into 2026, and we're making sure our candidates have the resources they need to win. 🤝Our candidates are teaming up in powerful ways — collaborating on events, sharing resources, and lifting each other up. This is what political power looks like when women work together. October isn't an in-between month. It's go time. While Republicans try to scare voters, we're doing the real work — and we're doing it all the way to Election Day and beyond. **= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | =** Thanks for being in this fight with us. – the EMILYs List Campaigns team = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. name: GIFFORDS.org
subject: [You're Invited] GIFFORDS New York Celebration of Courage
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Dear friend,
You are invited to join Gabby Giffords for a special evening in New York City to learn about our progress and path forward saving lives from gun violence.
* * *
**GIFFORDS Second Annual Celebration of Courage**
featuring Gabby Giffords. Special guests to be announced.
**Thursday, October 9th**
New York, NY
**[RSVP HERE](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=1009nyc.lNBAOL&refcode=em251001-2-ev&t=1&akid=10930%2E3935704%2EAqprph)**
* * *
This exciting event will bring together national leaders from the gun safety movement to celebrate the progress we have made in the fight to end gun violence, while also looking at the challenges ahead. We hope to see you there!
— Team GIFFORDS
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=1009nyc.lNBAOL&refcode=em251001-2-ev&t=2&akid=10930%2E3935704%2EAqprph)
---

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=10930%2E3935704%2EAqprph) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.
