name: Lindsey Graham
subject: Why I’m fighting for our future.
body:
Fellow American, I grew up in a single room behind my parents’ family-owned liquor store, restaurant, and pool hall in Central, South Carolina. I was the first in my family to attend college, and while I was in school, I lost my mother and father within two years of one another. |
---
Fellow American,

I grew up in a single room behind my parents' family-owned liquor store, restaurant, and pool hall in Central, South Carolina.

I was the first in my family to attend college, and while I was in school, I lost my mother and father within two years of one another. I quickly took on the responsibility of helping raise my 13-year-old sister, Darline, and running the family businesses.

[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=0eb405348f7a4cb68c10b544dfb723b2&_e=XXies1tI3Xc2NaT7z07a3S49rx_seAsi4LApozAr1d3LmjT4IHb4hmZx_ctZA3ocGz3ZNPQHtFeGBGnSdJLpB9DbOOlpoTx7S8zcYqIBLAd5ky_eiLpF6rBHshFsS_3eMfq6RxJXJCSOP9nN3hFISaHflsyei2D7v3qQfU6r1grJGccAJo2NCrwZhn64_N0q-Hq--r_E43QZEOyZK6s9vgGtinuOnzKAV1uc8wHzQQSFPpU18YPdwuxBOH0Hit2kDuQ-b4IxNzg1IoKizvkCJtwdzZgO0JnRdYhhRVDsFF5bjWl76PvWwgHmy6lwFu3X_wJxAKCw59dk5SV4QP7_Aks6LH9pPSmlF5Z1HpIjm3HvDvnY0iAEFFN9uyuRUeIKMTG5ZzdXnl8mmF48My2eK4FtpjRJg1vZfThMSkZGj_y2GrzEPSCdhy0QR9aNpgMYRJX4jRzzOlMQkJ9buNFg67nd4hPU-QWWDW9fmSzidMpLVDHvBSjK3HhxH3CxcxgUgavVrbNYThv24IAhYOef_RRfBObGPD5wxfU1UKr4ZxOTfv7UxF5uurMSW_luRRP3lgpA4RBAIfiq7eVchYXm8uqq7tGqRRmX89p5iN4gnn7-bFefX3H2CK5uayWNBWtkZEXGiV1EspLF5MNFCIjbrU2LiFI6JRl9RTHnCM_kvErbus_9wzbN6CbVka9a4FHK)
**I had to grow up fast, Fellow American,_and I learned many life lessons at an early age._**

After attending law school, I joined the U.S. Air Force as a member of the Judge Advocate General Corps, where I served as a military prosecutor and defense attorney.

Even after being elected to the United States Senate, I continued to wear the uniform and served in the U.S. Air Force Reserves, where I performed several short deployments in the war zones of Afghanistan and Iraq.

[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=0eb405348f7a4cb68c10b544dfb723b2&_e=XXies1tI3Xc2NaT7z07a3S49rx_seAsi4LApozAr1d3LmjT4IHb4hmZx_ctZA3ocGz3ZNPQHtFeGBGnSdJLpB9DbOOlpoTx7S8zcYqIBLAd5ky_eiLpF6rBHshFsS_3eMfq6RxJXJCSOP9nN3hFISaHflsyei2D7v3qQfU6r1grJGccAJo2NCrwZhn64_N0q-Hq--r_E43QZEOyZK6s9vgGtinuOnzKAV1uc8wHzQQTO5Mc6brIbCJ-MCnE0r-adHb61lN5yKtezgLwdcv627Xjd5wvt9O0vPsvBn3HVXLHpE5a8xGUHO4kXsFgeIzo22P4UsucVpKhpjKxZEpYogV_NPZpIqYY7L_NsmkpmL_yQUqja99dbI5stilw3SmW-Ejna7xbdfpy8PGs8mjlKhFg42gLWptrAoPBdG9p84vv-QAcoa6-PoCf62ZsoFBjdx4UbjPlQKdPUpoIOR_JE6Ue90MJi2MlporN7HIRpYVtdReLUo4z1QIjHOLUrrKYGprzKuWLuPEASpQ6Gs_y6TMJ6mShAEfyuCjwhOLnYA3n--ZF4EEKP5un-dEaTWyzd3nCvNZ8egmljOrkBNrfJsKbX4NVNtPYYIABv6cwKtaYPUIKwMwV_3rE-gsI3GzJe99_EfQkkYmws_EpefjWWB7qP7HM2ORR779_MJ9fH7q1cP4sxr8a8ZoPTw_CtHZ5P)
Fellow American, my story is similar to that of most Americans. I didn't grow up with a silver spoon in my mouth with everything handed to me. I had to grow up fast and work hard. I learned a lot of valuable lessons at a young age and took on a whole lot of responsibility.

But one thing stuck with me over the years -- the perspectives I gained from listening to the hard-working South Carolinians who were regulars at my family's pool hall or my brave colleagues in the military. Their perspectives, whether I agreed with them or not, helped build my foundation for understanding what Americans need.

**It's no secret that our nation is sharply divided right now, but there are some things we should all agree on.**

**We need a country that is a safe place to live and raise a family, and we need a country where the American Dream is alive and possible for everyone, no matter where they start from.**

Fellow American, I'm fighting every day to make those two things a reality. Sadly, there are people across the aisle in Washington who simply can't agree with us on these issues. They are okay with open borders and the flow of violent crime into our neighborhoods and onto our streets. They are okay with punishing hard-working Americans with higher taxes, deepening the burden on them and their families.

**[That's why I'm reaching out with a simple request: if you have a few dollars to spare, would you consider making a contribution to support my campaign by clicking this link or the button below?](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=0eb405348f7a4cb68c10b544dfb723b2&_e=XXies1tI3Xc2NaT7z07a3S49rx_seAsi4LApozAr1d3LmjT4IHb4hmZx_ctZA3ocGz3ZNPQHtFeGBGnSdJLpB9DbOOlpoTx7S8zcYqIBLAd5ky_eiLpF6rBHshFsS_3eMfq6RxJXJCSOP9nN3hFISaHflsyei2D7v3qQfU6r1grJGccAJo2NCrwZhn64_N0q-Hq--r_E43QZEOyZK6s9vgGtinuOnzKAV1uc8wHzQQQMxwDVMVe60cQOvyXiqkKzCzxuWO5K5ez-onzCpclK3eXInHdM2Zjbvt_lJX-a1K8kQN-B7LxbqoDEyTLMpK49lBPOz6raS4klBogVr-ef-M9KO8079I4V4pzgSI9BZpqVTJEGzhIb2N2oDOnAudoFfTeFM5NRLNQ6YBkBQ2IgePIcaNi1Fwlunza1c2aGzJU9_hfYHtnyRkE44pUQbx9hrq8WLLXoa81GMVb269gxPl69Q6Qx8D6fhBaG3TNqKfZt9S-47PEwbeIQAs_wNcg9ISzYIPipTLQT5zE0E-Fc-_1aQPgS5xv0kHWc5ymRVDpTrf6Xi1uRiQglPMWxRBXIDJsqf24WXCMoLQsEKrQpXjLUr4XHoCm7_JnkPX_caQXc-R_aIIt2k7p5Mlo-dBbJ5_VfeQPpV2hTSpR3d8Mvdv_7SIscQxflQMKp_Rphx-Sl8i-TEdw_oFbVGj75H568)**

| [**CONTRIBUTE HERE**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=0eb405348f7a4cb68c10b544dfb723b2&_e=XXies1tI3Xc2NaT7z07a3S49rx_seAsi4LApozAr1d3LmjT4IHb4hmZx_ctZA3ocGz3ZNPQHtFeGBGnSdJLpB9DbOOlpoTx7S8zcYqIBLAd5ky_eiLpF6rBHshFsS_3eMfq6RxJXJCSOP9nN3hFISaHflsyei2D7v3qQfU6r1grJGccAJo2NCrwZhn64_N0q-Hq--r_E43QZEOyZK6s9vgGtinuOnzKAV1uc8wHzQQRT0VLj97S0RUGM4sc70Yli1ceZLvtgsbtoJWnM-6ufe_DMY-QqggjQC6qeuKGBwLl-Zwhd_Q0ioV0mHUJgyWxSn0iZhpe4CTgOFLy-iAqCqsko6Nm6Ju56FULAdl7qVJnBgJV_K6K27pYw0fRbLx-N0DuvMtdsPDycLKaTWIEOaymPvwLS7kkiiYmH3SunJ5YKPo74DOqnqlfcnBuEykTt1635NQ08IpA4Z_S2ZtCJnVmF1N1NwlMVtwhTqsCUcqRCthI0CFgg382NaWRaOaZGriLts52PDhg-ZDJUDEc83UfzJPsIQ5fzR7afV8cLm3C_rJaVCT8puu4sPI58GCpMfRs-ZkwzWDu8JK1F4iqCgdGo-75otcbVjGkP6pFQ_5HnJKP2_hkwBngcFahbyC20_KFFQtDi-ppqdywBlOF0vsfnfvlU4L6aGdX0BZeJDdmGCxz3qIW08o0Wr-5woTcm)
---

If you're unable to contribute financially, I understand. I'd greatly appreciate it if you could forward this email along to a friend or family member to help amplify my message.

Together, I know we can build the country that protects our communities, rewards hard work, and ensures every hard-working American has a shot at their dreams, just like I was so fortunate to have.

Thank you for taking a moment out of your busy day to read this message.

Sincerely,
Lindsey Graham

[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=0eb405348f7a4cb68c10b544dfb723b2&_e=XXies1tI3Xc2NaT7z07a3aJKVOsO1OnfCSand10ftKbB4Ox2goQd7aBfxnqVjV_Buu-ftmlp1mbQjipLpmwkSH4ZA5UqFRgXTmAb9XGrX1QZvozTEyq1incNxMeBLlOP8yc0hJmOMRMnT0Dz-5N29mTkHVCzll1BTGXuLG7t_zwnWW5cPKjzNSASj19SH2MW9CgCoP_5hZRkNVylA9Vkli2Iv7rajjb5LTcwRT9CdGSQrLxiPZdhbjs9UO_dOO5_umQIQ2c7qz18AV3KTreNFfUkpbkUQyC3Xo3DbvPtWy_0ueN874NvNtR15DRsKUA5m2B9BXq0vBGVWzEl3fu7FdnPU6J5If2H2STQ6HPfdGU%3D)

[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=0eb405348f7a4cb68c10b544dfb723b2&_e=XXies1tI3Xc2NaT7z07a3S49rx_seAsi4LApozAr1d3LmjT4IHb4hmZx_ctZA3ocGz3ZNPQHtFeGBGnSdJLpB9DbOOlpoTx7S8zcYqIBLAd5ky_eiLpF6rBHshFsS_3eMfq6RxJXJCSOP9nN3hFISaHflsyei2D7v3qQfU6r1grJGccAJo2NCrwZhn64_N0q-Hq--r_E43QZEOyZK6s9vgGtinuOnzKAV1uc8wHzQQSBTPZOc238S0XoUy43042cHNOWd7gYRIbFSUcidLl6ogP6iQtPKVtHORlEKIFtIntm_zmB8tfUPuHacVqqEBLwhX6b7fFtZjnyWrklTSOSo-bMQBagZJSqahlfXSScqIaQ_FaLn8j2vEkMuqa6FVgK9pR4SAuynLu6ZjLox5eMr060viZrJvdiwAzC-I3N4ZmO5TnmrdI3SHlVYX8DyvrMM8QswX1hLK8V-b3linJlj_dzMzeOxCZY8SPghumn04QFS1k8asAuVpQN_7Cx5zL-9cK7g2l6zssm57lxTf1LZLvN8L4B_5NEQpHPxFgg5jTfxuRGaWhtYQ_4r5nSHD1X__FXZwogslopWJJwug5utlCXTghoHxv0MBpRqkQ4NbwAN4zqer-WVWxQTQwJtMIx0n8sSqovyfzAcPzmlvHQzoYsYEcG2JYLxqjE0XJBT8TFkt8gg-Wgk097YC5JxD64)
In the United States Senate, South Carolina's Lindsey Graham has earned a reputation as a conservative, a problem-solver, and a leader who gets things done. He is a great friend to our men and women serving in uniform, a respected voice on national security matters, a leading advocate for cutting the out-of-control spending in Washington, and a champion for confirming conservative judges.

clean_body: Fellow American, I grew up in a single room behind my parents’ family-owned liquor store, restaurant, and pool hall in Central, South Carolina. I was the first in my family to attend college, and while I was in school, I lost my mother and father within two years of one another. | Fellow American, I grew up in a single room behind my parents' family-owned liquor store, restaurant, and pool hall in Central, South Carolina. I was the first in my family to attend college, and while I was in school, I lost my mother and father within two years of one another. I quickly took on the responsibility of helping raise my 13-year-old sister, Darline, and running the family businesses. I had to grow up fast, Fellow American,and I learned many life lessons at an early age. After attending law school, I joined the U.S. Air Force as a member of the Judge Advocate General Corps, where I served as a military prosecutor and defense attorney. Even after being elected to the United States Senate, I continued to wear the uniform and served in the U.S. Air Force Reserves, where I performed several short deployments in the war zones of Afghanistan and Iraq. Fellow American, my story is similar to that of most Americans. I didn't grow up with a silver spoon in my mouth with everything handed to me. I had to grow up fast and work hard. I learned a lot of valuable lessons at a young age and took on a whole lot of responsibility. But one thing stuck with me over the years -- the perspectives I gained from listening to the hard-working South Carolinians who were regulars at my family's pool hall or my brave colleagues in the military. Their perspectives, whether I agreed with them or not, helped build my foundation for understanding what Americans need. It's no secret that our nation is sharply divided right now, but there are some things we should all agree on. We need a country that is a safe place to live and raise a family, and we need a country where the American Dream is alive and possible for everyone, no matter where they start from. Fellow American, I'm fighting every day to make those two things a reality. Sadly, there are people across the aisle in Washington who simply can't agree with us on these issues. They are okay with open borders and the flow of violent crime into our neighborhoods and onto our streets. They are okay with punishing hard-working Americans with higher taxes, deepening the burden on them and their families. | If you're unable to contribute financially, I understand. I'd greatly appreciate it if you could forward this email along to a friend or family member to help amplify my message. Together, I know we can build the country that protects our communities, rewards hard work, and ensures every hard-working American has a shot at their dreams, just like I was so fortunate to have. Thank you for taking a moment out of your busy day to read this message. Sincerely, Lindsey Graham In the United States Senate, South Carolina's Lindsey Graham has earned a reputation as a conservative, a problem-solver, and a leader who gets things done. He is a great friend to our men and women serving in uniform, a respected voice on national security matters, a leading advocate for cutting the out-of-control spending in Washington, and a champion for confirming conservative judges. | Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Air Force or the Department of Defense. We want to make sure you're a proud member of Team Graham, and we don't want to bother you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, please . | Paid for by Graham Majority Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Team Graham Inc, Fund for America's Future, Security Is Strength PAC, and NRSC.

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: Just writing to personally say thank you.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HICKENLOOPER FOR COLORADO
body:
Folks, I owe you a massive thank you.

I know you heard a lot from us this week about our campaign’s quarterly fundraising goal. I know nobody likes being asked for money (and to be honest, I hate asking too).

It’s not lost on me that your support is crucial as we continue advocating for all working people. Having a strong group of grassroots supporters from all across the country is exactly what we need to win this race and push back on MAGA Republicans’ extreme agenda.

I wish I could say our work was finished, folks, but the truth is our campaign is just getting started. Donald Trump and his Republican-controlled Congress are wreaking havoc on our country — shutting down the government, threatening mass firings, and blocking our effort to keep the government open while lowering health care costs.

We have a long road ahead to take back our Senate majority and get our country back on track — and we need you with us every step of the way.

So if you’re able to make your first donation to my campaign, it’d mean a lot as we build the momentum to kick off this next quarter on a strong note. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-october-email-2025?amount=15]

DONATE → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-october-email-2025]

Thanks a ton,
John
Make sure this email goes to your inbox. Add hello@hickenlooper.com to your address book.
Email is a key way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. But if you would like to unsubscribe: https://action.hickenlooper.com/p/cTrdfv93Ski9KUzCx_WudA2?unsubscribedata=FilPocfUF9qeIgkuo860NHHnzg%2B4%2BpQwf9qFkc7NacgpP2o0%2BUhk1oeEZJrv%2BGj1LEyLRaZRuu%2FwKyvthtbtQnkjNwS6GTfd4M%2F3ztCNTpIgrsGYsy8e1zG4tmiM3rY%2BnvSPnf0BzpVRuBuxybdOProQ7ij6oyNm8%2BU%2BUQv81iyV1mJ3HIIfIGF%2FqOgax3cGmOvX%2FgUUCcnVDuMSeMSTmC0VQYnlDJ3LQ15j9pGy%2Bkuyu7K74MkHt32P6czEXtUY50IZHq6xWhbvlZ4AJHlhMfUQ5YJ28VIoRg6d4ko4oRdqLb9iyT6wtihOZt5uouGSi5WoQ7AA3WLeCQU%2B5xHw%2BDPC6FH2MX8OL%2FZrnDiRdBqgEpHgBvq4%2FR234umtFhauUF4AAy7yeQr%2B5CcUP129joHUciXp7PxKDnnwsVATHuY%3D .

name: JanePAC.com
subject: Trump's shutdown puts lives at risk during hurricane season
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
Shutdowns have consequences.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116401079/573304464/1328794144?refcode=ea.cf17b92d-0b9f-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.cf17b92d-0b9f-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNmMTdiOTJkLTBiOWYtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dPIM5eiPg8EzC4loCMPGQ3bV0hZFmKe4CmogzTSCkFo=&emci=1db28e27-0b9f-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=cf17b92d-0b9f-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=4823105)
---
| **Donald Trump and his Republican cronies shut down the government early this morning. Their goal? To cut healthcare for millions of Americans, while making working people pay for the billionaire tax breaks he’s already handed out.** **[Americans deserve better. Add your name to demand Congress reopen the federal government NOW >>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116401080/573304465/1225983513?refcode=ea.cf17b92d-0b9f-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.cf17b92d-0b9f-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNmMTdiOTJkLTBiOWYtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dPIM5eiPg8EzC4loCMPGQ3bV0hZFmKe4CmogzTSCkFo=&emci=1db28e27-0b9f-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=cf17b92d-0b9f-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=4823105)** | [**SIGN THE PETITION →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116401081/573304466/1225983513?refcode=ea.cf17b92d-0b9f-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.cf17b92d-0b9f-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNmMTdiOTJkLTBiOWYtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dPIM5eiPg8EzC4loCMPGQ3bV0hZFmKe4CmogzTSCkFo=&emci=1db28e27-0b9f-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=cf17b92d-0b9f-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=4823105)
---
Let’s be clear: Donald Trump and the GOP own this shutdown.
Republicans control the House, Senate, and the White House. They _chose_ to plunge us into chaos over their refusal to restore healthcare for millions of Americans — healthcare they themselves slashed through a law they passed over the summer.
Now, hundreds of thousands of federal workers face uncertainty as paychecks are delayed and critical services are disrupted.
But the damage doesn’t stop there. **Climate and science agencies were already barely hanging on after Trump’s cuts earlier this year. Now, with even less staff, funding, and resources, the federal government is more unprepared than ever to handle the climate risks we’re facing.**
To make matters worse, this is happening in the middle of hurricane season, as two storms in the Atlantic threaten the East Coast. The agencies we depend on — like FEMA — to respond and protect our communities from extreme weather events are left scrambling with depleted resources. And if a major climate disaster hits, agencies won’t even be able to appeal to Congress for emergency funds.
**Bottom line: The GOP is playing with the health and livelihoods of millions of Americans.**
Every day this shutdown drags on, our country falls further behind in the race to protect communities from climate disasters. Families go without paychecks. Communities lose access to data and services they depend on. Lives are put at risk.

clean_body: Shutdowns have consequences. | | Donald Trump and his Republican cronies shut down the government early this morning. Their goal? To cut healthcare for millions of Americans, while making working people pay for the billionaire tax breaks he’s already handed out. | Let’s be clear: Donald Trump and the GOP own this shutdown. Republicans control the House, Senate, and the White House. They chose to plunge us into chaos over their refusal to restore healthcare for millions of Americans — healthcare they themselves slashed through a law they passed over the summer. Now, hundreds of thousands of federal workers face uncertainty as paychecks are delayed and critical services are disrupted. But the damage doesn’t stop there. Climate and science agencies were already barely hanging on after Trump’s cuts earlier this year. Now, with even less staff, funding, and resources, the federal government is more unprepared than ever to handle the climate risks we’re facing. To make matters worse, this is happening in the middle of hurricane season, as two storms in the Atlantic threaten the East Coast. The agencies we depend on — like FEMA — to respond and protect our communities from extreme weather events are left scrambling with depleted resources. And if a major climate disaster hits, agencies won’t even be able to appeal to Congress for emergency funds. Bottom line: The GOP is playing with the health and livelihoods of millions of Americans. Every day this shutdown drags on, our country falls further behind in the race to protect communities from climate disasters. Families go without paychecks. Communities lose access to data and services they depend on. Lives are put at risk. – Team JanePAC P.S. If you’ve been impacted by the government shutdown and would like to receive fewer emails from us, or Take care of what matters most, and we’ll be here when you’re ready. | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. name: Bonnie Watson Coleman
subject: I'm standing strong
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bonnie Watson Coleman for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116401426/573305174/1328194270?source=EM_NBI_BWC_20251001_EN_TYShutdown_0_ALL_BonnieWatsonColeman_NA_NA_Shutdown&refcode2=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NWRlNDlhZC0wYzlmLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wY-kn5kh2jB1rhHRW7DfJlt9HvjkmvUgKKMZ_LKblGg=&emci=2e8032a4-0c9f-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=55de49ad-0c9f-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=30096098) | Thank you _so_ much for your support. Thanks to you we were able to reach our fundraising goal. But we still have some work ahead of us.

Republicans continue to play petty politics and scurry away from a vote that could’ve kept the government open and protect our healthcare rights.

Trump and Republicans would rather put their billionaire buddies over everyday Americans who can’t afford it. If they get their way, healthcare premiums, copays, deductibles, and prescription drugs will skyrocket for the people in New Jersey’s 12th district and across the nation.

We know the last thing people need is a shutdown that could cause late paychecks and a pause on medical services. Democrats are ready to work across the aisle, but not if it comes at the cost of the American people.

We must not back down and let the Republicans stand in the way of our rights. Your activism makes the difference, so I like to take the time to say thank you for your continued support and involvement.

Thank you,

Bonnie Watson Coleman
---

name: Marcy Kaptur
subject: Republicans walked out.
body:
At the very moment families need stability, they left us with chaos.

| |
---
Hi there, it’s Marcy. I, along with my Democratic colleagues, have been in Washington all week, doing our job: working to keep our government open and fighting to protect affordable healthcare for families in Northwest Ohio and across the country. But my Republican colleagues? They literally walked out. At the very moment families need stability and solutions, the GOP left working people, seniors, and children to pay the price. Here’s what’s at stake: **29,000 of my neighbors in OH-09 rely on Enhanced ACA Premium Tax Credits** to afford their health coverage. If Republicans refuse to act, those families could see premiums skyrocket by thousands of dollars overnight. A family of four in our district earning $64,000 could **see their annual premiums increase by 217%**. A 60-year-old couple could be hit with an **extra $15,000 per year in healthcare costs.** Hospitals across Ohio — especially rural ones — are **at risk of cutting services or closing entirely.** This isn’t just bad politics, friend. It’s cruel, reckless, and devastating for our communities. Healthcare is a human right, and instead of protecting it, the GOP is inflicting pain on the very people they represent. I came to Washington to fight for the people of Northwest Ohio and to make sure no family loses the care they depend on. That’s the work I’ll keep doing every single day. But here’s the truth: my district is a top target for the NRCC, and MAGA super PACs are already pouring dark money into this race. clean_body: At the very moment families need stability, they left us with chaos. | | Hi there, it’s Marcy. I, along with my Democratic colleagues, have been in Washington all week, doing our job: working to keep our government open and fighting to protect affordable healthcare for families in Northwest Ohio and across the country. But my Republican colleagues? They literally walked out. At the very moment families need stability and solutions, the GOP left working people, seniors, and children to pay the price. Here’s what’s at stake: 29,000 of my neighbors in OH-09 rely on Enhanced ACA Premium Tax Credits to afford their health coverage. If Republicans refuse to act, those families could see premiums skyrocket by thousands of dollars overnight. A family of four in our district earning $64,000 could see their annual premiums increase by 217%. A 60-year-old couple could be hit with an extra $15,000 per year in healthcare costs. Hospitals across Ohio — especially rural ones — are at risk of cutting services or closing entirely. This isn’t just bad politics, friend. It’s cruel, reckless, and devastating for our communities. Healthcare is a human right, and instead of protecting it, the GOP is inflicting pain on the very people they represent. I came to Washington to fight for the people of Northwest Ohio and to make sure no family loses the care they depend on. That’s the work I’ll keep doing every single day. But here’s the truth: my district is a top target for the NRCC, and MAGA super PACs are already pouring dark money into this race. I need your grassroots support to keep up the fight. = | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately. Peter,

They’re calling us **_“backward,” “extreme,”_** and worse — labels meant to dismiss and divide. Rep. Jasmine Crockett’s harsh words about President Trump aren’t just about him. They’re aimed at you, me, and anyone who cherishes America’s values, respects our nation’s heritage, or believes in standing firm for what’s right.

They think we’re obstacles to their agenda. They believe we’ll stay silent. But I know better — and so do you.

I’m Adam Schwarze, a former Navy SEAL Officer and Marine Corps veteran. I’ve served in over 70 countries, led teams through high-stakes missions, and faced challenges that tested my resolve. Through it all, I learned that disciplined action and quiet strength always prevail.

I’m running for U.S. Senate in Minnesota — to fight for our state with focus, humility, and unwavering commitment.

I never imagined a career in politics. But returning home from deployments, I saw a Minnesota drifting from the values that shaped me. My opponent, Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor, and a radical transgender activist, pushes a far-left vision that’s out of touch with our communities. _**While chaos gripped our streets in 2020, she criticized those working to restore order, leaving businesses and families to bear the cost.**_****

I grew up on Minnesota’s hockey rinks and enlisted in the Marine Corps at 18, weeks after 9/11. Service has always been my calling — to my country, my family, and now to you. This is a different kind of fight, but the stakes are just as high.

Minnesota hasn’t backed a Republican for president since 1976, and this Senate race is an uphill climb. I’m the underdog — a regular Minnesotan called to an extraordinary challenge. **[With your support, we can turn this seat red and send a message to Washington](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=c4fdea0fe1d4402ea5c481b322000f10&_e=rugiA8QWAtqmwcEmv5DzKULpYvjrk-6xnH52g7oNRfFfk_xtZCxZsBtumhN7-VMim1vnyc0Sg8ko5ki56F8KZcAXKSo3rDsxMzCwPNCjCsRgNhVxwOId2xx_h8WmCyOK5yzIEqO2MZwhQMd8gZSJ9AEpbhuaTICTG1XX9WFs5XbwgFEKZsf-MvbKG-Uf9IK133LiiwUqwoD7UsofMzDtNWBgUm_WNuZThgOjhSclOHvwjzniYQaw_G7ZURs37bMKB_FvKG4mkfDKTnPzWLWbXIVjvrjB8Kwnjc2IPaGokMUdztwP4LjxN1LMtDGB7KSMPyZWyZqvL0JxlE49eTxxpJ-Ft752m_jGtfr__x9NQFwX9IDueghcHmPSNUWMNe17doat2-OqQAzytqXN-X4sezaBqweZN9KaBDKzRzg2YPjnL4XcVyvwy64LkBL3iJ8aiC0_v9yTf-fALXz98r50K3zAwLEs4oZiglcAz1y9OTzwhpEEKGfTDPkr_BBiUuu_N6LrtiwVh9T4rtxzmrWzPiBdcBsbLf0g6Avb65NkTdzR0mP9a-niC8Z_0AYO6jvnRGdZdOcbALtbyxpgybqEGndKn2_pPtE86GbS26FnlAeUszCVTXhvkA6eANK-qQl7dU0RVIFRY5mtfKzJxyfAyE9AvmfkC9VyZrGWEMqiREQifUIdLIjgRT357y9BWq8uXbfbpKFFjxL1xmz434Em9S1VQbM2phjUxm5nXqhFPdM3ypvOXO23ODQ9cM6yC-lRgrWu5_Ix79ktP8fYsiNDrEvWYgW8540RG8sWwKAs0pg%3D)**.

_**You have a choice.**_

You can set this email aside, or you can join me in sending a second Navy SEAL to the U.S. Senate — someone forged in service, ready for the challenge, and driven by principle, not pride. **[Will you contribute $1, $5, or $50 to help us win this fight?](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=c4fdea0fe1d4402ea5c481b322000f10&_e=rugiA8QWAtqmwcEmv5DzKULpYvjrk-6xnH52g7oNRfFfk_xtZCxZsBtumhN7-VMim1vnyc0Sg8ko5ki56F8KZcAXKSo3rDsxMzCwPNCjCsRgNhVxwOId2xx_h8WmCyOK5yzIEqO2MZwhQMd8gZSJ9AEpbhuaTICTG1XX9WFs5XbwgFEKZsf-MvbKG-Uf9IK133LiiwUqwoD7UsofMzDtNWBgUm_WNuZThgOjhSclOHvwjzniYQaw_G7ZURs37bMKB_FvKG4mkfDKTnPzWLWbXIVjvrjB8Kwnjc2IPaGokMUVbNXoMgLIHFQeptVXVs35i0cEbqslMDh-LSl15W8yw3vcx7b-iKVkNkARkYhvsaEyICQ7MWa_YJn05QR3O7Wu4zQjqagE_I14I0Ba1-tvZSOJjarEHTXpFHYDiENWhtxw4cSX2Mfkqsj7EvlbGuWQxahwzClyw8Bisc-lIoX6KsBJAp1W7VwynoYwRM9J9-F120C44qdU4vJ8hGwmrQGiBfROTY51sls6_MvCaxVQ3V6TUMTB_i5LkMVAxQb7HzLAaKvfNTZP-wkcFoEB9ZN2LvFosQRDhThBknIaXVjz3ubIfqWd56_c3nxzzs4tqk-DhK8vFun0qLfOCepRebHvyYQaXsAjnnCSQIM_9W-z_BMvbvcvLLxG97AB5rD36WZH1tRyD-kS0zs541hzYmS70RQLYyZpOXr_IRrRLvtV4T-zg7nnmcyxeM3OFHFdr1-dFvLrZUg1lIMQs2pix-eYWcF9GTr9A3CEbmN6JHNnAMeXCFp3V0BrSc667Opc-NA%3D)**

[**MAKE A GIFT RIGHT NOW
**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=c4fdea0fe1d4402ea5c481b322000f10&_e=rugiA8QWAtqmwcEmv5DzKULpYvjrk-6xnH52g7oNRfFfk_xtZCxZsBtumhN7-VMim1vnyc0Sg8ko5ki56F8KZcAXKSo3rDsxMzCwPNCjCsRgNhVxwOId2xx_h8WmCyOK5yzIEqO2MZwhQMd8gZSJ9AEpbhuaTICTG1XX9WFs5XbwgFEKZsf-MvbKG-Uf9IK133LiiwUqwoD7UsofMzDtNWBgUm_WNuZThgOjhSclOHvwjzniYQaw_G7ZURs37bMKB_FvKG4mkfDKTnPzWLWbXIVjvrjB8Kwnjc2IPaGokMXZYd2IGcluJJIiz1VcAaJJDB6sQUGgHA2pjYsiWg_lwiWwy0S7miIyoz2fBN1qVrj1V_wrLt4zloRjqGHqc9JnW9iF4MKXfvm4rl61d0VQ_Ad6usouc4SQf41MYvAsP2NXEp4l_Wgtz4jfhM7MW4O_lY0t3awuaSWQF1WPuteHwhrQ5-4l2Hzy3IDs1y7BMsYlCQwd7Xz6zF00MsKy3YoKYRg5j4QV7aUvj6OaOF6PSMUUYZIc9yKgTCpvl-F27E_3lMEv805DSxS4iGNRryOflDSZk385Vgo8N-XnKjTovh9n_c_BwXBkrKkHxQiIfE-qopFSQNzb1KnclEI75Kkyrl28eX4UVxzZcP4_YhNtHexCVnDDclHxiOFc9hfGfC04bcpTVgwfsOaZvcmZRgRHZLl9e1GTkSOubCf5ZHEkrPqlzSQaXUkcND5OBExwxa8cL1bZKzotlIzzKkA2lQgspzFL7LBsINuyUU53UdaRrCk-6LY558OjEuK6Xax6qvs%3D)
I’ve earned degrees from Harvard and Johns Hopkins and trained in high-stakes fields like nuclear deterrence. I’ve built coalitions across cultures and led through crises. But the greatest challenge is earning your trust and building a movement to reclaim our state. I’m not asking for a free pass —** I’m asking for your partnership. **

Our country is worth defending. Respect, integrity, and action still matter. Together, we can show Minnesota — and America — what we’re made of.

With gratitude,
Adam Schwarze
Proud Marine Veteran
Retired Navy SEAL

clean_body: Tim Walz and the radical left are preparing for war - it’s up to us to stop them. As a former Navy SEAL, I believe I can be of assistance. | Peter, They’re calling us “backward,” “extreme,” and worse — labels meant to dismiss and divide. Rep. Jasmine Crockett’s harsh words about President Trump aren’t just about him. They’re aimed at you, me, and anyone who cherishes America’s values, respects our nation’s heritage, or believes in standing firm for what’s right. They think we’re obstacles to their agenda. They believe we’ll stay silent. But I know better — and so do you. I’m Adam Schwarze, a former Navy SEAL Officer and Marine Corps veteran. I’ve served in over 70 countries, led teams through high-stakes missions, and faced challenges that tested my resolve. Through it all, I learned that disciplined action and quiet strength always prevail. I’m running for U.S. Senate in Minnesota — to fight for our state with focus, humility, and unwavering commitment. I never imagined a career in politics. But returning home from deployments, I saw a Minnesota drifting from the values that shaped me. My opponent, Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor, and a radical transgender activist, pushes a far-left vision that’s out of touch with our communities. While chaos gripped our streets in 2020, she criticized those working to restore order, leaving businesses and families to bear the cost.** I grew up on Minnesota’s hockey rinks and enlisted in the Marine Corps at 18, weeks after 9/11. Service has always been my calling — to my country, my family, and now to you. This is a different kind of fight, but the stakes are just as high. Minnesota hasn’t backed a Republican for president since 1976, and this Senate race is an uphill climb. I’m the underdog — a regular Minnesotan called to an extraordinary challenge. . You have a choice. You can set this email aside, or you can join me in sending a second Navy SEAL to the U.S. Senate — someone forged in service, ready for the challenge, and driven by principle, not pride. I’ve earned degrees from Harvard and Johns Hopkins and trained in high-stakes fields like nuclear deterrence. I’ve built coalitions across cultures and led through crises. But the greatest challenge is earning your trust and building a movement to reclaim our state. I’m not asking for a free pass — I’m asking for your partnership. Our country is worth defending. Respect, integrity, and action still matter. Together, we can show Minnesota — and America — what we’re made of. With gratitude, Adam Schwarze Proud Marine Veteran Retired Navy SEAL Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate – Minnesota FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA** | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Sen. Patty Murray
subject: re: Trump's shutdown
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
Trump and the GOP would rather let the government shut down than work with Democrats to fix the health care crisis they created.
| | |
---
Peter – as of 12 a.m. ET today, the government has officially shut down.
Meanwhile, House Republicans are on vacation, Senate Republicans just forced another vote on a bill they knew wouldn't pass, and the president is posting vulgar AI deepfakes and bold-faced lies on social media.
_Why?_**Because Trump and the GOP would rather let the government shut down than work with Democrats to fix the health care crisis they created**.
Thanks to Republican inaction and their nonstop attacks on health care, premiums on the ACA marketplace are set to more than DOUBLE in 2026. One family paying $278 a month on average for their health insurance will pay as much as**$1,800 per month** by next year.
So if it seems like the only sentence Republicans say consists of a noun, verb, and "illegal immigrant," it's because they have to resort to straight-up lies to distract from the reality of their God-awful health care policies.
Their health care cuts – to the tune of over **$1 TRILLION** – are already hurting millions of American citizens. Hospitals are already laying off staff and closing down nationwide. Millions will soon be kicked off their health care plans.
So Donald Trump, JD Vance, and the rest of their party can lie all they like. **But they can't stop people from getting those letters in the mail telling them how much more their premiums will cost next year.**
**[And with your contribution of any amount today, we can send the GOP a message LOUD and CLEAR that their Senate majority is on track to flip blue if they don't start working with us to fix this crisis, and soon.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116403098/573307117/-548933253?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk556-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZTQzMWUzOS0wZjlmLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mPsmzVIT6xBFsattZICJVChgRxieOHdqGXjp-9JwaZs=)**
Apparently, when President Trump was looking over Democratic health care proposals the other day, he said, and I quote: **_"Go f--- yourself."_**
That tells you how much he really cares about whether working families go bankrupt paying for their health care, put off seeking lifesaving medical assistance until it's too late, or even die as a result of his agenda.
Unlike the president, I _do_ care –**and I'm ready and willing to pass a bipartisan bill that not only funds the government, but also fixes the GOP's self-made health care crisis.**
Now, it's up to Senate Republicans to get serious about negotiating a way out of this.
Thank you so much for everything, Peter – there'll be more to come soon. So hold the line, keep the faith, and stay tuned.

Patty Murray
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116403101/573307118/-548933253?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk556-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZTQzMWUzOS0wZjlmLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mPsmzVIT6xBFsattZICJVChgRxieOHdqGXjp-9JwaZs=)

name: Team Schrier
subject: Republicans are behind this shutdown.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress

Tell the GOP: Do your job and reopen the government NOW. Peter,

Republicans control the House, the Senate, and the White House—and instead of working to keep our government open, **they walked away from the people they were elected to serve.**

When it was time to vote to fund the government and protect vital services, Democrats showed up ready to work. Meanwhile, Speaker Mike Johnson called a recess, and Republicans stayed home.

Now, Washington workers are missing paychecks, families aren't getting the benefits they rely on, farmers, schools, and community organizations are being cut off from critical funding and grants. This is nothing but political theater—and it's working Americans who are paying the price for the GOP's non-stop partisan games.

We cannot allow extreme Republicans to hold our government hostage. We need them to do their jobs, end this reckless shutdown, and get back to work NOW.

Peter, more than 200,000 votes have already been cast in the biggest election of 2025.
_This is our biggest moment since Abigail announced she was running for Governor._
We have thousands of organizers and volunteers fanning out across the Commonwealth, going door-to-door, making calls, and engaging voters in meaningful conversations about all the important issues. The stats speak for themselves: _1,000,000 voters contacted. 500,000 doors knocked. 1 crystal-clear mission._
**But now's the point at which every decision we make will become even more important.**
And we'll put this plainly: We're facing a major budget gap, and unless we raise more money, we will have trouble funding all the necessary investments in our campaign.
[_**So, that's why Abigail needs your $25 donation to come in today. clean_body: This is our biggest moment since Abigail announced she was running for Governor. = Peter, more than 200,000 votes have already been cast in the biggest election of 2025. This is our biggest moment since Abigail announced she was running for Governor. We have thousands of organizers and volunteers fanning out across the Commonwealth, going door-to-door, making calls, and engaging voters in meaningful conversations about all the important issues. The stats speak for themselves: 1,000,000 voters contacted. 500,000 doors knocked. 1 crystal-clear mission. But now's the point at which every decision we make will become even more important. And we'll put this plainly: We're facing a major budget gap, and unless we raise more money, we will have trouble funding all the necessary investments in our campaign. = = = = = = = Thanks, The Spanberger Campaign By submitting your phone number you're agreeing to receive periodic text messages from the Spanberger for Governor campaign. Message & data rates may apply. Text HELP for more info. Text STOP to stop receiving messages. . Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. ### **[Want more unfiltered conversations with voices like Don Lemon? Become a paid subscriber to support Endless Urgency](https://substack.com/redirect/8c4a327d-f8cb-4a13-a8fe-d8affe76f6e2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) 👇**
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/8c4a327d-f8cb-4a13-a8fe-d8affe76f6e2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Hey folks,
This week I went live with my friend **Don Lemon** , and let me tell you--this one's essential. We got into the chaos in Washington, the quiet complicity of Democrats, and why our communication strategy needs a full reset. It's raw, it's urgent, and it's the kind of conversation you're just not going to hear anywhere else.
* [00:01:12] Why Democrats keep caving--and what that signals to voters who want a party that fights.
* [00:04:45] Outdated tactics in the House vs. the GOP's lockstep messaging machine.
* [00:13:03] What's really at stake in the budget fight: ACA subsidies, child cancer research, and community policing.
* [00:19:03] The silence from the administration on the Michigan church shooter--and what that says about narrative control.
* [00:27:02] The growing crisis of disaffected young men--and why Andrew Tate's influence can't be ignored.

**[If you're tired of performative politics and desperate for real talk about how we win, become a paid subscriber today. These are the conversations that matter. Let's stay sharp, stay urgent, and never back down.](https://substack.com/redirect/8c4a327d-f8cb-4a13-a8fe-d8affe76f6e2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
With urgency,
--Mike.

| | Dear Peter,
---
Last month the Garnet Fire swept through the historic McKinley Grove of giant sequoias. Saving the grove took more than a thousand firefighters digging fire breaks and setting up sprinklers while planes roared overhead, dousing the flames from above. Smokejumpers even climbed 200 feet up into massive sequoias to extinguish glowing embers. In the end, the grit and heroism of the firefighters, a few dozen hissing sprinklers, and a lucky rainstorm kept the sequoias standing. But rallying a small army of firefighters to save sequoias every time a blaze erupts is exhausting, costly, and unsustainable. Especially now, as drought, warming temperatures, and decades of fire suppression fuel ever more destructive megafires. That’s why the League is putting boots on the ground to advance a long-term, holistic, and scalable plan to restore natural fire resiliency across the Sierra.In our latest story, **[“Why firefighters alone aren't enough to save every sequoia,”](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116403496/573308907/-1785420343?utm_campaign=garnet-fire&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ea-mar&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY1OGVmMmZmLTExOWYtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=bhbKX_WpFCU0zKfSwsRaR7ez-jP15n4E98WiYDhyg4A=&emci=cbd4be47-739a-f011-b485-6045bda9d96b&emdi=658ef2ff-119f-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=1504551)** we explain how proactive resilience is the key to safeguarding these invaluable groves.

name: Rev. Dr. Stephany Rose Spaulding
subject: No budget. No paychecks. No care. This is Trump’s shutdown.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POLITIVIST ACTION PAC
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_m4f_email-25q4?refcode=x_251001_govshutdown_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_m4f_email-25q4?refcode=x_251001_govshutdown_act]
Rent is already too high.
The cost of food and medical care is skyrocketing, driven by Trump’s reckless tariffs and Republican tax cuts for the ultra-wealthy.
And now: a government shutdown.
Let’s be clear: This shutdown is 100% on Trump and his weak-minded Republican allies in Congress.
Here’s what a shutdown means for our country:
* 550,000–750,000 workers furloughed , with many at risk of losing their jobs permanently under this administration’s reduction-in-force agenda.
* 1.5 million workers forced to work without pay , waiting for who knows how long for back pay.
* Zero real solutions in sight.
Meanwhile:
* During a shutdown, presidential budgetary power actually expands .
* The President and Members of Congress still get paid unless they choose not to accept their checks.
* Families across America are left wrestling with uncertainty.
This shutdown doesn’t help everyday people; it only hurts them. While Trump and Congress play politics, workers are left holding the bag. Families are suffering enough already.
We need a Congress that prioritizes people over politics and a government that actually works, not one that leaves our workers and communities behind.
Join the movement for freedom and accountability. Let’s build a new way forward. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_m4f_email-25q4?refcode=x_251001_govshutdown_act]

# Steven Crowder brings BACK "Change My Mind," hires an army of security and wears bullet proof vest
Conservative commentator Steven Crowder has relaunched his "Change My Mind" videos, where he, much like Charlie Kirk, sits at a table on college campuses to debate with liberal students on political issues.
This time, Crowder was not messing around. He hired dozens of security guards and wore a bullet proof vest among other safety measures amid the radical left's recent killing spree.
**[His topic: The Left Is Violent - Change My Mind](https://substack.com/redirect/83e73352-908b-4abe-b8c4-89ad96c656e2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

# Trump prepares for federal layoffs
OMB Director Russ Vought told House Republicans on Wednesday that **[worker layoffs through reductions in force (RIFs) are"imminent"](https://substack.com/redirect/c99a95ff-eab0-48b8-a3d0-0a351ea140d1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** and "likely a day or two out" as the government shutdown persists following Senate Democrats' rejection of GOP funding plans.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c99a95ff-eab0-48b8-a3d0-0a351ea140d1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
DC bureaucrats panicking
* **Republicans blame Democrats** : Vought and Speaker Mike Johnson characterized the layoffs as Democrats forcing the administration's hand by rejecting the GOP's spending bill multiple times, with Johnson saying Democratic lawmakers put Vought in a "terrible situation" and encouraging Republicans to defend him against criticism.
* **Agency heads to determine cuts** : Vought explained that layoffs will be decided by individual agency heads based on what roles are appropriate under current spending levels and the Trump administration's budget priorities, following earlier OMB guidance directing agencies to prepare layoff plans.
* **Democratic demands on healthcare** : Senate Democrats have rejected the GOP funding plan twice in 24 hours, refusing to accept any bill that doesn't extend enhanced Obamacare tax subsidies from the COVID-19 pandemic era, which are set to expire at year's end, with the next Senate vote unlikely until Friday due to Yom Kippur recess.

* * *
# **ICE deportations to continue during gov 't shutdown**
Despite the federal government shutdown the Department of Homeland Security confirmed that Immigration and Customs Enforcement will continue deportation operations, arrests, and hiring of new agents under funding from the "One Big Beautiful Bill," **[the Daily Caller reports.](https://substack.com/redirect/912fad54-0656-434d-ba31-5ed9c7b2a913?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
* **Recent arrests highlight ongoing enforcement** : Just hours before the shutdown, ICE agents arrested multiple illegal immigrants across the country, including individuals convicted of sexual assault of a child in Texas, child cruelty in California, second-degree murder in Los Angeles, assault with a dangerous weapon in Massachusetts, and alien smuggling.
* **Rising violence against ICE agents** : The agency faces increased threats with assaults against ICE agents reportedly up over 1,000%, including a September sniper attack at a Dallas ICE facility that killed two detainees, with the shooter leaving writings about wanting to "give ICE agents real terror" and inscribing "anti-ICE" on shell casings.
* **Political tensions over ICE operations** : DHS Assistant Secretary Tricia McLaughlin criticized Democratic politicians for calling ICE agents "Nazi Gestapo" and "kidnappers" while putting officers' families under financial strain during the shutdown, asserting "the deportations will continue" and the agency will prioritize "the safety of the American people FIRST."

"Millions of non-citizens are getting government healthcare, are they worth shutting down the government for?!" | | | Oct 1 | | | | | | | | | | | | Politibrawl editor Matt Miller asked Democrat protesters at the capitol building, what is their response to the 65% of Americans who say they do not want Democrats to shut down the government over their demands. "Don't repeat that Republican bullsht!" one protester snapped. Steven Crowder brings BACK "Change My Mind," hires an army of security and wears bullet proof vest Conservative commentator Steven Crowder has relaunched his "Change My Mind" videos, where he, much like Charlie Kirk, sits at a table on college campuses to debate with liberal students on political issues. This time, Crowder was not messing around. He hired dozens of security guards and wore a bullet proof vest among other safety measures amid the radical left's recent killing spree. | | POLL Are you happy to see Crowder bring back his signature video format? | ? ? ? | | ---|---|--- In a genius move that benefits all Americans, President Trump unlocked tax cuts for working and middle class Americans. You'll see why in a moment. But it gets better, because while the jerks on the left want to see you weak and timid, Trump's "One Big Beautiful Bill" delivers a lopsided win for workers and retirees. Once the gears on this start turning, it'll pick up speed and smash through the gates of Congress, creating an opportunity as wide as a city block. But don 't clap just yet, because there's more to the story: If you've got a retirement account -- IRA, 401(k), or TSP -- then you're likely in the warpath of that very machine designed to help you. Because all it takes is one uppercut to the chin, and your retirement's on the ropes. A bank failure, another damn geopolitical crisis, or God forbid a repeat of the 2008 market crash... You might have wished you did something about it sooner. So if you're concerned about your retirement account, and don't want to leave yourself open to attack, then click the link below: Inside, you'll get the blueprint to help hedge, neutralize volatility, and buffer your retirement savings against geopolitical shocks. Trump rolls out reforms fast, and his gender-bender enemies will get crushed under the wheels. Markets may rattle, shaking the cobwebs loose. So while we're in a construction zone, get out of the warpath, and get on the gravy train. Trump prepares for federal layoffs OMB Director Russ Vought told House Republicans on Wednesday that and "likely a day or two out" as the government shutdown persists following Senate Democrats' rejection of GOP funding plans. | | ---|---|--- DC bureaucrats panicking Republicans blame Democrats : Vought and Speaker Mike Johnson characterized the layoffs as Democrats forcing the administration's hand by rejecting the GOP's spending bill multiple times, with Johnson saying Democratic lawmakers put Vought in a "terrible situation" and encouraging Republicans to defend him against criticism. Agency heads to determine cuts : Vought explained that layoffs will be decided by individual agency heads based on what roles are appropriate under current spending levels and the Trump administration's budget priorities, following earlier OMB guidance directing agencies to prepare layoff plans. Democratic demands on healthcare : Senate Democrats have rejected the GOP funding plan twice in 24 hours, refusing to accept any bill that doesn't extend enhanced Obamacare tax subsidies from the COVID-19 pandemic era, which are set to expire at year's end, with the next Senate vote unlikely until Friday due to Yom Kippur recess. ICE deportations to continue during gov 't shutdown Despite the federal government shutdown the Department of Homeland Security confirmed that Immigration and Customs Enforcement will continue deportation operations, arrests, and hiring of new agents under funding from the "One Big Beautiful Bill," Recent arrests highlight ongoing enforcement : Just hours before the shutdown, ICE agents arrested multiple illegal immigrants across the country, including individuals convicted of sexual assault of a child in Texas, child cruelty in California, second-degree murder in Los Angeles, assault with a dangerous weapon in Massachusetts, and alien smuggling. Rising violence against ICE agents : The agency faces increased threats with assaults against ICE agents reportedly up over 1,000%, including a September sniper attack at a Dallas ICE facility that killed two detainees, with the shooter leaving writings about wanting to "give ICE agents real terror" and inscribing "anti-ICE" on shell casings. Political tensions over ICE operations : DHS Assistant Secretary Tricia McLaughlin criticized Democratic politicians for calling ICE agents "Nazi Gestapo" and "kidnappers" while putting officers' families under financial strain during the shutdown, asserting "the deportations will continue" and the agency will prioritize "the safety of the American people FIRST." It’s clear that Republicans are doing whatever they can to cheat and win:
* In **Texas** , manipulated district lines drawn in the August special session could help Republicans achieve Donald Trump’s explicit goal of picking up five seats ahead of the 2026 midterms.

* In **Missouri** , another special session forced through a new gerrymandered map that is designed to add an additional GOP House seat.

* **Ohio** is currently using a map that the Ohio Supreme Court rejected as unconstitutionally gerrymandered. As leaders work to redraw this maps as per their state constitution, Republican Senator Bernie Moreno is pushing for a map that ups GOP control, potentially disenfranchising millions of voters, especially from communities of color.

Our partners are fighting back in court in Texas and Missouri to prevent these gerrymanders from going into effect. We’re actively tracking legislative activity in Ohio. And we’re ready to act in the other 47 states to prevent Republicans from taking away our voting rights.
[**We will not let extreme, unfair maps tip the scales for Republicans. clean_body: Every dollar can protect the will of the people in November 2026. | “At this stage in the game, the House looks like it’s going to be more competitive than we had thought, and redistricting is a main driver of that.” — Scott Tranter, Decision Desk HQ The Hill, 9/21/25 Thanks to unfair, undemocratic tricks, the 2026 election is going to be tight as a coin toss. Republicans are desperate, Peter, and looking at every state they can to redraw maps and tip the scales in their favor. Here’s the good news, Peter: Despite the far right’s anti-democracy trickery, we’re still in the race for control. And we have over a year to go. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = It’s clear that Republicans are doing whatever they can to cheat and win: In Texas , manipulated district lines drawn in the August special session could help Republicans achieve Donald Trump’s explicit goal of picking up five seats ahead of the 2026 midterms. In Missouri , another special session forced through a new gerrymandered map that is designed to add an additional GOP House seat. Ohio is currently using a map that the Ohio Supreme Court rejected as unconstitutionally gerrymandered. As leaders work to redraw this maps as per their state constitution, Republican Senator Bernie Moreno is pushing for a map that ups GOP control, potentially disenfranchising millions of voters, especially from communities of color. Our partners are fighting back in court in Texas and Missouri to prevent these gerrymanders from going into effect. We’re actively tracking legislative activity in Ohio. And we’re ready to act in the other 47 states to prevent Republicans from taking away our voting rights. = — The NDRC Team = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States ** if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

Team, At Fight Like Hell PAC, we’re working hard to help win elections for candidates who will make a real difference in peoples’ lives. Michigan will be one of the most critical battleground states in the country, and we’re hitting the ground running. Over the weekend, we held our first training of the election cycle for Michigan candidates and staff to share best practices and make sure they run the strongest, most authentic campaigns possible. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116403969/573310641/-1313101069?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251001_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTRiMDcwOTItMTM5Zi1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZyqsrECZ5c0VtMOgbXMpy-qSYutmwoZDPP-1epdHHG4=) Attendees had the opportunity to listen to elected officials, like my good friend Congresswoman Debbie Dingell, and practitioners with years of campaign experience. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116403972/573310643/-1313101069?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251001_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTRiMDcwOTItMTM5Zi1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZyqsrECZ5c0VtMOgbXMpy-qSYutmwoZDPP-1epdHHG4=) Future leaders attended breakout sessions that covered everything from fundraising, messaging, to even managing day-to-day life on a campaign. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116403975/573310647/-1313101069?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251001_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTRiMDcwOTItMTM5Zi1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZyqsrECZ5c0VtMOgbXMpy-qSYutmwoZDPP-1epdHHG4=) The energy in the room was inspiring, and it reminded me exactly why we started this grassroots movement in the first place. **This is what Fight Like Hell PAC is all about, and it’s powered by people like you.** But the road ahead will be tough. We’ve got to keep organizing, keep training, keep working, and keep reaching for a better future. And all along the way, you’d better believe we’ll make time for a selfie. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116403978/573310649/-1313101069?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251001_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTRiMDcwOTItMTM5Zi1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZyqsrECZ5c0VtMOgbXMpy-qSYutmwoZDPP-1epdHHG4=) **[Help fuel our movement to train even more candidates and win races up and down the ballot. clean_body: | | | | | Friend, I won't sugar coat it: this politico article should be a wake up call to Republicans. George Soros, the DNC, and the Liberal unions are bankrolling Gavin Newsom's Proposition 50 power grab to let Democrats redraw Californias congressional maps without a census and steal 5-7 GOP house seats. This is the most critical race in 2025, and it could end President Trumps agenda in Congress. The Democrats are flooding this race with over $100 million from Soros, the DNC, and the liberal unions to rig California’s maps and export their radical policies in California nationwide—open borders, high taxes, and woke nonsense. If Prop 50 passes on November 4th, Democrats will: Flip the house next year Impeach President Trump Reverse the Trump agenda Last year, over 6.3 million Californians voted for me in the senate race —the most ever for a Republican in our state’s history. Now, my You Gotta Believe PAC** is fighting to turn out those over 6.3 million Garvey voters to vote NO on Prop 50 and protect our independent redistricting commission. Your donation will fuel targeted ads, door-to-door outreach, and voter mobilization to rally my team of over 6.3 million supporters to the polls. | | | | | | | Together, we’ll mobilize a huge grassroots effort to stop Soros and Newsom and save Trump’s agenda.Lets play hardball, | | PAID FOR BY YOU GOTTA BELIEVE PAC P.O. | | Friend, It’s the premier conservative event of the year – our annual **Reagan Dinner** is back! **When:****Saturday, November 1, 2025****Time:****Dinner at 7:00 PM****Where:****NW Events, 2900 NE Century Blvd, Hillsboro, OR 97124** Join Republicans from across Oregon for an unforgettable evening of fellowship, inspiration, and a renewed commitment to restoring conservative leadership in our state. **_Featured Speakers:_**
* **U.S. Senator Markwayne Mullin:** bringing a national perspective and conservative vision straight to Oregon.
* **Chris Dudley:** former Portland Trail Blazer and community leader.
* **Chael Sonnen:** UFC legend and proud Oregon conservative voice.

**Don’t miss this incredible opportunity to hear from national and local leaders, connect with fellow Republicans, and stand united as we prepare for the critical battles ahead.**

name: Brian Lenney
subject: They spent nearly $400K to stop me...
body:
LOL, didn't work.

| |
---|---|---
|
# They spent nearly $400K to stop me...
### LOL, didn't work.
| | | [Brian Lenney](https://substack.com/@brianlenney)
---
| Oct 1
---
| [](https://substack.com/@brianlenney)
---
Look, I really hate doing this...
I mean it. I'd rather be fishing with my kids or annoying lobbyists in committee hearings than writing a fundraising email.
But here's the reality: The Idaho Republican primary is coming up in May 2026. And if I want to stay in the statehouse fighting for individual rights, blocking bureaucratic overreach, and being the guy who still hasn't even met the Governor (yes, really, but I got him to sign all my bills this year anyway), I need your help.
_**You woke up during the "pandemic" and realized Idaho isn't as conservative as you thought it was.**_
So did I.
That's when everything changed for me. I saw what needed to be done, and I decided someone had to do it. Not for status. Not to climb some political ladder (this is something I _do_ , not someone _I am)_.
I'm just a regular guy who happens to have a big mouth and the willingness to use it.
The establishment knows this. That's why they dumped nearly $400,000 against me last year. Yep! Almost four hundred thousand dollars trying to get rid of one loud, principled conservative who won't play their game.
I won anyway. By double digits. Four times in a row.
And then in 2025, I did something they didn't think was possible: I got nearly ALL my bills passed. How? I didn't compromise my principles. I just... changed my tactics.
Check out what I personally SPONSORED that got SIGNED INTO LAW in 2025:
**A few of my bills:**
* Combated lawfare (SLAPP lawsuits) to protect free speech (S1001)
* Permanently banned mask mandates (H32)
* Reduced power of Idaho's public health districts (S1031)
* Curbed Health & Welfare bureaucrats' overreach after $15 million child care budget overrun (H90)
* Made Dept. of Health & Welfare bureau chiefs fireable (S1052)
* Sponsored several transparency and accountability bills to keep government efficient (H312, H215, H222, H113, H358)

**A few bills I cosponsored and/or supported:**
* School choice tax credit, empowering parents over bureaucrats (H93)
* Parents must opt IN to sex education, not opt out (H239)
* Preventing indecent exposure like we saw at "Nampa PRIDE" (H270)
* Keeping men out of women's locker rooms (H264)
* Death penalty for pedophiles (H380)
* Firing squad for death penalty cases (H37)
* Fixed vaccine exemptions to favor parents (S1179)
* Made Ivermectin available over the counter (S1211)
* Medical Ethics Defense Act (H59)
* Medicaid Reform and Cost Containment Act (H345)
* Raised grocery tax credit, cutting taxes by over $400 million (H231)
* Medical Freedom Act protecting Idahoans in public AND private sectors from forced medical mandates (S1210)
* Eliminated DEI from Idaho higher education (S1198)

Cool, right?
(And I did all of this while the establishment probably wished I'd just shut up and go away)
Here's the thing: I don't serve the lobby class, the Governor, or the bureaucrats. I serve Idaho residents, full stop (and selfishly, I do this for my kids and grandkids future).
Now, will the Governor and his establishment friends dump another $400K against me this time? After I proved I could win AND get things done, maybe they'll think twice this time. But maybe they won't.
What I DO know is that a guy with my big mouth will definitely draw opposition. I already have a Democrat challenger signed up. And look, I'll beat the Democrat. We both know it. Idaho District 13 is solid red.
But here's what keeps me up at night: the moderate/liberal Republican who'll (likely) run against me in the primary wearing a conservative costume. You know the type. Says all the right things in mailers. Has a nice smile. Talks about "working together" and "getting things done," oh and "common sense."
Then they get to Boise and vote however the Governor and the lobbyists tell them to vote.
That's the real threat. Not the Democrat who's honest about what they believe. The wolf in sheep's clothing who'll promise you the moon in May and deliver you to the establishment in January.
Out of all 105 legislators in Idaho, I have the most fun doing this. Real happy warrior vibes. And I can do that because I don't care what "they" think about me. I care about doing what's right in God's eyes, in the Constitution's eyes, and for the people who sent me there.
I'm not there to get wined and dined by lobbyists or bow down to the Governor. I take out yes-men in elections because Idaho deserves fighters, not followers.
So here's the ask:
_**Will you help me STAY where I am?**_
Money in campaigns just goes to marketing (mailers, signs, door hangers, ads, stuff like that). Basic blocking and tackling to get the message out.
They had $400K. I had you. And we won.
But we have to do it again in May 2026.
I'm asking you to chip in $50, $250, $500, $2,000 or whatever amount you can afford today to help me fight off the establishment and win the May 2026 primary.
**» [CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://substack.com/redirect/85c80fa3-febc-440c-92af-c1bb0066c730?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
I took out a liberal Republican in the last two primaries, and I hope to do it again if anyone steps up besides my Democrat challenger.
I sincerely appreciate you.
And I sincerely hate asking for money.
But if we want to keep a loud, principled, and EFFECTIVE conservative in the Idaho statehouse who actually gets bills passed without selling out, this is what it takes.
Let's win this thing in May.
Stay frosty,
Brian
**P.S.** I won the 2025 Canyon County Senator of the Year award, earned CPAC's Award for Conservative Excellence, and got one of the highest ratings from Club for Growth for driving economic growth. They spent $400K trying to stop me. We beat them with grassroots support. Let's do it again.
**P.P.S.** Look, I'll be blunt about what happens if me and my conservative friends lose these primaries to establishment Republicans. Picture this dystopian scenario: The Governor and his department heads get EVERYTHING they want, lobbyists write the bills, bureaucrats run wild with your tax dollars, and you get breadcrumbs and a pat on the head for being a good little constituent. Mask mandates? Back on the table. Parental rights? "We'll think about it." Your money? "The government knows how to spend it better than you do." DEI back in our universities? "It's just common sense." Yeah, no thanks. Not on my watch.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b5d18fb2-c97c-4ee0-af0e-710271c51ecf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
(C) 2025 Brian Lenney
[Unsubscribe](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9icmlhbmxlbm5leS5zdWJzdGFjay5jb20vYWN0aW9uL2Rpc2FibGVfZW1haWw_.4VF-2ukHKEwNKHfJzW47yEk4dEGhRYILSxKm-44RBoo?)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/16af08da-0e54-4aaf-b0ae-b2743ac364f1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[](https://substack..GLyN-YsdrqEGjrYYbGuXF3CsAr4D-jP4fpwxVuomvaM?)

body:
We’re in this together.

Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/lNYIdkhPikOBrh6RGc-KWg2?unsubscribedata=f%2FKIelovSGo%2F1yrLVKmzvFrN60lSs4dEjOgCgsQnlYBZ%2Fd%2FRYsH3ikRxASeyE8WniXcTVmTgKxoRYIUzKaGdYSvmZ%2B0TFPBm78%2BUh69FEHfGj2uP2BYZsaLBSuap88Aa2m9GIu6t6%2FxKEl%2B1FgrRrc0rM4xUcrBj8vipcHsTRDUk%2BmmUFqt1aPbcpvRHATU5XnpNJm1rhVR20pU1Vmnpn1C8rBXmdkkZRY9X1vu30jt07xtUe2SvE4x8BOOpl%2BL4gNH2fKCYD2MELlQN9iWj7oT4akHWm%2BiSQRkrRn9drGR0uR7pH1VEXL%2F7gVHf6NRhOMn33%2F7BjK1uWzvz6xYhTPSHymSVq7ZDXkfKGJxot1hj%2BVIX%2FMtiHsTa9A0bXxpKjEs49CW8hu6NDmNCsze9wLje70w52IcPznpAijSULt4%3D)

It’s Gabe with some news: **we hit our end-of-quarter fundraising goal!** From the moment we launched this campaign last month, the response has been overwhelming in the best way. It’s clear: people across southern New Mexico are showing up to defend our democracy, our communities, and the values we all share. Together, we’ve won this seat twice. We know we can do it again, but this race is shaping up to be the most competitive we’ve faced. The NRCC is quietly backing our new MAGA opponent, and national groups are already pouring money into this district. They see an opportunity — and they’re going all in to flip NM-02. But here’s the thing: we’ve never relied on big checks or special interests. We’ve built our campaigns the right way — with support from people like you, who care deeply about our communities and the future we’re all fighting for. We all feel the weight of this moment. Our democracy, our lands, our healthcare, our rights — it’s all on the line. I believe in this district, I believe in you, and I know that together, we can win this fight — again. Onwards together, Gabe
* * *

name: New Dems
subject: Tell Republicans to reopen the government, lower costs, and protect health care »
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Democrat Coalition Action Fund
body:
Add your signature ASAP

| Earlier this year, MAGA Republicans passed the largest cut to Medicaid in history.

At the end of the summer, Trump proposed slashing healthcare _again_ which would raise premiums for 22 million Americans and put thousands of federal employees' jobs at risk.

**And just this past week, Republicans in Congress pushed the country into a shutdown rather than working on a bipartisan solution to lower costs and protect millions of American’s healthcare.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116404679/573312948/-2049238687?refcode=NDCAF_20251001_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGFhZTMzMy0xNjlmLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nCskr6iMLNcDZOMy8WhR-eVGPdlbPrFCh92Cckt4Nr8=&emci=6a0c9a6a-f19e-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=28aae333-169f-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=48524772) | [_ADD YOUR SIGNATURE NOW:_ Tell Republicans to reopen the government, lower costs and protect healthcare »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116404680/573312949/-2049238687?refcode=NDCAF_20251001_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGFhZTMzMy0xNjlmLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nCskr6iMLNcDZOMy8WhR-eVGPdlbPrFCh92Cckt4Nr8=&emci=6a0c9a6a-f19e-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=28aae333-169f-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=48524772)
---
**With the House, Senate, and White House under their control, the blame rests squarely on them.** While Democrats stayed in Washington fighting to end the crisis, _Republicans went home on vacation._

**What could have been avoided has now become a crisis.** And now our economy, national security, and essential services are all at risk and the American people are paying the price.

That’s why we’re launching an emergency petition demanding to reopen the government with the guarantee of lower costs and healthcare protections for the American people.

name: Sharice (personal)
subject: Grateful
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
This has been one of those months when there was so much news, it felt overwhelming

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116404689/573312960/-240735101?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDlkZmE1OC0xNjlmLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P2h6hncH7ivOciA8W9XalyAT3KL1-97qwzcFFqnfJBQ=) This has been one of those months when there was so much news, it felt overwhelming. In Kansas, Republicans have plowed ahead on a scheme to gerrymander me out of this seat. And that’s to say nothing of the chaos in DC. As I write this, we’re a few hours into a government shutdown that is occurring as a direct result of Republican leadership’s refusal to work across the aisle on a deal that protects Kansas families from a costly shutdown. My heart breaks for the thousands of federal employees who are either working without knowing when their next paycheck will come, and those who have been furloughed entirely — all because National Republicans have refused to come to the bargaining table and let hardworking Americans continue to access the health care they need. With so much going wrong in our country right now, I know just how easy it would be for folks to tune out this gerrymandering push happening in Kansas. To throw in the towel and just accept it as _another_ thing that’s gone wrong. **But that’s not what happened.** This team has stepped up in more ways than I ever could have imagined. So many of you have spoken out, contacted your state legislators, and yes, chipped in to help our campaign push back in every way possible. Now, the Kansas GOP _knows_ they’re playing with fire. They _know_ if they keep pushing Donald Trump’s gerrymander in Topeka, they’ll get a fight they never expected — a fight I know we can win. **And that’s all thanks to you.** For now, I’ll leave you with this: _Thank you._ [_**And finally, if you didn’t get the chance to chip in ahead of our End-of-Quarter deadline, please know that your support is still appreciated, and to be completely candid, absolutely essential. If you’re in a position to give amid all this uncertainty, anything you’re able to contribute goes a long, long way right now at this critical moment as we fight to protect this seat from being gerrymandered out of existence.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116404690/573312961/769548894?refcode=email_100125_grateful&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDlkZmE1OC0xNjlmLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P2h6hncH7ivOciA8W9XalyAT3KL1-97qwzcFFqnfJBQ=) | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116404691/573312962/-1213029538?refcode=email_100125_grateful&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDlkZmE1OC0xNjlmLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P2h6hncH7ivOciA8W9XalyAT3KL1-97qwzcFFqnfJBQ=)

Sharice
