name: Andrea Salinas
subject: We’re calling on Republicans to work with us to reopen the government
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Andrea Salinas for Oregon
body:
House Republicans cancelled votes and skipped town just before last night’s funding deadline.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116404794/573313324/-1080040549?refcode=email-header&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTVlZTYwYi0xNzlmLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Eal2Q9BYU9uUNVYuRd3lqJ0PNGlOXs5sETRb9dFH3g=) Friend, despite holding the House, the Senate, and the White House, Donald Trump and the Republican Party failed to pass a budget bill through Congress in time to prevent a government shutdown. And it gets worse: **Instead of working to prevent a shutdown, House Republicans cancelled votes and skipped town — _over a week before last night’s funding deadline._** **[Can you sign onto my petition and join me in calling on the GOP to come back to D.C. and get to work on passing a deal to reopen the government?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116404795/573313325/-1753458613?refcode=email_100125_shutdown&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTVlZTYwYi0xNzlmLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Eal2Q9BYU9uUNVYuRd3lqJ0PNGlOXs5sETRb9dFH3g=&emci=c65ee60b-179f-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=ce5ee60b-179f-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=5643047)** | | **[SIGN ON →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116404796/573313326/-1753458613?refcode=email_100125_shutdown&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTVlZTYwYi0xNzlmLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Eal2Q9BYU9uUNVYuRd3lqJ0PNGlOXs5sETRb9dFH3g=&emci=c65ee60b-179f-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=ce5ee60b-179f-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=5643047)**
---
We’re asking them to come back to Washington and work with Democrats to reopen the government ASAP.
We’re asking them to cancel the massive cuts to health care they passed earlier this year.
We’re asking them to stop EVEN MORE Americans from getting priced out of their health care plans.
**Access to affordable health care is a matter of life and death for hundreds of thousands of families in Oregon and around the country.** And that’s exactly why I refuse to go along with Republicans’ scheme to keep raising costs and kick struggling American families off of their health care.
**[So if you agree that House Republicans should stop playing politics, come to the table, and work out a spending plan that reopens the federal government while protecting your health care coverage — add your name to our petition and amplify our message for the Republican party →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116404797/573313327/-1753458613?refcode=email_100125_shutdown&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTVlZTYwYi0xNzlmLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Eal2Q9BYU9uUNVYuRd3lqJ0PNGlOXs5sETRb9dFH3g=&emci=c65ee60b-179f-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=ce5ee60b-179f-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=5643047)**

name: Josh Harder
subject: A heartfelt thank you
body:
and my thoughts on the government shutdown. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116404876/573313595/-1860252395?refcode=-header-&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTUwODcyMDUtMTc5Zi1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=7AKIKv44j2rbA9f3GWmv-EaByAN7GcR4ZTxPHIz1mN0=) | Hi Peter, First, I want to start with a heartfelt thank you. Because of supporters like you, we reached 98% of our end-of-quarter goal. Honestly, I didn’t think we’d get that close, so it was a real relief when my team shared the final numbers. I’m very, very grateful. Unfortunately, this news is bittersweet given the national news of the day. **The United States government is officially shut down.** As you know, healthcare premiums are set to double next year if Congress doesn’t act. This is a huge problem, especially in communities like mine. And yet Republicans either don’t want to deal with it, or simply don’t care. Either way, I’m incredibly frustrated it’s gotten to this point. Now they have a decision to make - are they willing to come to the table and hash out an agreement or are they going to let our military, veterans and government workers suffer? I truly hope a deal can be brokered soon. The last thing our families need is more instability. I’ll keep you updated as this process unfolds. — Josh
---
* * *

name: Janelle Bynum
subject: healthcare is non-negotiable
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Janelle Bynum for Congress
body:
Republicans in Washington shut down the government last night after failing to come to an agreement on a funding bill that would put hard working Americans first.

It’s official: Republicans in Washington shut down the government last night after failing to come to an agreement on a funding bill that would put hard working Americans first. I spoke to KATU about the shutdown and the importance of funding resources that Americans rely on: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116404979/573313870/1565084121?refcode=email_100125_shutdown&amounts=5,25,50,75,100,250,500&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDJhYmYyMjktMTg5Zi1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=20vRrjnJX71AdgsIdjI1ZksbclXzFifoKtujbPCD68o=) Democrats spent weeks trying to negotiate to avoid a shutdown, but instead of coming to the table with a clean bill that represents the needs of Oregonians and people across the country, Speaker Johnson sent my Republican colleagues home. Now, they’re placing the blame for this shutdown entirely on us — _and they’re even running attack ads against me for it!_ **Let’s get it straight: Republicans control the House, the Senate, and the presidency. If they can’t pass a budget that supports the average working American, protects our healthcare, and doesn’t give our money to billionaires, it’s on them.** Healthcare is nothing to play with. I’ve held 18 town halls this year across the district, and I’ve heard over and over again that healthcare is non-negotiable. So I can’t — _and I won’t_ — vote for a budget that doesn’t put Oregonians first. [_**It’s time Republicans stop playing political games and start delivering real solutions — and that’s exactly what I’m fighting for. I’m standing up in the House to ensure we reach a deal that centers the American people and safeguards healthcare. This will be a tough fight, so if you can, I’d appreciate your support in this critical moment.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116404980/573313871/1565084121?refcode=email_100125_shutdown&amounts=5,25,50,75,100,250,500&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDJhYmYyMjktMTg5Zi1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=20vRrjnJX71AdgsIdjI1ZksbclXzFifoKtujbPCD68o=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116404981/573313872/-629675555?refcode=email_100125_shutdown&amounts=5,25,50,75,100,250,500&amount=5&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDJhYmYyMjktMTg5Zi1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=20vRrjnJX71AdgsIdjI1ZksbclXzFifoKtujbPCD68o=)

body:
While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/dAfRehWDrkq5GdVTndjWgA2?unsubscribedata=USG%2Bb3nKwqUMyfQ6TIars85f18SLbs45g9rqDupL9LcYh%2FmJ%2FOZGrkl%2BIghUeh8UZ%2FJYy%2FetLPS3yGjc2X0DITUzzhUrVCOYQIo6ZpTGuUpTiHyfVV%2B3yym0Gi66aCVsYGAStHkk%2BZnwS4rGwYhOLPMDQhbIXzmXhvmrVRZ00dcLCsuwXooVZoUbbI6e0eFSe7wyA%2F85IMTyD9SLZ6yFq1VYFeADsBqme7hrQNMYQBgtuThFyeVM1cD8iTHZxZaWX%2FtWo1n5oqhfLH9JkKuq3Balb3mN9jco2F9b8SyG2edp1cbqP%2FXpzQNGh2KmTaRj%2FP%2BnP7xiOc1LivkD%2FvCtVLrLi2oj2aHrE%2Fw5X9VY8bij5n5F7%2Bo2%2Bpw38mGM%2BXzrjlwoySKcLdHT%2Brwm%2FaIK1EDwG71R%2FsVQs9gOYCb0rHuD8lVhY9%2BUjDo4GFJhhSlm]

# [#]
Hi, it’s Raul.

I’m overwhelmed by the response from you and everyone who pulled through to help us meet our end-of-quarter fundraising goal.

Thanks to your grassroots support, we showed the strength of our movement.

Our ability to come together and unite for the values we believe in during these chaotic and challenging times is what continues to give me faith and clarity as we push forward.

And while the Trump administration is hellbent on removing science and reasoning from critical government decisions, you're letting them know that this is unacceptable.

Together, we’re sending a clear message: we’re done with the dysfunction and conspiracies. We demand leaders who, unlike Donald Trump and RFK Jr., can make sound decisions grounded in science to improve the lives of all Californians.

We still have a long road to the midterms, but because of you, we're prepared to fight every step of the way.

With gratitude,

Raul Ruiz

In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress.

subject: Closer to Justice: Ninth Circuit Speeds Up, Washington Dems Stand With Zahid

# [Closer to Justice: Ninth Circuit Speeds Up, Washington Dems Stand With Zahid](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3260111&post_id=175063130&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc1MDYzMTMwLCJpYXQiOjE3NTkzNTkxMDYsImV4cCI6MTc2MTk1MTEwNiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMyNjAxMTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.46IG8koh7dp2uZW5QLcUfVo7B8zvQpYoWoSIfIU28uw)
### With the Court moving quicker and the Democratic Party speaking out, our fight grows stronger. Now it's up to us to keep the momentum.
| | [Melissa Chaudhry](https://substack.com/@melissa4congress)
---
| Oct 1
---
| [](https://substack.com/@melissa4congress)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3260111&post_id=175063130&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc1MDYzMTMwLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1OTM1OTEwNiwiZXhwIjoxNzYxOTUxMTA2LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMzI2MDExMSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.hPYmQ5MRw-4_XeOU0H1ZWElrQ9SmVJbnBRY6rl48A6o&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3260111&post_id=175063130&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc1MDYzMTMwLCJpYXQiOjE3NTkzNTkxMDYsImV4cCI6MTc2MTk1MTEwNiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMyNjAxMTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.46IG8koh7dp2uZW5QLcUfVo7B8zvQpYoWoSIfIU28uw&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3260111&post_id=175063130&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc1MDYzMTMwLCJpYXQiOjE3NTkzNTkxMDYsImV4cCI6MTc2MTk1MTEwNiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMyNjAxMTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.46IG8koh7dp2uZW5QLcUfVo7B8zvQpYoWoSIfIU28uw)
---
| | [](https://substack..9YQ3hd3seXd-zv-9deraC4g3uFtBL7rSgW26brBaTm0?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/melissa4congress/p/closer-to-justice-ninth-circuit-speeds?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Friends,
We've received word that the Ninth Circuit Court of Appeals has granted our Motion to Expedite. We now expect a decision by around the end of the year; maybe January.
It's not fast enough -- but it's not a full year of waiting, either.
* * *
In other news, the Washington State Democrats overwhelmingly passed [this resolution](https://substack.com/redirect/5039ce58-cb41-4e21-9084-a38fccfe8576?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in support of Zahid, calling for his immediate release and an end to the unlawful detention of law-abiding American residents, _especially_ when political targeting is involved. Huge shout-out of gratitude to them for being on the right side of history.
* * *
Zahid continues to meet people and learn their stories, inside.
He's told me about a Mexican-origin man who lived in New Mexico for over 20 years, raising a family, running a landscaping business. He was grabbed a couple of blocks away from home one morning, leaving his wife and daughter abandoned without warning or word, and with no income to pay their bills.
He told me about a man (the women are kept separately, they rarely interact) of Iraqi origin who lived in Yakima for almost 30 years. In the early '00s, he apparently made a copy of a CD. (Remember when that was a big deal?) Unlike the millions of other people who did that and got a slap on the wrist or less, he got the book thrown at him and was put in federal prison for two years. He did his time, was released, and came back to his family - where he continued to work hard (at a local dairy, if I recall correctly), put food on the table, and continue his life as a well-respected salt-of-the-earth member of his community... until ICE grabbed him, during a routine (and required) immigration "check-in" appointment. Leaving his four kids without their father.
Another, a young man of Turkish ancestry who grew up in Ukraine, had applied for _and been granted_ asylum here, in the past few years (since the war). He was starting to study medicine and wanted to be a doctor in a rural community, because he knew what it was like to need care and be unable to afford or access it. When his father died, in Turkey, he traveled for the funeral. ("You don't understand... in my culture - I _have_ to go.") On his return, his green card was confiscated at the airport, his asylum was revoked, and he was grabbed and put straight into the detention center. He chose to sign away his claims to residency and accept deportation - his brother flew in to help his family sell everything and leave as well.
_do these really sound like "the worst of the worst?" _
... _and if you 're reading this, you probably don't need convincing - please forward this to someone who does._
* * *
The battle lines are shaping up. The sides are becoming clear.
One side has racism, power, money, and an increasingly large paramilitary force made up of people whose economic stability and future prospects depend on doing what they're told without asking pesky moral or ethical questions. It also - fortunately, perhaps - has incompetence and arrogance at the highest levels, which tends to (ahem) reduce morale. But it also rewards and incentivizes extremism, and we shouldn't take lightly what extremists will do on their own initiative if they feel emboldened. Putting the genie of racist violence back in the bottle is going to be a _**lot**_ harder than letting it out was.
The other side - that's us - has genuine courage, strength of heart, respect for one another, and dedication to _**shared humanity**_ as well as justice, truth, and freedom. We have living and ancestral memories of resistance movements across different cultures, generations, and continents. We have the numbers, we have the competence, we have the sort of grounded self-confidence that comes from knowing our principles and knowing we're on the right side of history. We lack (broadly speaking) organization, money, and power - but we're working on grassroots solutions to all of that.
The other side leans heavily into surveillance and bureaucratic control, and increasingly-consolidated military control - across whatever agencies will take their orders (and after Quantico, I'm heartened that perhaps the actual military...won't.). They're reliant on us being (and staying) fractured, scattered, confused, isolated, broke, and afraid.
Fortunately... we're not.
Fortunately, we've all learned the lessons of history and decided a long time ago that apartheid isn't our thing, Nazism belongs in the dustbin of history, racism and fascism are a stain on humanity's soul, and our future belongs to this good earth, each other, and the goodness of all living things. We're dedicated to making a better future for everyone, and we are - increasingly - clear in our understanding of what stands in the way. We're also rapidly rediscovering our personal power to _do something about it._
In the end - if I had to place a good bet - I bet that goodness will win. Racist extremism consumes its own future, in the end.
The problem isn't "in the end," it's what happens along the way. Every variable is under our influence. How many good, hardworking people will this country lose? How many people will be killed or imprisoned or economically devastated by those who've seized power? How many ICE agents and disaffected soldiers will be able to find another way to make a good living, and a good life - and thereby have a path to escape the economic seduction of enforcement-as-a-career? How many people who were manipulated by MAGA will we be able to help escape the cult? How much will our State governments protect us? How many vulnerable families will be helped to escape this madness safely? How many won't?
* * *
Whatever you're doing, _**thank you.**_
Whatever you feel the whisper that you could be doing more of, _**please do.**_
This is a long game AND it's an urgent one.
Remember to unplug, and make meaningful, real-life connections with other human beings.
We're all in this together. We need each other. _You 're not alone._

clean_body: With the Court moving quicker and the Democratic Party speaking out, our fight grows stronger. Now it's up to us to keep the momentum. | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? With the Court moving quicker and the Democratic Party speaking out, our fight grows stronger. Now it's up to us to keep the momentum. | | | Oct 1 | | | | | | | | | | | | Friends, We've received word that the Ninth Circuit Court of Appeals has granted our Motion to Expedite. We now expect a decision by around the end of the year; maybe January. It's not fast enough -- but it's not a full year of waiting, either. In other news, the Washington State Democrats overwhelmingly passed in support of Zahid, calling for his immediate release and an end to the unlawful detention of law-abiding American residents, especially when political targeting is involved. Huge shout-out of gratitude to them for being on the right side of history. Zahid continues to meet people and learn their stories, inside. He's told me about a Mexican-origin man who lived in New Mexico for over 20 years, raising a family, running a landscaping business. He was grabbed a couple of blocks away from home one morning, leaving his wife and daughter abandoned without warning or word, and with no income to pay their bills. He told me about a man (the women are kept separately, they rarely interact) of Iraqi origin who lived in Yakima for almost 30 years. In the early '00s, he apparently made a copy of a CD. (Remember when that was a big deal?) Unlike the millions of other people who did that and got a slap on the wrist or less, he got the book thrown at him and was put in federal prison for two years. He did his time, was released, and came back to his family - where he continued to work hard (at a local dairy, if I recall correctly), put food on the table, and continue his life as a well-respected salt-of-the-earth member of his community... until ICE grabbed him, during a routine (and required) immigration "check-in" appointment. Leaving his four kids without their father. Another, a young man of Turkish ancestry who grew up in Ukraine, had applied for and been granted asylum here, in the past few years (since the war). He was starting to study medicine and wanted to be a doctor in a rural community, because he knew what it was like to need care and be unable to afford or access it. When his father died, in Turkey, he traveled for the funeral. ("You don't understand... in my culture - I have to go.") On his return, his green card was confiscated at the airport, his asylum was revoked, and he was grabbed and put straight into the detention center. He chose to sign away his claims to residency and accept deportation - his brother flew in to help his family sell everything and leave as well. do these really sound like "the worst of the worst?" ... and if you 're reading this, you probably don't need convincing - please forward this to someone who does. The battle lines are shaping up. The sides are becoming clear. One side has racism, power, money, and an increasingly large paramilitary force made up of people whose economic stability and future prospects depend on doing what they're told without asking pesky moral or ethical questions. It also - fortunately, perhaps - has incompetence and arrogance at the highest levels, which tends to (ahem) reduce morale. But it also rewards and incentivizes extremism, and we shouldn't take lightly what extremists will do on their own initiative if they feel emboldened. Putting the genie of racist violence back in the bottle is going to be a lot harder than letting it out was. The other side - that's us - has genuine courage, strength of heart, respect for one another, and dedication to shared humanity as well as justice, truth, and freedom. We have living and ancestral memories of resistance movements across different cultures, generations, and continents. We have the numbers, we have the competence, we have the sort of grounded self-confidence that comes from knowing our principles and knowing we're on the right side of history. We lack (broadly speaking) organization, money, and power - but we're working on grassroots solutions to all of that. The other side leans heavily into surveillance and bureaucratic control, and increasingly-consolidated military control - across whatever agencies will take their orders (and after Quantico, I'm heartened that perhaps the actual military...won't.). They're reliant on us being (and staying) fractured, scattered, confused, isolated, broke, and afraid. Fortunately... we're not. Fortunately, we've all learned the lessons of history and decided a long time ago that apartheid isn't our thing, Nazism belongs in the dustbin of history, racism and fascism are a stain on humanity's soul, and our future belongs to this good earth, each other, and the goodness of all living things. We're dedicated to making a better future for everyone, and we are - increasingly - clear in our understanding of what stands in the way. We're also rapidly rediscovering our personal power to do something about it. In the end - if I had to place a good bet - I bet that goodness will win. Racist extremism consumes its own future, in the end. The problem isn't "in the end," it's what happens along the way. Every variable is under our influence. How many good, hardworking people will this country lose? How many people will be killed or imprisoned or economically devastated by those who've seized power? How many ICE agents and disaffected soldiers will be able to find another way to make a good living, and a good life - and thereby have a path to escape the economic seduction of enforcement-as-a-career? How many people who were manipulated by MAGA will we be able to help escape the cult? How much will our State governments protect us? How many vulnerable families will be helped to escape this madness safely? How many won't? Whatever you're doing, thank you. Whatever you feel the whisper that you could be doing more of, please do. This is a long game AND it's an urgent one. Remember to unplug, and make meaningful, real-life connections with other human beings. We're all in this together. We need each other. You 're not alone. | | ---|---|--- | | ---|---|--- You 're currently a free subscriber to "It's a Matter of Integrity" by Melissa Chaudhry. To support the mission and access the full experience, upgrade your subscription. | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Melissa Chaudhry 6727 Martin Luther King Jr Way S, Suite M, #1117 Seattle, WA 98118 ? ?

name: Gavin Newsom
subject: Make them pay
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yes on 50, The Election Rigging Response Act, Governor Newsom’s Ballot Measure Committee
body:
... for shutting down the government.

The government shutdown has understandably received a lot of attention today. It has our attention as well.
But for just a few moments, we are writing to ask you to return your focus to California.
People are already receiving ballots in California. Yes, votes being cast. And right now now, we are short of the budget goals we need in order to ensure victory.
If everyone reading this email chipped-in whatever extra they could afford, we would CRUSH our fundraising goals for the rest of the campaign and have the resources we need to WIN.
But not everyone gives. So we are asking - one more time - to return your focus to California and the importance of this ballot measure. The election is happening - and we won't win without your help.
**If you are looking for a way to make Donald Trump and Republicans pay for shutting down the government, winning here is something they will feel.**
[**Please use this link to contribute to help Gavin Newsom pass the Election Rigging Response Act in California. Our average contribution is $30. Many give more. Some give less. But every donation helps us win this election and gives Democrats a fair chance of taking back the House.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/erra-em?refcode=em251001-1&refcode2=2625_4767699_hEMeSy&akid=2625%2E4767699%2EhEMeSy)

name: Robert Garcia
subject: My new district
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
body:
I’m running to defend democracy
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116406201/573317826/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmM0MzdmNS0xYTlmLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wCWbGBC67YYeD6h_04YyikQHjT-gmcKQkZrqPzfAevE=)
Hi, it’s Democratic Congressman, Robert Garcia.
We're all seeing the news: Democracy is under attack.
Donald Trump and Texas MAGA extremists are using redistricting in Texas to rig the next midterm elections. But here in California, we’re fighting back. If Texas is going to punch, California will punch harder.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116406203/573317828/789508428?refcode=251001_RG_newdistrict-ob&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmM0MzdmNS0xYTlmLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wCWbGBC67YYeD6h_04YyikQHjT-gmcKQkZrqPzfAevE=)
We just learned about California’s new map – and I have big news: If passed, I’ll be running in the new 42nd District.
This district includes my hometown of Long Beach and stretches along the coast through Huntington Beach and Newport Beach.
**But I’ll be honest: this is a much tougher district.** In 2024, our district voted for Kamala Harris by 32 points. _Our new district voted for Kamala Harris by less than half that._
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116406205/573317831/789508428?refcode=251001_RG_newdistrict-ob&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmM0MzdmNS0xYTlmLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wCWbGBC67YYeD6h_04YyikQHjT-gmcKQkZrqPzfAevE=)
I love my current congressional district, but I understand the stakes. Democracy is on the line.
**So I’m ready to fight and run in this new, harder district. But I’m going to become a top target for national Republicans. They’re going to spend millions and pull out all the stops to try and defeat me – to silence _us._ **
Here’s what they don’t know: this amazing grassroots team is ready to fight back. Because that’s what this moment calls for: speaking out, getting involved, and fighting for a democracy that represents _all of us._

Robert

name: Everett Kelley, AFGE via United for Democracy
subject: Because of Trump’s war on workers, we have had to dip into our reserves as we’re facing the biggest crisis in our union’s history.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United for Democracy
body:
I’m the President of the American Federation of Government Employees, which represents many of those federal workers, and I want to tell you how we’re fighting back. | |
---
Peter, The federal government shut down at midnight on September 30, leaving federal workers with another chaotic mess in a year that was already filled with them. **I’m the President of the American Federation of Government Employees, which represents many of those federal workers, and I want to tell you how we’re fighting back.** Donald Trump swept into office with the richest man in the world, Elon Musk, in tow, and proceeded to insult the work of the 800,000 public servants who keep Social Security checks moving, care for our veterans, keep our drinking water safe, and so much more. Together, these billionaires forced out thousands of career staff, and now they’re going even further. **Before this shutdown started, we got news that the Trump Administration sees this crisis as an opportunity to kick us while we’re down.** [****](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsQNarR6PCR1lUtXpWTyhe6kmyRck622OlBzJdLojp_jEkyO9djHMVgzyFV2V5nwc3m3qcFEIJr65BBwA6RXdTTqBjYOL7tscEnKq8vpj9InBp8iJnlhpfOAZ5xREqpLY3PPmPq6tlVbH3eMGII0IREgTwS2gv8eWYMc9FrWUCHz3Izh8j5ErRSH1KwEpAomlKRuM5RT6db1-dOu8MHXXvVS5Gtnh3lDnCnq3Sr6d91LPOGEBAGqQvkKkfDSBdPa5a7sMxLqRjQYFVGVEFS7R34ZwjPn41455kFxzAlExc6sDkthLY6O3FcW_q8irMZNubpVgIBzQ9DjGimiouYTwXZ9K9EPcqNGAhpLOqCJyOIauhv4SZCUa2pBVX5gRy7_IKUhw_F1dVbiyrATQHIPVhAZkQARz_vBzGuk1WNXTiXdGFGKhuShTCQQfHGVAjMEY9R_3LQPzMDBrMu8dpqMrWzmZTksPyHZ6Ytynh4X0zlBVJXhJSX0_7vXjIPXepLGwqufMnqZ4Y8-YBUfjnBIwn-DeiUEQqNlg_x2EuWURbozbggb91U1C-jMZZsZo_a03U/4kd/usP260xORvCxRiPdVxQtXQ/h0/h001.YYVDGxibNiGiKcNm1AHfqE_COxQEUy8xHzqSlZrynF8) Announcing plans to fire potentially tens of thousands of federal employees simply because Congress and the administration are at odds on funding the government past the end of the fiscal year is **not only illegal – it’s immoral and unconscionable.** Federal employees dedicate their careers to public service―more than a third are military veterans―and the contempt being shown to them by this administration is appalling. **Let’s be clear:** Federal employees are not bargaining chips. They are veterans, caregivers, law enforcement officers, and neighbors who serve their country and fellow Americans every day. **They deserve stability and respect, not pink slips and political games.** [**These firings will be as unlawful as they will be chaotic. We’re not wasting any time―we filed a lawsuit to stop these firings before this shutdown even started. Can you donate $5 to the Federal Worker Defense Fund ] to help fund this legal challenge?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsQNarR6PCR1lUtXpWTyhe6kmyRck622OlBzJdLojp_jMaGH-Q36Lkl-NTfgvwh4WYkZWU-Ksvp6sWsFiBCO-dmZcH9Xb4iHF2-IzkDrhW1eboNgQDjaVhBdryBHtd1H9hrJ-ycr8Up-nF3M0hNtc0vXRQqS6L1HC1pS5d6Vt9RG_tbbs9z7iaZ6JFZYfVb9nQ9lyNVm7he7vZcupaO2gndYpFKUiBg2q5iJLg_v65fq-OdbClXu7QzFr-bVi5YccDOAdaBDk7NRMQWEAXsYapPSTlbHzyy5stgJeOOK7g6mKXlLJTM-jMvOFjFO3lsBU_8NgqNPYeYVRpQn2af6tZO0ji3xb5CUUmKRcgGawv6yooY8Itlm9lamptYYOigKtThbos0frKVBO8Rj-4pLWf6cmi_LWLzoOPwV_Xy8cNjXb_VeR2OHabqJSbxS4C_eoPWyNu8kAk77HFTSVeXH-_PqNe6tcM8aDqSGQDFvlBWxNXYFhRIrtz3wTe2IdHTN85Qi68mHmP7S9-bUc1quqWG4yoIrt7EmK3w6vsAmiGsAJgqMtVXtleQ5fP00ndtUiw/4kd/usP260xORvCxRiPdVxQtXQ/h1/h001.L5Ej3hG1C_n29sjmz63QtaEIWzJ4WkcTr-KdOA5nv90) **Here’s why we’re asking:** For decades, AFGE was able to collect dues from our members through paycheck deduction, just like most other unions. But in March, Donald Trump issued an executive order that barred agencies from cooperating in these standard dues deductions. **Because of Trump’s war on workers, we have had to dip into our reserves as we’re facing the biggest crisis in our union’s history.** This administration has repeatedly refused to follow the laws that govern the federal workforce. They have impounded Congressionally authorized funds, shuttered duly authorized agencies, and now they’re using this Congressional spat as another excuse to carry out their DOGE agenda. **We have to fight back.** [**Can you chip in $5 to stand up to Trump’s illegal mass firing scheme? We’re suing to stop the mass firing of America’s workers.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsQNarR6PCR1lUtXpWTyhe6kmyRck622OlBzJdLojp_jO2Rc5rVipGS1iS5jtbwNwwdAoL9fXsLEwe0O9wV8D0hoB-7Zexp7jghdfYnQIo1keNsxUgkjybn15e_trnvvADqrkdEq1rBVIII2v6ZRrrK9VWgZDjunRqLGBHTgi4jjwQeVzeTAyxXP-3wSe2-c4h5IvZgosZ2LJNUfGrCdgi-od4zk9wKmwidQtQ7wu6OtQiV4I4Vfb0niGfrA54dhmJTCtR7uG-9zcQLSoK7Ex-mOM5myBe9DKxLG3PR_Fayqyg8ha8ygmjAh0y8iCfnNJ34HuWJmSo0GmD6ztnsr2Ms01Q7h-eJ57dbACXiilLZbBOydnvND28ywC4Jzdf-kK4vhiHlz7ATc06gtqpWLo0QRqnwSuCXSDVE9jlkPMM3CHOBobGksODXpSMppEKDS21U-JBDwvWrd4UpEKaCGr3b7m0JTpMpj2BEdtytfOyAbNN_iHnGBNh0G8w3Hc3DQ00yzvOzwLBFr1OnxIaWLbG6STO8DpbTl9HTSfBvcDL4Yg6eXCBzxtoA7y8J-kw1p70/4kd/usP260xORvCxRiPdVxQtXQ/h2/h001.Oz4EvlwNdeF8GI9P-IP8T497CtMsSSMSc_d8pwdYicw) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, with 100% going directly to The Labor Force's Federal Worker Defense Fund_ | | | [Chip in $15 now](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsQNarR6PCR1lUtXpWTyhe6uBCbH_lmkKHJk7F1QxlJWkb4VxsYqRyuV4qx4uxaCPRSzp5WsyRaQGd7sTaiUeIGKk85GI7Q1kWuYl_MVulvCr3hmj2f4HEdTRSXU4j9tYpx33whkUXPHonA3omLYnEom3YcHqz4BgHiTzPSKk4l01L-1j5UY50RQ41TE43Ht3knRBjFo2hE21-EGnWHgwPN5WvY55K1m7lHf9StUfo9QTDHk1PP91d1W0FRktccbNsHY1ZC4dCkGAT6qvq147Aq1ECiYnrdSaoIAX4hcg5ZwCl_6rnMECIsb8X5QMn6geFDq4SfFPV3fsCfSw7Q0CTxQC9-syxz0z0TvhLc8DLJvSQmqD-Ry92LYKhY3x0Li-UCR3onzdk24T0a0RHGAIknMrHeBNsNjTD1pK9FGI_i4Z6ui95V9eMOxwhag0XQzNzzx8OB-mXFVTk8yol97XhpDN1Ec7PejGXHTn-c-19QFbMe35EOD4kn11gisYa7GTpvP14G1zAOG-3WL2oS8oSrWHpa4l8ZQy9JwuhBU9XbnpLZuJfYtz06mbwsTmQqySoKUjmW19wPffoC9ucjyBiM_vfP_ES5qBmHCyJz4yBHNQ/4kd/usP260xORvCxRiPdVxQtXQ/h3/h001.rlkcQwo8CIRxh-KuigqEeKCnZr41gMPaE5MfbqOAoQY)

clean_body: I’m the President of the American Federation of Government Employees, which represents many of those federal workers, and I want to tell you how we’re fighting back. | | Peter, The federal government shut down at midnight on September 30, leaving federal workers with another chaotic mess in a year that was already filled with them. I’m the President of the American Federation of Government Employees, which represents many of those federal workers, and I want to tell you how we’re fighting back. Donald Trump swept into office with the richest man in the world, Elon Musk, in tow, and proceeded to insult the work of the 800,000 public servants who keep Social Security checks moving, care for our veterans, keep our drinking water safe, and so much more. Together, these billionaires forced out thousands of career staff, and now they’re going even further. Before this shutdown started, we got news that the Trump Administration sees this crisis as an opportunity to kick us while we’re down. Announcing plans to fire potentially tens of thousands of federal employees simply because Congress and the administration are at odds on funding the government past the end of the fiscal year is not only illegal – it’s immoral and unconscionable. Federal employees dedicate their careers to public service―more than a third are military veterans―and the contempt being shown to them by this administration is appalling. Let’s be clear: Federal employees are not bargaining chips. They are veterans, caregivers, law enforcement officers, and neighbors who serve their country and fellow Americans every day. They deserve stability and respect, not pink slips and political games. [These firings will be as unlawful as they will be chaotic. We’re not wasting any time―we filed a lawsuit to stop these firings before this shutdown even started. Can you donate $5 to the Federal Worker Defense Fund ] to help fund this legal challenge?]() Here’s why we’re asking: For decades, AFGE was able to collect dues from our members through paycheck deduction, just like most other unions. But in March, Donald Trump issued an executive order that barred agencies from cooperating in these standard dues deductions. Because of Trump’s war on workers, we have had to dip into our reserves as we’re facing the biggest crisis in our union’s history. This administration has repeatedly refused to follow the laws that govern the federal workforce. They have impounded Congressionally authorized funds, shuttered duly authorized agencies, and now they’re using this Congressional spat as another excuse to carry out their DOGE agenda. We have to fight back. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, with 100% going directly to The Labor Force's Federal Worker Defense Fund | | | | | | | | | | I want to thank United for Democracy for giving me the chance to reach out to you. In solidarity, Everett Kelley President American Federation of Government Employees Paid for by United for Democracy. | | Sent via . name: Abdul El-Sayed
subject: Republicans have the majority, habibi
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abdul for U
body:
[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=em20251001-1033&t=1001&akid=1037%2E251025%2EsdXxAq ]Abdul for US Senate [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=em20251001-1033&t=1002&akid=1037%2E251025%2EsdXxAq ]Abdul for US Senate

Peter,

The federal government just shut down. Again.

Why? Because MAGA Republicans don’t know how to govern.

The last two shutdowns happened under Trump while Republicans controlled
Congress. We went four years without a single shutdown, and now, less than
one year into Trump’s second term, total dysfunction returns.

Yet, Trump is trying to push the blame onto the “Radical Left.”

[ A ]A screenshot from HUD.gov that shows a red warning about the 'Radical
Left' shutting down the government.via HUD.gov

Republicans have the majority, habibi. No one is buying that BS.

And if you’re wondering what this shutdown is really about — it’s
healthcare.

Democrats are fighting to renew subsidies that help millions of Americans
afford health insurance. If they expire, insurance costs will spike.

Republicans would rather let your healthcare costs skyrocket than risk
upsetting their billionaire donors and corporate backers.

And it doesn’t end there. When the government shuts down, thousands of
federal workers are furloughed. Families relying on food assistance see
benefits delayed. Veterans wait even longer for care. Our economy takes a
hit.

GOP dysfunction always ends with working people footing the bill.

It’s wrong, and it’s why I’m running for Senate. Because in the richest
country in the world, people should never have to worry that their
government will abandon them for the sake of political theater.

I will never turn my back on working people. I’ll fight to make sure the
government does what it’s supposed to do: Serve us, not the wannabe
oligarchs.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-ms-aes-20251001-1-ak?amount=10&refcode=em20251001-1033&refcode2=1037_251025_sdXxAq&akid=1037%2E251025%2EsdXxAq ]If you’re with me, please consider supporting our grassroots campaign
today:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-ms-aes-20251001-1-ak?amount=10&refcode=em20251001-1033&refcode2=1037_251025_sdXxAq&akid=1037%2E251025%2EsdXxAq ]Donate $10 ››

One more thing: If you or someone close to you is directly impacted by
this shutdown, please don’t feel obligated to give right now.

You can find shutdown resources from the National Active and Retired
Federal Employees Association by clicking [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/371?t=1004&akid=1037%2E251025%2EsdXxAq ]here.

In solidarity,

Abdul

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. To contribute via check, please address it to Abdul for U.S. Senate, PO Box 126, St. Clair Shores, MI 48080.

Receive Fewer Emails: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1005&akid=1037%2E251025%2EsdXxAq

name: Michael Bennet
subject: re: the government shutdown (please read)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
The government has officially shut down – and it's all because Donald Trump and Republicans wanted it to.
| | |
---
Friend – as of 12:00 a.m. ET today, the government has officially shut down. **And it's all because President Trump and Republicans refused to negotiate.**
When we pitched a sensible plan that'd give the GOP enough votes to keep the government open AND save health care for tens of millions of people – including 280,000 Coloradans – they shot it down.
When we asked them to come to the negotiation table, they refused and canceled bipartisan meetings.
And when we took our concerns to Trump directly, he lied about our efforts to lower health care costs for the American people.
**President Trump and the GOP could not care less if:**
* **15 million people** have to choose between accessing lifesaving health care and putting food on the table.

* More than **16 million children** go hungry.

* **Every last hospital in rural America** closes its doors.

* **Our troops go without pay. **(In fact, he sees it as a _golden opportunity_ to fire thousands more nonpartisan civil servants and remake the government in his image.)

**Well, I care – and if you do too, stand with me to protect Colorado from Trumps' cruelty and chaos and** _[chip in to ensure I have the resources to win the governor's race.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116406302/573318194/851209409?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk941-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDQxMjVjYS0xYjlmLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0ISDCM8lW1RX5V-4V4N2Ypp0SoCa8YiS-4PmIBAlLWU=)_
The sad truth is that President Trump cares about two things:
**1) Giving TRILLIONS in tax cuts to the wealthiest Americans **_– like himself_ ; and
**2) Taking a wrecking ball to our system of checks and balances to ensure he can amass more power.**
So for now, I'll be fighting in the Senate to get the government back up and running and stop your health care premiums from skyrocketing in the new year.
**As Colorado's next governor, I solemnly vow to do everything in my power to protect your access to health care, your ability to put food on the table and your essential state-run services from Trump's hostile agenda.** Because, unlike him, I'm running to be a leader who works for everyone who calls Colorado home – not just the wealthy few.
_[**But since I'm running a people-powered campaign, I can't bring home the fight to build a brighter future for every Coloradan without you. So please friend, will you rush $5, or the best gift you can make right now, to help me win this race?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116406303/573318195/851209409?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk941-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDQxMjVjYS0xYjlmLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0ISDCM8lW1RX5V-4V4N2Ypp0SoCa8YiS-4PmIBAlLWU=)_

clean_body: | | | | | Friend, I won't sugar coat it: this politico article should be a wake up call to Republicans. George Soros, the DNC, and the Liberal unions are bankrolling Gavin Newsom's Proposition 50 power grab to let Democrats redraw Californias congressional maps without a census and steal 5-7 GOP house seats. This is the most critical race in 2025, and it could end President Trumps agenda in Congress. The Democrats are flooding this race with over $100 million from Soros, the DNC, and the liberal unions to rig California’s maps and export their radical policies in California nationwide—open borders, high taxes, and woke nonsense. If Prop 50 passes on November 4th, Democrats will: Flip the house next year Impeach President Trump Reverse the Trump agenda Last year, over 6.3 million Californians voted for me in the senate race —the most ever for a Republican in our state’s history. Now, my You Gotta Believe PAC** is fighting to turn out those over 6.3 million Garvey voters to vote NO on Prop 50 and protect our independent redistricting commission. Your donation will fuel targeted ads, door-to-door outreach, and voter mobilization to rally my team of over 6.3 million supporters to the polls. | | | | | | | Together, we’ll mobilize a huge grassroots effort to stop Soros and Newsom and save Trump’s agenda.Lets play hardball, | | PAID FOR BY YOU GOTTA BELIEVE PAC P.O. name: The Turning Point USA Family
subject: Charlie always believed this day would come
body:
[unsubscribe](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xul=o5pvyewrzrxe8xiau9slbgewvudmthcmzcve1h612hkpbt831of1s1c7uagrrvfx18mo9kusccf0oxflg01ufdc34vrexzxkrk8ugxg&__stmp=t3h7io&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
---
Please read the message below from Turning Point USA.
* * *
| | | | [](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3h7io&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, Even now... it still doesn't feel real that we lost Charlie. His voice, his courage, his conviction — it shaped all of us. And his vision — **to build the most faithful and the most patriotic generation in American history** — is why Turning Point USA exists today. Friend, that's why we have an inspiring update for you... In just the first seven days since Charlie was taken from all of us, Turning Point USA has received more than 54,000 requests from students who want to start or join a chapter:
---
[](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3h7io&__onlt=h)
---
**God is so good.** ✝️🙏🕊️ To give you perspective, Friend... Coming into this school year, Turning Point USA had roughly 900+ college chapters and 1,200+ high school chapters. It took us years to build those chapters... over a decade in fact... _But now?_ These students who signed up? They weren't asked to... They weren't recruited... **They felt it was their time to stand up for this country and honor Charlie.** Because of the life he lived. The faith he had. The love he showed God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And his vision of a better America for us all.
---
[](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3h7io&__onlt=h)
---
He always believed this day would come. He used to talk about it all the time — how the momentum would shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in America. And now... _It's happening._ Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible. And more beautiful than we can even describe. **Again, Friend, God is so good.** Since we lost Charlie, we've also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie's voice changed lives... or your children's or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, _"What can I do?"_ As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request. And we're going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. **Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started — including:** ✅ Leadership materials
✅ Pocket Constitutions
✅ Chapter training tools
✅ American flags & patriotic gear Friend, I'm sure you'd believe it when we say it... _this won't be a small task._ But we're going to do it. Whatever it takes. **_For Charlie._** _And here's how YOU can help with this..._ **Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit — ready to deploy into a new Turning Point USA student chapter...** How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of new student chapters that are just getting started?
---
[ **1 KIT = $25**](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3h7io&__onlt=h)
---
[ **2 KITS = $50**](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3h7io&__onlt=h)
---
[ **10 KITS = $250**](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3h7io&__onlt=h)
---
[ **100 KITS = $2,500**](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3h7io&__onlt=h)
---
[ **1,000 KITS = $25,000**](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3h7io&__onlt=h)
---
[ **Sponsor Activism Kits**](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3h7io&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, if there was ever a more immediate way you could help make Charlie's vision a reality... **This is it****.**
---
[](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3h7io&__onlt=h)
---
Also... **Here's one more powerful thing you can do:** 📩 If you have a son, daughter, grandchild, niece, nephew — or any young person in your life — who wants to get involved... who wants to join or start a chapter... **Please send them this link:** **[TPUSAStudents.com/StartaChapter](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=edb8w7bac21j69wqjfscjyenfgechdfcc3y08p7kp4tiwan8c9fsm2rvxwb26c3ye13gchpsd3bvoi23o466d7jbt318aeprgmpolvh08ba0jzni8g8clpyyv9x7fff62mmkefbba&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3h7io&__onlt=h)** Friend, if you've already given... If you've already donated... If you've already been a voice of encouragement and strength in this painful week... If you've prayed, been praying, and continue to pray... **Thank you.** We can never say it enough. If you've read this far, we want you to know this... **You're the reason Charlie's mission and vision will grow for generations to come.** God is so good.
---
**For Charlie,** -The Turning Point USA Family **P.S.** Please know, Friend, if you can't afford to help right now, all we ask for are your prayers. Charlie would have wanted you to pray first — and if that's all you can give today, _we're grateful._ But if you're able to help... if you're overjoyed to hear that students are flocking to Charlie's message and mission... Your gift today helps sustain this wave of student inspiration and gets new student chapters off the ground floor... And ensures Charlie's vision is realized faster than we all thought possible. **Every $25 you give today helps us stock another activism kit ready to deploy to a new student chapter.**
---
[ **Sponsor an Activism Kit**
**Make Your Gift Here**](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3h7io&__onlt=h)
---
Thank you for your help and for your prayers, Friend. **God is so good.** 🙏
---

Phoenix, Arizona 85044

clean_body: Please read the message below from Turning Point USA. | | | | Friend, Even now... it still doesn't feel real that we lost Charlie. His voice, his courage, his conviction — it shaped all of us. And his vision — to build the most faithful and the most patriotic generation in American history — is why Turning Point USA exists today. Friend, that's why we have an inspiring update for you... In just the first seven days since Charlie was taken from all of us, Turning Point USA has received more than 54,000 requests from students who want to start or join a chapter: God is so good. ✝️🙏🕊️ To give you perspective, Friend... Coming into this school year, Turning Point USA had roughly 900+ college chapters and 1,200+ high school chapters. It took us years to build those chapters... over a decade in fact... But now? These students who signed up? They weren't asked to... They weren't recruited... They felt it was their time to stand up for this country and honor Charlie. Because of the life he lived. The faith he had. The love he showed God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And his vision of a better America for us all. He always believed this day would come. He used to talk about it all the time — how the momentum would shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in America. And now... It's happening. Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible. And more beautiful than we can even describe. Again, Friend, God is so good. Since we lost Charlie, we've also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie's voice changed lives... or your children's or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, "What can I do?" As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request. And we're going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started — including: ✅ Leadership materials ✅ Pocket Constitutions ✅ Chapter training tools ✅ American flags & patriotic gear Friend, I'm sure you'd believe it when we say it... this won't be a small task. But we're going to do it. Whatever it takes. For Charlie. And here's how YOU can help with this... Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit — ready to deploy into a new Turning Point USA student chapter... How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of new student chapters that are just getting started? Friend, if there was ever a more immediate way you could help make Charlie's vision a reality... This is it**. Also... Here's one more powerful thing you can do: 📩 If you have a son, daughter, grandchild, niece, nephew — or any young person in your life — who wants to get involved... who wants to join or start a chapter... Please send them this link: Friend, if you've already given... If you've already donated... If you've already been a voice of encouragement and strength in this painful week... If you've prayed, been praying, and continue to pray... Thank you. We can never say it enough. If you've read this far, we want you to know this... You're the reason Charlie's mission and vision will grow for generations to come. God is so good. For Charlie, -The Turning Point USA Family P.S. Please know, Friend, if you can't afford to help right now, all we ask for are your prayers. Charlie would have wanted you to pray first — and if that's all you can give today, we're grateful. But if you're able to help... if you're overjoyed to hear that students are flocking to Charlie's message and mission... Your gift today helps sustain this wave of student inspiration and gets new student chapters off the ground floor... And ensures Charlie's vision is realized faster than we all thought possible. Every $25 you give today helps us stock another activism kit ready to deploy to a new student chapter. Thank you for your help and for your prayers, Friend. God is so good. 🙏 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 / / AFFILIATE DISCLOSURE NOTICE: You should assume the sender of this message has a financial or affiliate relationship with the persons or companies referenced and may be compensated for purchases made via linked sites. name: Eugene DePasquale, Chairman, Pennsylvania Democratic Party
subject: Republicans have shut down the government
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pennsylvania Democratic Party
body:
| |
---
Hi Peter,

Donald Trump and Congressional Republicans just shut down the federal government, and Pennsylvanians will pay the price.

After voting to gut Medicaid and threaten our rural hospitals, Republicans are now forcing a shutdown that could **cause 500,000 Pennsylvanians on the ACA marketplace to see their health care premiums skyrocket.** Working families are being used as political hostages in Trump’s reckless power game.

This is the disastrous Republican agenda in action. Pennsylvania Republicans like Stacy Garrity and Doug Mastriano are marching in lockstep with Trump, selling out our families and making it even harder for people to get by.

Meanwhile, Democrats are doing everything possible to support Pennsylvanians through this manufactured crisis. Governor Shapiro has made it clear that the Commonwealth will be prepared, and his Administration is doing everything possible to deal with this shutdown and support the people of Pennsylvania.

Let’s send a clear message: Pennsylvania won’t stand for shutdowns and sellouts. We will continue fighting to defend health care, protect working families, and put people ahead of political games.

\- Eugene DePasquale

Chairman, Pennsylvania Democratic Party

name: Jim Jordan
subject: Doing what Obama NEVER could?
body:

I will fight every single day for our God-given rights | [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=73c077f9a4a344a281f58cb886840ee1&_e=ceA5CVqiJhZkKXua92Z1MpXpWvubkeQZf3j73epGlob7LBLf3PSJ6NLjgCmBNb7YmKz67CzErNFuqhJNaapl8y8B87c-b1xo8LDU-4JRjIqa3DI1Y_8qIufbgSCtGbgwQM688K253fNTgGRO47xLHQxvnnO24XOgeK1dzbi4K9bAGi-e5nnaanu6Nab9UzEDgEuJDLyvUkINRl01J54FXdQH0wRqhLm6bW3XDJe3fyHyoydE5EfmZq0gXoAOLB4RDkqiLVu54rVjpUetkQmnf2HVpIGM0t4bYgP9-rMsWL3Bk7DdGXv-OevuirGSVqJ-Z13mDwu7mHOfTaBlr1P3YIG5XNViFBp6lRTn4oK4Ti8_Sk1ePVOSWzxub382zqJPuQ3f0Ya3ETgqzjWlSfXJac__0rW3Br1R3WFLaaWMn11vAIN8hatRajVOfZ5r-u3vJTfxNqh4F398KSPYh_6T4nzh6t5UQjL8XJxsCJUS2tAklVM_5sPkTvEX5rDfL0fHakeu9fGlBOHokuEqb9HgW_3wMfhWEdFbeXCILjOYMpMWyqwg7__4CnDGr16Qir-FifHeR2rSf2Py2Qm_bqUKUxuHMp8MhOkmVJeplxb8r-SKyPAvz6ED2PCmjkglj5CwnldaY_0uGKcL06DEuj7YMnhoTOB6knyqI4Ow3aJeHm8%3D)
Texas is under assault, Fellow American.

From open-border politicians, radical leftists, and faceless foreign corporations that threaten our sovereignty, safety, and our way of life, **it's time to draw a line in the sand.**

That's why I am running for Attorney General - to protect our Texas way of life.

For so long, Texas was a conservative beacon. We have a proud tradition of rising to defend our homes, our freedoms, and our communities. Texas is anchored by liberty, freedom, and self-determination.

clean_body: I will fight every single day for our God-given rights | Texas is under assault, Fellow American. From open-border politicians, radical leftists, and faceless foreign corporations that threaten our sovereignty, safety, and our way of life, it's time to draw a line in the sand. That's why I am running for Attorney General - to protect our Texas way of life. For so long, Texas was a conservative beacon. We have a proud tradition of rising to defend our homes, our freedoms, and our communities. Texas is anchored by liberty, freedom, and self-determination. But radical Leftists moving here are threatening to turn Texas blue. Politicians like Colin Allred are flooding our state with Hollywood and Wall Street donors. They will do whatever they can to turn Texas into California or New York. I will fight every single day for our God-given rights, for our families, and for the future of Texas. name: The Turning Point USA Family
subject: Charlie always believed this day would come
body:
[Unsubscribe](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?xul=zkl8p045sz1uh88qpcsbcn9qhg1ggthd0ln6u673verf0stff069hhn6sg0498ufnu4osg6t8ii00q8mctsj02ji1gp8xswurizcwf89y8htm&__stmp=t3h834&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
---
Please read the message below from Turning Point USA.
* * *

| | | | [](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3h834&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, Even now... it still doesn't feel real that we lost Charlie. His voice, his courage, his conviction — it shaped all of us. And his vision — **to build the most faithful and the most patriotic generation in American history** — is why Turning Point USA exists today. Friend, that's why we have an inspiring update for you... In just the first seven days since Charlie was taken from all of us, Turning Point USA has received more than 54,000 requests from students who want to start or join a chapter:
---
[](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3h834&__onlt=h)
---
**God is so good.** ✝️🙏🕊️ To give you perspective, Friend... Coming into this school year, Turning Point USA had roughly 900+ college chapters and 1,200+ high school chapters. It took us years to build those chapters... over a decade in fact... _But now?_ These students who signed up? They weren't asked to... They weren't recruited... **They felt it was their time to stand up for this country and honor Charlie.** Because of the life he lived. The faith he had. The love he showed God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And his vision of a better America for us all.
---
[](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3h834&__onlt=h)
---
He always believed this day would come. He used to talk about it all the time — how the momentum would shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in America. And now... _It's happening._ Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible. And more beautiful than we can even describe. **Again, Friend, God is so good.** Since we lost Charlie, we've also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie's voice changed lives... or your children's or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, _"What can I do?"_ As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request. And we're going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. **Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started — including:** ✅ Leadership materials
✅ Pocket Constitutions
✅ Chapter training tools
✅ American flags & patriotic gear Friend, I'm sure you'd believe it when we say it... _this won't be a small task._ But we're going to do it. Whatever it takes. **_For Charlie._** _And here's how YOU can help with this..._ **Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit — ready to deploy into a new Turning Point USA student chapter...** How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of new student chapters that are just getting started?
---
[ **1 KIT = $25**](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3h834&__onlt=h)
---
[ **2 KITS = $50**](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3h834&__onlt=h)
---
[ **10 KITS = $250**](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3h834&__onlt=h)
---
[ **100 KITS = $2,500**](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3h834&__onlt=h)
---
[ **1,000 KITS = $25,000**](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3h834&__onlt=h)
---
[ **Sponsor Activism Kits**](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3h834&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, if there was ever a more immediate way you could help make Charlie's vision a reality... **This is it****.**
---
[](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3h834&__onlt=h)
---
Also... **Here's one more powerful thing you can do:** 📩 If you have a son, daughter, grandchild, niece, nephew — or any young person in your life — who wants to get involved... who wants to join or start a chapter... **Please send them this link:** **[TPUSAStudents.com/StartaChapter](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?xtl=1wduekwl7wti0brmwwdbulgi7unm64b1afzkffnqz0idyxbgx65m1zvqxml6vyz3nza7v79g1b77k007c90126z2b9hdmnhgrgcpwcax7gb4stztl4irxrifvv1ubszekhut62fwpq5krq56&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3h834&__onlt=h)** Friend, if you've already given... If you've already donated... If you've already been a voice of encouragement and strength in this painful week... If you've prayed, been praying, and continue to pray... **Thank you.** We can never say it enough. If you've read this far, we want you to know this... **You're the reason Charlie's mission and vision will grow for generations to come.** God is so good.
---
**For Charlie,** -The Turning Point USA Family **P.S.** Please know, Friend, if you can't afford to help right now, all we ask for are your prayers. Charlie would have wanted you to pray first — and if that's all you can give today, _we're grateful._ But if you're able to help... if you're overjoyed to hear that students are flocking to Charlie's message and mission... Your gift today helps sustain this wave of student inspiration and gets new student chapters off the ground floor... And ensures Charlie's vision is realized faster than we all thought possible. **Every $25 you give today helps us stock another activism kit ready to deploy to a new student chapter.**
---
[ **Sponsor an Activism Kit**
**Make Your Gift Here**](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3h834&__onlt=h)
---
Thank you for your help and for your prayers, Friend. **God is so good.** 🙏
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

The faith he had. The love he showed God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And his vision of a better America for us all. He always believed this day would come. He used to talk about it all the time — how the momentum would shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in America. And now... It's happening. Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible. And more beautiful than we can even describe. Again, Friend, God is so good. Since we lost Charlie, we've also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie's voice changed lives... or your children's or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, "What can I do?" As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request. And we're going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started — including: ✅ Leadership materials ✅ Pocket Constitutions ✅ Chapter training tools ✅ American flags & patriotic gear Friend, I'm sure you'd believe it when we say it... this won't be a small task. But we're going to do it. Whatever it takes. For Charlie. And here's how YOU can help with this... Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit — ready to deploy into a new Turning Point USA student chapter... How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of new student chapters that are just getting started? Friend, if there was ever a more immediate way you could help make Charlie's vision a reality... This is it**. Also... Here's one more powerful thing you can do: 📩 If you have a son, daughter, grandchild, niece, nephew — or any young person in your life — who wants to get involved... who wants to join or start a chapter... Please send them this link: Friend, if you've already given... If you've already donated... If you've already been a voice of encouragement and strength in this painful week... If you've prayed, been praying, and continue to pray... Thank you. We can never say it enough. If you've read this far, we want you to know this... You're the reason Charlie's mission and vision will grow for generations to come. God is so good. For Charlie, -The Turning Point USA Family P.S. Please know, Friend, if you can't afford to help right now, all we ask for are your prayers. Charlie would have wanted you to pray first — and if that's all you can give today, we're grateful. But if you're able to help... if you're overjoyed to hear that students are flocking to Charlie's message and mission... Your gift today helps sustain this wave of student inspiration and gets new student chapters off the ground floor... And ensures Charlie's vision is realized faster than we all thought possible. Every $25 you give today helps us stock another activism kit ready to deploy to a new student chapter. Thank you for your help and for your prayers, Friend. God is so good. 🙏 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 / / NOTICE OF AFFILIATE CONNECTION: Be aware that the sender of this email may have a business or affiliate relationship with the parties mentioned and could earn commissions from purchases made through linked sites. name: The Turning Point USA Family
subject: God is moving
body:
[unsubscribe](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xul=1nmc5a54x67zfmd5fi2bt1ih0jlmjpsfbwiv9hc02qkv20fovy0cxt9gpwvl2drtdpva2dw6sg1lla7957vp7spnldu2jp7e1bljlbjtsadp0bl5g998&__stmp=t3h84p&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
---
Please read the message below from Turning Point USA.

Steve Thompson, Editor

* * *

| | | | [](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3h84p&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, Even now... it still doesn't feel real that we lost Charlie. His voice, his courage, his conviction — it shaped all of us. And his vision — **to build the most faithful and the most patriotic generation in American history** — is why Turning Point USA exists today. Friend, that's why we have an inspiring update for you... In just the first seven days since Charlie was taken from all of us, Turning Point USA has received more than 54,000 requests from students who want to start or join a chapter:
---
[](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3h84p&__onlt=h)
---
**God is so good.** ✝️🙏🕊️ To give you perspective, Friend... Coming into this school year, Turning Point USA had roughly 900+ college chapters and 1,200+ high school chapters. It took us years to build those chapters... over a decade in fact... _But now?_ These students who signed up? They weren't asked to... They weren't recruited... **They felt it was their time to stand up for this country and honor Charlie.** Because of the life he lived. The faith he had. The love he showed God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And his vision of a better America for us all.
---
[](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3h84p&__onlt=h)
---
He always believed this day would come. He used to talk about it all the time — how the momentum would shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in America. And now... _It's happening._ Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible. And more beautiful than we can even describe. **Again, Friend, God is so good.** Since we lost Charlie, we've also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie's voice changed lives... or your children's or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, _"What can I do?"_ As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request. And we're going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. **Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started — including:** ✅ Leadership materials
✅ Pocket Constitutions
✅ Chapter training tools
✅ American flags & patriotic gear Friend, I'm sure you'd believe it when we say it... _this won't be a small task._ But we're going to do it. Whatever it takes. **_For Charlie._** _And here's how YOU can help with this..._ **Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit — ready to deploy into a new Turning Point USA student chapter...** How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of new student chapters that are just getting started?
---
[ **1 KIT = $25**](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3h84p&__onlt=h)
---
[ **2 KITS = $50**](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3h84p&__onlt=h)
---
[ **10 KITS = $250**](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3h84p&__onlt=h)
---
[ **100 KITS = $2,500**](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3h84p&__onlt=h)
---
[ **1,000 KITS = $25,000**](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3h84p&__onlt=h)
---
[ **Sponsor Activism Kits**](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3h84p&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, if there was ever a more immediate way you could help make Charlie's vision a reality... **This is it****.**
---
[](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3h84p&__onlt=h)
---
Also... **Here's one more powerful thing you can do:** 📩 If you have a son, daughter, grandchild, niece, nephew — or any young person in your life — who wants to get involved... who wants to join or start a chapter... **Please send them this link:** **[TPUSAStudents.com/StartaChapter](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=34017q10ity9duygsnz6ax9e3x0ehqpeuyrej0b6tvfpaiudu54rm3fhtuox2r446pozxflmt5svhzgidk31o724avp0uah438mbkza8nn6xgp435olnz6o6v70tsychg7559re45p0fpr9en1e31t&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3h84p&__onlt=h)** Friend, if you've already given... If you've already donated... If you've already been a voice of encouragement and strength in this painful week... If you've prayed, been praying, and continue to pray... **Thank you.** We can never say it enough. If you've read this far, we want you to know this... **You're the reason Charlie's mission and vision will grow for generations to come.** God is so good.
---
**For Charlie,** -The Turning Point USA Family **P.S.** Please know, Friend, if you can't afford to help right now, all we ask for are your prayers. Charlie would have wanted you to pray first — and if that's all you can give today, _we're grateful._ But if you're able to help... if you're overjoyed to hear that students are flocking to Charlie's message and mission... Your gift today helps sustain this wave of student inspiration and gets new student chapters off the ground floor... And ensures Charlie's vision is realized faster than we all thought possible. **Every $25 you give today helps us stock another activism kit ready to deploy to a new student chapter.**
---
[ **Sponsor an Activism Kit**
**Make Your Gift Here**](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3h84p&__onlt=h)
---
Thank you for your help and for your prayers, Friend. **God is so good.** 🙏
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

[Privacy Policy](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=o40io4oxrrl5umqg0et53frjpc8k2l2bbrut3n2uqddm0gizesak75is8m0nvsukkx4b2w093fnb4dy9i2p9sz4b6kuf0l8gsu79vl6wsu11g2t6wuzwhwy8vw3qyiu7ylxv4q8takx8tr84ct9jj0br379x4ciwf5&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3h84p&__onlt=h) / [Advertise with us](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=64luld8ccj8xc6kutjxlbg5yf6p7f0n096ezcuinhph7qaduocm1q4yne46odbo9x8fkshia070dw7a3urdwkxzn2n1a7apg9gys4ciz7myyysjotp8x3ebd9ibgw28jd8oyacx2e7ljjug9cqysl0vrhopp&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3h84p&__onlt=h)
