name: Squad Victory Fund
subject: Republicans chose politics over people
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20251001-1552-foote&t=1001&akid=1552%2E342411%2Ehhbf2k ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

The government has shut down. Millions of Americans are at risk — and the
reason is clear: Republicans chose politics over people.

Instead of working to lower costs, protect healthcare, and find solutions,
Republicans are trying to let Affordable Care Act subsidies expire at the
end of the year — a move that could drive up healthcare costs for millions
of Americans who rely on this coverage.

This adds to the cuts Trump and the GOP pushed through this summer in
their so-called ‘One Big Beautiful Bill,’ which gutted $1 trillion from
Medicaid, Medicare, SNAP, and other federal health programs.

When their plan started to fall apart, Republicans chose to double down
rather than work for Americans.

This isn’t just a political standoff — it’s real people losing health
coverage, paychecks, and stability. Families can’t wait. Federal workers
can’t wait. People relying on healthcare cannot wait while Republicans
play games with their lives and livelihoods.

The Squad is fighting back. We’re standing up for the people, not the
powerful. We’re working to protect healthcare, paychecks, and fundamental
freedoms. And we need your help.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20251001-movement.vk0ldw&refcode=em20251001-1552&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1552%2E342411%2Ehhbf2k ]We can’t let this moment pass without action. Chip in $3
to help the Squad keep standing up to Republicans’ attacks and defending
the people, not the powerful.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20251001-movement.vk0ldw&refcode=em20251001-1552&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1552%2E342411%2Ehhbf2k ]Contribute ››

In solidarity,

The Squad Victory Fund

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1552%2E342411%2Ehhbf2k

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated equally among: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

name: GOTV PAC
subject: Shut down Trump!

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09042025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09042025&amount=25]
Peter ,
Donald Trump just shut down the government, and now, he’s using it as a weapon.
His administration just announced that billions of dollars in federal funding for energy and infrastructure projects are being pulled from states that voted for Kamala Harris. Not a dime touched from Florida or Texas. Only Harris states. Only blue states.
He’s literally trying to punish the states that voted against him.
But while Trump plays games with people’s livelihoods, we’re staying focused on what really matters: turning out voters in the three states on the ballot this November – New Jersey, Pennsylvania, and Virginia. If Democrats win there, we’ll set the stage to take back the House in 2026 – and make Trump really, really mad.
But GOP super PACs are already flooding these states with money and disinformation. To fight back, we need every grassroots donor standing with us. Can you chip in $20 today to help us fund voter turnout in NJ, PA, and VA? Together, we can show Trump and his allies that their attacks only make us stronger: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email10012025]

Learn more at: gotv.vote [https://www.gotv.vote/]

name: The Turning Point USA Family
subject: God is so good
body:
[unsubscribe](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xul=65a6x69jow166jo1opkmvmi0qv37j6w63kncl8efuyi67any0do3s1r8cepc7maccuo9vye8h7zkaq5rl6zwt8pwxdccqcspb&__stmp=t3h94w&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
---
Please read the message below from Turning Point USA.
* * *
| | | | [](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3h94w&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, Even now... it still doesn't feel real that we lost Charlie. His voice, his courage, his conviction — it shaped all of us. And his vision — **to build the most faithful and the most patriotic generation in American history** — is why Turning Point USA exists today. Friend, that's why we have an inspiring update for you... In just the first seven days since Charlie was taken from all of us, Turning Point USA has received more than 54,000 requests from students who want to start or join a chapter:
---
[](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3h94w&__onlt=h)
---
**God is so good.** ✝️🙏🕊️ To give you perspective, Friend... Coming into this school year, Turning Point USA had roughly 900+ college chapters and 1,200+ high school chapters. It took us years to build those chapters... over a decade in fact... _But now?_ These students who signed up? They weren't asked to... They weren't recruited... **They felt it was their time to stand up for this country and honor Charlie.** Because of the life he lived. The faith he had. The love he showed God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And his vision of a better America for us all.
---
[](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3h94w&__onlt=h)
---
He always believed this day would come. He used to talk about it all the time — how the momentum would shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in America. And now... _It's happening._ Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible. And more beautiful than we can even describe. **Again, Friend, God is so good.** Since we lost Charlie, we've also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie's voice changed lives... or your children's or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, _"What can I do?"_ As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request. And we're going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. **Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started — including:** ✅ Leadership materials
✅ Pocket Constitutions
✅ Chapter training tools
✅ American flags & patriotic gear Friend, I'm sure you'd believe it when we say it... _this won't be a small task._ But we're going to do it. Whatever it takes. **_For Charlie._** _And here's how YOU can help with this..._ **Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit — ready to deploy into a new Turning Point USA student chapter...** How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of new student chapters that are just getting started?
---
[ **1 KIT = $25**](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3h94w&__onlt=h)
---
[ **2 KITS = $50**](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3h94w&__onlt=h)
---
[ **10 KITS = $250**](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3h94w&__onlt=h)
---
[ **100 KITS = $2,500**](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3h94w&__onlt=h)
---
[ **1,000 KITS = $25,000**](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3h94w&__onlt=h)
---
[ **Sponsor Activism Kits**](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3h94w&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, if there was ever a more immediate way you could help make Charlie's vision a reality... **This is it****.**
---
[](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3h94w&__onlt=h)
---
Also... **Here's one more powerful thing you can do:** 📩 If you have a son, daughter, grandchild, niece, nephew — or any young person in your life — who wants to get involved... who wants to join or start a chapter... **Please send them this link:** **[TPUSAStudents.com/StartaChapter](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=qwikcdl711si3jaz6ok7lmoz9ur1g5ps5hvs0wh1zvhot2kib4by9arb7zdvgcjuokv8s3svqgbmfh3mzrazrga08erhddv133bjju6jex8wksd9q8zz8p404sh4o65wl1l&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3h94w&__onlt=h)** Friend, if you've already given... If you've already donated... If you've already been a voice of encouragement and strength in this painful week... If you've prayed, been praying, and continue to pray... **Thank you.** We can never say it enough. If you've read this far, we want you to know this... **You're the reason Charlie's mission and vision will grow for generations to come.** God is so good.
---
**For Charlie,** -The Turning Point USA Family **P.S.** Please know, Friend, if you can't afford to help right now, all we ask for are your prayers. Charlie would have wanted you to pray first — and if that's all you can give today, _we're grateful._ But if you're able to help... if you're overjoyed to hear that students are flocking to Charlie's message and mission... Your gift today helps sustain this wave of student inspiration and gets new student chapters off the ground floor... And ensures Charlie's vision is realized faster than we all thought possible. **Every $25 you give today helps us stock another activism kit ready to deploy to a new student chapter.**
---
[ **Sponsor an Activism Kit**
**Make Your Gift Here**](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3h94w&__onlt=h)
---
Thank you for your help and for your prayers, Friend. **God is so good.** 🙏
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

[Unsubscribe](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xul=65a6x69jow166jo1opkmvmi0qv37j6w63kncl8efuyi67any0do3s1r8cepc7maccuo9vye8h7zkaq5rl6zwt8pwxdccqcspb&__stmp=t3h94w&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh) / [Privacy Policy](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=11qfvsq9v6vlvtjb8oh39a2p4r3a80oy6hb0ikmbxp1h2541t23key025fhhp5q89bkpjr8k6uk1hjv0meaodjyytatnz747k2cxhwtoauroxk5yc02q0t3nsv1w&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3h94w&__onlt=h) / [Contact us](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=ukxuchlat4j90cixm89s63v5gj7k6v3g3rmh0wycqn1vqfkgwe0nfvsuafyg6x1nel02wu8oxhc0sbdlgfvduntlzcj7nzd28jul1osc38kn4prz9759c&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3h94w&__onlt=h)

### **[Trump, Hegseth& The War On Reality](https://substack.com/redirect/019896c4-6ef7-4ebe-a11a-d33c7e49031f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
My friends,
Thank you as always for tuning into the Wednesday Cliff's Edge live stream!
We braved some drilling in the hall outside my office, Streamyard glitches galore and the emotional agita of again discussing, traitor Trump and punch-drunk Pete Hegseth.
Hegseth, the semi-self aware rash no woman wanted to encounter in college. The Christian Nationalist who can't spell Pontius Pilate.
The faux-bravado-bro plucked from important duty as backup Fox & Friends host--on weekends!--to run the Pentagon.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/019896c4-6ef7-4ebe-a11a-d33c7e49031f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
And then we have Trump. And here, aftter seeing his speech to the flag officers, I'll just poach from myself about a month ago:
> A bloated, stumbling, smash-&-grab, cash-licking cadaver who was born on 3rd base--to spend his entire life finding ways to get thrown out at 2nd--taking out his vast wilderness of dumbf*kery on us all.
This was [what we had to contend with today on ](https://substack.com/redirect/019896c4-6ef7-4ebe-a11a-d33c7e49031f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[Cliff's Edge](https://substack.com/redirect/019896c4-6ef7-4ebe-a11a-d33c7e49031f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_.
David Schuster and I sat down with Navy veteran and brilliant writer and storyteller Melissa Corrigan, and let me tell you, _THIS_ was one helluva conversation.
Melissa has lived it. Service on the USS Eisenhower. Standing up as **one of the first full waves of women aboard ships** , fighting elbow-to-rib through the misogyny of the early 2000s Navy culture.
She knows what it means to serve honorably--[and what it looks like when politicians betray that service](https://substack.com/redirect/1cc7a955-dc03-4fc4-b4d6-ce8b521fbafe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
### [Hegseth & Trump's Fantasy Military](https://substack.com/redirect/019896c4-6ef7-4ebe-a11a-d33c7e49031f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/019896c4-6ef7-4ebe-a11a-d33c7e49031f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.EdhjluOJc_bsTqoQqJwMia3LXEa1iBnFs7vN7aC3GuQ?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=175053600)
We dug into Pete Hegseth's speech--Trump at his side--where he waxed nostalgic about "returning" the military to some imagined golden age (psst, this is a telltale signs of fascism, wanting to return to a glorious age that never even existed).
Except Hegseth's chosen year was 1990. That's where he wanted to return. Hmm, why that date?
Well, if you remember 1990, you may recall that was the year of _The_ _Tailhook scandal_ : 83 women and 7 men sexually assaulted by naval aviators in Vegas.
**That 's the year Hegseth wants back.**
You think that's an accident? Or is he signaling exactly who he wants protected and promoted?
And Trump? The draft dodger who compared dead soldiers to "suckers and losers" delivered his usual rambling nonsense--this time even finding time to complain about the thickness of the White House stationery.
Just the whiniest little pr*k, bar none.
Meanwhile, a room full of flag officers gave him nothing. No applause. No validation. Just silence.
And you could see it on his face--he couldn't comprehend the concept that united the military faces in the room, "honor,"
Because the man has never had a relationship with the concept.
### [Intolerable Cruelty](https://substack.com/redirect/019896c4-6ef7-4ebe-a11a-d33c7e49031f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Melissa pointed out something crucial: Hegseth isn't just fantasizing.
He's pushing directives--like erasing "adverse information reports" from officers' records after ten years. Translation: He wants to wipe clean substantiated findings of misconduct, abuse, even sexual assault.
Not reform, not readiness--just protection for predators.
That's projection, pure and simple, and perhaps self-protection.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.EdhjluOJc_bsTqoQqJwMia3LXEa1iBnFs7vN7aC3GuQ?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=175053600)
The military leaders who were forced to attend knew it. They sat stone-faced, refusing to play his reality-TV clap track.
They know what we know: diversity _is_ strength. Without women, Black soldiers, Latino soldiers--there is no American military.
Period.
And here's the danger: the speeches were the circus. The real threat is what happens after the cameras shut off. Ten doddering directives have already pushed down the chain.
Courts--military and civilian--will be forced to test them. And we **must** **all** be asking: which officers will honor their oath, and who will buckle to Trump and Hegseth's lawless vision of the American military?
To Trump's ridiculous claim [he'll be sending these military leaders with their troops into cities across the country](https://substack.com/redirect/b9914510-9b82-46a3-9e55-fd3f4470a4cd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--to stop crime that isn't happening with soldiers who aren't trained to do it in violation of the U.S.Constitution.
### [Why It Matters](https://substack.com/redirect/019896c4-6ef7-4ebe-a11a-d33c7e49031f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
This is bigger than speeches. It's about whether our armed forces remain apolitical, professional, and constitutional--[or whether they become a mercenary force](https://substack.com/redirect/978286ca-65ff-4d84-b16d-e1b0f5b83cfa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that bends to the will of a president bone-spur McGee and his B-list Fox lackey.
In other words, authoritarian shock troops.
Yet, If the looks on their faces were any indication, they haven't and won't sign up for the Trump/Hegseth Circle-K-parking-lot version of how our military should behave.
Meanwhile, Melissa reminded us: _enlisted soldiers go to prison for pocketing a thumb drive with classified material for ten minutes_.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/019896c4-6ef7-4ebe-a11a-d33c7e49031f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Hegseth?
He puts classified bombing plans on Signal, includes a reporter on the chain and gets promoted.
That double standard will destroy morale. It will break the force. It's exactly what Trump wants.
**[Bottom Line](https://substack.com/redirect/019896c4-6ef7-4ebe-a11a-d33c7e49031f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) :** Trump and Hegseth are trying to drag our military back into the dark ages of sexism, cruelty, and lawlessness. But the silence of those generals yesterday sent a message: they serve the Constitution, not a weak, wannabe dictator.
**It 's on us to stand with them--and to fight like hell to keep it that way.**
* * *

She knows what it means to serve honorably--. | | ---|---|--- We dug into Pete Hegseth's speech--Trump at his side--where he waxed nostalgic about "returning" the military to some imagined golden age (psst, this is a telltale signs of fascism, wanting to return to a glorious age that never even existed). Except Hegseth's chosen year was 1990. That's where he wanted to return. Hmm, why that date? Well, if you remember 1990, you may recall that was the year of The Tailhook scandal : 83 women and 7 men sexually assaulted by naval aviators in Vegas. That 's the year Hegseth wants back. You think that's an accident? Or is he signaling exactly who he wants protected and promoted? And Trump? The draft dodger who compared dead soldiers to "suckers and losers" delivered his usual rambling nonsense--this time even finding time to complain about the thickness of the White House stationery. Just the whiniest little prk, bar none. Meanwhile, a room full of flag officers gave him nothing. No applause. No validation. Just silence. And you could see it on his face--he couldn't comprehend the concept that united the military faces in the room, "honor," Because the man has never had a relationship with the concept. Melissa pointed out something crucial: Hegseth isn't just fantasizing. He's pushing directives--like erasing "adverse information reports" from officers' records after ten years. Translation: He wants to wipe clean substantiated findings of misconduct, abuse, even sexual assault. Not reform, not readiness--just protection for predators. That's projection, pure and simple, and perhaps self-protection. The military leaders who were forced to attend knew it. They sat stone-faced, refusing to play his reality-TV clap track. They know what we know: diversity is strength. Without women, Black soldiers, Latino soldiers--there is no American military. Period. And here's the danger: the speeches were the circus. The real threat is what happens after the cameras shut off. Ten doddering directives have already pushed down the chain. Courts--military and civilian--will be forced to test them. And we must all be asking: which officers will honor their oath, and who will buckle to Trump and Hegseth's lawless vision of the American military? To Trump's ridiculous claim stop crime that isn't happening with soldiers who aren't trained to do it in violation of the U.S.Constitution. This is bigger than speeches. It's about whether our armed forces remain apolitical, professional, and constitutional-- that bends to the will of a president bone-spur McGee and his B-list Fox lackey. In other words, authoritarian shock troops. Yet, If the looks on their faces were any indication, they haven't and won't sign up for the Trump/Hegseth Circle-K-parking-lot version of how our military should behave. Meanwhile, Melissa reminded us: enlisted soldiers go to prison for pocketing a thumb drive with classified material for ten minutes. | | ---|---|--- Hegseth? He puts classified bombing plans on Signal, includes a reporter on the chain and gets promoted. That double standard will destroy morale. It will break the force. It's exactly what Trump wants. : Trump and Hegseth are trying to drag our military back into the dark ages of sexism, cruelty, and lawlessness. But the silence of those generals yesterday sent a message: they serve the Constitution, not a weak, wannabe dictator. It 's on us to stand with them--and to fight like hell to keep it that way.
